name.zh: 开放重定向路径解析混淆

description.zh: 使用点号、控制字符、编码斜杠与反斜杠测试重定向目标在代理、框架和浏览器之间是否发生不一致的 URL 规范化。
description.en: Tests whether dots, control characters, encoded slashes, and backslashes produce inconsistent redirect-target normalization across proxies, frameworks, and browsers.

subCategory.zh: 路径规范化与 URL 解析差异
subCategory.en: Path Normalization and URL Parser Differentials

prerequisites.zh: 应用存在接收跳转目标或回跳路径的参数
prerequisites.en: The application accepts a redirect destination or return path.

prerequisites.zh: 可在授权环境观察最终 Location 与浏览器落点
prerequisites.en: The final Location value and browser destination can be observed in an authorized environment.

title.zh: 路径解析差异样例

description.zh: 逐条替换授权测试参数中的跳转目标，比较入口校验值、响应 Location 和浏览器最终地址；不要把这些行拼成单个 URL。
description.en: Substitute each line into the authorized redirect parameter and compare validation input, response Location, and the browser's final URL; do not concatenate the lines.

overview.zh: 这组输入用于检查重定向链各层对路径的理解是否一致。安全结论必须基于最终跳转到非允许来源，而不是仅看到 3xx、字符串中出现域名，或某一层返回解析错误。
overview.en: These inputs check whether every layer in a redirect chain interprets a path consistently. A finding requires a final navigation to a disallowed origin, not merely a 3xx response, a hostname-like string, or a parser error at one layer.

vulnerability.zh: 根因通常是入口只按字符串前缀或单次解码校验，而下游代理、框架或浏览器再次解码并执行不同的斜杠、反斜杠和控制字符规范化。校验对象与实际导航对象不相同，就可能绕过同源或允许列表限制。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is often prefix or single-decode validation followed by a proxy, framework, or browser that decodes again and normalizes slashes, backslashes, or control characters differently. The validated string then differs from the URL actually navigated.

exploitation.zh: 先用站内相对路径建立正常基线，再逐条提交样例并记录每一跳的状态码、Location 原文、代理重写和浏览器最终 origin。只有输入通过应用校验且最终到达非允许 origin 才算有效；被拒绝、停留本站或仅规范化为普通路径均为阴性。
exploitation.en: Start with an internal relative path, then submit each sample separately and record every status, raw Location header, proxy rewrite, and final browser origin. Count only cases that pass validation and land on a disallowed origin; rejection, same-origin navigation, or normalization to a normal path is negative.

mitigation.zh: 优先只接受服务端映射的路由标识或站内相对路径。必须支持绝对 URL 时，使用单一标准解析器完成解码与规范化后，按 scheme、规范化 host 和固定端口允许列表校验，并禁止用户信息段、控制字符和协议相对目标。
mitigation.en: Prefer server-mapped route identifiers or same-site relative paths. If absolute URLs are required, decode and canonicalize once with one standards-based parser, validate scheme, canonical host, and port against an allowlist, and reject user-info, control characters, and scheme-relative targets.

title.zh: 定位跳转输入

description.zh: 确认参数进入服务端重定向逻辑，并记录合法站内路径经过各层后的完整跳转基线。
description.en: Confirm that the parameter reaches server-side redirect logic and record the full multi-layer baseline for a valid internal path.

title.zh: 逐条重放解析样例

description.zh: 分别提交点号、控制字符及编码分隔符样例，保留原始请求与每一跳的 Location。
description.en: Submit dot, control-character, and encoded-separator samples separately while preserving the raw request and each Location header.

title.zh: 关联最终导航来源

description.zh: 比较应用校验值、代理重写值和浏览器最终 origin，排除仅有字符串回显或错误页的假阳性。
description.en: Compare application validation, proxy rewrites, and the browser's final origin, excluding reflection and error-page false positives.

title.zh: 统一规范化并回归

description.zh: 改为规范化后允许列表校验，并同时重放合法站内路径与全部差异样例确认边界稳定。
description.en: Adopt post-normalization allowlist validation, then replay valid internal paths and all differential samples to prove a stable boundary.

analysis.zh: 有效证据包括服务端接受、下游发生二次解释、最终 origin 越界三部分；任何单独一部分都不足以确认开放重定向。
analysis.en: Valid evidence combines server acceptance, downstream reinterpretation, and a final origin outside policy; no single element proves an open redirect.

opsecTips.zh: 使用自有无内容测试域并限制请求次数，避免把授权环境用户带到第三方站点。
opsecTips.en: Use a controlled empty test domain and limit requests so authorized-environment users are never sent to third-party sites.

opsecTips.zh: 保存完整重定向链而不是只截取最终页面，便于区分应用、CDN 和浏览器的处理责任。
opsecTips.en: Preserve the complete redirect chain rather than only the final page so application, CDN, and browser behavior remain distinguishable.

name.zh: 路径扩展名内容协商绕过

description.zh: 测试框架是否根据 URL 后缀重新选择 JSON 等响应格式，从而绕过只覆盖原始路径或 HTML 响应的访问控制与过滤规则。
description.en: Tests whether a framework reselects JSON or another representation from a URL suffix, bypassing controls that cover only the original route or HTML representation.

prerequisites.zh: 目标框架支持路径扩展名或后缀式内容协商
prerequisites.en: The target framework supports path-extension or suffix-based content negotiation.

prerequisites.zh: 可用低权限账号比较同一资源的不同表示
prerequisites.en: A low-privilege account can compare multiple representations of the same resource.

title.zh: JSON 后缀变体

description.zh: 将后缀附加到已知路由并分别请求，比较路由匹配、Content-Type、响应字段和授权结果。
description.en: Append each suffix to a known route and compare route matching, Content-Type, response fields, and authorization results.

overview.zh: 路径后缀有时会在路由匹配后触发第二次内容协商，使同一对象通过 JSON、XML 或下载表示返回。测试目标是确认不同表示是否执行同一套认证、对象授权和字段裁剪，而不是把任何 404 差异当作绕过。
overview.en: A path suffix can trigger a second content-negotiation step after routing, exposing the same object as JSON, XML, or a download. The test verifies equal authentication, object authorization, and field filtering across representations; a different 404 alone is not a bypass.

vulnerability.zh: 风险来自路由层、内容协商层和安全中间件使用了不同的规范化路径。若授权策略只绑定无后缀路由，而处理器仍接受后缀变体，低权限请求可能进入未覆盖的序列化分支并获得额外字段。
vulnerability.en: Risk arises when routing, content negotiation, and security middleware use different canonical paths. If policy covers only the suffix-free route while the handler accepts a variant, a low-privilege request can reach an unprotected serializer or receive extra fields.

exploitation.zh: 选择一个已知受保护对象，先请求规范路径并保存状态码、Content-Type 和字段集合，再逐条请求后缀变体。只有变体返回原本无权访问的对象或敏感字段才成立；格式变化、统一拒绝或普通错误不构成越权。
exploitation.en: Choose a known protected object and save the canonical response status, Content-Type, and fields, then request each suffix variant. A finding requires access to an otherwise forbidden object or sensitive field; format changes, consistent denial, or ordinary errors are not authorization bypasses.

mitigation.zh: 在安全中间件之前完成一次路径规范化，并让所有表示共享同一对象级授权函数。关闭不需要的路径扩展名协商，显式声明可接受媒体类型，对每种序列化表示执行相同字段过滤和自动化回归。
mitigation.en: Canonicalize once before security middleware and make every representation call the same object-level authorization function. Disable unnecessary path-extension negotiation, explicitly declare accepted media types, and apply identical field filtering and regression tests to every serializer.

title.zh: 选取受保护资源基线

description.zh: 以低权限主体请求规范路径，记录授权结果、媒体类型和可见字段。
description.en: Request the canonical path as a low-privilege principal and record authorization, media type, and visible fields.

title.zh: 请求后缀表示

description.zh: 逐条附加 JSON 后缀并保持身份、对象 ID 和其他参数不变，捕获完整响应。
description.en: Append each JSON suffix while keeping identity, object ID, and all other parameters fixed, and capture the full response.

title.zh: 比较对象与字段授权

description.zh: 确认差异是否确实暴露禁止对象或字段，排除缓存、错误格式和公开元数据。
description.en: Determine whether the difference exposes a forbidden object or field, excluding caching, error formats, and public metadata.

title.zh: 统一安全策略并复测

description.zh: 让全部表示复用同一授权与字段裁剪，再重放规范路径和后缀路径确认结果一致。
description.en: Route all representations through one authorization and field-filtering path, then replay canonical and suffix URLs to confirm parity.

analysis.zh: 应按主体、对象、操作和字段四个维度做差异比较；仅有 Content-Type 或错误页变化属于内容协商现象，不等于安全边界突破。
analysis.en: Compare principal, object, action, and field visibility. A Content-Type or error-page change is content negotiation, not proof of a security-boundary violation.

opsecTips.zh: 只读取专用测试对象，避免因序列化差异批量导出生产数据。
opsecTips.en: Use a dedicated test object and avoid bulk retrieval of production data through serializer differences.

opsecTips.zh: 固定缓存控制头并记录命中信息，避免把 CDN 中的旧表示误认为授权绕过。
opsecTips.en: Hold cache-control inputs constant and record cache hits so stale CDN representations are not mistaken for authorization bypass.

name.zh: Spring Boot Actuator 端点暴露

description.zh: 枚举 Spring Boot Actuator 的管理端点，验证健康、配置、映射、日志和诊断数据是否被错误地公开或授予低权限主体。
description.en: Enumerates Spring Boot Actuator management endpoints to verify whether health, configuration, mappings, logs, or diagnostic data are exposed publicly or to low-privilege users.

prerequisites.zh: 目标可能运行 Spring Boot 并启用 Actuator
prerequisites.en: The target may run Spring Boot with Actuator enabled.

prerequisites.zh: 测试范围允许对已知管理路径进行低频只读请求
prerequisites.en: The scope permits low-rate read-only requests to known management paths.

title.zh: Actuator 管理端点清单

description.zh: 逐条发起 GET/HEAD 请求并记录认证要求、响应类型和数据敏感度；heapdump、threaddump 等高成本端点应先获专项批准。
description.en: Send each GET or HEAD request separately and record authentication, content type, and sensitivity; obtain specific approval before high-cost endpoints such as heapdump or threaddump.

overview.zh: Actuator 为应用提供运行状态与管理能力，端点是否危险取决于暴露范围、返回细节和写操作授权。探测到路径存在并不自动构成漏洞，必须确认未授权主体实际获得了超出业务需要的数据或操作。
overview.en: Actuator provides runtime observability and management. Risk depends on endpoint exposure, returned detail, and write-operation authorization. Discovering a path is not automatically a vulnerability; an unauthorized principal must receive data or capability beyond business need.

vulnerability.zh: 常见根因是把 management 端口发布到公网、使用过宽的 include 配置，或只在反向代理层保护管理路径。环境变量、Bean、映射、日志和堆转储可能泄露密钥、内部拓扑与用户数据，Jolokia 或 loggers 还可能改变运行状态。
vulnerability.en: Common causes are publishing the management port, using an overly broad exposure include list, or protecting management paths only at a reverse proxy. Environment, bean, mapping, log, and heap data can reveal secrets or topology, while Jolokia or loggers may alter runtime state.

exploitation.zh: 先请求根端点确认实际管理基路径，再以未登录和低权限身份分别探测清单。按 404、401/403、有限健康信息和敏感内容分级，并与应用日志关联。不要下载堆转储或修改日志级别作为默认验证动作。
exploitation.en: Request the root endpoint to identify the actual management base path, then probe the list as anonymous and low-privilege users. Classify 404, 401/403, limited health output, and sensitive content and correlate application logs. Do not download heap dumps or change log levels by default.

mitigation.zh: 将管理服务绑定到独立内网接口，默认只暴露 health/info，并对详细健康信息及所有敏感端点实施强认证、细粒度授权和网络访问控制。关闭不需要的 Jolokia、环境、日志和转储功能，轮换已泄露凭据并持续审计访问。
mitigation.en: Bind management services to a private interface, expose only health and info by default, and protect detailed health and every sensitive endpoint with strong authentication, granular authorization, and network controls. Disable unneeded Jolokia, environment, log, and dump features, rotate exposed secrets, and audit access.

title.zh: 识别管理基路径

description.zh: 用根路径和普通 404 对照确认 Actuator 路由、版本特征与是否经过独立管理端口。
description.en: Compare the root path with a random 404 to identify Actuator routing, version signals, and any separate management port.

title.zh: 执行只读端点矩阵

description.zh: 以匿名与低权限会话逐条请求端点，记录认证状态和响应数据类别。
description.en: Request each endpoint under anonymous and low-privilege sessions and record authentication and response-data classification.

title.zh: 确认敏感信息边界

description.zh: 只记录最小必要证据，区分公开健康摘要、受保护细节和实际密钥或个人数据暴露。
description.en: Capture the minimum evidence needed and distinguish public health summaries, protected details, and actual secret or personal-data exposure.

title.zh: 收敛暴露面并回归

description.zh: 收紧端点清单、绑定地址及授权后重放矩阵，确认业务监控保留且未授权敏感响应消失。
description.en: Tighten the endpoint list, bind address, and authorization, then replay the matrix to preserve monitoring while removing unauthorized sensitive responses.

analysis.zh: 按端点的可达性、认证要求、数据敏感度和副作用分别评级；公开的简化 health 响应通常不等同于 env、heapdump 或 Jolokia 暴露。
analysis.en: Rate reachability, authentication, data sensitivity, and side effects per endpoint; a minimal public health response is not equivalent to exposed env, heapdump, or Jolokia data.

opsecTips.zh: 默认仅做 GET/HEAD 探测，禁止调用写端点、修改日志级别或触发大体积转储。
opsecTips.en: Default to GET or HEAD discovery and do not invoke write operations, change log levels, or trigger large dumps.

opsecTips.zh: 证据截图和报告中遮盖环境变量、令牌、Cookie 与个人数据。
opsecTips.en: Redact environment variables, tokens, cookies, and personal data from evidence and reports.

name.zh: 调试与版本库端点暴露

description.zh: 检查 Mercurial 元数据以及通用调试、跟踪、指标和映射路径是否被生产路由意外公开。
description.en: Checks whether Mercurial metadata and generic debug, trace, metrics, mapping, or dump paths are accidentally exposed by production routing.

subCategory.zh: 调试接口与源码元数据泄露
subCategory.en: Debug Interface and Source Metadata Exposure

prerequisites.zh: 目标允许对常见诊断路径进行低频只读检查
prerequisites.en: The target permits low-rate read-only checks of common diagnostic paths.

prerequisites.zh: 可将响应与随机不存在路径做对照
prerequisites.en: Responses can be compared with a random nonexistent path.

title.zh: 调试与元数据路径

description.zh: 逐条请求并比较状态码、Content-Type、响应签名和认证要求，以随机路径排除统一软 404。
description.en: Request each path separately and compare status, Content-Type, body signature, and authentication, using a random path to exclude uniform soft 404 responses.

overview.zh: 该卡覆盖两类常被混在一起的生产暴露：部署目录中的版本控制元数据，以及框架遗留的诊断路由。路径存在不是最终结论，需确认响应包含可用的源码状态、内部结构、运行指标或敏感配置。
overview.en: This card covers two production exposures often collected together: version-control metadata in the deployment tree and leftover framework diagnostic routes. Path existence is not the conclusion; the response must reveal usable source state, internal structure, runtime metrics, or sensitive configuration.

vulnerability.zh: 根因可能是把工作副本直接发布到 Web 根目录，或在生产配置中保留调试与监控处理器。反向代理若只按部分前缀保护路径，框架默认别名仍可能绕过认证并泄露路由、Bean、请求轨迹或内存数据。
vulnerability.en: The cause may be publishing a working copy under the web root or leaving debug and monitoring handlers enabled in production. A reverse proxy that protects only selected prefixes can miss framework aliases that disclose routes, beans, request traces, or memory data.

exploitation.zh: 先请求随机路径建立软 404 基线，再逐条检查清单，并以匿名和低权限身份对比。确认响应类型与内容来源后，只提取能证明暴露的最小片段；通用登录页、静态前端回退和无细节健康状态不应升级为漏洞。
exploitation.en: Establish a soft-404 baseline with a random path, then check the list under anonymous and low-privilege sessions. After identifying response type and source, retain only the minimum fragment proving exposure. Generic login pages, SPA fallbacks, and detail-free health status should not be escalated.

mitigation.zh: 构建制品时排除 .hg 等版本库目录并在 Web 服务器层显式拒绝隐藏元数据。生产环境关闭调试处理器，将必要监控端点置于独立网络与强认证之后，并用部署后自动扫描阻止这些路径重新出现。
mitigation.en: Exclude repository directories such as .hg from build artifacts and deny hidden metadata at the web-server layer. Disable debug handlers in production, place required monitoring behind a private network and strong authentication, and use post-deployment checks to prevent recurrence.

title.zh: 建立软 404 对照

description.zh: 请求随机不存在路径，记录前端回退、统一错误页和 CDN 缓存特征。
description.en: Request a random nonexistent path and record SPA fallback, uniform error-page, and CDN-cache signatures.

title.zh: 逐条检查暴露路径

description.zh: 以相同请求头逐条检查版本库与诊断路径，保存状态、媒体类型和最小响应样本。
description.en: Check repository and diagnostic paths with identical headers and retain status, media type, and a minimal response sample.

title.zh: 验证内容敏感度

description.zh: 确认数据来自真实诊断处理器或版本库文件，并判断是否含路由、配置、源码状态或请求信息。
description.en: Confirm that data comes from a real diagnostic handler or repository file and assess routes, configuration, source state, or request data.

title.zh: 移除发布内容并回归

description.zh: 清理制品、关闭处理器并收紧代理规则后重放清单，确认返回一致的拒绝或不存在结果。
description.en: Clean the artifact, disable handlers, and tighten proxy rules, then replay the list to confirm consistent denial or absence.

analysis.zh: 判定重点是响应来源和数据价值。静态前端壳、统一登录页与公开健康摘要应记录为观察项；可下载元数据、内部映射或敏感转储才形成明确风险。
analysis.en: The decisive factors are response provenance and data value. SPA shells, generic login pages, and public health summaries are observations; downloadable metadata, internal mappings, or sensitive dumps create concrete risk.

opsecTips.zh: 不要批量抓取版本库或转储文件，只保留能证明错误发布的最小字节范围。
opsecTips.en: Do not mirror repositories or dump files; retain only the smallest byte range that proves accidental publication.

opsecTips.zh: 对 metrics、trace 和 dump 路径限速，避免给监控服务或应用进程带来额外负载。
opsecTips.en: Rate-limit metrics, trace, and dump checks to avoid unnecessary load on monitoring services or the application process.

name.zh: 可信请求头与 WordPress 路由授权绕过
name.en: Trusted Header and WordPress Route Authorization Bypass

description.zh: 检查应用是否错误信任客户端来源头、作者参数或 WordPress 特殊路由，从而在代理与应用授权规则之间产生访问控制差异。
description.en: Checks whether client-controlled origin headers, author parameters, or WordPress route variants create authorization differences between proxy and application rules.

subCategory.zh: 代理信任与 WordPress 路由差异
subCategory.en: Proxy Trust and WordPress Route Differentials

prerequisites.zh: 目标位于反向代理或 WAF 后并存在受保护管理资源
prerequisites.en: The target is behind a reverse proxy or WAF and has a protected administrative resource.

prerequisites.zh: 可使用未登录或低权限测试账号比较授权结果
prerequisites.en: Anonymous or low-privilege test identities are available for authorization comparison.

title.zh: 代理头与 WordPress 路由样例
title.en: Proxy Header and WordPress Route Samples

description.zh: 将头、参数与 URL 变体分别应用到对应请求，不要把不同语法组合成一条请求；比较标准路径与变体的身份和对象授权。
description.en: Apply each header, parameter, or URL variant to its corresponding request rather than combining all syntax, and compare identity and object authorization with the canonical route.

title.zh: 边界规则差异复测

description.zh: 保留原集合中的 WAF 复测样例，用于验证边界设备与后端是否对相同输入执行一致的规范化和授权。
description.en: Preserves the original WAF retest samples for checking whether the edge and backend normalize and authorize identical input consistently.

overview.zh: 这组样例横跨来源身份头、WordPress 用户枚举和带重复斜杠的管理资源。它们共享的安全问题是边界设备与应用对请求身份或路由的判断不一致；只有低权限主体获得受保护内容或操作时才成立。
overview.en: These samples span a source-identity header, WordPress user enumeration, and repeated-slash administrative resources. The common issue is disagreement between edge and application identity or routing; a finding requires protected content or capability to become available to a lower-privilege principal.

vulnerability.zh: 根因通常是后端无条件信任可由客户端提交的代理头，或 WAF 按原始路径授权而 WordPress/PHP 在规范化后匹配另一处理器。查询参数若直接参与角色或作者筛选，也可能暴露本应隐藏的账户信息。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is commonly unconditional trust in client-supplied proxy headers, or an edge policy evaluating a raw path while WordPress or PHP routes the normalized path elsewhere. Query parameters that influence author or role selection can also disclose hidden accounts.

exploitation.zh: 分别建立匿名、低权限和授权管理员的基线，再单独修改一个头、参数或路径形式。记录边缘日志与应用日志中的规范化值和主体。仅当响应从拒绝变为真实受保护资源，或返回非公开用户数据时报告；静态脚本可公开加载不等于管理权限绕过。
exploitation.en: Establish anonymous, low-privilege, and administrator baselines, then change one header, parameter, or path form at a time. Record normalized values and principals in edge and application logs. Report only a transition to real protected content or nonpublic user data; publicly loadable static assets do not prove administrative access.

mitigation.zh: 在最外层可信代理删除所有客户端来源身份头并重新写入，经明确代理链校验后后端才能使用。边界和应用共享同一规范化路径，WordPress REST 与作者数据按最小披露配置，并对每个对象在后端重新授权。
mitigation.en: Have the outermost trusted proxy remove client-supplied identity headers and set its own values, and let the backend consume them only after an explicit proxy-chain check. Share one canonical path between edge and app, minimize WordPress REST and author disclosure, and authorize every object at the backend.

title.zh: 建立主体与路由基线

description.zh: 分别记录匿名、低权限和管理员访问规范路径时的状态、响应与后端识别主体。
description.en: Record status, response, and backend principal for anonymous, low-privilege, and administrator access to canonical routes.

title.zh: 单变量提交差异样例
title.en: Submit differential samples one variable at a time

description.zh: 一次只改变一个来源头、作者参数或路径形式，并保留边界与应用两侧日志。
description.en: Change only one source header, author parameter, or path form per request and retain both edge and application logs.

title.zh: 确认授权状态变化

description.zh: 核实是否获得真实受保护对象、非公开字段或管理操作，排除公开静态资源和统一错误页。
description.en: Verify access to a real protected object, nonpublic field, or administrative action, excluding public assets and uniform error pages.

title.zh: 修复信任链并重放
title.en: Repair the trust chain and replay

description.zh: 清理伪造头、统一路由规范化并强化对象授权后，重放全部样例与正常代理流量。
description.en: Strip forged headers, unify route normalization, and enforce object authorization, then replay all samples and normal proxied traffic.

analysis.zh: 将响应变化与边界/后端日志中的主体、规范化路径和对象授权关联。若只有缓存、静态资产或公开 REST 元数据差异，应降低结论等级。
analysis.en: Correlate response changes with principal, canonical path, and object authorization in edge and backend logs. Cache, static-asset, or public REST metadata differences warrant a lower-severity observation.

opsecTips.zh: 使用专用测试账户和对象，不枚举真实站点全部用户或作者。
opsecTips.en: Use dedicated test accounts and objects rather than enumerating all real site users or authors.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只发送一个差异输入，避免代理头与路径变体组合后难以归因。
opsecTips.en: Send one differential input per request so header and path behavior remains attributable.

name.zh: Shell 分词与路径通配混淆
name.en: Shell Tokenization and Path Globbing Obfuscation

description.zh: 使用未初始化变量、引号分割和通配路径验证命令执行入口是否在过滤后仍被 Shell 重新组合为可执行命令。
description.en: Uses unset variables, quote splitting, and globbed paths to determine whether a shell reconstructs executable commands after input filtering.

subCategory.zh: Shell 分词与通配符绕过

prerequisites.zh: 用户输入可能进入 Unix Shell 命令上下文
prerequisites.en: User input may reach a Unix shell command context.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离测试环境允许执行无副作用的命令验证
prerequisites.en: An isolated test environment permits side-effect-free command verification.

title.zh: Shell 词法混淆样例

description.zh: 逐条用于对应的 Shell 输入点；先把文件目标替换为测试容器中的无敏感标记文件，并将网络地址替换为隔离监听器。
description.en: Use each line separately at the relevant shell input; first replace file targets with a nonsensitive marker in the test container and network values with an isolated listener.

title.zh: 过滤器复测样例

description.zh: 保留原集合的边界过滤复测行；用于比较过滤前后字符串与 Shell 实际 argv，而不是证明特定 WAF 可被通用绕过。
description.en: Preserves the original edge-filter retest lines to compare pre-filter text, post-filter text, and actual shell argv; it does not imply a universal WAF bypass.

overview.zh: Shell 会在执行前完成变量展开、分词、引号移除和通配符展开。字符串黑名单即使移除了明显命令名，也可能让剩余输入在这些阶段重新组合；验证时应关注实际 argv 和子进程，而不只是响应中的命令输出。
overview.en: Before execution, a shell performs variable expansion, word splitting, quote removal, and glob expansion. A string blacklist can remove an obvious command yet leave input that reconstructs it during these phases. Validation should focus on actual argv and child processes, not only reflected output.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是应用通过 shell 字符串拼接调用系统命令，并试图用替换或正则阻断危险词。空变量可切开关键字，引号可在解析后消失，问号通配符可匹配路径字符，使静态过滤与实际执行语义分离。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is composing a shell command string and relying on replacement or regex denial. Empty variables can split tokens, quotes disappear after parsing, and question-mark globs can reconstruct paths, separating filter semantics from execution semantics.

exploitation.zh: 在测试容器中先以固定参数 API 建立安全基线，再逐条提交样例并记录过滤前后文本、父子进程和 argv。使用可回滚标记文件或受控监听器确认副作用。只有出现预期子进程或标记读取才成立；500、WAF 告警和原样回显不算执行。
exploitation.en: In a test container, establish a safe fixed-argument baseline, then submit samples individually and capture pre-filter text, post-filter text, process lineage, and argv. Use a disposable marker file or controlled listener. A finding requires the expected child process or marker read; 500 responses, WAF alerts, and reflection are not execution.

mitigation.zh: 不要通过 Shell 解释用户输入；调用固定可执行文件并使用参数数组，服务端对每个参数实施类型和允许列表校验。以低权限、只读文件系统和出站网络限制运行，部署子进程监控，并保留这组词法变体作为回归用例。
mitigation.en: Do not interpret user input through a shell. Invoke a fixed executable with an argument array and validate each argument by type and allowlist. Run with low privilege, read-only filesystems, and egress controls, monitor child processes, and retain these lexical variants as regression cases.

title.zh: 确认 Shell 解释边界

description.zh: 通过代码或进程遥测确认输入进入 shell -c 等解释路径，而不是安全参数数组。
description.en: Use code or process telemetry to confirm that input reaches shell -c or equivalent rather than a safe argument array.

title.zh: 逐条执行词法样例

description.zh: 在隔离容器中把目标替换为无敏感标记，逐条提交并捕获过滤结果与实际 argv。
description.en: Replace targets with nonsensitive markers in an isolated container, submit each line, and capture filter output and actual argv.

title.zh: 关联子进程证据

description.zh: 把请求 ID 与进程树、argv、文件访问或受控网络连接关联，排除仅过滤告警的假阳性。
description.en: Correlate request IDs with process trees, argv, file access, or controlled connections to exclude filter-only alerts.

title.zh: 移除 Shell 并回归

description.zh: 改用固定程序和参数数组后重放样例，确认正常参数仍工作且不再产生额外子进程。
description.en: Switch to a fixed executable and argument array, then replay samples to preserve valid behavior without extra child processes.

analysis.zh: 核心证据是应用进程实际启动了非预期子进程或解释出不同 argv。过滤器放行、错误响应或命令文本出现在页面中只能说明输入处理差异。
analysis.en: The decisive evidence is an unexpected child process or reconstructed argv from the application. Filter acceptance, errors, or command text in a page only show input-handling differences.

opsecTips.zh: 在一次性容器中用无敏感标记文件替代系统账户文件，并禁用到公网的出站访问。
opsecTips.en: Use a disposable container with a nonsensitive marker file in place of account files and block public-network egress.

opsecTips.zh: 不在生产请求中启动交互式 Shell；网络型样例只连接隔离测试监听器。
opsecTips.en: Do not launch interactive shells in production requests; network samples may connect only to an isolated test listener.

name.zh: 内联 DOCTYPE 实体过滤差异

description.zh: 使用最小内联外部实体声明验证 WAF 与后端 XML 解析器是否对 DOCTYPE 和外部资源执行一致阻断。
description.en: Uses a minimal inline external-entity declaration to verify consistent DOCTYPE and external-resource blocking between the WAF and backend XML parser.

prerequisites.zh: 目标端点实际解析 XML 或 XML 派生格式
prerequisites.en: The endpoint actually parses XML or an XML-derived format.

prerequisites.zh: 测试环境提供无敏感标记资源或受控回连端点
prerequisites.en: The test environment provides a nonsensitive marker resource or controlled callback endpoint.

title.zh: 最小外部实体声明

description.zh: 将系统路径替换为隔离环境的无敏感标记，并嵌入目标接受的完整 XML 文档中；该行本身只是声明片段。
description.en: Replace the system path with a nonsensitive marker in the isolated environment and embed the line in a complete XML document accepted by the target; the line alone is only a declaration fragment.

title.zh: WAF 与解析器一致性复测

description.zh: 保留原集合中的第二份相同行，用于修复后分别验证边界设备与后端解析器都拒绝外部实体。
description.en: Preserves the original duplicate line for post-fix verification that both the edge and backend parser reject external entities.

overview.zh: DOCTYPE 声明只有在后端以允许 DTD 和外部实体的 XML 解析器处理时才有风险。WAF 拦截、通用 400 或原样保存 XML 不能证明或排除 XXE，必须观察受控实体解析证据。
overview.en: A DOCTYPE is risky only when the backend parses XML with DTDs and external entities enabled. WAF blocking, a generic 400, or storing XML unchanged neither proves nor disproves XXE; evidence must show controlled entity resolution.

vulnerability.zh: 问题源于解析器默认允许外部资源，而边界过滤只匹配特定大小写、空白或文档结构。若 WAF 和解析器对编码与文法理解不同，声明可能到达解析器并触发文件或网络访问。
vulnerability.en: The issue arises when the parser permits external resources while edge filtering recognizes only selected casing, whitespace, or document forms. Encoding or grammar disagreement can let a declaration reach the parser and trigger file or network access.

exploitation.zh: 先发送不含 DOCTYPE 的合法 XML，再在完整文档中加入声明并引用无敏感标记实体。关联 WAF、应用和解析器日志，观察标记出现在响应或后台任务中。只有解析证据成立；上传成功、错误码变化或规则命中均不足。
exploitation.en: Send valid XML without a DOCTYPE, then add the declaration and reference a nonsensitive marker entity in a complete document. Correlate WAF, application, and parser logs and look for the marker in response or job output. Only resolution evidence counts; upload success, status changes, or a rule hit do not.

mitigation.zh: 在每个 XML 入口禁用 DOCTYPE、外部通用实体、参数实体与 XInclude，并限制解析任务的文件系统和出站网络。WAF 仅作补充控制，修复测试要直接覆盖实际解析库和异步处理链。
mitigation.en: Disable DOCTYPE, external general and parameter entities, and XInclude at every XML entry point, and restrict parser filesystem and egress. Treat the WAF as defense in depth and test the actual parser library and asynchronous processing chain directly.

title.zh: 确认实际 XML 解析器

description.zh: 确认请求或上传内容由哪个同步或异步组件解析，并记录安全特性配置。
description.en: Identify the synchronous or asynchronous component that parses the request or upload and record its security configuration.

title.zh: 嵌入受控实体声明

description.zh: 把声明放入结构有效的 XML，并将目标改为隔离标记资源后提交。
description.en: Place the declaration in structurally valid XML, replace its target with an isolated marker resource, and submit it.

title.zh: 关联解析副作用

description.zh: 检查标记输出、文件访问或受控回连，并用无 DOCTYPE 文档与不存在资源做对照。
description.en: Check marker output, file access, or controlled callbacks and compare with no-DOCTYPE and missing-resource controls.

title.zh: 关闭实体能力并回归

description.zh: 关闭所有相关解析特性后重放恶意与正常 XML，确认实体不解析且业务文档仍可处理。
description.en: Disable all related parser features, then replay malicious and normal XML to confirm no resolution while valid documents still work.

analysis.zh: 确认 XXE 需要把输入与具体解析器副作用关联；边界规则是否命中只是控制效果，不能替代文件读取、受控外连或实体展开证据。
analysis.en: XXE confirmation requires linking input to a concrete parser side effect. An edge-rule hit measures a control, not file access, controlled egress, or entity-expansion evidence.

opsecTips.zh: 在验证前把系统敏感路径替换为测试容器中的标记文件，避免读取真实凭据。
opsecTips.en: Replace sensitive system paths with a marker file in a test container before validation to avoid reading real credentials.

opsecTips.zh: 限制 XML 大小和实体数量，避免测试触发实体扩展型资源耗尽。
opsecTips.en: Limit XML size and entity count so testing cannot trigger entity-expansion resource exhaustion.

name.zh: 路径遍历过滤与规范化差异
name.en: Path Traversal Filter and Normalization Differentials

description.zh: 使用点号变体、双重编码和产品特定下载路由验证边界过滤与后端文件路径规范化是否一致。
description.en: Uses dot variants, double encoding, and product-specific download routes to verify consistent path normalization between edge filters and backend file handlers.

prerequisites.zh: 目标路由接受文件名、模板名或资源路径
prerequisites.en: The target route accepts a filename, template name, or resource path.

prerequisites.zh: 测试环境提供位于允许目录外的无敏感标记文件
prerequisites.en: The test environment provides a nonsensitive marker file outside the allowed directory.

title.zh: 路径规范化差异样例

description.zh: 逐条按目标技术栈选择使用，并把敏感文件替换为隔离环境中的标记；产品特定 URL 不应无差别发送到其他框架。
description.en: Select samples according to the target stack and replace sensitive files with an isolated marker; do not spray product-specific URLs at unrelated frameworks.

title.zh: 边界与后端规范化复测

description.zh: 保留原集合中的重复测试集，用于修复后对 WAF 规范化与后端根目录校验分别做回归。
description.en: Preserves the duplicate original test set for separate post-fix regression of WAF normalization and backend root enforcement.

overview.zh: 这些行来自不同产品和路径语法，不能视为通用漏洞利用。共同验证目标是：边界设备解码后的路径与后端最终打开的规范路径是否一致，并且后者是否始终留在预期根目录内。
overview.en: These lines target different products and path syntaxes and are not universal exploits. Their common purpose is to compare the edge-decoded path with the canonical file opened by the backend and verify that it remains under the intended root.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是对原始字符串做黑名单过滤，却在后端进行额外 URL 解码、点段折叠、别名解析或平台路径转换。产品插件若把查询参数直接拼入文件 API，会让重复编码或非标准点号在后续阶段恢复为父目录跳转。
vulnerability.en: The cause is filtering a raw string before additional URL decoding, dot-segment collapse, alias resolution, or platform path conversion. Product plugins that concatenate query parameters into file APIs can turn repeated encoding or nonstandard dot forms back into parent traversal later.

exploitation.zh: 只选择与已识别组件匹配的样例，将目标改为根目录外的测试标记，并记录每层解码值与最终文件路径。与合法文件、随机文件和不存在标记做对照。只有返回标记内容或文件访问遥测才成立；状态码或产品指纹本身不足。
exploitation.en: Use only samples matching an identified component, point them to a test marker outside the root, and record each decoded value and final filesystem path. Compare with a valid file, random file, and missing marker. A finding requires marker content or file-access telemetry; status or product fingerprint alone is insufficient.

mitigation.zh: 把用户标识映射到服务端对象 ID，不接受任意路径。必须处理路径时，完成全部解码后解析规范绝对路径并验证其位于固定根目录，拒绝符号链接越界；同时升级存在已知问题的产品组件，WAF 规则仅作补充。
mitigation.en: Map user identifiers to server-side object IDs instead of accepting paths. If paths are unavoidable, fully decode, resolve the canonical absolute path, enforce a fixed root, and reject symlink escape. Patch affected components and use WAF rules only as defense in depth.

title.zh: 识别文件处理组件

description.zh: 根据路由、版本和正常请求确认实际文件 API，避免向无关技术栈发送产品特定路径。
description.en: Use routes, versions, and normal requests to identify the actual file API and avoid sending product-specific paths to unrelated stacks.

title.zh: 提交匹配的规范化样例

description.zh: 把文件目标替换为隔离标记后逐条请求，记录原始值、边界解码值和后端规范路径。
description.en: Replace file targets with an isolated marker, request each sample, and record raw, edge-decoded, and backend-canonical paths.

title.zh: 确认根目录越界

description.zh: 通过标记内容或文件访问遥测证明最终打开路径越过允许根目录，并排除自定义 404。
description.en: Use marker content or file-access telemetry to prove the opened path escapes the allowed root and exclude custom 404 responses.

title.zh: 实施规范路径约束

description.zh: 完成根目录校验与组件升级后重放合法文件和全部匹配样例，确认只有允许对象可访问。
description.en: After root enforcement and component updates, replay valid files and all matching samples to confirm only allowed objects remain accessible.

analysis.zh: 每行必须结合对应产品与实际文件 API 解释。最强证据是规范化后的真实文件路径和标记读取，单纯 WAF 放行或响应长度变化不构成文件读取。
analysis.en: Interpret each line in the context of its product and file API. Canonical path and marker-file access are strong evidence; WAF acceptance or response-length change alone is not a file read.

opsecTips.zh: 先替换所有系统文件路径为测试标记，避免在验证过程中读取真实配置或账户数据。
opsecTips.en: Replace every system-file target with a test marker before validation to avoid reading real configuration or account data.

opsecTips.zh: 仅对已识别组件使用对应 URL，降低无关日志噪声与潜在服务压力。
opsecTips.en: Use product-specific URLs only against identified components to reduce irrelevant logs and service load.

name.zh: IIS CGI 双重编码路径遍历

description.zh: 使用双重编码点段访问 Windows CGI 路径，验证边界代理与 IIS/CGI 处理器是否执行不同次数的 URL 解码。
description.en: Uses double-encoded dot segments against a Windows CGI path to test whether the edge proxy and IIS or CGI handler perform different numbers of URL-decoding passes.

prerequisites.zh: 目标已确认是授权测试中的旧式 IIS/CGI 路径
prerequisites.en: The target is a confirmed legacy IIS or CGI path in an authorized test environment.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离 Windows 实例提供无副作用测试 CGI 与路径审计
prerequisites.en: An isolated Windows instance provides a side-effect-free test CGI and path auditing.

title.zh: 双重编码 CGI 路径样例

description.zh: 原行保留用于数据审校。真实验证把 cmd.exe 与 dir 操作替换为隔离实例中的无副作用标记 CGI，不调用系统命令。
description.en: The original line is retained for data review. Real validation replaces cmd.exe and dir with a side-effect-free marker CGI in isolation and does not invoke an OS command.

title.zh: 边界/CGI 解码复测

description.zh: 保留原集合中的重复复测行，用于修复后分别验证边界和 CGI 只执行一致的规范化。
description.en: Preserves the original duplicate retest line for verifying consistent canonicalization at both edge and CGI after remediation.

overview.zh: 该样例来自历史 IIS 双重解码路径问题，不能对现代服务器作为通用命令。测试目标是确认 `%25` 解码后的点段是否在下游第二次恢复为父目录，并到达非预期 CGI，而不是执行原始系统命令。
overview.en: This sample comes from historical IIS double-decoding path behavior and is not a universal command for modern servers. The test asks whether percent-25 decoding restores parent segments downstream and reaches an unintended CGI, without executing the original OS command.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是代理按一次解码后的路径做访问控制，而 IIS/CGI 再次解码并规范化，导致受保护路径在两层具有不同含义。若旧 CGI 可执行系统命令，影响进一步放大。
vulnerability.en: The cause is an edge policy evaluating a once-decoded path while IIS or CGI decodes and canonicalizes again, giving the protected path different meanings across layers. Impact is amplified if a legacy CGI can execute OS commands.

exploitation.zh: 在隔离旧版本复现环境中，用普通测试 CGI 建立基线，再将原目标改为固定标记 CGI 并提交双重编码路径。记录边界、IIS 和 CGI 三层路径及处理器。只有非预期处理器实际被调用才成立；404、500 或产品指纹不足。
exploitation.en: In an isolated legacy reproduction, baseline a normal test CGI, replace the original target with a fixed marker CGI, and submit the double-encoded path. Record paths and handlers at edge, IIS, and CGI. Confirmation requires the unintended handler to run; 404, 500, or fingerprinting is insufficient.

mitigation.zh: 升级受支持 IIS/Windows 版本，移除不需要的 CGI 映射，在边界和后端使用相同的单次规范化路径并拒绝重复编码。Web 服务身份最小权限，系统目录不可映射到 Web 路径，并保留双重解码回归。
mitigation.en: Upgrade to supported IIS and Windows, remove unnecessary CGI mappings, use one canonical path consistently across edge and backend, and reject repeated encoding. Run the web identity with least privilege, never map system directories into web paths, and retain double-decode regression.

title.zh: 确认 IIS/CGI 测试环境
title.en: Confirm the IIS or CGI test environment

description.zh: 记录版本、代理层、解码次数和无副作用测试 CGI 的规范路径。
description.en: Record version, proxy layers, decode passes, and the canonical path of a side-effect-free test CGI.

title.zh: 提交改写后的双重编码路径

description.zh: 用标记 CGI 替换系统命令目标并保留每层路径日志。
description.en: Replace the OS-command target with a marker CGI and preserve path logs at every layer.

title.zh: 确认非预期处理器调用

description.zh: 匹配请求 ID、规范路径、CGI 日志和固定标记，排除错误页与静态文件。
description.en: Match request ID, canonical path, CGI log, and fixed marker, excluding error pages and static files.

title.zh: 升级并统一路径解析

description.zh: 修复后重放规范和双重编码路径，确认合法 CGI 保留且越界路径拒绝。
description.en: After remediation replay canonical and double-encoded paths to preserve valid CGI while rejecting traversal.

analysis.zh: 必须证明至少两层解码差异和非预期 CGI 调用。原 URL 中出现 cmd.exe 只说明历史目标，不构成现代 RCE 证据。
analysis.en: Prove at least two decoding passes and unintended CGI invocation. cmd.exe in the historical URL does not establish modern RCE.

opsecTips.zh: 只在隔离复现环境使用标记 CGI，不请求真实 cmd.exe 或执行 dir。
opsecTips.en: Use a marker CGI only in an isolated reproduction and never request real cmd.exe or run dir.

opsecTips.zh: 每次只发送一个路径并限制日志保留范围，避免旧服务不稳定。
opsecTips.en: Send one path at a time and limit log retention to avoid destabilizing legacy services.

name.zh: CRLF 响应头注入

description.zh: 通过编码 CRLF 注入 Content-Type、Location 或 Set-Cookie，验证用户输入是否能越过响应头边界并改变浏览器处理。
description.en: Uses encoded CRLF sequences to inject Content-Type, Location, or Set-Cookie and verify whether input crosses the response-header boundary.

prerequisites.zh: 用户输入会进入响应头值或重定向目标
prerequisites.en: User input reaches a response-header value or redirect target.

prerequisites.zh: 可捕获代理后的原始 HTTP 响应
prerequisites.en: The raw HTTP response after proxy processing can be captured.

title.zh: 编码 CRLF 响应头样例

description.zh: 逐条放入已确认会进入响应头的测试参数，使用自有测试来源与无敏感 Cookie，检查原始响应头结构。
description.en: Place each line separately in a confirmed response-header input, use a controlled origin and nonsensitive cookie, and inspect the raw header structure.

overview.zh: CRLF 注入发生在应用把未清理输入写入 HTTP 响应头时。判断不能只看页面出现换行，而要证明服务器或中间件生成了额外响应头、第二个响应片段，或浏览器接受了攻击者控制的 Cookie/重定向。
overview.en: CRLF injection occurs when unsanitized input is written into HTTP response headers. A finding requires an added header, a second response fragment, or browser acceptance of an attacker-controlled cookie or redirect, not merely a newline in rendered text.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是响应头 API 接收包含 CR、LF 或解码后控制字符的值，并且代理、框架和服务器在不同阶段解码。输入因此可能终止原头并创建新的 Content-Type、Location 或 Set-Cookie。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is a header API accepting CR, LF, or values that decode to control characters while proxies, frameworks, and servers decode at different stages. Input can terminate one header and create Content-Type, Location, or Set-Cookie.

exploitation.zh: 用普通值建立响应基线，逐条提交样例并保存线上的原始字节。检查新增头是否独立出现、浏览器是否采纳，以及缓存是否传播。原样编码回显、框架拒绝或仅应用日志换行不构成响应拆分。
exploitation.en: Establish a normal-value baseline, submit each sample separately, and preserve raw wire bytes. Check whether a new header appears independently, whether the browser accepts it, and whether caches propagate it. Encoded reflection, framework rejection, or log-only line breaks are not response splitting.

mitigation.zh: 只使用框架提供的结构化响应头 API，拒绝 CR、LF、NUL 及其多次解码形式。重定向使用规范化允许列表，Cookie 由固定服务端代码生成，并在代理与应用之间统一一次解码策略和回归测试。
mitigation.en: Use structured framework header APIs, reject CR, LF, NUL, and multiply decoded forms, allowlist canonical redirects, and generate cookies from fixed server code. Align decoding policy across proxy and application and retain regression tests.

title.zh: 定位响应头数据流

description.zh: 确认参数进入哪个响应头，并捕获正常值经过代理和应用后的原始响应基线。
description.en: Identify the response header receiving the parameter and capture raw baseline bytes after proxy and application processing.

title.zh: 逐条提交 CRLF 样例

description.zh: 分别尝试媒体类型、跳转与无敏感 Cookie 头，保持其余请求字段不变。
description.en: Try media-type, redirect, and nonsensitive cookie headers separately while holding all other request fields constant.

title.zh: 确认线上头边界变化

description.zh: 在原始响应字节和浏览器状态中确认新增头，排除仅回显、日志污染和客户端解码。
description.en: Confirm added headers in raw bytes and browser state, excluding reflection, log pollution, and client-only decoding.

title.zh: 修复头值校验并回归

description.zh: 拒绝控制字符后重放正常值与全部编码样例，确认业务响应保持且无法创建新头。
description.en: After rejecting control characters, replay normal values and all encodings to preserve behavior without creating headers.

analysis.zh: 以原始 HTTP 字节和浏览器采纳结果为准。代理规范化前的日志、应用层字符串或单纯状态码变化都是间接证据。
analysis.en: Use raw HTTP bytes and browser acceptance as authoritative evidence. Pre-normalization logs, application strings, and status changes are indirect.

opsecTips.zh: 使用测试 Cookie 名和自有空白域，避免覆盖真实会话或跳转到第三方。
opsecTips.en: Use a test cookie name and controlled empty domain to avoid overwriting real sessions or redirecting to third parties.

opsecTips.zh: 在非共享缓存对象上验证，防止注入响应被其他用户命中。
opsecTips.en: Test on a nonshared-cache object so an injected response cannot be served to other users.

name.zh: CRLF 代理与路由头注入
name.en: CRLF Proxy and Routing Header Injection

description.zh: 通过编码换行注入来源 IP、内部路由和 Host 相关头，验证边界层是否把用户输入拆成可信代理元数据。
description.en: Injects encoded line breaks before source-IP, internal-route, and host-related headers to test whether an edge layer treats user input as trusted proxy metadata.

subCategory.zh: 代理头注入与路由授权
subCategory.en: Proxy Header Injection and Route Authorization

prerequisites.zh: 输入可到达上游请求头或代理重写配置
prerequisites.en: Input can reach an upstream request header or proxy rewrite rule.

prerequisites.zh: 目标存在按来源 IP、Host 或内部路径授权的资源
prerequisites.en: The target protects resources by source IP, host, or internal path.

title.zh: 编码代理头注入样例

description.zh: 一次只在已确认的头值数据流中提交一个样例，关联边界与后端接收到的实际头集合和授权主体。
description.en: Submit one sample at a time only in a confirmed header-value data flow and correlate the actual header set and principal received by edge and backend.

overview.zh: 该测试关注换行经过解码后是否创建第二个请求头，并被后端当作可信来源或内部路由指令。看到输入字符串包含头名不等于注入成功，必须确认后端头集合和授权决策发生变化。
overview.en: This test asks whether a decoded line break creates a second request header that the backend trusts as source identity or internal routing metadata. A header name in reflected text is not success; the backend header set and authorization decision must change.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是代理把用户控制值拼接进转发头，同时在不同阶段进行百分号解码；后端又无条件信任 X-Forwarded-*、X-Original-URL 或私有头。注入值便可能伪造内网来源或改写受保护路由。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is a proxy concatenating user-controlled values into forwarded headers while percent-decoding at a different stage, plus a backend that blindly trusts X-Forwarded-*, X-Original-URL, or private headers. The injected value can spoof an internal source or rewrite a protected route.

exploitation.zh: 先对规范请求记录边界和后端头集合，再逐条提交样例并用请求 ID 关联日志。比较后端识别 IP、Host、路由和主体。只有新增头进入后端并导致真实授权差异才成立；WAF 告警、400 或日志换行均不足。
exploitation.en: Record edge and backend headers for a canonical request, then submit each sample and correlate logs by request ID. Compare backend IP, host, route, and principal. A finding requires a new header reaching the backend and changing real authorization; WAF alerts, 400 responses, or log line breaks are insufficient.

mitigation.zh: 最外层代理拒绝头值中的控制字符，删除全部客户端可伪造的转发与路由头后再写入标准值。后端仅信任来自固定代理地址且经过签名或 mTLS 保护的元数据，敏感路由仍执行独立主体授权。
mitigation.en: The outer proxy must reject control characters, remove every client-spoofable forwarding and routing header, and set canonical values itself. The backend should trust metadata only from fixed proxy peers protected by signing or mTLS, while sensitive routes still enforce principal authorization.

title.zh: 记录代理头基线

description.zh: 捕获正常请求在边界和后端看到的完整头集合、来源 IP、路由和主体。
description.en: Capture the complete header set, source IP, route, and principal observed at edge and backend for a normal request.

title.zh: 逐条提交编码换行

description.zh: 在一个已确认的数据流中一次只提交一个头样例，并用请求 ID 关联两侧日志。
description.en: Submit one header sample at a time in a confirmed data flow and correlate both sides with a request ID.

title.zh: 确认后端授权差异

description.zh: 证明后端实际接收新增头并授予原主体不具备的对象或路由访问。
description.en: Prove that the backend receives the added header and grants object or route access unavailable to the original principal.

title.zh: 收敛代理信任边界

description.zh: 清理客户端头并绑定可信代理后重放全部样例，确认正常转发保留且伪造无效。
description.en: After stripping client headers and binding trusted proxies, replay every sample to preserve normal forwarding while spoofing fails.

analysis.zh: 后端接收头与授权日志是核心证据。客户端发送了什么或边界记录了什么都不能单独证明后端信任了注入值。
analysis.en: Backend-received headers and authorization logs are decisive. What the client sent or the edge logged alone cannot prove backend trust.

opsecTips.zh: 只访问专用测试资源，不使用伪造内网头触碰真实管理接口。
opsecTips.en: Use a dedicated test resource and do not use spoofed internal headers against real administrative functions.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只测试一个头，避免多头组合改变代理稳定性或掩盖根因。
opsecTips.en: Test one header at a time so combinations do not destabilize the proxy or obscure causality.

name.zh: Content-Length 请求不同步片段

description.zh: 使用含冲突消息边界的原始请求片段，验证前端代理与后端服务器是否对 Content-Length 和后续请求起点产生不同解释。
description.en: Uses a raw request fragment with conflicting message boundaries to test whether a frontend proxy and backend disagree on Content-Length and the next request start.

prerequisites.zh: 授权环境包含至少两跳 HTTP/1.1 请求处理链
prerequisites.en: The authorized environment has at least two HTTP/1.1 request-processing hops.

prerequisites.zh: 具备不会影响其他用户的独占测试连接与标记路由
prerequisites.en: An exclusive test connection and marker route prevent impact on other users.

title.zh: 原始消息边界片段

execution.command:
Host: example.com
Content-Length: 6
G
GET / HTTP/1.1
Content-Length: 5
Host: evil.com

description.zh: 该多行内容是一个原始请求构造片段，必须在隔离连接中按目标服务器要求补全请求行与 CRLF，不能把每行独立发送。
description.en: This multiline value is one raw-request construction fragment. Complete its request line and CRLF framing for the target in an isolated connection; do not send lines independently.

overview.zh: 请求不同步依赖两个 HTTP 解析器对消息边界理解不一致。单个服务器返回 400、连接关闭或页面异常都不是证据；必须在独占连接上观察到后续标记请求被错位、拼接或延迟处理。
overview.en: Request desynchronization depends on two HTTP parsers disagreeing about message boundaries. A 400, closed connection, or odd page from one server is not evidence; an exclusive connection must show a later marker request shifted, prefixed, or delayed.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是前端与后端对 Content-Length、请求行容错或不完整消息处理不同，并复用同一后端连接。一个解析器认为请求结束时，另一个仍把剩余字节视为当前主体，导致下一请求边界被污染。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is different frontend and backend handling of Content-Length, tolerant request lines, or incomplete messages on a reused backend connection. Bytes considered a new request by one parser remain body data for the other, contaminating the next boundary.

exploitation.zh: 仅在独占测试连接上发送补全后的片段，随后发送带随机标记的无害请求，重复多次并与正常连接对照。确认标记响应出现稳定错位且服务端日志显示解析边界差异。超时、随机 5xx 或负载均衡节点切换属于不确定结果。
exploitation.en: Send the completed fragment only over an exclusive test connection, followed by a harmless random-marker request, and repeat against a normal control connection. Confirm stable marker misalignment and boundary differences in server logs. Timeouts, random 5xx responses, or load-balancer node changes are inconclusive.

mitigation.zh: 让前后端使用严格且一致的 HTTP 解析，拒绝含歧义长度、不完整请求行和非法控制字符的请求；边界处规范化或降级为单一协议，并避免在异常后复用后端连接。升级代理与应用服务器并加入差异解析回归。
mitigation.en: Use strict consistent HTTP parsing across hops, reject ambiguous lengths, incomplete request lines, and invalid controls, normalize or terminate to one protocol at the edge, and never reuse backend connections after parse errors. Patch intermediaries and servers and retain parser-differential regression.

title.zh: 绘制 HTTP 处理链

description.zh: 确认前端、网关和后端协议版本、连接复用及解析器产品，并准备独占测试连接。
description.en: Identify frontend, gateway, and backend protocol versions, connection reuse, and parser products, and prepare an exclusive connection.

title.zh: 发送边界片段与标记请求
title.en: Send the boundary fragment and marker request

description.zh: 按目标语法补全片段后发送，再追加随机无害标记请求并保留原始字节与时间。
description.en: Complete the fragment for the target, send it, append a random harmless marker request, and retain raw bytes and timing.

attackChain.payload:
Host: example.com
Content-Length: 6
G
GET / HTTP/1.1
Content-Length: 5
Host: evil.com

title.zh: 验证稳定不同步

description.zh: 在独占连接重复并与正常连接对照，关联两跳日志证明标记请求边界发生可重复错位。
description.en: Repeat on the exclusive connection, compare with a normal connection, and correlate both hop logs to prove repeatable marker-boundary shift.

title.zh: 统一解析并回归

description.zh: 升级并严格化解析器后重放差异样例，确认歧义请求被拒绝且正常流水线不受影响。
description.en: After upgrading and tightening parsers, replay the differential case to confirm ambiguous requests are rejected while normal pipelining works.

analysis.zh: 只有可重复标记错位和两跳解析日志才能确认请求走私。单次延迟、400/500 或连接关闭通常只是严格解析或网络抖动。
analysis.en: Only repeatable marker displacement plus two-hop parse evidence confirms smuggling. A single delay, 400/500, or close usually indicates strict parsing or network variance.

opsecTips.zh: 必须使用独占后端连接或隔离环境，避免测试字节污染其他用户请求。
opsecTips.en: Use an exclusive backend connection or isolated environment so test bytes cannot contaminate another user's request.

opsecTips.zh: 标记请求只访问无副作用测试路由，不对认证或缓存对象做验证。
opsecTips.en: Send markers only to side-effect-free test routes and avoid authentication or shared-cache objects.

name.zh: Host 覆盖头信任测试

description.zh: 检查应用或代理是否信任 Host、X-Forwarded-Host 及私有覆盖头，并据此生成链接、选择租户或路由到内部服务。
description.en: Checks whether an application or proxy trusts Host, X-Forwarded-Host, or private override headers for link generation, tenant selection, or internal routing.

subCategory.zh: Host 头信任与路由覆盖
subCategory.en: Host Header Trust and Route Override

prerequisites.zh: 目标根据请求主机生成绝对链接或选择虚拟主机/租户
prerequisites.en: The target uses request host data for absolute links or virtual-host or tenant selection.

prerequisites.zh: 可使用测试租户、测试邮件箱或无副作用路由观察结果
prerequisites.en: A test tenant, mailbox, or side-effect-free route is available for observation.

title.zh: Host 与代理覆盖头

execution.command:
Host: internal-service
X-Forwarded-Host: evil.com
X-Forwarded-Host: localhost
X-Host: evil.com
X-Original-Host: evil.com
X-Rewrite-Host: evil.com
X-Real-Host: evil.com
X-Forwarded-Server: evil.com
X-Override-URL: /admin
X-Forwarded-Server: localhost
X-HTTP-Host-Override: localhost
Forwarded: for=127.0.0.1;by=127.0.0.1;host=localhost

description.zh: 一次只修改一个 Host 类字段，并将 evil.com 替换为自有测试域；比较后端路由、生成链接和租户上下文。
description.en: Change one host-related field at a time, replace evil.com with a controlled test domain, and compare backend route, generated links, and tenant context.

overview.zh: Host 相关头既参与虚拟主机路由，也可能被应用用于密码重置链接、缓存键和租户选择。验证需要明确哪一个组件使用了哪个头，并证明产生了攻击者可控的安全结果，而不是只看到响应回显域名。
overview.en: Host-related headers affect virtual-host routing and may feed password-reset links, cache keys, or tenant selection. Validation must identify which component consumed which header and prove an attacker-controlled security outcome, not just reflected hostname text.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是代理未删除客户端可控覆盖头，后端又按优先级读取它们而不校验受信代理链和允许主机。Host 值因此可能污染绝对 URL、跨租户缓存或内部路由。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is a proxy failing to remove client-controlled override headers while the backend prioritizes them without validating a trusted proxy chain or allowed hosts. Host data can poison absolute URLs, cross-tenant cache entries, or internal routes.

exploitation.zh: 以正常主机建立路由、页面链接与测试邮件基线，然后一次修改一个头。记录代理选择、后端 tenant、Location 和邮件链接。只有链接指向自有测试域、租户越界或内部路由可达才成立；普通回显、统一拒绝和无敏感缓存差异不是漏洞。
exploitation.en: Baseline routing, page links, and test mail with the normal host, then change one header at a time. Record proxy selection, backend tenant, Location, and mail links. Count controlled-domain links, tenant crossing, or internal-route access; simple reflection, uniform rejection, and nonsensitive cache variation are not vulnerabilities.

mitigation.zh: 在边界显式允许 Host，并删除所有非必要转发与覆盖头；由可信代理写入唯一规范头。应用绝对 URL 使用配置的公共基础地址，租户和授权从已认证上下文解析，不从 Host 推断，缓存键包含规范租户。
mitigation.en: Allowlist Host at the edge, remove unnecessary forwarding and override headers, and have a trusted proxy set one canonical value. Generate absolute URLs from configured public origins, derive tenants and authorization from authenticated context, and include canonical tenant identity in cache keys.

title.zh: 建立规范 Host 基线

description.zh: 记录正常主机下的代理路由、租户、绝对链接、邮件和缓存行为。
description.en: Record proxy routing, tenant, absolute links, mail, and cache behavior under the canonical host.

title.zh: 逐头测试覆盖优先级
title.en: Test override precedence header by header

description.zh: 一次提交一个 Host 或转发覆盖头，用自有测试域并关联边界与后端日志。
description.en: Submit one Host or forwarding override at a time using a controlled domain and correlate edge and backend logs.

attackChain.payload:
Host: internal-service
X-Forwarded-Host: evil.com
X-Forwarded-Host: localhost
X-Host: evil.com
X-Original-Host: evil.com
X-Rewrite-Host: evil.com
X-Real-Host: evil.com
X-Forwarded-Server: evil.com
X-Override-URL: /admin
X-Forwarded-Server: localhost
X-HTTP-Host-Override: localhost
Forwarded: for=127.0.0.1;by=127.0.0.1;host=localhost

title.zh: 确认安全影响

description.zh: 验证是否污染重置链接、跨越租户/缓存边界或路由到内部资源，排除单纯字符串回显。
description.en: Verify reset-link poisoning, tenant or cache crossing, or internal routing, and exclude simple string reflection.

title.zh: 固定可信主机来源

description.zh: 配置主机允许列表和公共基础 URL 后重放全部头，确认非规范值统一拒绝。
description.en: Configure host allowlists and public base URLs, then replay all headers to confirm noncanonical values are rejected.

analysis.zh: 需要区分代理路由、应用 URL 生成、租户选择和缓存键四条数据流；同一个头在一条流中被回显，不代表它影响其他安全决策。
analysis.en: Separate proxy routing, application URL generation, tenant selection, and cache-key flows. Reflection in one flow does not prove influence over another security decision.

opsecTips.zh: 域名全部替换为自有不可执行测试域，密码重置只使用专用测试账号。
opsecTips.en: Replace domains with a controlled nonserving test origin and perform password-reset checks only on a dedicated account.

opsecTips.zh: 避免在共享缓存资源上测试 Host 污染，或先配置不缓存的测试路径。
opsecTips.en: Avoid Host poisoning tests on shared-cache resources or use an explicitly uncacheable test route.

name.zh: 数据库带外网络解析注入

description.zh: 按 Oracle、MySQL、SQL Server 和 PostgreSQL 方言触发受控 DNS、HTTP、LDAP 或文件共享访问，用于确认盲 SQL 注入与数据库出站能力。
description.en: Uses Oracle, MySQL, SQL Server, and PostgreSQL-specific network primitives to trigger controlled DNS, HTTP, LDAP, or file-share access for blind SQL injection validation.

prerequisites.zh: 输入可能进入数据库字符串或表达式上下文
prerequisites.en: Input may enter a database string or expression context.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离环境提供唯一受控 DNS/HTTP 回连域并允许审计数据库出站
prerequisites.en: An isolated environment provides a unique controlled callback domain and auditable database egress.

title.zh: 数据库方言带外样例

description.zh: 仅选择与已确认数据库方言匹配的行，将域名替换为每次请求唯一的自有回连标识；不要把多方言样例合并提交。
description.en: Select only lines matching the confirmed database dialect, replace the domain with a unique controlled callback label per request, and never combine dialects in one submission.

overview.zh: 带外 SQL 注入适用于响应中无直接数据但数据库具有网络解析能力的场景。DNS 或 HTTP 回连必须与唯一请求标识、数据库日志和时间窗口对应；互联网背景扫描或应用层回连不能算数据库注入证据。
overview.en: Out-of-band SQL injection applies when the response reveals no data but the database can resolve network resources. A DNS or HTTP callback must correlate with a unique request label, database logs, and time window; background traffic or application-tier callbacks do not prove database injection.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是不可信输入被拼接为 SQL，同时数据库账户仍可调用网络、文件或目录扩展函数且允许出站访问。不同产品函数和权限差异很大，错误方言通常只会产生语法错误。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is untrusted input concatenated into SQL while the database account retains network, file, or directory extension functions and egress. Functions and privileges are product-specific, and the wrong dialect usually only causes a syntax error.

exploitation.zh: 先通过错误特征或资产信息确认数据库类型，生成一次性子域并只提交对应样例。关联应用请求、数据库审计、DNS/HTTP 监听和源地址，使用无外连控制表达式复测。唯一回连且来源链吻合才成立；超时或单次公共 DNS 查询不充分。
exploitation.en: Identify the database from error or asset data, create a one-time subdomain, and submit only the matching sample. Correlate application request, database audit, callback listener, and source address, then repeat with a no-egress control expression. A unique correlated callback is evidence; timeout or one public DNS query is insufficient.

mitigation.zh: 使用参数化查询并禁止动态 SQL 片段；移除数据库账户不需要的网络、文件与扩展过程权限，在网络层阻断数据库出站并审计相关函数调用。修复后重放正常查询、注入样例和唯一回连控制。
mitigation.en: Use parameterized queries and prohibit dynamic SQL fragments. Remove unnecessary network, file, and extension-procedure privileges, block database egress at the network layer, and audit these functions. Replay normal queries, injection samples, and unique callbacks after remediation.

title.zh: 确认数据库方言与权限

description.zh: 从资产、错误和审计信息确认数据库产品，只选择相符且副作用最小的网络函数。
description.en: Use asset, error, and audit data to identify the database and select only a matching low-impact network primitive.

title.zh: 提交唯一回连标识

description.zh: 将示例域替换为一次性自有子域，逐条提交并记录请求 ID 与精确时间。
description.en: Replace the example domain with a one-time controlled subdomain, submit one line, and record request ID and exact time.

title.zh: 关联数据库出站证据

description.zh: 匹配唯一标签、源地址、数据库函数审计和请求时间，并用无网络控制表达式排除应用层请求。
description.en: Match unique label, source, database-function audit, and request timing, and use a no-network control expression to exclude application-tier traffic.

title.zh: 参数化并隔离出站

description.zh: 修复查询和数据库权限后重放样例，确认正常业务查询保留且不再产生回连。
description.en: After query and privilege remediation, replay samples to preserve valid queries without callbacks.

analysis.zh: 带外通道只证明网络请求来源时还不够；应将其绑定到具体 SQL 函数执行、数据库主体和应用输入，才能排除应用服务器自身请求。
analysis.en: A callback source alone is insufficient. Bind it to a specific SQL function, database principal, and application input to exclude requests made by the application tier.

opsecTips.zh: 唯一域名只编码随机请求 ID，不放入表名、用户名或真实数据。
opsecTips.en: Encode only a random request ID in callback domains, never table names, usernames, or real data.

opsecTips.zh: 每个目标只尝试已确认方言的一条低影响函数，并设置监听过期时间。
opsecTips.en: Try one low-impact primitive for the confirmed dialect per target and expire callback listeners promptly.

name.zh: 注入式重定向响应体 XSS

description.zh: 使用伪造的 301 响应头片段与 SVG 事件处理器，验证用户输入是否能结束响应头并创建可执行 HTML 响应体。
description.en: Uses a forged 301 header fragment and SVG event handler to test whether input can terminate headers and create an executable HTML response body.

subCategory.zh: 响应拆分后的 HTML 注入

prerequisites.zh: 用户输入可能进入原始响应头或代理错误响应模板
prerequisites.en: User input may reach raw response headers or a proxy error-response template.

prerequisites.zh: 可在隔离浏览器与不可缓存测试路由中观察解析结果
prerequisites.en: Parsing can be observed in an isolated browser on an uncacheable test route.

title.zh: 重定向响应与 SVG 片段

execution.command:
HTTP/1.1 301 Moved Permanently
Location:
Content-Type: text/html
<svg onload=alert``>

description.zh: 该四行是一个整体响应构造片段。只在隔离代理/测试路由中使用，并把可见动作替换为无副作用标记。
description.en: The four lines form one response-construction fragment. Use it only on an isolated proxy or test route and replace the visible action with a side-effect-free marker.

overview.zh: 该片段同时依赖响应边界被突破和浏览器把后续内容解析为 HTML。只有完整响应在浏览器中创建受输入控制的 SVG 节点并触发测试标记时才成立；把片段作为普通文本回显不是 XSS。
overview.en: This fragment depends on both crossing the response boundary and the browser parsing subsequent bytes as HTML. A finding requires the complete response to create an attacker-controlled SVG node and trigger a test marker; plain-text reflection is not XSS.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是应用或代理允许不可信数据控制状态行、Location、Content-Type 或头后正文，并且未对 HTML 上下文编码。响应拆分可把安全的重定向变成 text/html，随后 SVG 事件属性进入可执行上下文。
vulnerability.en: The cause is untrusted data controlling a status line, Location, Content-Type, or post-header body without HTML encoding. Response splitting can turn a safe redirect into text/html and place an SVG event attribute in an executable context.

exploitation.zh: 在不可缓存测试路由中先记录正常 301，再提交整体片段并捕获原始字节、DOM 和 CSP 事件。将动作替换为设置测试标记。只有服务端生成独立 HTML 响应且浏览器执行标记才成立；开发者工具手工编辑、扩展注入或文本节点不算。
exploitation.en: Baseline a normal 301 on an uncacheable test route, submit the complete fragment, and capture raw bytes, DOM, and CSP events. Replace the action with setting a test marker. Count only an independent server-generated HTML response that triggers the marker; DevTools edits, extensions, and text nodes do not.

mitigation.zh: 禁止用户输入控制原始 HTTP 响应结构，使用框架重定向与响应 API 并拒绝控制字符。对任何 HTML 输出执行上下文编码和成熟消毒，设置严格 CSP、nosniff 与不可缓存错误响应，并统一代理/应用解析。
mitigation.en: Do not let input control raw HTTP response structure. Use framework redirect and response APIs and reject controls. Apply context-aware encoding and maintained sanitization to HTML, deploy strict CSP and nosniff, avoid caching error responses, and align proxy and application parsing.

title.zh: 建立正常重定向基线

description.zh: 记录测试路由的原始 301 响应、Content-Type、缓存头和浏览器 DOM。
description.en: Record raw 301 bytes, Content-Type, cache headers, and browser DOM for the test route.

title.zh: 提交整体响应构造片段

description.zh: 在隔离环境保持四行结构，并把事件动作替换为无副作用测试标记。
description.en: Preserve the four-line structure in isolation and replace the event action with a side-effect-free marker.

attackChain.payload:
HTTP/1.1 301 Moved Permanently
Location:
Content-Type: text/html
<svg onload=alert``>

title.zh: 关联线上字节与 DOM

description.zh: 确认响应边界和媒体类型确实改变，SVG 成为元素且标记由浏览器触发。
description.en: Confirm that response boundaries and media type changed, the SVG became an element, and the browser triggered the marker.

title.zh: 固定响应结构并回归

description.zh: 改用结构化响应 API 和上下文编码后重放片段，确认其被拒绝或仅作为文本显示。
description.en: After structured response APIs and encoding, replay the fragment to confirm rejection or inert text rendering.

analysis.zh: 需同时证明响应拆分和浏览器执行两个条件。只证明其中一个时，应分别归为头注入或普通 HTML 反射，而不是完整 XSS 链。
analysis.en: Both response splitting and browser execution must be proven. If only one is present, classify it as header injection or inert HTML reflection rather than a full XSS chain.

opsecTips.zh: 仅在隔离浏览器设置内存标记，不使用 Cookie 读取、网络回传或持久化动作。
opsecTips.en: Set only an in-memory marker in an isolated browser; do not read cookies, send callbacks, or persist changes.

opsecTips.zh: 对测试路由关闭共享缓存，结束后清除浏览器状态和代理缓存。
opsecTips.en: Disable shared caching for the test route and clear browser state and proxy caches afterward.

name.zh: JWT 算法、JWK 与权限声明校验
name.en: JWT Algorithm, JWK, and Privilege Claim Validation

description.zh: 使用无签名令牌、算法头、内嵌 JWK 和管理员声明变体，验证服务端是否将签名策略与授权声明可靠绑定。
description.en: Uses unsigned tokens, algorithm headers, embedded JWK data, and administrator claims to verify that signature policy and authorization claims are securely bound.

prerequisites.zh: 目标使用 JWT 承载认证或授权状态
prerequisites.en: The target uses JWTs for authentication or authorization state.

prerequisites.zh: 可签发普通测试用户的有效基线令牌
prerequisites.en: A valid baseline token can be issued for a normal test user.

title.zh: JWT 头部与声明变体

description.zh: 前两行是令牌样本，后续行是待应用于测试令牌的头或声明片段；一次只改变一个字段并保留原普通用户身份。
description.en: The first two lines are token samples and the remaining lines are header or claim fragments for a test token; change one field at a time while retaining the normal-user identity.

overview.zh: JWT 的 Base64URL 内容可被任何人修改，安全性来自服务端固定的算法、可信密钥和签名验证，以及验证后对声明执行的授权策略。解码出管理员字段或服务器返回 401 并不能证明漏洞，需观察被修改令牌是否被接受并获得额外权限。
overview.en: Anyone can modify Base64URL JWT content. Security comes from server-pinned algorithms, trusted keys, signature verification, and authorization over verified claims. Decoding an admin field or receiving 401 does not prove a flaw; the modified token must be accepted and gain additional privilege.

vulnerability.zh: 风险来自接受 alg=none、根据令牌头动态切换对称/非对称算法、信任令牌内嵌 JWK，或直接相信 role/admin 等声明而不把它们绑定到签名密钥、issuer、audience 和服务端主体。
vulnerability.en: Risk comes from accepting alg=none, switching symmetric and asymmetric algorithms from token input, trusting embedded JWK material, or consuming role and admin claims without binding them to a trusted key, issuer, audience, and server-side principal.

exploitation.zh: 保存普通用户有效令牌及其授权响应，复制后一次只修改算法、JWK 或权限声明，再访问专用管理员测试对象。记录令牌验证日志与最终主体。只有服务端接受篡改令牌且授权提升才成立；令牌解析成功、错误差异或客户端 UI 变化均不足。
exploitation.en: Save a valid normal-user token and authorization baseline, then alter only the algorithm, JWK, or privilege claim and request a dedicated admin test object. Record token-validation logs and the final principal. A finding requires acceptance plus privilege gain; parsing, error differences, or client UI changes are insufficient.

mitigation.zh: 在服务端配置中固定允许算法和可信密钥来源，拒绝 none、未知 crit 和令牌提供的任意 JWK/URL。验证签名、issuer、audience、时间与 token type 后，从受信身份或服务端权限表计算授权，不直接相信可编辑声明。
mitigation.en: Pin allowed algorithms and trusted key sources in server configuration; reject none, unknown critical headers, and arbitrary token-supplied JWK or URLs. Validate signature, issuer, audience, time, and token type, then derive authorization from trusted identity or server-side policy rather than editable claims.

title.zh: 建立普通用户令牌基线

description.zh: 记录有效令牌的 issuer、audience、算法、主体和对管理员测试对象的拒绝结果。
description.en: Record issuer, audience, algorithm, principal, and denied access to the administrative test object for a valid token.

title.zh: 单字段构造令牌变体

description.zh: 一次只替换算法头、JWK 或权限声明，并保持其余上下文可比较。
description.en: Change only the algorithm header, JWK, or privilege claim while keeping the rest of the context comparable.

title.zh: 关联验证与授权主体

description.zh: 检查签名验证日志、解析密钥、最终主体及对象授权，排除客户端解码和 UI 假象。
description.en: Inspect signature logs, selected key, final principal, and object authorization, excluding client decoding and UI artifacts.

title.zh: 固定信任策略并回归

description.zh: 固定算法和密钥并改为服务端授权后，重放全部变体与合法令牌。
description.en: After pinning algorithms and keys and moving authorization server-side, replay every variant and valid token.

analysis.zh: 必须区分令牌语法解析、密码学验证、主体建立和对象授权四个阶段。只有篡改令牌穿过全部阶段并提升权限才是可利用问题。
analysis.en: Separate token parsing, cryptographic validation, principal construction, and object authorization. Exploitability requires a modified token to pass all stages and elevate privilege.

opsecTips.zh: 只针对专用测试用户和管理员测试对象，不修改真实用户声明。
opsecTips.en: Use only a dedicated test user and administrative test object, never real-user claims.

opsecTips.zh: 报告中遮盖真实签名、密钥标识和个人声明，仅保留结构证据。
opsecTips.en: Redact real signatures, key identifiers, and personal claims from reports while retaining structural evidence.

name.zh: Bearer 空值与未定义令牌处理
name.en: Bearer Null and Undefined Token Handling

description.zh: 使用 null 与 undefined 作为 Bearer 凭据，验证网关、框架和业务代码是否将占位字符串错误映射为已认证或默认主体。
description.en: Uses null and undefined as Bearer credentials to test whether gateways, frameworks, or application code map placeholder strings to an authenticated or default principal.

prerequisites.zh: 目标使用 Authorization: Bearer 认证
prerequisites.en: The target uses Authorization: Bearer authentication.

prerequisites.zh: 存在明确要求登录的无副作用测试资源
prerequisites.en: A side-effect-free test resource clearly requires authentication.

title.zh: Bearer 占位字符串

description.zh: 分别作为完整 Authorization 值发送，并与无头、空头、随机无效令牌及有效测试令牌对照。
description.en: Send each as the complete Authorization value and compare with absent, empty, random-invalid, and valid test-token controls.

overview.zh: 前端序列化错误常把 JavaScript 的 null/undefined 变成字面字符串。安全认证应把它们与其他无效凭据同样拒绝；只有它们创建主体、复用旧会话或访问受保护对象时才是漏洞。
overview.en: Frontend serialization bugs often turn JavaScript null or undefined into literal strings. Secure authentication rejects them like any invalid credential. A flaw exists only if they create a principal, reuse stale state, or access a protected object.

vulnerability.zh: 根因可能是存在性判断只检查头非空、缓存键把无效值映射到共享身份，或中间件验证失败后仍继续执行并保留先前主体。多层认证链若没有显式清除安全上下文，容易出现失败后放行。
vulnerability.en: Causes include checking only that a header is nonempty, mapping invalid values to a shared cache key, or continuing after middleware failure with a stale principal. Layered authentication that does not explicitly clear security context can fail open.

exploitation.zh: 在新会话中依次比较无头、空头、随机令牌、两个占位字符串和有效令牌，记录网关与应用的状态码、WWW-Authenticate、主体和对象授权。只有占位值相对其他无效对照获得额外访问才成立。
exploitation.en: In fresh sessions compare absent, empty, random, placeholder, and valid tokens and record gateway and application status, WWW-Authenticate, principal, and object authorization. Count only placeholder values that gain access beyond the other invalid controls.

mitigation.zh: 严格解析 Bearer 语法并执行完整令牌验证，任何异常都清除主体并立即失败关闭。认证缓存键包含可信 issuer 与令牌哈希，不缓存失败为用户；业务处理器必须要求已验证主体而非仅检查头存在。
mitigation.en: Strictly parse Bearer syntax and fully validate tokens; on every error clear the principal and fail closed. Key authentication caches by trusted issuer and token hash, never cache failures as users, and require a verified principal rather than header presence in handlers.

title.zh: 建立无效凭据矩阵

description.zh: 使用新会话记录无头、空头、随机令牌和有效令牌的认证与授权基线。
description.en: Use fresh sessions to baseline absent, empty, random, and valid tokens for authentication and authorization.

title.zh: 提交占位 Bearer 值

description.zh: 分别发送 null 与 undefined，并保持 Cookie、缓存和请求资源一致。
description.en: Send null and undefined separately while holding cookies, cache state, and resource constant.

title.zh: 核对最终安全主体

description.zh: 关联网关、认证中间件和业务授权日志，确认是否生成、保留或复用主体。
description.en: Correlate gateway, authentication middleware, and authorization logs to detect created, retained, or reused principals.

title.zh: 失败关闭并复测

description.zh: 修复解析与上下文清理后重放矩阵，确认所有无效值一致拒绝。
description.en: After parser and context cleanup fixes, replay the matrix to confirm consistent rejection of every invalid value.

analysis.zh: 状态码相同不保证安全，应检查最终主体、授权结果和缓存命中。反之，错误消息不同但都无主体且拒绝访问通常只是输入校验差异。
analysis.en: Equal status codes do not guarantee safety; inspect final principal, authorization, and cache hits. Different errors that all clear the principal and deny access are usually only validation differences.

opsecTips.zh: 每次使用全新 Cookie 容器，避免旧会话让无效令牌看似有效。
opsecTips.en: Use a fresh cookie jar for every case so stale sessions cannot make invalid tokens appear valid.

opsecTips.zh: 只访问只读测试资源，避免认证边界测试触发业务状态变化。
opsecTips.en: Use a read-only test resource so authentication-boundary checks cannot alter business state.

name.zh: Session ID 路径遍历

description.zh: 通过 session_id、PHPSESSID 与 JSESSIONID 中的父目录片段，验证文件型会话存储是否把外部标识直接拼接为文件路径。
description.en: Uses parent-directory segments in session_id, PHPSESSID, and JSESSIONID to test whether file-backed session stores concatenate external identifiers into filesystem paths.

subCategory.zh: 文件型会话存储路径遍历

prerequisites.zh: 目标使用客户端可控会话标识并可能采用文件存储
prerequisites.en: The target accepts a client-controlled session identifier and may use file storage.

prerequisites.zh: 测试环境提供会话目录外的无敏感标记文件
prerequisites.en: A nonsensitive marker file exists outside the session directory in the test environment.

title.zh: 会话标识路径样例

description.zh: 按目标实际使用的 Cookie 或参数选择一行，并把系统路径替换为测试标记；不要同时设置多个会话标识。
description.en: Choose the line matching the target cookie or parameter, replace the system path with a test marker, and do not set multiple session identifiers simultaneously.

overview.zh: 某些会话实现用标识符构造磁盘文件名。测试目标是确认规范化后的标识能否越过会话根目录并导致文件读取、覆盖或异常会话加载，而不是把 Cookie 中出现 ../ 本身当作漏洞。
overview.en: Some session implementations build disk filenames from identifiers. The test asks whether canonicalized input escapes the session root and reads, overwrites, or loads an unintended file; the presence of ../ in a cookie alone is not a vulnerability.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是会话 ID 缺少严格字符集和长度约束，经过 URL 解码后直接与目录拼接。若存储层未解析规范路径并验证根目录，编码斜杠和父目录段可能访问任意文件。
vulnerability.en: The cause is a session ID without a strict alphabet and length being URL-decoded and concatenated with a directory. Without canonical-path and root checks, encoded separators and parent segments can reach unintended files.

exploitation.zh: 确认实际会话 Cookie 名与存储后端，用合法会话建立文件访问基线，再将路径替换为隔离标记并逐条测试。通过文件系统遥测或明确标记内容确认越界。注销、创建新会话、400 或通用错误都不等于文件访问。
exploitation.en: Identify the actual session cookie and backend, establish a valid-session baseline, then replace paths with an isolated marker and test one line at a time. Confirm escape through filesystem telemetry or marker content. Logout, new-session issuance, 400, or generic errors do not prove file access.

mitigation.zh: 使用密码学随机且固定编码的会话 ID，并在框架入口实施长度与字符集白名单。存储层使用哈希或数据库键而不是原始 ID 文件名；若必须落盘，解析规范路径并强制根目录、禁用符号链接越界。
mitigation.en: Use cryptographically random session IDs with a fixed encoding and enforce length and alphabet at framework entry. Use a hash or database key rather than the raw ID as a filename; if files are necessary, resolve canonical paths, enforce the root, and block symlink escape.

title.zh: 识别会话存储实现

description.zh: 确认 Cookie 名、解码位置、会话后端和文件命名规则，并准备目录外标记。
description.en: Identify cookie name, decode point, backend, and filename rules and prepare a marker outside the session root.

title.zh: 逐会话名提交路径变体
title.en: Submit path variants for the active session name

description.zh: 只选目标实际使用的一种会话标识，把系统路径替换为标记并记录请求 ID。
description.en: Use only the session identifier active on the target, replace system paths with the marker, and record the request ID.

title.zh: 确认规范路径越界

description.zh: 用文件访问日志、路径审计或标记内容证明会话处理器越过根目录。
description.en: Use file-access logs, path audit, or marker content to prove the session handler escaped its root.

title.zh: 固定 ID 格式并回归

description.zh: 改用固定字符集与哈希存储键后，重放合法会话和所有路径样例。
description.en: After fixed alphabets and hashed storage keys, replay valid sessions and all path samples.

analysis.zh: 重点区分会话失效与文件路径越界。只有规范路径、文件访问或标记读取能确认后者；重新签发 Cookie 通常说明实现安全拒绝了非法 ID。
analysis.en: Distinguish session invalidation from filesystem escape. Only canonical path, file access, or marker reads prove the latter; issuing a new cookie often means the invalid ID was safely rejected.

opsecTips.zh: 将 `/etc/passwd` 等示例目标全部替换为无敏感测试标记。
opsecTips.en: Replace examples such as /etc/passwd with a nonsensitive test marker.

opsecTips.zh: 使用独立测试账号并在结束后清理其会话文件和 Cookie。
opsecTips.en: Use an isolated test account and remove its session files and cookies afterward.

name.zh: 登录认证 SQL 注入

description.zh: 使用引号、布尔恒真和注释边界变体，验证登录标识是否被拼接进 SQL 并改变凭据匹配条件。
description.en: Uses quote, tautology, and comment-boundary variants to test whether login identifiers are concatenated into SQL and alter credential matching.

prerequisites.zh: 登录标识或密码进入关系型数据库查询
prerequisites.en: A login identifier or password reaches a relational database query.

prerequisites.zh: 使用专用测试账户和可审计数据库副本
prerequisites.en: A dedicated test account and auditable database copy are available.

title.zh: 登录 SQL 布尔与注释变体
title.en: Login SQL Boolean and Comment Variants

description.zh: 逐条用于授权测试账户字段，并与随机错误密码、引号控制输入和有效登录对照；不要对真实管理员账户批量尝试。
description.en: Use each line separately in a dedicated test-account field and compare with a random bad password, quote control, and valid login; do not spray real administrator accounts.

overview.zh: 登录 SQL 注入必须证明输入改变了数据库查询语义，并使原本错误的凭据建立了有效服务端会话。重定向到登录后页面、错误消息变化或前端显示用户名都可能由缓存和 UI 逻辑造成。
overview.en: Login SQL injection requires proof that input changed database semantics and established a valid server-side session from invalid credentials. Redirects, error changes, or a displayed username can arise from caching or UI logic.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是把用户名或密码直接拼接进 WHERE 条件。攻击输入通过闭合引号、添加恒真谓词或注释剩余比较，使数据库返回非预期用户行；应用若只取第一行便可能建立错误主体。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is concatenating username or password into a WHERE clause. Input closes a quote, adds a tautology, or comments out the remaining comparison so the database returns an unintended row, which the application may use as the principal.

exploitation.zh: 在测试副本中记录错误密码、单引号控制和有效测试账号基线，再逐条提交变体并关联参数化前后的数据库审计。若建立会话，访问只属于该测试主体的无副作用资源确认身份。只出现 SQL 错误或响应长度差异不构成认证绕过。
exploitation.en: In a test copy, baseline a bad password, quote control, and valid account, then submit each variant and correlate database audit with the query construction. If a session forms, access a harmless resource unique to the test principal. SQL errors or response-length differences alone are not authentication bypass.

mitigation.zh: 所有登录查询使用参数化语句和严格类型绑定，不动态拼接标识符或条件。密码使用独立哈希验证而非 SQL 明文比较，统一失败响应并限制速率，同时监控查询语法错误和异常会话建立。
mitigation.en: Use parameterized statements and strict type binding for every login query; never concatenate identifiers or predicates. Verify password hashes separately rather than comparing plaintext in SQL, normalize failure responses, rate-limit attempts, and monitor syntax errors and anomalous sessions.

title.zh: 建立登录对照组

description.zh: 记录错误密码、引号输入和有效测试账号的响应、会话 Cookie 与数据库查询。
description.en: Record responses, session cookies, and database queries for a bad password, quote input, and valid test account.

title.zh: 逐条提交 SQL 变体

description.zh: 一次只修改一个认证字段并保留数据库审计与请求关联标识。
description.en: Change one authentication field per request and preserve database audit and request correlation.

title.zh: 验证服务端会话主体

description.zh: 使用无副作用测试资源确认会话主体，并证明查询语义而非前端状态发生改变。
description.en: Use a harmless test resource to confirm the session principal and prove database semantics, not frontend state, changed.

title.zh: 参数化查询并回归

description.zh: 修复后重放有效、无效和全部注入输入，确认只允许正确凭据建立会话。
description.en: After remediation replay valid, invalid, and every injection input to confirm only correct credentials create sessions.

analysis.zh: 确认链应同时包含查询结构变化、非预期用户行和有效服务端会话。只看到数据库错误属于注入线索，但尚未证明认证绕过。
analysis.en: Confirmation should include altered query structure, an unintended user row, and a valid server-side session. A database error is an injection signal but does not yet prove authentication bypass.

opsecTips.zh: 仅使用专用测试账号与数据库副本，不探测真实管理员用户名。
opsecTips.en: Use only dedicated test accounts and a database copy; do not probe real administrator usernames.

opsecTips.zh: 严格限速并在每次尝试后注销测试会话，避免锁定和审计噪声。
opsecTips.en: Rate-limit strictly and log out test sessions after each attempt to avoid lockouts and audit noise.

name.zh: 客户端可控权限参数

description.zh: 通过 admin、role、authenticated、debug 等参数验证服务端是否直接接受客户端声明的身份、角色或运行模式。
description.en: Uses admin, role, authenticated, and debug parameters to test whether the server directly accepts client-declared identity, privilege, or runtime mode.

prerequisites.zh: 目标请求包含可疑身份、角色、布尔权限或调试字段
prerequisites.en: A target request contains suspicious identity, role, boolean privilege, or debug fields.

prerequisites.zh: 可比较普通与特权测试账号对同一对象的授权
prerequisites.en: Normal and privileged test accounts can be compared against the same object.

title.zh: 角色与布尔权限参数

execution.command:
admin=true
isAdmin=1
role=admin
user=admin
authenticated=true
is_admin=true
debug=true
test=test

description.zh: 一次只把一个字段加入或替换到普通测试账号请求中，观察服务端持久化对象、最终主体和对象授权。
description.en: Add or replace one field at a time in a normal test-account request and inspect persisted objects, final principal, and object authorization.

overview.zh: 客户端字段可以描述界面状态，但不能成为服务端认证和权限事实。该测试确认请求中的角色、管理员、已认证或调试标志是否影响真实服务端主体、持久化属性或受保护操作。
overview.en: Client fields may describe UI state but cannot be authoritative security facts. This test determines whether role, admin, authenticated, or debug flags alter the real server principal, persisted attributes, or protected operations.

vulnerability.zh: 根因包括通用对象绑定把敏感字段批量赋值、业务处理器直接读取请求布尔值，或授权中间件信任前端传来的 user/role。字段名不同但都反映了缺少服务端允许列表和主体绑定。
vulnerability.en: Causes include mass assignment of sensitive fields, handlers reading request booleans directly, or authorization middleware trusting client user or role values. Different field names share the absence of server-side allowlisting and principal binding.

exploitation.zh: 使用普通测试账号保存规范请求和授权基线，一次加入一个参数并检查响应、数据库变更、最终主体及专用管理测试对象。只有角色/属性被持久化或受保护操作获批才成立；隐藏按钮、字段回显或 debug 文本本身不是越权。
exploitation.en: Save a canonical request and authorization baseline for a normal test user, add one parameter at a time, and inspect response, database changes, final principal, and a dedicated admin test object. A finding requires persisted privilege or an approved protected operation; hidden buttons, reflected fields, or debug text are not authorization bypass.

mitigation.zh: 对每个 DTO 使用显式允许字段，禁止客户端写入角色、owner、认证和内部模式。身份只来自已验证会话/令牌，授权按服务端主体、对象和动作执行；敏感角色变更使用独立管理流程、再认证与审计。
