exploitation.en: Prepare a nonexecutable empty directory in a disposable database container and submit one sample using a random filename and fixed marker. Correlate database audit, process write, and file hash, then delete it immediately. Never write scripts, overwrite files, or test production paths.

mitigation.zh: 修复注入并移除应用数据库账户的 FILE/外部写入权限，数据库容器使用只读根文件系统和最小可写卷，Web 服务与数据库文件系统隔离，并监控异常 OUTFILE/DUMPFILE 语句。
mitigation.en: Fix injection and remove FILE or external-write privileges from the application database account, use a read-only database root with minimal writable volumes, isolate web and database filesystems, and monitor anomalous OUTFILE or DUMPFILE statements.

title.zh: 准备不可执行测试目录

description.zh: 在一次性容器创建空目录、随机文件名与固定无害标记。
description.en: Create an empty directory, random filename, and fixed harmless marker in a disposable container.

title.zh: 提交单次 OUTFILE 样例

description.zh: 将目标替换为测试目录并只执行一次，保留请求与数据库审计。
description.en: Replace the target with the test directory, execute once, and retain request and database audit.

title.zh: 确认数据库进程写入

description.zh: 匹配文件所有者、时间、哈希和数据库日志，排除应用或预置文件。
description.en: Match file owner, time, hash, and database logs, excluding application-created or preexisting files.

title.zh: 删除文件并撤销权限
title.en: Delete the file and revoke privilege

description.zh: 清理测试文件、移除写权限并修复查询后重放，确认语句无法创建文件。
description.en: Remove the test file, revoke write privilege, fix the query, and replay to confirm no file is created.

analysis.zh: 将 SQL 注入、数据库文件权限、目录可写和 Web 执行映射分别证明。测试文件写入不自动等于 WebShell 或 RCE。
analysis.en: Prove SQL injection, database file privilege, directory writability, and web execution mapping separately. A test file write is not automatically a webshell or RCE.

opsecTips.zh: 仅在一次性容器写固定标记，禁止写 PHP/JSP/ASP 或覆盖文件。
opsecTips.en: Write only a fixed marker in a disposable container; never write PHP, JSP, ASP, or overwrite files.

opsecTips.zh: 验证后立即删除文件并撤销临时权限，保存哈希而非文件内容。
opsecTips.en: Delete the file and revoke temporary privilege immediately, retaining a hash rather than content.

name.zh: SQLite 版本、Schema 与列枚举
name.en: SQLite Version, Schema, and Column Enumeration

description.zh: 使用 sqlite_version、sqlite_master、group_concat 与 pragma_table_info 验证 SQLite UNION 注入和测试 schema 元数据可见性。
description.en: Uses sqlite_version, sqlite_master, group_concat, and pragma_table_info to test SQLite UNION injection and visibility of test-schema metadata.

prerequisites.zh: 目标已确认使用 SQLite 且测试查询列数兼容 UNION
prerequisites.en: The target is confirmed to use SQLite and the test query has UNION-compatible columns.

prerequisites.zh: 使用只含伪数据和专用 users 表的数据库副本
prerequisites.en: A database copy contains only synthetic data and a dedicated users table.

title.zh: SQLite 元数据查询

execution.command:
1 UNION SELECT sqlite_version()--
1 UNION SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master--
1 UNION SELECT group_concat(tbl_name) FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'--
1 UNION SELECT group_concat(name) FROM pragma_table_info('users')--

description.zh: 逐条对测试数据库使用，并把 users 替换为专用伪数据表；限制返回长度，不枚举真实生产 schema。
description.en: Use each line separately against the test database, replace users with a dedicated synthetic table, and cap output length rather than enumerating production schema.

overview.zh: 这些样例专用于 SQLite，不是 DB2、Cassandra 或 BigQuery 通用语法。它们从版本确认逐步进入 schema 和列元数据，只有测试数据库中的固定标记被 UNION 合并到响应时才能确认注入。
overview.en: These samples are SQLite-specific, not generic DB2, Cassandra, or BigQuery syntax. They move from version identification to schema and column metadata, and require a fixed marker from the test database to appear through UNION for confirmation.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是用户输入被拼接进 SQLite 查询结构，允许 UNION 注入执行 sqlite_master 或 PRAGMA 表值函数。即使业务表权限有限，SQLite 文件连接通常仍能读取该数据库内的完整 schema。
vulnerability.en: The cause is user input concatenated into SQLite query structure, permitting UNION access to sqlite_master or PRAGMA table-valued functions. Even limited business queries often share full schema visibility within the connected SQLite file.

exploitation.zh: 先用常量 UNION 确认列数和类型，再依次查询版本、专用测试表定义和列名，并关联最终 SQL 与固定伪数据。错误差异或页面中出现 SQLite 字样不足；元数据结果和数据库审计必须一致。
exploitation.en: Use constant UNION values to establish column count and type, then query version and a dedicated test table definition and columns. Correlate final SQL with fixed synthetic data. Error differences or a SQLite string in a page are insufficient; metadata output and audit must agree.

mitigation.zh: 所有查询值使用参数绑定，动态列/表名映射到服务端枚举；应用不得暴露任意 SQL 片段。SQLite 文件和备份使用最小文件权限，错误不返回 schema，回归覆盖 UNION 与 PRAGMA 输入。
mitigation.en: Bind every query value and map dynamic relation or column names through server-side enums; never expose raw SQL fragments. Protect SQLite files and backups with least filesystem privilege, suppress schema errors, and regress UNION and PRAGMA inputs.

title.zh: 确认 SQLite 与 UNION 列型
title.en: Confirm SQLite and UNION column types

description.zh: 用资产信息和常量 UNION 建立数据库方言、列数及回显位置。
description.en: Use asset information and constant UNION values to establish dialect, column count, and reflected position.

title.zh: 查询测试 schema 元数据

description.zh: 逐条运行版本、sqlite_master 和 PRAGMA 样例，只指向专用测试表。
description.en: Run version, sqlite_master, and PRAGMA samples separately and target only the dedicated test table.

attackChain.payload:
1 UNION SELECT sqlite_version()--
1 UNION SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master--
1 UNION SELECT group_concat(tbl_name) FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'--
1 UNION SELECT group_concat(name) FROM pragma_table_info('users')--

title.zh: 关联结果与数据库审计

description.zh: 确认固定测试表名和列名进入结果，并排除静态文档、错误页与缓存。
description.en: Confirm fixed test relation and column names in output while excluding documentation, error pages, and caches.

title.zh: 参数化并限制文件权限

description.zh: 修复查询后重放所有样例，确认合法检索保留且 schema 语句只作为数据处理。
description.en: After query remediation replay all samples to preserve valid retrieval while schema syntax is treated only as data.

analysis.zh: 版本、schema、表名和列名是不同深度的证据。只在专用测试库验证到固定元数据即可停止，不需要导出表内容。
analysis.en: Version, schema, relation, and column names represent increasing evidence depth. Stop after fixed metadata is proven in a dedicated test database; table contents are unnecessary.

opsecTips.zh: 将 users 替换为伪数据表并限制 group_concat 输出，避免收集生产 schema。
opsecTips.en: Replace users with a synthetic table and cap group_concat output to avoid collecting production schema.

opsecTips.zh: 使用数据库副本并保留只读快照，测试结束后销毁。
opsecTips.en: Use a database copy with a read-only snapshot and destroy it after testing.

name.zh: SQLite ATTACH DATABASE 文件写入

description.zh: 使用 ATTACH、CREATE TABLE 与 INSERT 组合验证堆叠 SQLite 注入是否能在数据库进程可写目录创建测试数据库文件。
description.en: Uses ATTACH, CREATE TABLE, and INSERT to test whether stacked SQLite injection can create a test database file in a process-writable directory.

subCategory.zh: SQLite 附加数据库文件写入

prerequisites.zh: 仅在一次性 SQLite 容器中验证堆叠语句和文件写入
prerequisites.en: Stacked statements and file writes are tested only in a disposable SQLite container.

prerequisites.zh: 测试目录在 Web 根外、为空且可完整回滚
prerequisites.en: The test directory is empty, outside the web root, and fully reversible.

title.zh: ATTACH 数据库写入样例

execution.command: ATTACH DATABASE '/var/www/html/shell.php' AS lol;CREATE TABLE lol.pwn(dataz text);INSERT INTO lol.pwn(dataz) VALUES('<?php system(["cmd"]);?>');--

description.zh: 原始行保留用于数据集审校；真实验证必须把 Web 路径改为一次性非执行目录，把脚本内容改为固定文本标记，并只执行一次。
description.en: The original line is retained for dataset review. Real validation must use a disposable nonexecutable directory, replace script content with a fixed text marker, and run only once.

overview.zh: ATTACH DATABASE 可在 SQLite 进程有权限的位置创建新数据库文件。该能力是注入与文件权限组合后的影响证明，不等于写入有效 PHP 文件；SQLite 文件头、目录映射和 Web 处理器都会影响后续结果。
overview.en: ATTACH DATABASE can create a database file where the SQLite process has permission. This is an impact proof combining injection and filesystem privilege, not automatic creation of a valid PHP file; SQLite headers, directory mapping, and web handlers affect any later outcome.

vulnerability.zh: 链条需要注入点允许堆叠语句、数据库连接允许 ATTACH、进程拥有目标目录写权限，并且用户可控制新库路径和内容。若目标目录由 Web 服务器解释，风险可能升级，但必须独立验证。
vulnerability.en: The chain requires stacked statements, ATTACH support, process write privilege, and control of the new database path and records. Risk may escalate if a web server interprets the target directory, but that boundary must be verified separately.

exploitation.zh: 在一次性容器创建空的不可执行目录，把路径和插入内容改为随机文件名与固定文本，提交一次后关联 SQL 审计、文件所有者、SQLite 文件头和标记记录。不得写脚本、覆盖文件或访问 Web 路由。
exploitation.en: In a disposable container create an empty nonexecutable directory, use a random filename and fixed text, submit once, and correlate SQL audit, owner, SQLite header, and marker record. Never write script content, overwrite files, or expose a web route.

mitigation.zh: 修复注入并禁用不需要的多语句，数据库文件目录和应用运行身份采用最小权限，Web 根目录不可由数据库进程写入。限制 ATTACH 能力、使用只读文件系统，并监控 ATTACH/CREATE TABLE 异常组合。
mitigation.en: Fix injection and disable unnecessary multi-statements, apply least privilege to database directories and the application identity, and prevent database writes to web roots. Restrict ATTACH, use a read-only filesystem, and monitor anomalous ATTACH and CREATE TABLE combinations.

title.zh: 准备隔离不可执行目录

description.zh: 在一次性容器创建空目录、随机路径和固定文本标记。
description.en: Create an empty directory, random path, and fixed text marker in a disposable container.

title.zh: 改写并提交 ATTACH 样例
title.en: Rewrite and submit the ATTACH sample

description.zh: 替换 Web 路径与 PHP 内容后只执行一次，保留最终 SQL。
description.en: Replace the web path and PHP content, execute once, and retain final SQL.

attackChain.payload: ATTACH DATABASE '/var/www/html/shell.php' AS lol;CREATE TABLE lol.pwn(dataz text);INSERT INTO lol.pwn(dataz) VALUES('<?php system(["cmd"]);?>');--

title.zh: 确认 SQLite 进程文件写入

description.zh: 匹配数据库审计、文件所有者、文件头和固定记录，排除预置文件。
description.en: Match database audit, file owner, file header, and fixed record, excluding preexisting files.

title.zh: 清理文件并撤销能力
title.en: Clean the file and revoke capability

description.zh: 删除测试库、收紧目录权限并修复查询后重放，确认 ATTACH 无法写入。
description.en: Delete the test database, tighten directory permissions, fix the query, and replay to confirm ATTACH cannot write.

analysis.zh: 分别报告堆叠 SQL、ATTACH 权限、文件创建与 Web 执行映射。只确认数据库文件创建时，结论应停留在文件写入而非 WebShell/RCE。
analysis.en: Report stacked SQL, ATTACH privilege, file creation, and web execution mapping separately. If only database-file creation is proven, stop at file write rather than webshell or RCE.

opsecTips.zh: 只写一次性目录中的固定文本数据库，禁止使用 Web 根和脚本内容。
opsecTips.en: Write only a fixed-text database in a disposable directory; never use a web root or script content.

opsecTips.zh: 测试前后校验目录清单和哈希，完成后删除整个容器。
opsecTips.en: Inventory and hash the directory before and after testing and destroy the entire container afterward.

name.zh: INFORMATION_SCHEMA 表与列枚举

description.zh: 使用 INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES/COLUMNS 验证 UNION 注入是否能枚举测试数据库的关系和列元数据。
description.en: Uses INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES and COLUMNS to test whether UNION injection can enumerate relation and column metadata in a test database.

prerequisites.zh: 目标数据库支持 INFORMATION_SCHEMA 且查询列型兼容
prerequisites.en: The target database supports INFORMATION_SCHEMA and compatible query columns.

prerequisites.zh: 专用 schema 只含少量伪表与列
prerequisites.en: A dedicated schema contains only a small set of synthetic relations and columns.

title.zh: 表与列目录查询

execution.command:
1 UNION SELECT table_name FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES--
1 UNION SELECT column_name FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE table_name='users'--

description.zh: 逐条用于专用 schema，并把 users 替换为伪表；添加数据库/Schema 过滤和结果上限。
description.en: Use each line separately in a dedicated schema, replace users with a synthetic relation, and add database or schema filters and a result limit.

overview.zh: INFORMATION_SCHEMA 是多个关系型数据库暴露元数据的标准接口，但具体字段、权限和大小写行为不同。测试只需证明专用测试表/列可被注入查询枚举，不应扫描整个生产目录。
overview.en: INFORMATION_SCHEMA is a standard metadata interface across several relational databases, though fields, privileges, and case rules differ. Testing only needs to prove that dedicated test relation and column names are enumerable, not scan the full production catalog.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是输入控制 UNION 查询结构，数据库账户又可读取目录视图。元数据可帮助推断业务 schema 和敏感列，即使当前查询本身不返回业务记录。
vulnerability.en: The cause is input controlling UNION structure while the database account can read catalog views. Metadata can reveal business schema and sensitive columns even when the original query returns no business records.

exploitation.zh: 先确认方言、列数和专用 schema，再分别查询测试表名和一个表的测试列名，并关联最终 SQL 与固定结果。加 schema 过滤和 LIMIT。错误或目录关键字回显不足，必须返回预置元数据。
exploitation.en: Confirm dialect, column count, and dedicated schema, then query a synthetic relation name and its fixed columns, correlating final SQL and output. Apply schema filtering and LIMIT. Errors or reflected catalog keywords are insufficient; preset metadata must be returned.

mitigation.zh: 参数化查询，动态标识符通过服务端映射，数据库账户只授予业务对象权限并在可行时限制目录可见性。错误不泄露 schema，异常 INFORMATION_SCHEMA 访问进入审计和告警。
mitigation.en: Parameterize queries, map dynamic identifiers server-side, grant the account only business-object privileges, and restrict catalog visibility where feasible. Suppress schema errors and audit anomalous INFORMATION_SCHEMA access.

title.zh: 确认目录方言与测试 schema
title.en: Confirm catalog dialect and test schema

description.zh: 建立专用 schema 和固定表/列名，并记录正常查询与权限。
description.en: Establish a dedicated schema with fixed relation and column names and record normal queries and privileges.

title.zh: 逐层查询测试元数据

description.zh: 先表后列逐条提交，添加 schema 过滤与结果上限。
description.en: Submit relation then column queries separately with schema filters and result limits.

attackChain.payload:
1 UNION SELECT table_name FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES--
1 UNION SELECT column_name FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE table_name='users'--

title.zh: 确认固定目录结果

description.zh: 将预置表/列名与最终 SQL 和数据库审计关联，排除静态提示。
description.en: Correlate preset relation and column names with final SQL and database audit, excluding static hints.

title.zh: 收紧查询与目录权限

description.zh: 修复后重放样例，确认合法业务查询保留且目录输入不再改变结构。
description.en: After remediation replay samples to preserve valid business queries while catalog input no longer alters structure.

analysis.zh: 以返回的专用测试元数据为充分证据并停止，不需要读取真实表数据。报告应注明数据库产品、目录范围和账户权限。
analysis.en: Treat returned dedicated test metadata as sufficient and stop without reading real records. State database product, catalog scope, and account privileges.

opsecTips.zh: 只查询专用 schema，并强制 LIMIT/过滤，禁止全库目录导出。
opsecTips.en: Query only the dedicated schema with mandatory filters and LIMIT; never export the full catalog.

opsecTips.zh: 表名与列名使用伪数据，不在报告中记录生产 schema。
opsecTips.en: Use synthetic relation and column names and omit production schema from reports.

name.zh: 堆叠语句与条件延迟探测
name.en: Stacked Statement and Conditional Delay Probes

description.zh: 使用分号堆叠和 IF 条件 SLEEP 变体验证驱动是否允许额外语句或可控查询延迟。
description.en: Uses semicolon stacking and conditional SLEEP variants to test whether the driver permits an extra statement or controllable query delay.

prerequisites.zh: 测试数据库和驱动行为可审计且请求无业务副作用
prerequisites.en: The test database and driver behavior are auditable and requests have no business side effects.

prerequisites.zh: 可采集交错真假控制的多轮时延样本
prerequisites.en: Repeated interleaved true and false timing controls can be collected.

title.zh: 堆叠与条件延迟样例

execution.command:
;SELECT SLEEP(5);--
';SELECT SLEEP(5);--
";SELECT SLEEP(5);--
' OR IF(1=1, SLEEP(5), 0)--

description.zh: 按输入引号上下文逐条选择，并在隔离环境把 5 秒降为可区分的最小延迟；同时运行无延迟与条件为假的对照。
description.en: Choose a line for the actual quote context, reduce five seconds to the smallest distinguishable delay in isolation, and run no-delay and false-condition controls.

overview.zh: 前三行测试语句终止后能否堆叠第二条 SELECT，第四行测试同一语句中的条件延迟。两者都需要统计和数据库审计，不能用单次慢响应推断。
overview.en: The first three lines test a second SELECT after statement termination; the fourth tests a conditional delay within one statement. Both require statistical and database-audit evidence rather than one slow response.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是输入被拼接进 SQL，且数据库驱动允许多语句或条件表达式。攻击者可通过时间函数建立盲信道，若堆叠成立还可能执行更高影响语句。
vulnerability.en: The cause is input concatenated into SQL while the driver permits multiple statements or conditional expressions. Timing functions create a blind channel, and successful stacking may allow higher-impact statements.

exploitation.zh: 先交错测量无延迟、条件为假和合法请求，选择匹配引号的一行并运行多轮。关联最终 SQL、数据库持续时间和应用响应。只有可重复分布差异且审计显示 SLEEP/第二语句执行才成立。
exploitation.en: Interleave no-delay, false-condition, and valid baselines, select one quote-matching line, and run multiple rounds. Correlate final SQL, database duration, and response. Confirm only repeatable separation with audited SLEEP or second-statement execution.

mitigation.zh: 使用参数化语句并关闭驱动多语句支持，动态条件映射为固定查询模板；配置语句超时和最小数据库权限，监控 SLEEP 等异常函数并回归成对时间用例。
mitigation.en: Use parameterized statements, disable driver multi-statements, map dynamic conditions to fixed query templates, set statement timeouts and least privilege, monitor abnormal delay functions, and regress paired timing cases.

title.zh: 建立无延迟统计基线

description.zh: 交错记录合法、条件为假和无延迟请求的应用与数据库耗时。
description.en: Interleave valid, false-condition, and no-delay requests and record application and database duration.

title.zh: 提交匹配上下文的延迟样例

description.zh: 一次选择一行并使用最小可辨延迟，多轮运行且保留最终 SQL。
description.en: Choose one line, use the minimum distinguishable delay, repeat multiple rounds, and retain final SQL.

attackChain.payload:
;SELECT SLEEP(5);--
';SELECT SLEEP(5);--
";SELECT SLEEP(5);--
' OR IF(1=1, SLEEP(5), 0)--

title.zh: 确认数据库延迟函数执行

description.zh: 匹配统计分布、查询审计和第二语句/IF 分支，排除网络和队列抖动。
description.en: Match timing distributions, query audit, and second-statement or IF execution, excluding network and queue jitter.

title.zh: 关闭堆叠并参数化回归

description.zh: 修复后按相同采样方案重放，确认延迟差异消失且业务查询正确。
description.en: After remediation replay the same sampling plan to confirm delay separation disappears while business queries remain correct.

analysis.zh: 报告应区分多语句能力与同语句时间盲注，并提供样本量、分位数和数据库审计。只证明其中一项时不要外推另一项。
analysis.en: Distinguish multi-statement capability from same-statement time injection and report sample size, percentiles, and database audit. Do not infer one from proof of the other.

opsecTips.zh: 缩短延迟并严格限制轮数，避免占用连接池。
opsecTips.en: Shorten delays and strictly cap rounds to avoid consuming the connection pool.

opsecTips.zh: 仅在无业务副作用测试查询中执行，不与写操作或真实用户请求并发。
opsecTips.en: Run only in a side-effect-free test query and never concurrently with writes or real-user traffic.

name.zh: SQL Server xp_cmdshell 影响验证

description.zh: 使用 xp_cmdshell 命令与文件读取样例验证堆叠 SQL 注入是否跨越到 SQL Server 主机进程执行。
description.en: Uses xp_cmdshell command and file-read samples to test whether stacked SQL injection crosses into SQL Server host-process execution.

prerequisites.zh: 仅在一次性 SQL Server 实验实例验证并已确认 SQL 注入
prerequisites.en: Testing occurs only on a disposable SQL Server lab after SQL injection is confirmed.

prerequisites.zh: 使用固定标记命令和无敏感文件，且可审计子进程
prerequisites.en: Fixed marker commands and nonsensitive files are used with child-process auditing.

title.zh: xp_cmdshell 原始样例

description.zh: 原行用于说明影响。真实验证将 whoami/type 替换为只输出随机固定标记和读取专用标记文件的命令，并只执行一次。
description.en: The original lines document impact. Real validation replaces whoami and type with one fixed random-marker output and a dedicated marker-file read and executes once.

overview.zh: xp_cmdshell 是 SQL Server 的高权限扩展过程。其存在、被禁用错误或函数名回显不等于 RCE；必须在隔离实例确认数据库会话调用它并由 SQL Server 服务身份启动受控子进程。
overview.en: xp_cmdshell is a high-impact SQL Server extended procedure. Presence, a disabled error, or reflected function name is not RCE; an isolated instance must show the database session invoking it and a controlled child process under the SQL Server service identity.

vulnerability.zh: 链条需要 SQL 注入控制语句、调用账户具备 EXEC 权限、xp_cmdshell 已启用或可被启用，并且服务身份拥有系统能力。每项都是独立边界，服务账户权限决定影响。
vulnerability.en: The chain requires statement-controlling injection, EXEC permission, xp_cmdshell enabled or enableable, and an OS-capable service identity. Each is a distinct boundary, and service-account privilege determines impact.

exploitation.zh: 在一次性实例先审计 xp_cmdshell 配置，不做更改。若已授权且启用，将命令替换为固定标记输出并执行一次，匹配数据库审计、进程树和输出。禁止读取系统文件、建立网络连接或修改配置。
exploitation.en: Audit xp_cmdshell configuration in a disposable instance without changing it. If explicitly authorized and enabled, replace the command with fixed marker output and execute once, correlating database audit, process tree, and output. Do not read system files, connect outward, or modify configuration.

mitigation.zh: 参数化查询，应用数据库账户不授予高权限角色或扩展过程执行，保持 xp_cmdshell 禁用并监控配置变更。SQL Server 使用专用低权限服务账户，限制子进程和出站网络。
mitigation.en: Parameterize queries, withhold high-privilege roles and extended-procedure execution from the application account, keep xp_cmdshell disabled, and monitor configuration changes. Run SQL Server under a dedicated low-privilege identity and restrict child processes and egress.

title.zh: 审计扩展过程配置与权限

description.zh: 只读检查 xp_cmdshell 是否启用、调用主体和 SQL Server 服务身份。
description.en: Read-only inspect whether xp_cmdshell is enabled, the calling principal, and SQL Server service identity.

title.zh: 执行单次固定标记命令

description.zh: 在一次性实例将原命令改为固定标记输出，并保留数据库与进程审计。
description.en: In a disposable instance replace the original command with fixed marker output and retain database and process audit.

title.zh: 确认 SQL Server 子进程
title.en: Confirm the SQL Server child process

description.zh: 匹配请求、SQL 审计、服务身份、子进程和固定输出，排除静态错误。
description.en: Match request, SQL audit, service identity, child process, and fixed output, excluding static errors.

title.zh: 撤销权限并回归

description.zh: 修复注入、撤销扩展过程权限并确认禁用后重放，确保无子进程。
description.en: Fix injection, revoke procedure privilege, verify disablement, and replay to ensure no child process.

analysis.zh: 应分别证明注入、过程调用权限、启用状态和操作系统子进程。xp_cmdshell 被禁用的错误只说明产品特征，不是可利用 RCE。
analysis.en: Prove injection, procedure privilege, enabled state, and OS child process separately. A disabled xp_cmdshell error is a product signal, not exploitable RCE.

opsecTips.zh: 只在一次性实例运行固定标记，不读取 hosts 或执行 whoami 原命令。
opsecTips.en: Use a fixed marker only in a disposable instance; do not run the original whoami or hosts read.

opsecTips.zh: 不启用 xp_cmdshell 作为测试步骤；若默认禁用，记录并停止。
opsecTips.en: Do not enable xp_cmdshell for testing; if it is disabled by default, record that and stop.

name.zh: MySQL LOAD_FILE 文件读取影响

description.zh: 使用 Linux 与 Windows 路径的 LOAD_FILE 查询验证 SQL 注入是否可借数据库账户读取主机文件。
description.en: Uses LOAD_FILE queries for Linux and Windows paths to test whether SQL injection can read host files through database privileges.

prerequisites.zh: 仅在隔离 MySQL 容器和已确认注入后评估文件权限
prerequisites.en: Filesystem privilege is assessed only in an isolated MySQL container after injection is confirmed.

prerequisites.zh: 测试目录提供无敏感标记并可审计数据库文件访问
prerequisites.en: A test directory provides a nonsensitive marker with database file-access auditing.

title.zh: LOAD_FILE 跨平台样例

description.zh: 按数据库主机平台选择一行，并把系统目标替换为容器中的专用标记文件；不读取真实账户或系统配置。
description.en: Choose one line for the database host platform and replace the system target with a dedicated marker in the container; do not read real account or system configuration.

overview.zh: LOAD_FILE 由数据库主机而非应用主机读取路径，受 MySQL FILE 权限、secure_file_priv、文件权限和大小限制影响。NULL 结果可能是安全配置或路径不存在，不能从错误推断任意读取。
overview.en: LOAD_FILE reads from the database host, not necessarily the application host, and depends on MySQL FILE privilege, secure_file_priv, filesystem permissions, and size limits. NULL can mean secure configuration or a missing path and does not imply arbitrary read.

vulnerability.zh: 链条需要 SQL 注入控制查询、应用数据库账户拥有 FILE 权限、目标位于允许目录且 mysqld 身份可读。若数据库和应用分离，读取范围属于数据库节点。
vulnerability.en: The chain requires query-controlling injection, FILE privilege, a target in an allowed location, and readability by the mysqld identity. When tiers are separate, exposure belongs to the database node.

exploitation.zh: 在隔离 MySQL 容器创建固定标记文件，确认 secure_file_priv 和账户权限后选择平台匹配的一行并替换路径。关联查询审计、mysqld 文件访问和标记哈希。禁止读取原示例系统文件。
exploitation.en: Create a fixed marker in an isolated MySQL container, inspect secure_file_priv and account privilege, choose a platform-matching line, and replace its path. Correlate query audit, mysqld file access, and marker hash. Never read the original system files.

mitigation.zh: 修复注入并从应用账户移除 FILE 权限，配置 secure_file_priv 为专用不可达目录或禁用，数据库容器使用最小只读文件系统，应用与数据库文件系统隔离，并监控 LOAD_FILE。
mitigation.en: Fix injection, remove FILE privilege from the application account, configure secure_file_priv to a dedicated inaccessible directory or disable it, use a minimal read-only database filesystem, isolate application and database storage, and monitor LOAD_FILE.

title.zh: 审计 MySQL 文件边界

description.zh: 只读检查账户 FILE 权限、secure_file_priv 和 mysqld 可读测试目录。
description.en: Read-only inspect FILE privilege, secure_file_priv, and a test directory readable by mysqld.

title.zh: 读取单一测试标记

description.zh: 按平台选择一行并替换为标记路径，只执行一次。
description.en: Choose one platform-matching line, replace it with the marker path, and execute once.

title.zh: 确认 mysqld 文件访问

description.zh: 匹配查询审计、进程文件访问和固定标记，不从 NULL/错误推断。
description.en: Match query audit, process file access, and fixed marker without inferring from NULL or errors.

title.zh: 撤销 FILE 权限并回归

description.zh: 修复查询和文件权限后重放标记与合法业务查询，确认读取拒绝。
description.en: After query and privilege fixes replay the marker and valid business queries to confirm file read denial.

analysis.zh: 明确数据库主机、应用主机和文件来源。最强证据是 mysqld 读取专用标记；错误、NULL 或应用层文件内容都需要进一步归因。
analysis.en: Identify database host, application host, and file source. Strong evidence is mysqld reading the dedicated marker; errors, NULL, or application-tier content require further attribution.

opsecTips.zh: 禁止读取 passwd、shadow 或 hosts；只使用固定标记文件。
opsecTips.en: Never read passwd, shadow, or hosts; use only a fixed marker file.

opsecTips.zh: 只执行一次并立即删除标记，保留哈希和审计事件即可。
opsecTips.en: Execute once, remove the marker immediately, and retain only its hash and audit event.

name.zh: MySQL OUTFILE 与 DUMPFILE 文件写入
name.en: MySQL OUTFILE and DUMPFILE File-Write Impact

description.zh: 使用文本与十六进制 SELECT INTO OUTFILE/DUMPFILE 样例验证注入查询是否能在数据库主机创建文件。
description.en: Uses text and hexadecimal SELECT INTO OUTFILE or DUMPFILE samples to test whether an injected query can create a file on the database host.

prerequisites.zh: 仅在一次性 MySQL 容器和不可执行空目录验证
prerequisites.en: Testing occurs only in a disposable MySQL container and an empty nonexecutable directory.

prerequisites.zh: 使用固定文本标记并可撤销 FILE 权限
prerequisites.en: A fixed text marker is used and FILE privilege can be revoked.

title.zh: OUTFILE/DUMPFILE 原始样例

execution.command:
' UNION SELECT '<?php system(["cmd"]);?>' INTO OUTFILE '/var/www/html/shell.php'--
' UNION SELECT 0x3c3f7068702073797374656d28245f4745545b22636d64225d293b3f3e INTO DUMPFILE '/var/www/html/shell.php'--

description.zh: 原始行用于说明文本/二进制写入差异。真实验证必须把内容替换为固定无害标记、路径改为非 Web 空目录，并确保文件不存在。
description.en: The original lines show text versus binary write behavior. Real validation must replace content with a fixed harmless marker, target a nonweb empty directory, and ensure the file does not exist.

overview.zh: OUTFILE 可格式化输出，DUMPFILE 写单一二进制值；两者都是数据库文件写入原语。原样例指向 WebShell，但安全验证只确认数据库进程能否在隔离非执行目录创建固定标记文件。
overview.en: OUTFILE formats output and DUMPFILE writes one binary value; both are database file-write primitives. Although the samples target a webshell, safe validation only confirms marker-file creation in an isolated nonexecutable directory.

vulnerability.zh: 链条需要查询结构注入、FILE 权限、允许的 secure_file_priv 路径、mysqld 写权限和不存在的目标文件。Web 执行还要求数据库目录与 Web 根共享并配置脚本处理器，必须单独证明。
vulnerability.en: The chain requires query-structure injection, FILE privilege, an allowed secure_file_priv path, mysqld write permission, and a nonexistent target. Web execution additionally requires shared web storage and script mapping and must be proven separately.

exploitation.zh: 在一次性容器创建不可执行空目录，将内容改为随机固定标记，分别选择 OUTFILE 或 DUMPFILE 一行执行一次。关联查询日志、文件所有者、长度和哈希后删除。不得使用原 PHP 内容或 Web 路径。
exploitation.en: In a disposable container create an empty nonexecutable directory, replace content with a random fixed marker, and execute one OUTFILE or DUMPFILE line once. Correlate query logs, owner, length, and hash and then delete it. Never use the PHP content or web path.

mitigation.zh: 修复注入、从应用账户移除 FILE 权限、严格配置 secure_file_priv，并让数据库文件系统与 Web 根隔离且尽量只读。监控 INTO OUTFILE/DUMPFILE 并阻止数据库服务身份写入可执行目录。
mitigation.en: Fix injection, remove FILE privilege from the application account, strictly configure secure_file_priv, isolate database storage from web roots, and make it read-only where possible. Monitor INTO OUTFILE or DUMPFILE and prevent the database identity from writing executable directories.

title.zh: 准备空的非执行目录

description.zh: 在一次性容器确认目标不存在并准备固定标记与审计。
description.en: In a disposable container confirm the target does not exist and prepare a fixed marker and audit.

title.zh: 改写并执行一个写入样例
title.en: Rewrite and run one write sample

description.zh: 替换 PHP 内容和 Web 路径，只选择 OUTFILE 或 DUMPFILE 之一执行。
description.en: Replace PHP content and web path and execute either OUTFILE or DUMPFILE, not both.

attackChain.payload:
' UNION SELECT '<?php system(["cmd"]);?>' INTO OUTFILE '/var/www/html/shell.php'--
' UNION SELECT 0x3c3f7068702073797374656d28245f4745545b22636d64225d293b3f3e INTO DUMPFILE '/var/www/html/shell.php'--

title.zh: 确认数据库文件创建

description.zh: 匹配查询审计、mysqld 所有者、文件长度与标记哈希，排除预置文件。
description.en: Match query audit, mysqld ownership, file length, and marker hash, excluding preexisting files.

title.zh: 删除文件并撤销 FILE 权限
title.en: Delete the file and revoke FILE privilege

description.zh: 清理测试文件、修复查询和权限后重放，确认无法创建新文件。
description.en: Remove the test file, fix the query and privilege, and replay to confirm no new file can be created.

analysis.zh: 分别证明 SQL 注入、FILE 权限、文件创建和 Web 执行。若只创建无害标记，结论是数据库主机文件写入，不应写成 WebShell 或 RCE。
analysis.en: Prove SQL injection, FILE privilege, file creation, and web execution separately. If only a harmless marker is created, classify database-host file write, not webshell or RCE.

opsecTips.zh: 禁止写 PHP 或十六进制脚本，目标必须位于非执行一次性目录。
opsecTips.en: Never write PHP or hexadecimal script content; the target must be a disposable nonexecutable directory.

opsecTips.zh: 写入前后核对目录清单并立即删除文件，避免残留或覆盖。
opsecTips.en: Inventory the directory before and after and delete the file immediately to prevent residue or overwrite.

name.zh: CSP 外部脚本与 JSONP 信任边界
name.en: CSP External Script and JSONP Trust Boundary

description.zh: 使用协议相对外部 script 源验证 CSP 的 script-src 是否错误信任可控主机、宽泛 CDN 或 JSONP 式脚本端点。
description.en: Uses a scheme-relative external script source to test whether CSP script-src overtrusts a controllable host, broad CDN, or JSONP-style script endpoint.

prerequisites.zh: 输入位于可创建 script 元素的 HTML 上下文
prerequisites.en: Input reaches an HTML context capable of creating a script element.

prerequisites.zh: 可在隔离页面和自有脚本域观察 CSP 决策
prerequisites.en: CSP decisions can be observed on an isolated page and controlled script origin.

title.zh: 协议相对外部脚本

description.zh: 将 evil.com 替换为只返回设置内存标记脚本的自有测试域，并记录 CSP 报告、网络请求与 DOM；不要加载第三方代码。
description.en: Replace evil.com with a controlled origin serving only an in-memory marker script and record CSP reports, network requests, and DOM; never load third-party code.

overview.zh: CSP 允许某个外部脚本源时，该源返回的内容拥有页面脚本权限。协议相对 URL 本身不是绕过；只有当前 policy 实际允许攻击者可控源或允许源中的可控 JSONP/上传端点，且脚本在页面执行时才成立。
overview.en: When CSP permits an external script origin, content returned from that origin receives page script privilege. A scheme-relative URL alone is not a bypass; the active policy must allow an attacker-controlled origin or controllable JSONP or upload endpoint and the script must execute.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是 script-src 允许过宽主机、通配子域、可上传脚本的 CDN 或可回调 JSONP 端点，并缺少 nonce/hash 与 strict-dynamic 的可信加载链。HTML 注入可借受信源转化为脚本执行。
vulnerability.en: The cause is an overly broad script-src host, wildcard subdomain, upload-capable CDN, or callback-controlled JSONP endpoint without a nonce or hash and strict-dynamic trust chain. HTML injection can then become script execution through a trusted source.

exploitation.zh: 保存真实响应头中的 CSP，先在无注入页面确认策略，再把 src 指向自有域的固定标记脚本。检查浏览器控制台、CSP report、请求和内存标记。源被阻断、只发生 DNS、或脚本作为文本返回均为阴性。
exploitation.en: Save the effective CSP response header, baseline the page, then point src to a controlled fixed-marker script. Inspect console, CSP reports, network request, and in-memory marker. A blocked source, DNS-only activity, or text response is negative.

mitigation.zh: 优先使用每响应 nonce/hash 与 strict-dynamic，删除宽泛 host allowlist，不信任可上传或 JSONP/CDN 路径。独立修复 HTML 注入，设置 report-to/report-uri 监控违规，并对所有允许脚本源做所有权和可控端点审计。
mitigation.en: Prefer per-response nonces or hashes with strict-dynamic, remove broad host allowlists, and do not trust upload or JSONP or CDN paths. Fix HTML injection independently, monitor violations through reporting, and audit ownership and controllable endpoints for every allowed script source.

title.zh: 解析生效的 script-src

description.zh: 记录响应头 policy、重定向和 iframe 继承，确认浏览器实际应用的脚本来源规则。
description.en: Record response policy, redirects, and frame inheritance to identify the browser's effective script-source rules.

title.zh: 加载自有固定标记脚本

description.zh: 替换示例域并提交单一 script 标签，标记脚本只写内存变量。
description.en: Replace the example origin and submit one script tag whose script only sets an in-memory variable.

title.zh: 确认 CSP 放行与执行

description.zh: 匹配网络、CSP 报告、DOM 和标记，排除 DNS 预取、扩展与缓存。
description.en: Match network, CSP report, DOM, and marker while excluding DNS prefetch, extensions, and caching.

title.zh: 收敛脚本信任链并回归
title.en: Constrain the script trust chain and regress

description.zh: 改用 nonce/hash 后重放外部脚本与合法脚本，确认前者阻断而应用仍工作。
description.en: After nonce or hash policy, replay external and legitimate scripts to confirm the former is blocked while the app works.

analysis.zh: 分别证明 HTML 注入、脚本源被 CSP 允许和脚本实际执行。仅能外连或 policy 中存在域名不等于可利用 XSS。
analysis.en: Prove HTML injection, CSP allowance, and actual script execution separately. Egress or a hostname in policy alone is not exploitable XSS.

opsecTips.zh: 测试脚本只设置随机内存标记，不读取 Cookie、DOM 数据或发起二次请求。
opsecTips.en: The test script should set only a random in-memory marker and never read cookies, DOM data, or make a second request.

opsecTips.zh: 测试域专用且短时有效，结束后删除脚本并清理 CDN 缓存。
opsecTips.en: Use a dedicated short-lived origin and remove the script and CDN cache afterward.

name.zh: CSP base-uri 与相对 URL 重定向
name.en: CSP base-uri and Relative URL Retargeting

description.zh: 使用 base 元素验证页面是否缺少 base-uri 限制，并导致相对脚本、表单或导航 URL 被重定向到非预期来源。
description.en: Uses a base element to test whether a missing base-uri restriction retargets relative scripts, forms, or navigation URLs to an unintended origin.

prerequisites.zh: 输入可在 document head 或首个有效 base 之前创建元素
prerequisites.en: Input can create an element in the document head or before the first effective base.

prerequisites.zh: 页面存在可观察的相对 URL 资源且测试域完全受控
prerequisites.en: The page has an observable relative-URL resource and the test origin is fully controlled.

title.zh: 外部 base 元素

description.zh: 将域替换为不提供敏感内容的自有监听器，观察一个无副作用相对资源解析；不要让表单提交或脚本加载携带真实数据。
description.en: Replace the origin with a controlled listener that serves no sensitive content and observe one side-effect-free relative resource; do not submit forms or load scripts carrying real data.

overview.zh: base 元素改变文档中相对 URL 的解析基址。它通常不是直接脚本执行，但可把相对脚本、链接或表单指向外部来源；CSP base-uri 可限制哪些 base 生效。
overview.en: A base element changes how relative URLs resolve. It is not usually direct script execution but can retarget relative scripts, links, or forms; CSP base-uri constrains which base values are effective.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是可在有效位置注入 base 元素，且 CSP 未设置 base-uri 'none'/'self'。页面后续相对 URL 因此使用攻击者基址；实际影响取决于 script-src、form-action、资源完整性和用户交互。
vulnerability.en: The cause is base-element injection at an effective position without base-uri 'none' or 'self'. Later relative URLs resolve against the attacker base; impact depends on script-src, form-action, integrity, and user interaction.

exploitation.zh: 记录无注入页面的 document.baseURI 和一个无害相对资源 URL，再注入指向自有域的 base 并比较 DOM 解析与网络请求。只有浏览器实际重定向安全相关资源才成立；标签作为文本、位于首个 base 之后或被 CSP 阻断均为阴性。
exploitation.en: Record document.baseURI and one harmless relative resource without injection, then inject a base pointing to a controlled origin and compare DOM resolution and network requests. Count only actual retargeting of a security-relevant resource; text rendering, placement after the first base, or CSP blocking is negative.

mitigation.zh: 修复 HTML 注入，并设置 CSP base-uri 'none' 或至少 'self'。安全相关脚本和提交目标使用可信绝对 URL，配合 script-src、form-action 与 SRI；将 base 固定放在文档前部，避免后续输入抢占。
mitigation.en: Fix HTML injection and set CSP base-uri 'none' or at least 'self'. Use trusted absolute URLs for security-relevant scripts and submissions with script-src, form-action, and SRI, and place the legitimate base early so later input cannot take precedence.

title.zh: 记录原始 URL 解析基线

description.zh: 保存 CSP、document.baseURI 和一个无副作用相对资源的绝对解析结果。
description.en: Save CSP, document.baseURI, and the absolute resolution of one side-effect-free relative resource.

title.zh: 注入自有 base 来源

description.zh: 替换示例域后提交 base 标签，并保持页面、会话和缓存一致。
description.en: Replace the example origin, submit the base tag, and hold page, session, and cache state constant.

title.zh: 确认相对资源重定向

description.zh: 匹配 DOM 属性、document.baseURI、网络请求和 CSP 事件，排除浏览器预取。
description.en: Match DOM attributes, document.baseURI, network requests, and CSP events, excluding browser prefetch.

title.zh: 设置 base-uri 并回归

description.zh: 加入限制并修复注入后重放，确认合法相对资源保留而外部基址无效。
description.en: After adding the directive and fixing injection, replay to preserve legitimate relative resources while the external base is ineffective.

analysis.zh: base 注入的影响由具体被改写资源决定，应报告实际 URL 解析和后续安全边界，不能仅因 document.baseURI 改变就按 XSS 最高影响评级。
analysis.en: Impact depends on the specific retargeted resource. Report actual URL resolution and downstream boundary rather than rating a baseURI change as full XSS automatically.

opsecTips.zh: 测试监听器不记录 Cookie/查询敏感值，只验证固定资源名。
opsecTips.en: The listener should not retain cookies or sensitive query values and should verify only a fixed resource name.

opsecTips.zh: 不要点击真实表单或触发脚本；优先观察无害图片/链接解析。
opsecTips.en: Do not submit real forms or trigger scripts; prefer observing a harmless image or link resolution.

name.zh: CSP Link Prefetch 与 DNS 泄漏
name.en: CSP Link Prefetch and DNS Leakage

description.zh: 使用 prefetch 与 dns-prefetch link 元素验证 HTML 注入是否能触发浏览器向外部来源进行资源预取或 DNS 解析。
description.en: Uses prefetch and dns-prefetch link elements to test whether HTML injection can trigger browser resource prefetching or DNS resolution to an external origin.

prerequisites.zh: 输入可创建 link 元素且浏览器未禁用资源提示
prerequisites.en: Input can create link elements and the browser has not disabled resource hints.

prerequisites.zh: 自有 DNS/HTTPS 监听器能区分唯一测试标记
prerequisites.en: Controlled DNS and HTTPS listeners can distinguish a unique test label.

title.zh: 资源预取与 DNS 预取元素

description.zh: 分别替换为一次性自有子域并逐条渲染，记录 DNS、HTTP、Sec-Purpose/Purpose 等请求特征；不在域名中编码用户数据。
description.en: Replace each with a one-time controlled subdomain, render separately, and record DNS, HTTP, and Sec-Purpose or Purpose signals; never encode user data in the hostname.

overview.zh: prefetch 可能发起资源请求，dns-prefetch 通常只触发 DNS。它们可证明 HTML 元素被浏览器解析并产生外连，但不执行 JavaScript，因此应按网络泄漏/资源提示影响而非完整 XSS 评级。
overview.en: prefetch may request a resource while dns-prefetch usually performs DNS only. They can prove that injected HTML caused browser egress but do not execute JavaScript, so rate them as network leakage or resource-hint impact rather than full XSS.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是用户输入进入未编码 HTML 元素上下文，且 CSP/浏览器资源提示策略允许外部目标。若攻击者可将敏感值拼入域名或 URL，可能形成有限数据泄漏；没有敏感数据流时通常只是外连信号。
vulnerability.en: The cause is unencoded input entering an HTML element context while CSP or browser resource-hint policy allows external targets. If sensitive values can be composed into the hostname or URL, limited leakage may occur; without that data flow it is usually only an egress signal.

exploitation.zh: 在全新浏览器上下文中用一次性随机子域分别提交两行，记录 DOM、DNS 和 HTTP 请求并与普通文本对照。仅观察唯一回连可证明元素生效；还需单独证明敏感数据可进入目标 URL 才能声明数据外泄。
exploitation.en: In a fresh browser context submit each line with a one-time random subdomain and record DOM, DNS, and HTTP requests against a text control. A unique callback proves the element worked; sensitive-data exfiltration requires separate proof that data reaches the target URL.

mitigation.zh: 按 HTML 上下文编码并限制富文本允许元素/属性，删除不需要的 link rel 值。配置适当 CSP 来源与浏览器策略，敏感数据不进入可控 URL，并通过 CSP 报告和 DNS 日志监控异常资源提示。
mitigation.en: Apply context-aware HTML encoding and restrict allowed rich-text elements and attributes, removing unnecessary link rel values. Configure appropriate CSP sources and browser policy, keep sensitive data out of controllable URLs, and monitor abnormal resource hints through CSP and DNS logs.

title.zh: 建立文本与资源提示基线

description.zh: 使用新浏览器上下文记录普通文本不会产生 DNS/HTTP 外连。
description.en: Use a fresh browser context to show that plain text causes no DNS or HTTP callback.

title.zh: 逐条提交一次性 link 元素

description.zh: 每行使用不同随机子域并分别渲染，保留 DOM 和监听日志。
description.en: Use a different random subdomain for each line, render separately, and retain DOM and listener logs.

title.zh: 区分 DNS 与资源请求

description.zh: 比较解析、TCP/HTTPS 和预取请求头，准确界定只解析还是下载资源。
description.en: Compare resolution, TCP or HTTPS, and prefetch headers to determine DNS-only versus resource retrieval.

title.zh: 编码并收紧富文本策略

description.zh: 修复后重放，确认用户内容为文本或 link 属性被移除且页面正常。
description.en: After remediation replay to confirm user content is text or link attributes are removed while the page works.

analysis.zh: DNS 查询、HTTP 预取和脚本执行是三个不同层级。该卡只覆盖前两者；除非另有敏感数据流，不能把回连写成完整 XSS。
analysis.en: DNS resolution, HTTP prefetch, and script execution are different levels. This card covers only the first two and should not be reported as full XSS without a separate sensitive-data flow.

opsecTips.zh: 子域只包含随机测试 ID，不编码 Cookie、用户名、页面内容或其他数据。
opsecTips.en: Hostnames should contain only a random test ID, never cookies, usernames, page content, or other data.

opsecTips.zh: 使用全新浏览器上下文并关闭第三方扩展，避免预取缓存和扩展流量混淆。
opsecTips.en: Use a fresh browser context without extensions to avoid prefetch cache and extension traffic confusion.

name.zh: Meta Refresh JavaScript URL 边界

description.zh: 使用 meta refresh 的 javascript: 目标验证浏览器、HTML 消毒器与 CSP 是否阻止元数据驱动的活动 URL。
description.en: Uses a meta refresh javascript target to test whether the browser, HTML sanitizer, and CSP block active URLs in metadata-driven navigation.

prerequisites.zh: 输入可创建 meta 元素并进入有效文档位置
prerequisites.en: Input can create a meta element in an effective document position.

prerequisites.zh: 使用隔离浏览器和无副作用内存标记观察导航/执行
prerequisites.en: An isolated browser and side-effect-free in-memory marker are used to observe navigation or execution.

title.zh: JavaScript Meta Refresh

description.zh: 在隔离页面把 alert 替换为设置随机内存标记，记录元素是否生效、导航 URL、CSP 控制台与最终 DOM。
description.en: On an isolated page replace alert with a random in-memory marker and record whether the element takes effect, navigation URL, CSP console, and final DOM.

overview.zh: 现代浏览器对 meta refresh 中 javascript: 的支持和限制可能不同，CSP 也只在浏览器实际形成脚本导航时介入。该样例需要真实浏览器验证，不能从标签文本或消毒器输入推断执行。
overview.en: Modern browsers vary in handling javascript URLs in meta refresh, and CSP matters only if the browser forms an active script navigation. This sample requires real-browser verification; execution cannot be inferred from tag text or sanitizer input.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是富文本或模板允许用户创建 meta/http-equiv/content 属性，并且浏览器把目标解释为活动 javascript URL。缺少元素/属性允许列表、输出编码和 CSP 会让 HTML 注入具备导航或执行能力。
vulnerability.en: The cause is rich text or templates allowing user-controlled meta, http-equiv, and content attributes while the browser interprets the destination as an active javascript URL. Missing element and attribute allowlists, encoding, and CSP can give HTML injection navigation or execution impact.

exploitation.zh: 在隔离浏览器先用普通 meta refresh 到自有静态页面建立功能基线，再提交样例的无害标记版本。捕获 DOM、导航、控制台和标记。标签被保留但 URL 不执行、被规范化或阻断均应记录为安全结果。
exploitation.en: Baseline a normal meta refresh to a controlled static page, then submit a harmless-marker version of the sample. Capture DOM, navigation, console, and marker. A retained tag whose URL is inert, normalized, or blocked is a safe result.

mitigation.zh: 用户内容禁止 meta/http-equiv，富文本消毒器采用元素与属性允许列表并拒绝 javascript: 等活动协议。导航由服务端固定 URL 生成，部署严格 script-src/object-src/base-uri CSP，并添加真实浏览器回归。
mitigation.en: Disallow meta and http-equiv in user content, use element and attribute allowlists, and reject active schemes such as javascript. Generate navigation from fixed server URLs, deploy strict script-src, object-src, and base-uri CSP, and add real-browser regression.

title.zh: 建立合法 Refresh 基线

description.zh: 在隔离页面确认普通 HTTP 目标的 meta refresh 行为和 CSP。
description.en: On an isolated page confirm normal HTTP meta-refresh behavior and CSP.

title.zh: 提交无害活动 URL 样例

description.zh: 把 alert 改为内存标记并提交，保留 DOM、导航与控制台。
description.en: Replace alert with an in-memory marker, submit it, and retain DOM, navigation, and console data.

title.zh: 确认浏览器执行边界

description.zh: 证明 URL 被实际解释并触发标记，排除静态 DOM、扩展和开发者工具操作。
description.en: Prove the URL was interpreted and triggered the marker, excluding static DOM, extensions, and DevTools actions.

title.zh: 移除 Meta 属性并回归

description.zh: 修复消毒与 CSP 后重放合法及活动 URL，确认前者按业务保留而后者无效。
description.en: After sanitizer and CSP fixes, replay valid and active URLs to preserve business behavior while the latter is inert.

analysis.zh: 浏览器版本和文档位置会影响结果，报告需给出 User-Agent、DOM 位置、CSP 与实际导航/标记，不从理论语法直接下结论。
analysis.en: Browser version and document placement affect results. Report user agent, DOM position, CSP, and actual navigation or marker rather than concluding from syntax theory.

opsecTips.zh: 仅使用内存标记，不弹窗、不读取页面数据、不导航到第三方。
opsecTips.en: Use only an in-memory marker with no dialog, page-data read, or third-party navigation.

opsecTips.zh: 在一次性隔离页面测试，避免零秒刷新影响共享会话。
opsecTips.en: Test on a disposable isolated page so zero-delay refresh cannot affect shared sessions.

name.zh: CSP JavaScript URL、srcdoc 与 data Frame 模式
name.en: CSP JavaScript URL, srcdoc, and Data Frame Patterns

description.zh: 使用表单 javascript: 动作、iframe srcdoc 和 data: 文档验证 CSP 对内联脚本、frame-src 与子文档策略继承的实际限制。
description.en: Uses a javascript form action, iframe srcdoc, and data documents to test CSP restrictions on inline script, frame-src, and child-document policy inheritance.

subCategory.zh: CSP 活动 URL 与子文档
subCategory.en: CSP Active URLs and Child Documents

prerequisites.zh: 输入可创建 form 或 iframe 元素并在隔离浏览器观察
prerequisites.en: Input can create form or iframe elements observable in an isolated browser.

prerequisites.zh: 可读取生效 CSP、frame-src/child-src 和 script-src 决策
prerequisites.en: The effective CSP, frame-src or child-src, and script-src decisions are observable.

title.zh: 活动 URL 与 Frame 文档样例
title.en: Active URL and Frame Document Samples

description.zh: 逐条在隔离页面测试，把 alert 替换为各自随机内存标记；表单仅由自动化点击专用按钮，iframe 记录加载、子文档 origin 与 CSP 事件。
description.en: Test each line separately on an isolated page, replacing alert with a unique in-memory marker. Automate only the dedicated form click and record frame load, child origin, and CSP events.

overview.zh: 这些模式跨越三个不同 CSP 边界：javascript: 导航受内联脚本策略影响，srcdoc 子文档继承嵌入上下文策略，data: frame 同时受 frame-src 和不透明来源行为影响。必须逐条验证，不能把一个成功外推到全部模式。
overview.en: These patterns cross three different CSP boundaries: javascript navigation is governed by inline-script policy, srcdoc inherits embedding-context policy, and data frames involve frame-src plus opaque-origin behavior. Test each separately and do not generalize one result to all.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是用户可创建活动 URL 或子文档元素，而 policy 允许 unsafe-inline、data: frame 或过宽 child sources，且应用依赖 CSP 替代 HTML 上下文编码/消毒。HTML 注入与策略缺口组合后才形成执行。
vulnerability.en: The cause is user creation of active URLs or child-document elements while policy allows unsafe-inline, data frames, or broad child sources, and the application relies on CSP instead of HTML encoding or sanitization. Execution requires both HTML injection and a policy gap.

exploitation.zh: 保存生效 policy 和无注入基线，逐条提交无害标记版本。对 form 记录显式点击后的导航；对 frame 记录加载、origin、DOM、控制台和 CSP report。只有对应标记在子/父文档执行才成立，元素存在或 frame 加载本身不足。
exploitation.en: Save the effective policy and clean baseline, then submit harmless-marker versions individually. For form record navigation after an explicit test click; for frames record load, origin, DOM, console, and CSP report. A finding requires the corresponding marker to execute in the child or parent; element presence or frame load alone is insufficient.

mitigation.zh: 修复 HTML 注入并在富文本中禁用 form、iframe、srcdoc 与活动协议。CSP 使用 nonce/hash 且不含 unsafe-inline，frame-src 仅允许必要来源并排除 data:，同时设置 object-src 'none'、base-uri 和 form-action。
mitigation.en: Fix HTML injection and disallow form, iframe, srcdoc, and active schemes in rich text. Use nonce or hash CSP without unsafe-inline, restrict frame-src to required origins excluding data, and set object-src none, base-uri, and form-action.

title.zh: 解析父子文档 CSP

description.zh: 记录响应头、meta policy、frame-src/child-src、script-src 和预期子文档 origin。
description.en: Record response and meta policy, frame-src or child-src, script-src, and expected child-document origin.

title.zh: 逐条提交无害元素
title.en: Submit harmless elements one by one

description.zh: 每个模式使用不同内存标记并独立刷新浏览器上下文。
description.en: Use a different in-memory marker per pattern and reset the browser context between cases.

title.zh: 确认执行上下文与来源

description.zh: 匹配标记、父/子 DOM、origin、控制台和 CSP 报告，区分加载与脚本执行。
description.en: Match markers, parent or child DOM, origin, console, and CSP reports to distinguish loading from script execution.

title.zh: 收紧元素和 CSP 后回归
title.en: Regress after element and CSP restrictions

description.zh: 修复消毒和 policy 后重放全部模式及合法 frame，确认业务保留且活动内容阻断。
description.en: After sanitizer and policy fixes replay every pattern and a legitimate frame to preserve business behavior while active content is blocked.

analysis.zh: 分别报告 form javascript、srcdoc、明文 data 和 Base64 data 的加载与执行结果、origin 和 CSP 指令。四行共享主题但不是同一浏览器机制。
analysis.en: Report load and execution, origin, and governing CSP directive separately for javascript forms, srcdoc, plain data, and Base64 data. They share a theme but not one browser mechanism.

opsecTips.zh: 所有 alert 改为内存标记，不读取 Cookie、存储或父文档敏感数据。
opsecTips.en: Replace every alert with an in-memory marker and do not read cookies, storage, or sensitive parent data.

opsecTips.zh: 每个模式使用全新浏览器上下文并关闭共享缓存，结束后销毁。
opsecTips.en: Use a fresh browser context without shared cache for each pattern and destroy it afterward.

name.zh: GraphQL 变量到 SQL 查询边界

description.zh: 使用布尔与堆叠 SQL 字符串验证 GraphQL 变量类型校验后是否仍被解析器拼接到数据库查询结构。
description.en: Uses Boolean and stacked SQL strings to test whether GraphQL variables are concatenated into database query structure after schema type validation.

prerequisites.zh: 目标 GraphQL resolver 使用变量访问关系型数据库
prerequisites.en: The target GraphQL resolver uses variables to access a relational database.

prerequisites.zh: 测试 schema、伪用户数据和最终 SQL 审计可用
prerequisites.en: A test schema, synthetic user data, and final SQL audit are available.

title.zh: GraphQL SQL 边界 JSON 请求

description.zh: 逐条发送到隔离 schema；前两行应在 GraphQL Int 强制转换阶段拒绝，第三行只指向可回滚测试表且用事务/只读账户验证，不执行 DROP。
description.en: Send separately to an isolated schema. The first two should fail GraphQL Int coercion; for the third use a rollback-safe test relation and read-only account and do not execute DROP.

overview.zh: GraphQL 变量与查询文档分离，但这只保证 GraphQL 类型边界，不自动参数化 resolver 内部 SQL。Int 变量收到字符串时应在执行前拒绝；String 变量仍必须由数据库驱动绑定。
overview.en: GraphQL separates variables from the operation document, but that only enforces GraphQL types and does not parameterize SQL inside a resolver. String values supplied to Int variables should be rejected before execution, while String variables still require database binding.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是 resolver 把已通过 GraphQL 校验的变量拼接进 SQL，或自定义 scalar/类型转换放宽输入后产生查询片段。GraphQL schema 是一层验证，但数据库语义边界仍由参数化查询决定。
vulnerability.en: The cause is a resolver concatenating GraphQL-validated variables into SQL or a custom scalar or coercion path turning input into query fragments. The schema validates one boundary; parameterized database calls enforce the SQL boundary.

exploitation.zh: 先用合法整数/字符串建立 resolver 和结果基线，逐条提交三行并关联 GraphQL validation、resolver 调用和最终 SQL。使用只读测试账户与事务回滚。只有最终 SQL 结构改变并返回固定伪数据才成立；类型错误是安全结果。
exploitation.en: Baseline valid integer and string variables, submit each line, and correlate GraphQL validation, resolver invocation, and final SQL. Use a read-only test account and transaction rollback. A finding requires altered SQL structure and fixed synthetic output; a coercion error is safe behavior.

mitigation.zh: 保持严格 schema 与标准 scalar，不在 resolver 中动态拼接 SQL；所有值使用数据库参数绑定，动态列/排序映射服务端枚举。应用数据库账户只读/最小权限，记录 validation 与查询审计并回归这三类变量。
mitigation.en: Keep a strict schema and standard scalars, never concatenate SQL in resolvers, bind every value, and map dynamic columns or sorting through server enums. Use least-privilege database accounts, log validation and query audit, and regress all three variable classes.

title.zh: 建立 GraphQL 类型基线

description.zh: 记录合法 Int/String 变量经过 validation、resolver 和数据库的完整路径。
description.en: Record the full validation, resolver, and database path for valid Int and String variables.

title.zh: 逐条提交 SQL 边界 JSON

description.zh: 一次发送一行并保留 GraphQL 错误、resolver 日志和最终 SQL。
description.en: Send one line at a time and retain GraphQL errors, resolver logs, and final SQL.

title.zh: 确认数据库结构是否改变

description.zh: 匹配固定伪数据和最终 SQL，区分 GraphQL 类型拒绝、普通无结果与真实注入。
description.en: Match fixed synthetic data and final SQL to distinguish type rejection, ordinary no-result behavior, and injection.

title.zh: 参数化 Resolver 并回归

description.zh: 修复后重放合法与全部恶意变量，确认 resolver 正常且 SQL 结构固定。
description.en: After remediation replay valid and all malicious variables to confirm normal resolver behavior with fixed SQL structure.

analysis.zh: 分层记录 GraphQL 解析、类型强制、resolver 和数据库四个阶段。前两行被 Int 校验拒绝是预期结果，不能因 payload 包含 SQL 关键字判为漏洞。
analysis.en: Record GraphQL parse, coercion, resolver, and database stages separately. Rejection of the first two at Int coercion is expected and must not be labeled vulnerable because the strings contain SQL keywords.

opsecTips.zh: 只使用测试表与只读账户，堆叠语句不执行任何 DROP/写操作。
opsecTips.en: Use only test relations and a read-only account and never execute the DROP or any write operation.

opsecTips.zh: 每次请求限制字段与返回条数，避免同时暴露 email/role 等真实数据。
opsecTips.en: Limit fields and result rows per request and avoid exposing real email or role data.

name.zh: GraphQL 变量文件路径边界

description.zh: 使用父目录字符串验证 GraphQL String 变量是否被 resolver 当作文件名或资源路径并越过服务端根目录。
description.en: Uses a parent-directory string to test whether a GraphQL String variable is treated as a filename or resource path and escapes the server root.

prerequisites.zh: resolver 的 id/String 变量实际参与文件或对象路径解析
prerequisites.en: A resolver's id or String variable actually participates in file or object-path resolution.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离文件根目录外有无敏感标记并启用访问审计
prerequisites.en: A nonsensitive marker exists outside the isolated file root with access auditing.

title.zh: GraphQL 路径变量 JSON

description.zh: 只有在代码/日志确认 id 进入路径 API 时使用，并把系统路径替换为根目录外测试标记；若 id 只是数据库键，该样例应判不适用。
description.en: Use only when code or logs show id reaching a path API and replace the system path with an out-of-root marker; if id is only a database key, mark the sample not applicable.

overview.zh: GraphQL String 接受路径字符是正常类型行为，安全问题取决于 resolver 的后续用途。只有变量进入文件 API、完全规范化后越过根目录并读取测试标记，才是路径遍历。
overview.en: GraphQL String legitimately accepts path characters; risk depends on resolver use. Path traversal requires the variable to reach a file API, escape the root after full canonicalization, and read a test marker.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是 resolver 复用 id 作为文件名、模板或对象路径，直接拼接到目录且只做原始字符串过滤。GraphQL schema 不理解文件系统语义，无法替代规范路径与根目录校验。
vulnerability.en: The cause is a resolver reusing id as a filename, template, or object path and concatenating it to a directory with raw-string filtering. The GraphQL schema does not understand filesystem semantics and cannot replace canonical-path root checks.

exploitation.zh: 先追踪合法 id 到 resolver 和文件 API，用根内标记建立基线，再把样例目标改为根外标记并提交一次。关联规范路径、文件审计和响应。GraphQL 接受变量、返回 null 或数据库错误都不能证明文件访问。
exploitation.en: Trace a valid id through resolver and file API, baseline an in-root marker, then point the sample to an out-of-root marker and submit once. Correlate canonical path, file audit, and response. Variable acceptance, null, or database errors do not prove file access.

mitigation.zh: 把 GraphQL id 映射到服务端对象而非路径；必须处理路径时，完全解码后解析规范绝对路径并强制固定根目录、禁止符号链接越界。文件服务身份最小权限，schema 使用语义明确的 ID scalar。
mitigation.en: Map GraphQL IDs to server-side objects rather than paths. If paths are required, fully decode, resolve a canonical absolute path, enforce a fixed root, and block symlink escape. Run file services with least privilege and use a semantically explicit ID scalar.

title.zh: 确认变量到路径的数据流

description.zh: 从 GraphQL validation 追踪 id 到 resolver、路径拼接和最终文件 API。
description.en: Trace id from GraphQL validation through resolver, path composition, and final file API.

title.zh: 提交根外标记变量

description.zh: 替换系统目标后发送一次 JSON，并保留规范路径和请求 ID。
description.en: Replace the system target, send the JSON once, and retain canonical path and request ID.

title.zh: 确认文件根目录越界

description.zh: 匹配文件审计、标记内容和 resolver 日志，排除数据库键错误。
description.en: Match file audit, marker content, and resolver logs, excluding database-key errors.

title.zh: 改用对象映射并回归
title.en: Switch to object mapping and regress

description.zh: 修复后重放合法 ID 和路径变量，确认前者可用且后者不会触发文件访问。
description.en: After remediation replay valid IDs and path variables to preserve the former without filesystem access from the latter.

analysis.zh: 如果 resolver 只做数据库查询，该样例属于 SQL/类型输入而非文件漏洞。报告必须给出路径 API 和真实规范路径，不能从 `../` 字符串下结论。
analysis.en: If the resolver only queries a database, this sample is a type or SQL input, not a file flaw. Report the path API and actual canonical path rather than concluding from ../ text.

opsecTips.zh: 将 `/etc/passwd` 替换为测试标记，禁止读取真实系统文件。
opsecTips.en: Replace /etc/passwd with a test marker and never read a real system file.

opsecTips.zh: 只在确认路径数据流后发送一次，避免无意义探测污染 GraphQL 审计。
opsecTips.en: Send once only after confirming the path data flow to avoid meaningless GraphQL audit noise.

name.zh: GraphQL Input 批量赋值越权

description.zh: 使用 role 与 isAdmin 字段验证 mutation input 是否把客户端可控属性直接绑定到用户实体并绕过角色变更授权。
description.en: Uses role and isAdmin fields to test whether mutation input is bound directly to a user entity and bypasses authorization for privilege changes.

subCategory.zh: GraphQL 批量赋值与字段授权
subCategory.en: GraphQL Mass Assignment and Field Authorization

prerequisites.zh: 低权限测试用户可调用 updateUser mutation
prerequisites.en: A low-privilege test user can call the updateUser mutation.

prerequisites.zh: 测试对象可回滚并可读取服务端持久化与审计结果
prerequisites.en: The test object is reversible and persistence and audit results are observable.

title.zh: 特权字段 Mutation JSON

description.zh: 逐条对专用低权限测试用户提交，并把 id 替换为其自身测试对象；每次后检查数据库、最终主体和对象授权并立即回滚。
description.en: Submit separately for a dedicated low-privilege user, replace id with that user's test object, inspect database, final principal, and authorization after each, and immediately roll back.

overview.zh: 字段出现在 GraphQL Input 类型中不代表所有调用者都有权修改。批量赋值问题发生在 resolver 将 input 自动映射到实体，未对 role/isAdmin 等字段做服务端字段级授权。
overview.en: A field's presence in a GraphQL Input type does not authorize every caller to modify it. Mass assignment occurs when a resolver automatically maps input to an entity without server-side field authorization for role or isAdmin.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是复用持久化模型作为输入 DTO，或通用 update/merge 将所有提供字段写入对象。schema 可见性、前端隐藏和字段命名不能替代按主体和字段执行的授权。
vulnerability.en: The cause is reusing a persistence model as an input DTO or a generic update or merge writing every supplied field. Schema visibility, hidden UI, and field naming cannot replace principal- and field-level authorization.

exploitation.zh: 记录普通用户更新允许字段的基线，逐条添加 role 或 isAdmin 并检查 mutation 错误、持久化对象、最终主体及管理测试操作。字段被忽略或验证拒绝是安全结果；只有持久化或真实授权提升成立。
exploitation.en: Baseline an allowed field update, add role or isAdmin separately, and inspect mutation errors, persisted object, final principal, and an administrative test action. Ignored or rejected fields are safe; persistence or real authorization elevation confirms the flaw.

mitigation.zh: 为每个 mutation 定义最小专用 Input DTO，resolver 显式复制允许字段并对敏感字段执行独立授权。角色变更使用单独管理 mutation、再认证与审计；持久化层禁止通用客户端对象 merge。
mitigation.en: Define minimal mutation-specific Input DTOs, explicitly copy allowed fields in resolvers, and independently authorize sensitive fields. Use a separate reauthenticated audited administrative mutation for role changes and prohibit generic client-object merges.

title.zh: 建立允许字段更新基线

description.zh: 用专用普通用户修改一个非敏感字段并记录持久化和审计。
description.en: Use a dedicated normal user to update one nonsensitive field and record persistence and audit.

title.zh: 逐条提交特权字段

description.zh: 一次添加 role 或 isAdmin，只操作自身测试对象。
description.en: Add role or isAdmin one at a time and operate only on the caller's test object.

title.zh: 确认持久化和授权影响

description.zh: 核对数据库、身份缓存和管理测试操作，排除单纯响应回显。
description.en: Inspect database, identity cache, and administrative test action, excluding response reflection.

title.zh: 实施字段允许列表并回归

description.zh: 修复 DTO 与授权后重放，确认正常字段可改而特权字段拒绝。
description.en: After DTO and authorization fixes replay requests to preserve normal updates while denying privilege fields.

analysis.zh: 分别检查 schema 是否接受字段、resolver 是否读取、实体是否持久化和授权是否改变。仅接受但忽略字段不构成越权。
analysis.en: Check schema acceptance, resolver consumption, persistence, and authorization separately. Accepting but ignoring a field is not privilege escalation.

opsecTips.zh: 只使用可回滚测试用户和自身对象，不修改真实角色或其他用户。
opsecTips.en: Use only a rollback-safe test user and self-owned object; never alter real roles or another user.

opsecTips.zh: 每次请求后立即回滚实体和身份缓存，确认无权限残留。
opsecTips.en: Roll back the entity and identity cache immediately after each request and verify no privilege remains.

name.zh: GraphQL 字符串内结构化过滤注入
name.en: Structured Filter Injection inside a GraphQL String

description.zh: 使用 JSON 字符串形式的 role 过滤器验证 resolver 是否对变量执行第二次结构解析并将未授权谓词传入数据层。
description.en: Uses a JSON-encoded role filter to test whether a resolver parses a variable a second time and forwards unauthorized predicates into the data layer.

prerequisites.zh: users resolver 接受 String filter 并在服务端解析为对象/查询条件
prerequisites.en: The users resolver accepts a String filter and parses it server-side into an object or query predicate.

prerequisites.zh: 专用数据集包含普通与管理员伪记录并可审计最终过滤器
prerequisites.en: A dedicated dataset contains synthetic normal and admin records and exposes the final predicate for audit.

title.zh: JSON 编码角色过滤器

description.zh: 只在确认 resolver 二次解析 String 后使用，目标改为专用伪角色并限制一条结果；同时比较普通文本和非法 JSON 对照。
description.en: Use only after confirming second-stage parsing of the String, target a synthetic role, limit output to one row, and compare plain-text and malformed-JSON controls.

overview.zh: GraphQL 只把 filter 视为 String，真正语义来自 resolver 的第二次 JSON/DSL 解析。若解析器允许客户端任意字段和运算符，可能绕过预定义搜索范围或对象级授权。
overview.en: GraphQL sees filter only as a String; semantics come from a second JSON or DSL parse in the resolver. If that parser allows arbitrary fields and operators, input may bypass intended search scope or object authorization.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是把自由字符串解析成通用过滤对象，并直接映射到 ORM/数据库查询。字段、运算符、深度和主体作用域缺少允许列表，导致客户端控制查询结构。
vulnerability.en: The cause is parsing a free-form string into a generic filter object and mapping it directly to an ORM or database query. Missing field, operator, depth, and principal-scope allowlists let the client control query structure.

exploitation.zh: 确认二次解析路径后，用普通关键词、非法 JSON 和专用 role 过滤器建立三组对照。记录解析后的 AST/对象、最终查询和返回伪记录。只有未授权 role 谓词被接受并越过主体范围才成立。
exploitation.en: After identifying second-stage parsing, compare a normal keyword, malformed JSON, and dedicated role filter. Record parsed AST or object, final query, and synthetic output. Confirm only if an unauthorized role predicate is accepted and escapes the caller's scope.

mitigation.zh: 使用强类型 GraphQL FilterInput 而非 String 内嵌 DSL，显式允许字段/运算符/深度并在服务端附加不可覆盖的主体范围。ORM 仍使用参数绑定，限制结果、复杂度和查询时间。
mitigation.en: Use a typed GraphQL FilterInput rather than an embedded DSL String, allowlist fields, operators, and depth, and append a server-owned principal scope that input cannot override. Keep ORM parameter binding and cap result size, complexity, and duration.

title.zh: 确认第二阶段过滤解析

description.zh: 从 String 变量追踪到 JSON/DSL 解析器、过滤对象和数据查询。
description.en: Trace the String variable into the JSON or DSL parser, filter object, and data query.

title.zh: 提交专用角色过滤器

description.zh: 使用伪角色和一条结果上限，并与普通/非法输入对照。
description.en: Use a synthetic role and one-row limit and compare with normal and malformed input.

title.zh: 确认范围或谓词越界

description.zh: 匹配解析对象、最终查询和伪记录，确认服务端主体范围是否被覆盖。
description.en: Match parsed object, final query, and synthetic output and determine whether the server-owned scope was overridden.

title.zh: 改用强类型 FilterInput

description.zh: 修复后重放三组输入，确认允许过滤保留且未知字段/运算符拒绝。
description.en: After remediation replay all controls to preserve allowed filters while rejecting unknown fields or operators.

analysis.zh: 关键证据是 String 被二次解析成结构并改变最终查询/主体范围。若 resolver 把整个字符串当普通关键词搜索，则样例不适用。
analysis.en: The key evidence is second-stage structural parsing that changes final query or principal scope. If the resolver treats the value as an ordinary search term, the sample is not applicable.

opsecTips.zh: 只使用伪角色与一条伪记录，不枚举真实管理员或邮箱。
opsecTips.en: Use only a synthetic role and one synthetic record; never enumerate real administrators or email addresses.

opsecTips.zh: 限制过滤深度和一次请求，避免通用解析器生成高成本查询。
opsecTips.en: Limit filter depth and use one request to avoid expensive queries from a generic parser.

name.zh: GraphQL 变量到 HTML 输出边界

description.zh: 使用 script 字符串验证 import mutation 的 data 变量是否在存储、预览或管理界面中未经上下文编码进入 HTML。
description.en: Uses a script string to test whether an import mutation's data variable reaches stored, preview, or administrative HTML without context-aware encoding.

subCategory.zh: GraphQL 导入数据存储型 XSS
subCategory.en: Stored XSS through GraphQL Import Data

prerequisites.zh: 授权测试账号可导入数据并在隔离预览/管理视图中查看
prerequisites.en: An authorized test account can import data and view it in an isolated preview or administrative view.

prerequisites.zh: 使用无副作用 DOM 内存标记且可清理测试记录
prerequisites.en: A side-effect-free DOM in-memory marker is used and test records can be removed.

title.zh: GraphQL HTML 数据变量

description.zh: 把 alert 改为设置随机内存标记，在专用记录中提交一次，并检查 API 响应、存储值、渲染 DOM 和 CSP；不读取 Cookie 或外传。
description.en: Replace alert with a random in-memory marker, submit once in a dedicated record, and inspect API response, stored value, rendered DOM, and CSP without cookie access or exfiltration.

overview.zh: GraphQL JSON 正确转义只保护传输格式，不保护数据最终进入 HTML 的上下文。import 成功也不等于 XSS；必须在实际消费者视图看到字符串成为 script 元素并触发无害标记。
overview.en: Correct JSON escaping protects transport syntax, not the later HTML context. A successful import is not XSS; the actual consumer view must turn the string into a script element and trigger a harmless marker.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是导入管线把不可信字符串存储后，在预览、报表或管理页面通过 innerHTML/模板原样渲染，缺少上下文编码或 HTML 消毒。API 与 UI 属于跨组件信任边界。
vulnerability.en: The cause is an import pipeline storing an untrusted string and later rendering it in preview, report, or admin UI through innerHTML or raw templates without context encoding or HTML sanitization. The API-to-UI path is a cross-component trust boundary.

exploitation.zh: 用普通文本建立导入/渲染基线，再提交无害标记版本并在隔离浏览器打开所有实际消费者视图。记录存储值、DOM、CSP 和标记。响应回显、源码文本或 sanitizer 删除标签均不是执行。
exploitation.en: Baseline import and rendering with plain text, submit a harmless marker version, and open every actual consumer view in an isolated browser. Record stored value, DOM, CSP, and marker. Response reflection, source text, or sanitizer removal is not execution.

mitigation.zh: 所有消费者按 HTML/属性/URL/JS 上下文编码，富文本使用成熟消毒器并禁止 script/事件属性；避免 innerHTML，部署 nonce/hash CSP 作为补充。导入 schema 校验数据类型并为 API 到 UI 建立端到端回归。
mitigation.en: Encode at every consumer for HTML, attribute, URL, or JavaScript context, use a maintained sanitizer for rich text, block script and event attributes, avoid innerHTML, and deploy nonce or hash CSP as defense in depth. Validate import schemas and add API-to-UI regression.

title.zh: 绘制导入到渲染数据流

description.zh: 确认 data 经过的存储、转换和所有前端/管理消费者。
description.en: Identify storage, transformations, and every frontend or administrative consumer of data.

title.zh: 提交无害 HTML 标记

description.zh: 替换 alert 后写入专用记录一次，并保留请求与记录 ID。
description.en: Replace alert, write one dedicated record, and retain request and record IDs.

title.zh: 确认真实消费者执行
title.en: Confirm execution in a real consumer

description.zh: 匹配存储值、DOM 元素、CSP 事件和内存标记，排除 API 回显。
description.en: Match stored value, DOM element, CSP events, and in-memory marker while excluding API reflection.

title.zh: 编码所有消费者并清理
title.en: Encode every consumer and clean up

description.zh: 删除测试记录、修复渲染后重放普通文本与标记，确认前者可见而后者为文本。
description.en: Delete test data, fix rendering, and replay plain text and the marker to confirm the former renders and the latter is inert text.

analysis.zh: 分别确认 JSON 传输、存储、HTML 解析和脚本执行。GraphQL 层接受 `<script>` 字符串是正常行为，漏洞位于后续未编码消费者。
analysis.en: Confirm JSON transport, persistence, HTML parsing, and script execution separately. GraphQL accepting a script string is normal; the flaw resides in an unencoded downstream consumer.

opsecTips.zh: 只设置随机内存标记，不读取 Cookie、localStorage 或页面数据。
opsecTips.en: Set only a random in-memory marker and never read cookies, localStorage, or page data.

opsecTips.zh: 使用专用记录并在测试后从数据库、缓存和搜索索引中清理。
opsecTips.en: Use a dedicated record and remove it from database, cache, and search index after testing.

name.zh: GraphQL 搜索通配与分页成本边界
name.en: GraphQL Search Wildcard and Pagination Cost Boundary

description.zh: 使用通配搜索与超大 first 值验证 resolver 是否缺少分页上限、查询复杂度控制和数据库成本保护。
description.en: Uses wildcard search and an oversized first value to test whether resolvers lack pagination caps, query-complexity controls, and database cost protection.

subCategory.zh: GraphQL 查询成本与资源限制
subCategory.en: GraphQL Query Cost and Resource Limits

prerequisites.zh: 只在性能隔离环境和小型伪数据集验证成本控制
prerequisites.en: Cost controls are tested only in a performance-isolated environment with a small synthetic dataset.

prerequisites.zh: 可观察 resolver、数据库和响应大小指标并设置硬超时
prerequisites.en: Resolver, database, and response-size metrics are observable with hard timeouts.

title.zh: 搜索与分页成本 JSON

description.zh: 在小型伪数据集逐条执行，从低值阶梯增加到策略边界；原 99999 仅用于验证服务器在执行前拒绝/截断，不实际返回该数量。
description.en: Execute separately on a small synthetic dataset and increase from low values to the policy boundary. The original 99999 is only to verify pre-execution rejection or clamping, not to return that many rows.

overview.zh: GraphQL 类型正确不代表查询成本受控。通配搜索可能触发全表/全文扫描，超大分页值可能放大数据库、序列化和网络开销。安全验证应证明服务器在成本执行前限制，而不是压测到资源耗尽。
overview.en: Valid GraphQL types do not guarantee bounded cost. Wildcard search can trigger broad scans and oversized pagination can amplify database, serialization, and network work. Safe validation proves pre-execution controls without driving the service to exhaustion.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是 resolver 直接把搜索和 first 值交给数据层，缺少最大页大小、搜索语法约束、查询成本预算、超时与速率限制。攻击者可用少量请求制造不成比例工作。
vulnerability.en: The cause is passing search and first values directly to the data layer without maximum page size, search grammar constraints, query-cost budgets, timeouts, or rate limits. A small number of requests can create disproportionate work.

exploitation.zh: 在小型测试集记录普通关键词和小分页基线，逐级增加到配置上限并最终提交原样例一次，观察是否在 resolver/数据库前拒绝或截断。记录执行计划、扫描行、响应字节与时延，达到任一安全阈值立即停止。
exploitation.en: On a small test dataset baseline a normal keyword and small page, increase stepwise to the configured cap, then submit the original sample once to observe pre-resolver or pre-database rejection or clamping. Record plan, scanned rows, bytes, and latency and stop at any safety threshold.

mitigation.zh: 为分页设置服务端硬上限和游标，搜索只允许定义语法并使用有界索引。部署 GraphQL depth/complexity/cost 预算、执行超时、响应字节上限、速率限制和缓存，监控成本与主体关联。
mitigation.en: Set hard server-side page caps and cursors, allow only defined search grammar backed by bounded indexes, and deploy GraphQL depth, complexity, and cost budgets, execution timeout, response-byte caps, rate limits, and caching with principal-linked monitoring.

title.zh: 建立小查询成本基线

description.zh: 在伪数据集记录普通搜索和小页的计划、扫描、时延与响应大小。
description.en: Record plan, scanned rows, latency, and response size for normal search and a small page on synthetic data.

title.zh: 阶梯增加并提交边界样例
title.en: Increase stepwise and submit boundary samples

description.zh: 逐级到上限后分别提交通配与超大分页，达到阈值即停止。
description.en: Increase to the cap, then submit wildcard and oversized pagination separately and stop at the first threshold.

title.zh: 确认拒绝、截断或成本放大
title.en: Confirm rejection, clamping, or cost amplification

description.zh: 关联 GraphQL 成本决策、resolver、数据库计划与响应指标，区分安全截断和无界执行。
description.en: Correlate GraphQL cost decisions, resolver, database plan, and response metrics to distinguish safe clamping from unbounded execution.

title.zh: 设置硬上限并回归

description.zh: 修复后重放小查询和边界样例，确认正常使用保留且超限在执行前拒绝。
description.en: After remediation replay small and boundary queries to preserve normal use while rejecting excessive cost before execution.

analysis.zh: 评价放大比而不是只看绝对延迟：输入大小、扫描行、数据库时间、序列化和响应字节。若 99999 被安全截断到上限，应记录为控制有效。
analysis.en: Evaluate amplification across input size, scanned rows, database time, serialization, and response bytes rather than absolute latency alone. Safe clamping of 99999 to a cap is an effective control.

opsecTips.zh: 只在隔离小数据集串行运行，设置硬超时、扫描行和响应字节停止线。
opsecTips.en: Run serially only on an isolated small dataset with hard timeout, scanned-row, and response-byte stop limits.

opsecTips.zh: 不并发、不循环原 99999 请求，取得拒绝/截断证据即停止。
opsecTips.en: Do not parallelize or loop the 99999 request and stop as soon as rejection or clamping is proven.

name.zh: PHP Filter Wrapper 源码读取

description.zh: 使用 php://filter 的 Base64 转换与 resource 参数验证文件读取/包含入口是否可返回 PHP 源码或测试文件内容。
description.en: Uses php://filter Base64 conversion and resource parameters to test whether a read or include sink can return PHP source or test-file content.

prerequisites.zh: 目标已确认运行 PHP，且用户输入进入文件读取或包含 API
prerequisites.en: The target is confirmed to run PHP and user input reaches a file-read or include API.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离实例提供无敏感 PHP 标记文件和文件访问审计
prerequisites.en: An isolated instance provides a nonsensitive PHP marker file and file-access auditing.

title.zh: Filter Wrapper 路径变体

description.zh: 按已确认路径模型逐条选择，把 config/flag/passwd 全部替换为测试标记；先验证读取 API，再决定 filter 语法是否适用。
description.en: Choose variants for the confirmed path model, replace every config, flag, and passwd target with a test marker, and establish the read API before testing filter syntax.

overview.zh: php://filter 可在文件读取前应用转换器，Base64 常用于让 PHP 源码以数据而非执行结果返回。风险取决于输入是否到达支持 wrapper 的 PHP 文件 API；URI 被接受或错误中出现 wrapper 名不足。
overview.en: php://filter applies transformations before a file read, and Base64 can expose PHP source as data rather than execute it. Risk depends on input reaching a wrapper-aware PHP file API; URI acceptance or a wrapper name in an error is insufficient.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是用户可控制读取/包含资源名，应用未限制 wrapper scheme 和规范路径。filter 将原本不可直接查看的 PHP 文件编码返回，路径遍历或绝对路径进一步扩大读取范围。
vulnerability.en: The cause is user control of a read or include resource without scheme and canonical-path restrictions. The filter can encode PHP files that would otherwise execute, while traversal or absolute paths expand the readable scope.

exploitation.zh: 先用根内纯文本标记确认文件数据流，再把一条 filter 变体指向无敏感 PHP 标记文件。关联文件访问、响应 Base64 与本地已知哈希。解码后固定标记匹配才成立；通用 500、空响应和 Base64 外观不是证据。
exploitation.en: First confirm the file flow with an in-root text marker, then point one filter variant to a nonsensitive PHP marker. Correlate file access, returned Base64, and a known local hash. Confirmation requires the decoded fixed marker; a 500, empty response, or Base64-looking text is not evidence.

mitigation.zh: 用服务端对象 ID 映射文件，不将用户输入传给通用文件 API；必须读取时只允许 file 资源、固定根目录和规范路径。禁用不需要的 wrapper，最小化 PHP 账户文件权限，并轮换任何已确认泄露的配置密钥。
mitigation.en: Map server-side object IDs to files and do not pass user input into generic file APIs. If reads are required, allow only file resources under a canonical fixed root, disable unnecessary wrappers, minimize PHP filesystem access, and rotate any configuration secret proven exposed.

title.zh: 确认 PHP 文件读取 API

description.zh: 从输入追踪到具体读取/包含函数、wrapper 支持和规范文件根。
description.en: Trace input to the exact read or include function, wrapper support, and canonical file root.

title.zh: 读取单一 Base64 标记

description.zh: 替换所有敏感目标并选择一条匹配路径变体，保留请求与文件审计。
description.en: Replace every sensitive target, choose one matching path variant, and retain request and file audit.

title.zh: 核对解码内容与访问来源
title.en: Verify decoded content and access provenance

description.zh: 解码响应并匹配固定标记哈希，同时确认读取由 PHP 进程发生。
description.en: Decode the response, match the fixed marker hash, and confirm the PHP process performed the read.

title.zh: 限制 Wrapper 与根目录
title.en: Restrict wrappers and the file root

description.zh: 修复后重放合法文件和全部变体，确认业务读取保留且 wrapper/越界目标拒绝。
description.en: After remediation replay valid files and all variants to preserve business reads while rejecting wrappers and out-of-root targets.

analysis.zh: 阳性需要 PHP 进程读取专用文件且解码内容与标记一致。错误、空白或任意 Base64 字符串是假阳性；还应区分源码读取与 include 执行。
analysis.en: A positive requires the PHP process to read the dedicated file and decoded content to match the marker. Errors, blanks, or arbitrary Base64 are false positives, and source read must remain distinct from include execution.

opsecTips.zh: 达到第一个固定标记后停止，不读取真实 config、flag、passwd 或 index.php。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the first fixed marker and do not read real config, flag, passwd, or index.php files.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后删除标记、清理应用缓存，并遮盖报告中的路径和编码内容。
opsecTips.en: Remove the marker, clear application caches, and redact paths and encoded content from the report afterward.

name.zh: PHP stdin、memory 与 temp 运行时流边界
name.en: PHP stdin, memory, and temp Runtime Stream Boundaries

description.zh: 验证文件型输入点是否接受 php://stdin、php://memory 与 php://temp，并区分进程标准输入、内存临时流和普通文件读取。
description.en: Tests whether a file-oriented sink accepts php://stdin, php://memory, or php://temp and distinguishes process input, in-memory temporary streams, and ordinary file reads.

prerequisites.zh: 目标 PHP API 接受通用 stream URI，并可观察实际打开的 wrapper
prerequisites.en: The target PHP API accepts generic stream URIs and the opened wrapper can be observed.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离请求体只含固定标记且不触发 include 执行
prerequisites.en: The isolated request body contains only a fixed marker and does not trigger include execution.

title.zh: PHP 运行时流 URI

description.zh: 逐条用于已确认的读取 API，stdin 请求体只放固定文本；memory/temp 通常是进程内新流，空结果可能是预期而非漏洞。
description.en: Use each with a confirmed read API and place only fixed text in stdin. memory and temp normally open new process-local streams, so empty output may be expected rather than vulnerable.

overview.zh: 这三种 wrapper 是 PHP 运行时 I/O 能力，不等同于本地文件读取。stdin 可引用进程标准输入，memory/temp 创建临时流；是否有安全影响取决于目标 API 是否 include 内容或复用了可控流。
overview.en: These wrappers expose PHP runtime I/O and are not equivalent to local-file reads. stdin references process input while memory and temp create temporary streams; impact depends on whether a sink includes content or reuses an attacker-controlled stream.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是业务把用户提供的 URI 交给通用 stream API，并在读取/包含之间没有固定语义。若 stdin 的请求体被 include，数据可跨入代码；若只是读取新建空 memory/temp，通常没有影响。
vulnerability.en: The cause is passing a user URI to a generic stream API without a fixed read-versus-include contract. Including stdin body can cross data into code, whereas reading a new empty memory or temp stream usually has no impact.

exploitation.zh: 从代码或跟踪确认 API 是 read 还是 include，再用纯文本随机标记逐条测试。记录打开的 wrapper、返回内容和 PHP 日志。只有标记跨越预期边界或被服务器解释时成立；URI 被接受、空响应或普通 echo 是假阳性。
exploitation.en: Identify read versus include behavior from code or tracing, then test each URI with a plain random marker. Record the opened wrapper, output, and PHP logs.
