A positive requires the marker to cross the intended boundary or be interpreted server-side; URI acceptance, empty output, or ordinary echo is a false positive.

mitigation.zh: 不要让用户选择 wrapper；为每个业务场景调用固定 API 和资源类型。禁止动态 include，请求体作为数据解析，关闭不需要的 wrapper，并以最小权限和资源限制运行 PHP。
mitigation.en: Do not let users choose wrappers; invoke a fixed API and resource type for each business case. Prohibit dynamic include, parse request bodies as data, disable unnecessary wrappers, and run PHP with least privilege and resource limits.

title.zh: 确认读取或包含语义

description.zh: 定位 URI 到具体 PHP stream API，并记录输入体和 wrapper 基线。
description.en: Locate the URI's PHP stream API and record body and wrapper baselines.

title.zh: 逐流提交固定标记
title.en: Submit a fixed marker per stream

description.zh: 一次选择一个 URI，stdin 配合纯文本标记，memory/temp 不预填敏感数据。
description.en: Choose one URI at a time, pair stdin with plain marker text, and do not preload sensitive data into memory or temp.

title.zh: 核对实际流与处理结果
title.en: Verify the actual stream and processing result

description.zh: 匹配 wrapper 打开日志、标记输出和是否发生解释，排除空流正常行为。
description.en: Match wrapper-open logs, marker output, and any interpretation, excluding normal empty-stream behavior.

title.zh: 固定资源类型并回归

description.zh: 修复后重放合法资源与三种 URI，确认只允许业务指定输入。
description.en: After remediation replay valid resources and all three URIs to confirm only business-specified input is allowed.

analysis.zh: 阳性边界是可控 stdin/流内容被目标读取或解释并改变服务器行为。memory/temp 的空结果和 wrapper 名回显是假阳性，不应按文件包含评级。
analysis.en: The positive boundary is controlled stdin or stream content being consumed or interpreted and changing server behavior. Empty memory or temp output and reflected wrapper names are false positives and should not be rated as file inclusion.

opsecTips.zh: stdin 只放一次随机文本标记，看到后立即停止，不提交 PHP 代码。
opsecTips.en: Place one random text marker in stdin and stop when observed; never submit PHP code.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后关闭请求连接并清理临时目录/进程缓存，确认没有持久文件。
opsecTips.en: Close the request and clear temporary directories or process caches afterward, confirming no persistent file remains.

name.zh: PHP data Wrapper 内联内容包含
name.en: PHP data Wrapper Inline Content Inclusion

description.zh: 使用 data:// 与 data: 的 Base64/明文 PHP 内容验证文件包含点是否把内联数据交给 PHP 解释器。
description.en: Uses Base64 and plain PHP content in data:// and data: URIs to test whether a file-inclusion sink passes inline data to the PHP interpreter.

subCategory.zh: PHP data Wrapper 代码包含

prerequisites.zh: 仅在隔离 PHP 实例确认输入进入 include/require 而非普通读取
prerequisites.en: Testing occurs only on an isolated PHP instance after confirming input reaches include or require rather than an ordinary read.

prerequisites.zh: 验证内容改写为固定输出标记且 allow_url_include 配置可审计
prerequisites.en: Validation content is rewritten to fixed marker output and allow_url_include configuration is auditable.

title.zh: data Wrapper 编码与明文变体
title.en: Encoded and Plain data Wrapper Variants

execution.command:
data://text/plain;base64,PD9waHAgaW5jbHVkZSgnL2ZsYWcnKTsgPz4=
data://text/plain;base64,PD9waHAgZWNobyhmaWxlX2dldF9jb250ZW50cygnL2ZsYWcnKSk7ID8+
data://text/plain;base64,PD9waHAgc2hvd19zb3VyY2UoJy9ldGMvcGFzc3dkJyk7ID8+
data://text/plain;base64,PD9waHAgcHJpbnRfcihzY2FuZGlyKCcuJykpOyA/Pg==
data://text/plain;base64,PD9waHAgaGlnaGxpZ2h0X2ZpbGUoX19GSUxFXyk7ID8+
data://text/plain;base64,PD9waHAgZmlsZV9nZXRfY29udGVudHMoJy9mbGFnJyk7ID8+
data://text/plain;base64,PD9waHAgcmVhZGZpbGUoJy9mbGFnJyk7ID8+
data://text/plain;base64,PD9waHAgZWNobyhmaWxlKCcvZmxhZycpKTsgPz4=
data://text/plain,<?php system('id'); ?>
data://text/plain,<?php include('/flag'); ?>
data://text/plain,<?php echo(file_get_contents('/flag')); ?>
data://text/plain,<?php show_source('/etc/passwd'); ?>
data://text/plain,<?php print_r(scandir('.')); ?>
data:text/plain;base64,PD9waHAgaW5jbHVkZSgnL2ZsYWcnKTsgPz4=
data:text/plain;base64,PD9waHAgZWNobyhmaWxlX2dldF9jb250ZW50cygnL2ZsYWcnKSk7ID8+

description.zh: 原行保留用于审校。实际验证选择一行并将其解码/明文内容改为 `<?php echo 'MARKER'; ?>`，不读取文件、不列目录、不执行系统命令。
description.en: The original lines are retained for review. For validation choose one and replace decoded or plain content with a fixed PHP marker echo, with no file read, directory listing, or OS command.

overview.zh: data Wrapper 把 URI 内联内容暴露为流；普通读取只返回数据，include/require 才可能把 PHP 标签解释为代码。原样例包含读取和命令内容，但安全验证只需固定 echo 标记。
overview.en: The data wrapper exposes inline URI content as a stream. Ordinary reads return data, while include or require may interpret PHP tags. The originals contain file-read and command content, but safe validation needs only a fixed echo marker.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是用户可控制 include 目标且启用了允许 URL include 的配置或等价执行路径。应用未限制 wrapper scheme，导致内联数据从输入跨入 PHP 编译执行。
vulnerability.en: The cause is user control of an include target with URL inclusion enabled or an equivalent execution path. Missing wrapper allowlisting lets inline data cross from input into PHP compilation and execution.

exploitation.zh: 审计配置与 include 路径后，将一条样例内容替换为随机固定 echo，提交一次并关联 PHP 编译日志和响应标记。若只原样返回内容则是读取不是 RCE；错误、URI 接受或 Base64 解码本身是假阳性。
exploitation.en: After auditing configuration and the include path, replace one sample with a random fixed echo, submit once, and correlate PHP compilation logs and marker output. Raw content return is a read rather than RCE; errors, URI acceptance, or Base64 decoding alone are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 禁止动态 include 用户输入，关闭 allow_url_include 并限制可用 wrapper。模板通过服务端 ID 映射，数据流只用解析 API，不交给 PHP 编译器；应用身份最小权限并监控 data URI 进入 include。
mitigation.en: Prohibit dynamic inclusion of user input, disable allow_url_include, and restrict wrappers. Map templates by server-side IDs, parse data with data APIs rather than the PHP compiler, apply least privilege, and monitor data URIs reaching include paths.

title.zh: 确认 include 与配置前提

description.zh: 定位动态 include/require、allow_url_include 和 PHP 版本。
description.en: Identify dynamic include or require, allow_url_include, and PHP version.

title.zh: 提交单一固定 echo Wrapper

description.zh: 选择一条变体并替换全部危险内容，只输出随机固定标记。
description.en: Choose one variant, replace all dangerous content, and emit only a random fixed marker.

attackChain.payload:
data://text/plain;base64,PD9waHAgaW5jbHVkZSgnL2ZsYWcnKTsgPz4=
data://text/plain;base64,PD9waHAgZWNobyhmaWxlX2dldF9jb250ZW50cygnL2ZsYWcnKSk7ID8+
data://text/plain;base64,PD9waHAgc2hvd19zb3VyY2UoJy9ldGMvcGFzc3dkJyk7ID8+
data://text/plain;base64,PD9waHAgcHJpbnRfcihzY2FuZGlyKCcuJykpOyA/Pg==
data://text/plain;base64,PD9waHAgaGlnaGxpZ2h0X2ZpbGUoX19GSUxFXyk7ID8+
data://text/plain;base64,PD9waHAgZmlsZV9nZXRfY29udGVudHMoJy9mbGFnJyk7ID8+
data://text/plain;base64,PD9waHAgcmVhZGZpbGUoJy9mbGFnJyk7ID8+
data://text/plain;base64,PD9waHAgZWNobyhmaWxlKCcvZmxhZycpKTsgPz4=
data://text/plain,<?php system('id'); ?>
data://text/plain,<?php include('/flag'); ?>
data://text/plain,<?php echo(file_get_contents('/flag')); ?>
data://text/plain,<?php show_source('/etc/passwd'); ?>
data://text/plain,<?php print_r(scandir('.')); ?>
data:text/plain;base64,PD9waHAgaW5jbHVkZSgnL2ZsYWcnKTsgPz4=
data:text/plain;base64,PD9waHAgZWNobyhmaWxlX2dldF9jb250ZW50cygnL2ZsYWcnKSk7ID8+

title.zh: 确认 PHP 解释而非数据返回
title.en: Confirm PHP interpretation rather than data return

description.zh: 匹配编译/执行日志和固定输出，排除原样流读取、解码与回显。
description.en: Match compile or execution logs and fixed output, excluding raw stream reads, decoding, and reflection.

title.zh: 关闭 URL Include 并清理
title.en: Disable URL inclusion and clean up

description.zh: 修复后重放合法模板与 data 变体，确认模板保留且内联代码不解释。
description.en: After remediation replay a valid template and data variants to preserve templates while inline code is not interpreted.

analysis.zh: 阳性必须是修改后的固定 PHP echo 在服务器端执行。原 data URI 被读取或解码、500、源码回显均是假阳性；不得用原危险内容确认。
analysis.en: A positive requires the rewritten fixed PHP echo to execute server-side. Reading or decoding the data URI, a 500, or source reflection are false positives, and the dangerous originals must never be used for confirmation.

opsecTips.zh: 只选择一行并改写为固定 echo，得到标记后立即停止，禁止文件读取/命令执行。
opsecTips.en: Choose one line rewritten to fixed echo and stop after the marker; no file reads or command execution are permitted.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后清理请求日志中的内联内容、opcode 缓存和临时响应。
opsecTips.en: After testing clean inline content from request logs, opcode caches, and temporary responses.

name.zh: PHP Expect Wrapper 命令边界

description.zh: 使用 expect:// 命令 URI 验证可选 Expect 扩展是否把文件型输入转换为操作系统进程执行。
description.en: Uses expect command URIs to test whether the optional Expect extension turns file-oriented input into operating-system process execution.

prerequisites.zh: 仅在隔离 PHP 实例确认 Expect 扩展已安装且输入进入通用 stream API
prerequisites.en: Testing occurs only on an isolated PHP instance after confirming the Expect extension and a generic stream sink.

prerequisites.zh: 可将命令改为固定标记输出并采集子进程审计
prerequisites.en: Commands can be replaced with fixed marker output and child-process auditing is available.

title.zh: Expect 命令 URI

description.zh: 原行仅说明命令边界。真实验证选择一行并替换为只输出随机固定标记的无害测试程序，不运行 whoami/cat/ls/pwd。
description.en: The original lines document the command boundary. For validation choose one and replace it with a harmless test program that emits a random fixed marker; do not run whoami, cat, ls, or pwd.

overview.zh: expect:// 不是 PHP 默认常驻能力，只有安装 Expect 扩展且目标 API 支持 wrapper 时才适用。风险在于 stream URI 直接启动进程，不能从 wrapper 字符串或扩展文档推断目标可利用。
overview.en: expect is not a default always-present PHP capability. It applies only when the Expect extension is installed and the sink supports the wrapper. The risk is direct process creation from a stream URI, which cannot be inferred from a string or documentation.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是用户控制通用 stream URI，运行环境启用可执行 wrapper，应用未限制 scheme。PHP 服务身份因此可启动任意允许程序，影响受其系统权限和出站边界限制。
vulnerability.en: The cause is user control of a generic stream URI while an executable wrapper is enabled without a scheme allowlist. The PHP identity can start allowed programs, with impact constrained by OS privilege and egress.

exploitation.zh: 只读审计扩展与 wrapper 列表，在一次性实例创建固定标记程序并提交一条改写 URI。关联请求、wrapper 打开、子进程映像和标记输出。扩展缺失、未知 wrapper、错误或回显均为阴性。
exploitation.en: Read-only audit installed extensions and wrappers, create a fixed-marker program in a disposable instance, and submit one rewritten URI. Correlate request, wrapper open, child-process image, and marker output. Missing extension, unknown wrapper, errors, or reflection are negative.

mitigation.zh: 生产移除不需要的 Expect 扩展，文件功能只允许固定 file scheme 和对象映射，禁止用户选择 stream wrapper。PHP 运行身份最小权限，限制子进程与出站网络，并监控 Expect/异常进程。
mitigation.en: Remove the Expect extension when unneeded, allow only fixed file resources and object mapping, and never let users select stream wrappers. Apply least privilege, restrict child processes and egress, and monitor Expect or anomalous process creation.

title.zh: 审计 Expect 扩展与 Sink
title.en: Audit the Expect extension and sink

description.zh: 确认扩展、注册 wrapper、目标 API 和 PHP 服务身份。
description.en: Confirm the extension, registered wrapper, target API, and PHP service identity.

title.zh: 提交一个固定标记程序

description.zh: 替换原命令并只运行无害标记程序一次。
description.en: Replace the original command and run one harmless marker program once.

title.zh: 确认 PHP 子进程因果链
title.en: Confirm the PHP child-process causal chain

description.zh: 匹配请求 ID、PHP 父进程、程序路径和固定输出，排除日志文本。
description.en: Match request ID, PHP parent process, program path, and fixed output, excluding log text.

title.zh: 移除扩展并回归

description.zh: 修复后重放合法文件 URI 和 Expect 样例，确认前者可用而后者拒绝。
description.en: After remediation replay a valid file URI and Expect samples to preserve the former while rejecting the latter.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求 PHP 进程实际启动改写后的标记程序。Expect 扩展不存在、URI 解析失败、命令文字回显均是假阳性；不得运行原系统命令。
analysis.en: A positive requires the PHP process to start the rewritten marker program. Missing extension, URI parse failure, or reflected command text are false positives, and the original OS commands must not run.

opsecTips.zh: 仅在一次性容器运行单个固定标记程序，看到输出后停止。
opsecTips.en: Run one fixed-marker program only in a disposable container and stop when output appears.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后删除程序、终止残留子进程并核对无网络连接或临时文件。
opsecTips.en: Remove the program, terminate residual children, and verify no network connection or temporary file remains afterward.

name.zh: PHP Zip Wrapper 归档成员包含

description.zh: 使用伪装为图片/文本的 ZIP 容器和成员路径验证文件包含点是否从归档中读取或解释 PHP 成员。
description.en: Uses ZIP containers disguised as image or text files and member paths to test whether an inclusion sink reads or interprets a PHP member from an archive.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离实例允许上传测试 ZIP 且输入进入支持 zip:// 的文件 API
prerequisites.en: The isolated instance permits a test ZIP upload and input reaches a zip-aware file API.

prerequisites.zh: 归档成员只包含固定文本/PHP echo 标记并可完整清理
prerequisites.en: The archive member contains only fixed text or PHP echo marker and can be fully removed.

title.zh: Zip Wrapper 容器扩展名变体

description.zh: 逐容器名测试同一专用 ZIP，把 shell.php 内容改为固定文本或 echo 标记；先判断读取还是 include，不上传可接收命令的脚本。
description.en: Test the same dedicated ZIP under each container name, replacing shell.php with fixed text or echo marker. Determine read versus include behavior first and never upload a command-capable script.

overview.zh: zip:// 允许 PHP 文件 API访问归档成员，容器外扩展名不决定内部成员是否可被读取/包含。风险来自上传、存储和后续 include 组合，而不是单独上传一个 ZIP。
overview.en: zip lets PHP file APIs address archive members, and the outer extension does not determine whether a member can be read or included. Risk comes from the combination of upload, storage, and later include, not from uploading a ZIP alone.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是上传校验只看外层文件名，应用又允许用户构造 zip URI 和成员名进入文件 API。若该 API 是 include，固定成员可被 PHP 解释；若只是读取，影响限于归档内容披露。
vulnerability.en: The cause is outer-filename-only upload validation plus user control of a zip URI and member name reaching a file API. An include sink may interpret the member as PHP, while a read sink is limited to archive-content disclosure.

exploitation.zh: 创建仅含随机固定成员的最小 ZIP，逐个外层扩展上传并记录规范存储名。先用纯文本成员证明读取；只有专项隔离验证才用固定 echo 成员证明 include。文件可上传、404 或 URI 回显不成立。
exploitation.en: Create a minimal ZIP with one random fixed member, upload it under each outer extension, and record the canonical stored name. Prove read behavior with text first; use a fixed echo member only for isolated include validation. Upload acceptance, 404, or URI reflection is insufficient.

mitigation.zh: 上传对象使用随机 ID 存在 Web 根外且不可执行，校验真实文件类型并限制归档部件。文件读取通过服务端对象映射，不允许用户 wrapper/成员路径；禁止动态 include 上传内容。
mitigation.en: Store uploads under random IDs outside the web root with execution disabled, validate actual type, and constrain archive contents. Map reads through server-side objects, disallow user wrapper or member paths, and prohibit dynamic inclusion of uploads.

title.zh: 创建单成员测试 ZIP

description.zh: 归档只含随机文本标记，记录哈希、成员名和安全存储路径。
description.en: The archive contains only a random text marker; record hash, member name, and safe storage path.

title.zh: 逐扩展提交 Zip URI

description.zh: 一次测试一个容器名并关联上传 ID、规范文件名和 wrapper 访问。
description.en: Test one container name at a time and correlate upload ID, canonical filename, and wrapper access.

title.zh: 确认成员读取或解释

description.zh: 匹配成员标记、文件 API 和处理器日志，区分文本读取与 PHP 执行。
description.en: Match member marker, file API, and handler logs to distinguish text read from PHP execution.

title.zh: 清理归档并封闭 Wrapper
title.en: Clean archives and close the wrapper boundary

description.zh: 删除所有测试上传，修复对象映射后重放，确认合法下载保留且 zip URI 拒绝。
description.en: Delete every test upload, fix object mapping, and replay to preserve valid downloads while rejecting zip URIs.

analysis.zh: 阳性边界分为成员可读与成员被 PHP 解释，两者影响不同。上传成功、外层扩展通过或 zip URI 被解析但无标记均是假阳性。
analysis.en: The positive boundary separates readable members from PHP-interpreted members, which have different impact. Upload success, accepted outer extension, or parsed URI without the marker is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 先用纯文本成员，确认读取后即停止；无专项批准不使用 PHP 标记。
opsecTips.en: Start with a plain-text member and stop after read confirmation; do not use a PHP marker without explicit approval.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后从上传目录、对象存储、缓存和备份队列删除所有归档。
opsecTips.en: Remove every archive from upload storage, object storage, cache, and backup queues afterward.

name.zh: PHP Phar Wrapper 归档成员边界

description.zh: 使用不同外层扩展名的 phar:// 成员路径验证 PHP 文件操作是否打开 Phar 归档并触发成员读取或元数据处理。
description.en: Uses phar archive-member paths under different outer extensions to test whether PHP file operations open a Phar and trigger member reads or metadata handling.

prerequisites.zh: 仅在隔离 PHP 版本中确认 phar wrapper 和目标文件 API
prerequisites.en: Testing occurs only on an isolated PHP version after confirming the phar wrapper and target file API.

prerequisites.zh: 测试 Phar 不含对象反序列化 gadget，只含固定文本成员
prerequisites.en: The test Phar contains no deserialization gadget and only a fixed text member.

title.zh: Phar 容器扩展名变体

description.zh: 逐外层文件名使用同一无 gadget 测试 Phar，成员只含固定文本；不要使用序列化对象或可执行 shell.php。
description.en: Use the same gadget-free test Phar under each outer filename with a fixed-text member; do not use serialized objects or an executable shell.php.

overview.zh: phar:// 可让 PHP 文件函数打开 Phar 容器与成员，历史版本/调用路径还可能处理元数据。安全验证只需证明容器或成员边界，不需要也不应使用反序列化 gadget。
overview.en: phar lets PHP file functions open Phar containers and members, and historical versions or paths may process metadata. Safe validation needs only the container or member boundary and must not use a deserialization gadget.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是用户可控制 phar URI 或上传容器路径，应用未限制 wrapper、文件类型与成员名。影响可从成员读取到特定版本的元数据反序列化，但后者必须由实际版本和调用栈单独证明。
vulnerability.en: The cause is user control of a phar URI or uploaded container path without wrapper, type, and member restrictions. Impact ranges from member reads to version-specific metadata deserialization, which requires separate proof from version and call path.

exploitation.zh: 创建签名有效、无对象元数据、只含固定文本成员的最小 Phar，逐扩展上传并请求对应 URI。记录 wrapper 打开、成员标记和 PHP 日志。上传成功、签名错误或 URI 回显是假阳性；禁止构造 gadget 链。
exploitation.en: Create a validly signed minimal Phar with no object metadata and one fixed-text member, upload it under each extension, and request the matching URI. Record wrapper open, member marker, and PHP logs. Upload success, signature errors, or URI reflection are false positives; never build a gadget chain.

mitigation.zh: 上传对象存于 Web 根外并使用随机 ID，禁止用户选择 wrapper 或成员路径。关闭不需要的 phar 写入/处理能力，升级 PHP 和依赖，反序列化只接受受信类型，并监控 phar URI。
mitigation.en: Store uploads outside the web root under random IDs, disallow user-selected wrappers or member paths, disable unnecessary phar handling, update PHP and dependencies, deserialize only trusted types, and monitor phar URIs.

title.zh: 创建无 Gadget 测试 Phar

description.zh: 归档仅含固定文本成员和标量元数据，记录签名与哈希。
description.en: The archive contains one fixed-text member and scalar metadata only; record signature and hash.

title.zh: 逐扩展请求 Phar 成员
title.en: Request the Phar member by extension

description.zh: 一次上传/请求一个外层名称并关联对象 ID 与 wrapper 日志。
description.en: Upload and request one outer filename at a time and correlate object ID and wrapper logs.

title.zh: 确认成员访问边界

description.zh: 匹配固定成员内容和 PHP 文件 API，确认没有对象反序列化行为。
description.en: Match fixed member content and PHP file API and confirm that no object deserialization occurs.

title.zh: 移除 Wrapper 输入并清理
title.en: Remove wrapper input and clean up

description.zh: 删除 Phar、修复对象映射后重放，确认合法文件功能保留且 phar URI 拒绝。
description.en: Delete the Phar, fix object mapping, and replay to preserve valid file behavior while rejecting phar URIs.

analysis.zh: 阳性是 PHP 进程打开无 gadget Phar 并读取固定成员。签名错误、上传成功、URI 文本或理论 gadget 可用性是假阳性；不得把成员读取写成反序列化 RCE。
analysis.en: A positive is the PHP process opening the gadget-free Phar and reading its fixed member. Signature errors, upload success, URI text, or theoretical gadget availability are false positives; member read must not be labeled deserialization RCE.

opsecTips.zh: 禁止序列化对象和 gadget，只验证固定文本成员，成功后立即停止。
opsecTips.en: Never include serialized objects or gadgets; test only a fixed text member and stop on success.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后删除归档、清空上传索引和缓存，并验证 PHP 临时目录无副本。
opsecTips.en: Remove the archive, clear upload indexes and caches, and verify no copy remains in the PHP temporary directory.

name.zh: Gopher 到 Redis RESP 文件写入序列

description.zh: 使用编码 RESP 命令序列说明 SSRF 获取器如何向 Redis 写键、修改持久化目录并触发保存；仅在隔离协议捕获器中验证字节边界。
description.en: Uses an encoded RESP command sequence to show how an SSRF fetcher could write a Redis key, change persistence paths, and save; validation is limited to an isolated protocol capture service.

subCategory.zh: Gopher Redis RESP 协议桥接

prerequisites.zh: 已在隔离环境确认服务端 URL 获取器支持 gopher 并可连接专用协议捕获器
prerequisites.en: An isolated environment has confirmed gopher support and connectivity to a dedicated protocol capture service.

prerequisites.zh: 不连接真实 Redis，捕获器只记录字节且无命令执行能力
prerequisites.en: No real Redis is contacted; the capture service only records bytes and cannot execute commands.

title.zh: 编码 Redis 持久化序列

description.zh: 原始序列包含破坏性配置/保存和脚本内容，只允许指向字节捕获器。验证时不得发送给 Redis，也不得解码后执行。
description.en: The original sequence contains destructive configuration and save operations plus script content and may point only to a byte capture service. It must never be sent to Redis or executed after decoding.

overview.zh: 该 URI 编码了完整 Redis RESP 序列，跨越 URL 解析、TCP 字节转发、Redis 命令权限和文件持久化多层边界。内容具有破坏性，因此数据卡只用于离线解析和隔离捕获，不用于真实服务验证。
overview.en: This URI encodes a Redis RESP sequence across URL parsing, TCP forwarding, Redis command authorization, and file persistence. Its content is destructive, so the card is for offline parsing and isolated capture only, not live-service validation.

vulnerability.zh: 可利用链要求 URL 获取器允许 gopher、应用网络可达 Redis、Redis 无强认证/ACL、CONFIG/SAVE 可用、文件系统目录可写且可能与 Web 根共享。任一边界阻断都会终止链。
vulnerability.en: The chain requires a gopher-capable fetcher, network reachability to Redis, weak authentication or ACLs, CONFIG and SAVE permission, a writable filesystem, and potentially shared web storage. Blocking any boundary stops the chain.

exploitation.zh: 在离线脚本解码并核对 RESP 长度，然后仅把原 URI 地址改为隔离捕获器，提交一次并匹配完整字节、来源和请求 ID。捕获到字节只确认 SSRF 协议桥接；不得继续验证 Redis 写入或 Web 文件执行。
exploitation.en: Decode offline and verify RESP lengths, then point the original URI only to an isolated capture service, submit once, and match full bytes, source, and request ID. Captured bytes prove SSRF protocol bridging only; do not proceed to Redis writes or web-file execution.

mitigation.zh: URL 获取器只允许 HTTP/HTTPS 并在解析/重定向后阻断内网，网络层隔离 Redis。Redis 启用认证/TLS/ACL，禁用危险命令或限制管理权限，持久化目录不与 Web 服务共享并采用最小文件权限。
mitigation.en: Allow only HTTP or HTTPS in the fetcher, block internal destinations after parsing and redirects, and isolate Redis at the network layer. Enable Redis authentication, TLS, and ACLs, restrict dangerous commands and administration, separate persistence from web storage, and enforce least filesystem privilege.

title.zh: 离线解析 RESP 序列

description.zh: 核对 URL 解码、命令帧和长度，不向任何网络服务发送。
description.en: Verify URL decoding, command frames, and lengths without sending to any network service.

title.zh: 指向隔离字节捕获器
title.en: Point to an isolated byte capture service

description.zh: 替换地址并提交一次，捕获器不解析或执行 Redis 命令。
description.en: Replace the address and submit once to a service that does not parse or execute Redis commands.

title.zh: 确认 Redis RESP 字节序列
title.en: Confirm the Redis RESP byte sequence

description.zh: 匹配原始请求、捕获字节、源地址和时间，排除客户端工具发送。
description.en: Match raw request, captured bytes, source address, and time, excluding traffic from the client tool.

title.zh: 停止并验证隔离控制

description.zh: 确认没有连接真实 Redis、没有文件或键变化，并回归协议/内网阻断。
description.en: Confirm that no real Redis was contacted and no key or file changed, then regress scheme and internal-destination blocking.

analysis.zh: 阳性仅定义为应用服务器向捕获器发送解码 RESP 字节。Redis 命令成功、文件写入和 RCE 均未验证；超时、DNS 查询或端口开放是假阳性。
analysis.en: A positive is limited to the application server sending decoded RESP bytes to the capture service. Redis command success, file write, and RCE remain unverified; timeout, DNS lookup, or an open port are false positives.

opsecTips.zh: 取得一次完整字节捕获后立即停止，禁止连接任何真实 Redis。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one complete byte capture and never connect to a real Redis service.

opsecTips.zh: 销毁捕获器日志中的脚本内容，核对隔离网段无 Redis 键、配置或文件变化。
opsecTips.en: Remove script content from capture logs and verify no Redis key, configuration, or file changed in the isolated segment.

name.zh: Gopher MySQL 握手片段

description.zh: 使用截断的 MySQL 二进制协议 URI 验证 Gopher SSRF 到 3306 端口的字节转发边界，并明确该样例本身不可执行。
description.en: Uses a truncated MySQL binary-protocol URI to test the byte-forwarding boundary to port 3306 and explicitly documents that the sample is not executable as written.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离获取器已确认支持 gopher，测试端点只是 3306 字节捕获器
prerequisites.en: The isolated fetcher supports gopher and the test endpoint is only a byte capture service on port 3306.

prerequisites.zh: 理解原行中的省略号是不可执行占位，不连接真实 MySQL
prerequisites.en: The ellipsis in the original is understood as a nonexecutable placeholder and no real MySQL is contacted.

title.zh: 截断 MySQL 数据包 URI

description.zh: 该行含 `...`，只能作为协议分类和端口字节转发探针；验证地址改为捕获器，禁止补全认证包或数据库命令。
description.en: The line contains an ellipsis and is only a protocol-classification and port-forwarding probe. Point it to a capture service and do not complete authentication packets or database commands.

overview.zh: MySQL 使用状态化二进制握手，客户端数据依赖服务器挑战和能力协商。原 URI 只有数据包前缀和省略号，不是可直接工作的 MySQL payload；其价值在于标记协议/端口边界。
overview.en: MySQL uses a stateful binary handshake whose client data depends on server challenge and capability negotiation. The URI contains only a packet prefix and ellipsis and is not a working MySQL payload; it marks a protocol and port boundary.

vulnerability.zh: 若获取器允许 gopher 并可达数据库网段，攻击者可能把受控字节发送到 MySQL，但实际认证和查询还受握手、凭据、TLS 与账户权限约束。截断样例不能证明这些后续边界。
vulnerability.en: A gopher-capable fetcher with database-segment reachability may send controlled bytes to MySQL, but authentication and queries still depend on handshake, credentials, TLS, and account privilege. The truncated sample proves none of those downstream boundaries.

exploitation.zh: 只将地址指向隔离捕获器并提交一次，确认应用源连接和 `%a3...` 前缀字节；不连接 MySQL、不补全省略内容。捕获前缀只确认端口字节转发，连接错误或超时不足。
exploitation.en: Point only to an isolated capture service and submit once to confirm an application-origin connection and the percent-a3 prefix bytes. Do not contact MySQL or complete omitted data. The prefix proves port byte forwarding only; connection errors or timeout do not.

mitigation.zh: 获取器协议允许列表限于 HTTP/HTTPS，解析后阻断数据库地址与端口，网络层禁止应用访问 MySQL 管理面。MySQL 使用 TLS、强认证、最小账户权限和独立网段。
mitigation.en: Restrict fetcher schemes to HTTP or HTTPS, block database addresses and ports after resolution, and prevent application access to MySQL management surfaces at the network layer. Use TLS, strong authentication, least privilege, and segmentation for MySQL.

title.zh: 确认样例为截断片段

description.zh: 识别省略号与状态化握手，禁止把它描述为可执行 SQL。
description.en: Identify the ellipsis and stateful handshake and do not describe it as executable SQL.

title.zh: 指向 3306 字节捕获器
title.en: Point to a port-3306 byte capture service

description.zh: 替换地址、提交一次并只记录前缀字节和连接来源。
description.en: Replace the address, submit once, and record only prefix bytes and connection source.

title.zh: 确认端口字节转发

description.zh: 匹配应用请求、源地址和捕获前缀，不推断握手或认证成功。
description.en: Match application request, source, and captured prefix without inferring handshake or authentication success.

title.zh: 阻断数据库网段并回归
title.en: Block the database segment and regress

description.zh: 修复后重放正常 HTTP 与该 URI，确认前者可用而 3306 连接被阻断。
description.en: After remediation replay normal HTTP and this URI to preserve the former while blocking port 3306.

analysis.zh: 阳性是应用源向捕获器发送已知前缀；省略号使其无法证明 MySQL 握手、认证或查询。端口开放、DNS、超时和解析错误均是假阳性。
analysis.en: A positive is an application-origin connection sending the known prefix. The ellipsis prevents proof of MySQL handshake, authentication, or query; an open port, DNS, timeout, or parse error is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 捕获一次前缀后停止，不补全协议、不连接真实 MySQL。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one prefix capture, do not complete the protocol, and never contact a real MySQL service.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后关闭 3306 捕获器并核对数据库网段无连接或账户事件。
opsecTips.en: Close the port-3306 capture service and verify no connection or account event occurred in the database segment afterward.

name.zh: Gopher FastCGI 记录片段

description.zh: 使用截断的 FastCGI 记录 URI 验证服务端获取器向 9000 端口发送二进制前缀的能力，并明确不构造可执行参数。
description.en: Uses a truncated FastCGI record URI to test whether a server fetcher sends a binary prefix to port 9000 without constructing executable parameters.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离环境提供只记录字节的 9000 端口捕获器
prerequisites.en: The isolated environment provides a byte-only capture service on port 9000.

prerequisites.zh: 不连接 php-fpm/FastCGI，也不补全参数或脚本文件名
prerequisites.en: No php-fpm or FastCGI service is contacted and no parameters or script filename are completed.

title.zh: 截断 FastCGI 记录 URI

description.zh: 省略号表示记录不完整。只替换为隔离捕获器并验证固定头字节，不生成 FCGI_PARAMS/STDIN 或 PHP 脚本请求。
description.en: The ellipsis marks an incomplete record. Point only to an isolated capture service and verify header bytes; do not generate FCGI_PARAMS, STDIN, or a PHP script request.

overview.zh: FastCGI 是带记录头、请求 ID、参数流和标准输入的二进制协议。原行只有 BEGIN_REQUEST 类前缀和省略号，不能执行 PHP；安全用途是确认 gopher 到 9000 的原始字节边界。
overview.en: FastCGI is a binary record protocol with headers, request IDs, parameters, and standard input. The line contains only a BEGIN_REQUEST-like prefix and ellipsis and cannot execute PHP; its safe use is confirming raw byte delivery to port 9000.

vulnerability.zh: 若获取器允许 gopher 且能访问 php-fpm，完整构造可能跨越反向代理预期边界。但还需要有效记录、SCRIPT_FILENAME、文件存在和 FPM 配置，截断片段不证明这些条件。
vulnerability.en: If a gopher-capable fetcher can reach php-fpm, a complete construction could cross an intended proxy boundary. It still requires valid records, SCRIPT_FILENAME, an existing file, and compatible FPM configuration, none of which the fragment proves.

exploitation.zh: 地址仅改为 9000 字节捕获器，提交一次并匹配 `%01%01%00%01` 解码前缀与应用来源。不得补全 FastCGI 参数或连接真实 FPM。连接失败、端口开放或错误页面不算字节转发。
exploitation.en: Point only to a port-9000 byte capture service, submit once, and match the decoded prefix and application source. Do not complete FastCGI parameters or contact real FPM. Connection failure, an open port, or an error page does not prove byte forwarding.

mitigation.zh: 获取器限制协议和解析后目标，网络层禁止应用访问 FPM 监听端口；php-fpm 仅绑定 Unix Socket 或受限接口，使用最小权限、明确 SCRIPT_FILENAME 根并禁用不需要功能。
mitigation.en: Restrict fetcher schemes and resolved destinations, block application access to FPM ports, bind php-fpm to a Unix socket or restricted interface, use least privilege, enforce a script root, and disable unnecessary features.

title.zh: 标记截断 FastCGI 前提

description.zh: 确认片段缺少参数和内容记录，不能描述为 PHP 执行 payload。
description.en: Confirm the fragment lacks parameter and content records and cannot be described as a PHP execution payload.

title.zh: 提交到隔离 9000 捕获器
title.en: Submit to an isolated port-9000 capture service

description.zh: 替换地址并发送一次，只采集前缀、来源和请求 ID。
description.en: Replace the address and send once, collecting only prefix, source, and request ID.

title.zh: 确认应用源记录前缀

description.zh: 匹配捕获字节与请求，不推断 SCRIPT_FILENAME、FPM 处理或代码执行。
description.en: Match captured bytes and request without inferring SCRIPT_FILENAME, FPM handling, or code execution.

title.zh: 隔离 FPM 并回归

description.zh: 修复协议/网络边界后重放，确认正常 URL 获取保留且 9000 无连接。
description.en: After scheme and network fixes replay to preserve normal retrieval while no port-9000 connection occurs.

analysis.zh: 阳性仅为应用服务器向捕获器发送 FastCGI 头前缀。截断内容无法证明有效请求、PHP 文件选择或执行；开放端口和超时是假阳性。
analysis.en: A positive is limited to the application server sending a FastCGI header prefix to the capture service. Truncated content cannot prove a valid request, PHP file selection, or execution; an open port and timeout are false positives.

opsecTips.zh: 取得一次头字节后停止，禁止补全参数、请求 PHP 文件或访问真实 FPM。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one header-byte capture and never complete parameters, request a PHP file, or access real FPM.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后关闭捕获器并核对 FPM 日志没有请求、子进程或文件访问。
opsecTips.en: Close the capture service and verify FPM logs contain no request, child process, or file access afterward.

name.zh: 浏览器 DNS Rebinding Iframe 探测

description.zh: 使用 nip.io、sslip.io、rbndr.us 与 1u.ms 主机名的 iframe 验证浏览器导航到回环/元数据地址映射时的来源、网络边界与加载结果。
description.en: Uses iframe URLs on nip.io, sslip.io, rbndr.us, and 1u.ms to test browser origin, network boundaries, and load results when names map to loopback or metadata addresses.

subCategory.zh: 浏览器 DNS Rebinding 导航

prerequisites.zh: 仅在隔离浏览器、专用测试页面与本地无敏感标记服务中验证
prerequisites.en: Testing occurs only in an isolated browser, dedicated page, and local nonsensitive marker service.

prerequisites.zh: 可观察 DNS、浏览器 Network/Origin 和标记服务日志
prerequisites.en: DNS, browser Network or Origin, and marker-service logs are observable.

title.zh: 通配 DNS Iframe URL

description.zh: 原行含公共解析与元数据地址。真实验证应改用自有隔离 DNS 名称和本地标记服务，不请求 169.254.169.254 或第三方公共服务。
description.en: The originals contain public resolver names and metadata addresses. Replace them with a controlled isolated DNS name and local marker service; do not request 169.254.169.254 or public third-party services.

overview.zh: iframe 行由浏览器执行，不是服务端 SSRF。它们可测试主机名解析到本地地址后页面是否加载，以及后续同源约束，但 iframe 可见或发生请求并不自动允许父页面读取内容。
overview.en: These iframe lines execute in the browser and are not server-side SSRF. They test loading after a hostname resolves locally and subsequent origin constraints, but frame visibility or a request does not automatically let the parent read content.

vulnerability.zh: 浏览器 DNS Rebinding 依赖同一主机名在不同时间解析到攻击者和内部地址，并利用源按 scheme/host/port 而非 IP 定义。内部服务若不校验 Host/Origin 且浏览器连接被允许，可能暴露接口。
vulnerability.en: Browser DNS rebinding depends on one hostname resolving to attacker and internal addresses over time while origin is defined by scheme, host, and port rather than IP. An internal service without Host or Origin validation may expose interfaces if browser connections are allowed.

exploitation.zh: 在自有 DNS 区和两个无敏感标记服务中记录首答、后答、TTL、iframe origin 与请求。先只证明 iframe 加载，再尝试读取固定公开标记并核对同源异常。公共 wildcard DNS、元数据服务和真实内网均不使用。
exploitation.en: Use a controlled DNS zone and two nonsensitive marker services to record first and later answers, TTL, iframe origin, and requests. Prove frame loading first, then test reading a fixed public marker and inspect origin behavior. Do not use public wildcard DNS, metadata services, or real internal networks.

mitigation.zh: 内部 Web 服务校验 Host/Origin、使用认证和 CSRF 防护并避免仅依赖网络位置；浏览器/终端采用网络隔离与私网访问策略。DNS 测试域隔离，应用在必要时使用 HTTPS/证书和明确允许来源。
mitigation.en: Internal web services should validate Host and Origin, require authentication and CSRF protection, and not rely on network location alone. Apply endpoint network isolation and private-network access controls, isolate test DNS zones, and use HTTPS certificates and explicit allowed origins where appropriate.

title.zh: 建立隔离 DNS 与标记服务
title.en: Establish isolated DNS and marker services

description.zh: 配置自有名称、可审计 TTL 和两个仅返回固定标记的端点。
description.en: Configure a controlled name, auditable TTL, and two endpoints that return only fixed markers.

title.zh: 改写并逐个加载 Iframe
title.en: Rewrite and load iframes one by one

description.zh: 替换公共/元数据地址，在全新浏览器上下文一次加载一个 iframe。
description.en: Replace public and metadata addresses and load one iframe per fresh browser context.

title.zh: 核对 DNS、Origin 与加载证据
title.en: Verify DNS, origin, and load evidence

description.zh: 匹配权威日志、浏览器 origin、标记服务请求和 DOM 读取结果，区分加载与同源读取。
description.en: Match authoritative logs, browser origin, marker requests, and DOM read results to distinguish loading from same-origin reading.

title.zh: 停止、清理 DNS 并回归

description.zh: 删除测试记录和页面，修复 Host/Origin/网络边界后重复基线确认内部内容不可读。
description.en: Remove test records and pages, fix Host, Origin, and network boundaries, and repeat the baseline to confirm internal content is unreadable.

analysis.zh: 阳性需区分三层：DNS 答案变化、iframe 成功连接、父页面在同源模型下读取内部标记。只有前两层时不是完整 Rebinding；浏览器错误页和公共 DNS 结果是假阳性。
analysis.en: A positive has three distinct layers: DNS answer change, iframe connection, and parent-page read of the internal marker under the origin model. The first two alone are not full rebinding; browser error pages and public DNS behavior are false positives.

opsecTips.zh: 只使用自有 DNS 和本地标记服务，禁止请求云元数据或真实内网；达到预定层级即停止。
opsecTips.en: Use only controlled DNS and local marker services, never cloud metadata or real internal networks, and stop at the planned evidence level.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后删除 DNS 记录、关闭标记端口、销毁浏览器上下文并清理缓存。
opsecTips.en: After testing delete DNS records, close marker ports, destroy the browser context, and clear caches.

name.zh: 浏览器 DNS Rebinding Fetch 探测

description.zh: 使用 fetch 脚本访问回环或元数据映射主机并将响应写入标题，验证浏览器 DNS、同源读取与内部服务响应边界。
description.en: Uses fetch scripts against loopback or metadata-mapped names and writes responses to the title to test browser DNS, same-origin reads, and internal-service response boundaries.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离页面与标记服务同属自有测试环境，浏览器网络日志可采集
prerequisites.en: The isolated page and marker service are controlled test assets and browser network logs are available.

prerequisites.zh: 脚本改写为只比较固定标记，不将响应写入标题或日志
prerequisites.en: Scripts are rewritten to compare only a fixed marker and do not write response bodies to the title or logs.

title.zh: 通配 DNS Fetch 脚本

description.zh: 原脚本会泄露响应到标题。实际验证替换为自有 DNS/标记服务，并只把 `t===MARKER` 的布尔结果写入内存；禁止访问元数据或公共 rebinding 服务。
description.en: The originals expose response text in the title. Rewrite them to controlled DNS and marker services and store only a Boolean t-equals-marker result in memory; never access metadata or public rebinding services.

overview.zh: fetch 比 iframe 更强，因为成功读取响应需要满足 CORS/同源和私网访问约束。原脚本把任意内容写入 document.title，不适合作为安全验证；应改为固定标记布尔值。
overview.en: fetch is stronger than iframe because reading a response must satisfy origin, CORS, and private-network constraints. The originals copy arbitrary content into document.title and are unsuitable for safe validation; use a fixed-marker Boolean instead.

vulnerability.zh: 若攻击者页面的主机名先指向其服务器、后解析到内部服务，浏览器可能仍按相同 host 判断来源。内部服务缺少 Host/Origin/认证控制时，脚本可读取接口响应；现代浏览器策略可能阻断。
vulnerability.en: If an attacker page hostname first resolves externally and later internally, the browser may still consider the host the same origin. A script may read an internal service lacking Host, Origin, or authentication controls, though modern browser policies can block it.

exploitation.zh: 在自有 DNS 区与只返回固定标记的本地服务，改写脚本并使用全新浏览器上下文。记录 DNS 序列、fetch mode、CORS/PNA、origin、网络和布尔标记。网络请求成功但响应 opaque/不可读不是完整阳性。
exploitation.en: Use a controlled DNS zone and local fixed-marker service, rewrite the script, and use a fresh browser context. Record DNS sequence, fetch mode, CORS or PNA, origin, network, and Boolean marker. A successful request with an opaque or unreadable response is not a complete positive.

mitigation.zh: 内部 API 使用强认证和对象授权，校验 Host/Origin，不信任来源网段；配置 CORS/PNA 最小允许范围并使用 HTTPS。客户端/网络隔离敏感服务，DNS 和代理防止不受信域解析/连接私网。
mitigation.en: Protect internal APIs with strong authentication and object authorization, validate Host and Origin, and do not trust network location. Minimize CORS and PNA allowances, use HTTPS, isolate sensitive services, and prevent untrusted names from resolving or connecting to private networks.

title.zh: 部署固定标记响应

description.zh: 自有外部/内部标记服务只返回随机常量并记录 Origin/Host。
description.en: Controlled external and internal marker services return only a random constant and log Origin and Host.

title.zh: 改写并逐个执行 Fetch
title.en: Rewrite and run fetch probes individually

description.zh: 替换地址和标题写入逻辑，每个浏览器上下文只执行一条。
description.en: Replace addresses and title-writing logic and execute one line per browser context.

title.zh: 确认响应可读性而非仅连接
title.en: Confirm response readability, not only connection

description.zh: 匹配 DNS、请求、Origin/CORS/PNA 与内存布尔标记，区分 opaque 响应。
description.en: Match DNS, request, Origin or CORS or PNA, and the in-memory Boolean marker, distinguishing opaque responses.

title.zh: 清理并验证浏览器/服务控制
title.en: Clean up and verify browser and service controls

description.zh: 删除页面/DNS、关闭服务并修复认证/Origin 后重放，确认固定标记不可读。
description.en: Remove page and DNS, close services, fix authentication and Origin checks, and replay to confirm the marker is unreadable.

analysis.zh: 完整阳性要求应用脚本读取内部固定标记。DNS 变化、TCP 请求、CORS 错误、opaque 响应或 document.title 的静态值是假阳性/部分证据。
analysis.en: A complete positive requires the application script to read the internal fixed marker. DNS changes, TCP requests, CORS errors, opaque responses, or a static document.title value are false positives or partial evidence.

opsecTips.zh: 禁止访问元数据/真实内网，仅读取自有单值标记；一旦可读立即停止。
opsecTips.en: Never access metadata or real internal networks; read only a controlled one-value marker and stop as soon as it is readable.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后销毁浏览器 Profile、删除 DNS 记录与页面脚本，并关闭所有监听器。
opsecTips.en: Destroy the browser profile, delete DNS records and page scripts, and close every listener afterward.

name.zh: SSRF 通配 DNS 零地址解析

description.zh: 使用解析到 0.0.0.0 的 nip.io/sslip.io URL 验证服务端获取器是否在解析后把未指定地址视为本机或允许目标。
description.en: Uses nip.io and sslip.io URLs resolving to 0.0.0.0 to test whether a server fetcher treats the unspecified address as local or otherwise allowed after resolution.

subCategory.zh: 通配 DNS 与特殊地址

prerequisites.zh: 隔离获取器由服务端发起 URL 请求，且本地 8080 仅运行固定标记服务
prerequisites.en: An isolated server-side fetcher makes URL requests and local port 8080 hosts only a fixed marker service.

prerequisites.zh: 公共域名在验证前替换为自有 DNS 名称，解析和连接日志可审计
prerequisites.en: Public names are replaced with a controlled DNS name and resolution and connection logs are auditable.

title.zh: 零地址通配 DNS URL

description.zh: 用自有域解析到隔离实例的特殊地址，并由本地 8080 标记服务响应；不要依赖公共 nip.io/sslip.io 或扫描其他端口。
description.en: Use a controlled name resolving to the special address in isolation and a local port-8080 marker service; do not depend on public nip.io or sslip.io or scan other ports.

overview.zh: 0.0.0.0 是 IPv4 未指定地址，不同操作系统/客户端在连接时可能拒绝或解释为本地。主机名字符串看似外部不重要，安全校验必须基于解析后的地址和最终连接目标。
overview.en: 0.0.0.0 is the IPv4 unspecified address, and operating systems or clients may reject it or interpret it locally. An externally shaped hostname is irrelevant; security checks must use resolved addresses and final connection destinations.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是 SSRF 过滤只检查原始 host 字符串或禁止字面 IP，却未分类解析结果与特殊地址。通配 DNS 将可疑地址隐藏在域名后，连接库可能最终访问本地服务。
vulnerability.en: The cause is SSRF filtering that checks raw host strings or literal IPs without classifying resolved and special-use addresses. Wildcard DNS hides the address behind a name and the connection library may reach a local service.

exploitation.zh: 先用自有外部标记 URL 证明服务端请求，再以自有 DNS 名替代两行并解析到隔离零地址，记录解析、socket 目标和本地标记请求。只有服务端连接到本地 8080 且携带唯一请求标记才成立；DNS 答案或超时不足。
exploitation.en: Prove server retrieval with a controlled external marker, replace both public names with a controlled name resolving to the isolated zero address, and record DNS, socket destination, and local marker request. A positive requires the server to connect to local port 8080 with the unique token; DNS or timeout is insufficient.

mitigation.zh: 解析全部 A/AAAA 后分类并阻断未指定、回环、链路本地、私网和其他非业务地址，连接到固定已批准 IP，并在重定向/重试时重复校验。网络层限制获取服务出站。
mitigation.en: Resolve all A and AAAA records, classify and block unspecified, loopback, link-local, private, and other nonbusiness addresses, connect to a pinned approved IP, and revalidate redirects or retries. Restrict fetcher egress at the network layer.

title.zh: 建立服务端外部获取基线

description.zh: 使用唯一标记确认请求来自应用服务器并记录其解析/连接流程。
description.en: Use a unique marker to confirm the request comes from the application server and record resolution and connection flow.

title.zh: 提交自有零地址域名

description.zh: 替换公共域后逐条请求，并只监听隔离 8080。
description.en: Replace public domains, request one at a time, and listen only on isolated port 8080.

title.zh: 确认最终 Socket 目标

description.zh: 匹配 DNS、连接地址、本地标记日志和请求令牌，排除客户端/健康检查。
description.en: Match DNS, connection address, local marker logs, and request token, excluding client or health-check traffic.

title.zh: 阻断特殊地址并清理
title.en: Block special addresses and clean up

description.zh: 修复后重放合法外部 URL 与零地址域，确认前者可用而后者在连接前拒绝；删除 DNS/服务。
description.en: After remediation replay valid external and zero-address names to preserve the former and reject the latter before connection, then remove DNS and services.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求服务端 socket 实际连接隔离本地 8080。域名解析到 0.0.0.0、错误信息、端口超时或浏览器请求是假阳性/不足证据。
analysis.en: A positive requires the server socket to connect to isolated local port 8080. DNS resolving to 0.0.0.0, errors, port timeout, or a browser request is false or insufficient evidence.

opsecTips.zh: 只验证单一 8080 标记服务，禁止扫描其他本机/内网端口，连接成功即停止。
opsecTips.en: Test only one marker service on port 8080, never scan other local or internal ports, and stop on the first connection.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后删除自有 DNS 记录、关闭监听器并清理请求日志中的令牌。
opsecTips.en: Delete controlled DNS records, close the listener, and remove request tokens from logs afterward.

name.zh: DNS Rebinding 测试区主机名规划

description.zh: DNS 区配置占位符，不是 Payload。替换为授权者控制的隔离测试域，用于规划 CNAME/本地主机记录；测试后删除记录。
description.en: DNS-zone configuration placeholders rather than payloads. Replace them with an operator-controlled isolated test zone for CNAME and local-host records and delete the records afterward.

name.zh: PHP Filter 源码读取边界

description.zh: 使用七个原始 php://filter 变体验证文件读取入口是否允许过滤器对目标资源编码，并把源码读取与普通文件响应区分开。
description.en: Uses seven original php://filter variants to verify whether a file-reading sink permits filtered encoding of a target resource and distinguishes source disclosure from an ordinary file response.

prerequisites.zh: 已确认参数进入 fopen、file_get_contents、include 或 require 之一，并记录具体 API
prerequisites.en: The parameter is confirmed to reach fopen, file_get_contents, include, or require, and the exact API is recorded.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离环境提供仅含随机标记的 PHP 文件，且可关联应用日志与文件审计
prerequisites.en: The isolated environment provides a PHP file containing only a random marker, with correlated application and file-audit logs.

title.zh: PHP Filter Base64 读取变体

description.zh: 逐行替换为隔离标记文件后提交，记录原始 URI、规范路径、过滤器选择和响应；不得读取系统或业务文件。
description.en: Submit one line at a time after substituting the isolated marker file, recording the raw URI, canonical path, selected filter, and response; never read system or business files.

overview.zh: php://filter 可在 PHP 流进入调用方之前应用编码或转换。这里的目标是确认读取函数是否越过预期文件对象边界返回标记源码，而不是把出现 Base64 文本直接当作漏洞。
overview.en: php://filter can encode or transform a PHP stream before it reaches the caller. The goal is to determine whether a read sink crosses its intended file-object boundary and returns marker source, not to treat any Base64-looking response as a vulnerability.

vulnerability.zh: 当用户控制的资源 URI 进入读取或包含 API，且没有固定根目录、对象映射和 scheme 限制时，过滤器可能暴露本应由解释器执行的源码。过滤器被识别、URI 被回显或目标文件不存在都不足以确认。
vulnerability.en: When a user-controlled resource URI reaches a read or include API without a fixed root, object mapping, and scheme restriction, a filter may disclose source that should have been interpreted. Filter recognition, URI reflection, or a missing-file error is insufficient evidence.

exploitation.zh: 先用合法对象 ID 读取随机标记文件建立基线，再逐条提交改写后的 filter URI。只有响应可解码为该标记且文件审计显示应用进程读取了规范化目标时算阳性；网关编码、静态样例或错误页是假阳性。
exploitation.en: Establish a baseline by reading the random-marker file through its valid object identifier, then submit each rewritten filter URI separately. A positive requires a response decoding to that marker plus file-audit evidence that the application process read the canonical target; gateway encoding, static examples, and error pages are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 将外部输入映射为服务端对象 ID，在固定根目录内解析并验证真实路径，拒绝非 file scheme，且禁止用户数据进入 include/require。修复后同时重放合法对象、越界路径和全部 filter 变体。
mitigation.en: Map external input to server-side object identifiers, resolve and validate real paths under a fixed root, reject non-file schemes, and keep user data out of include or require. After remediation, replay the valid object, an escaping path, and every filter variant.

title.zh: 确认读取函数与标记文件
title.en: Confirm the read function and marker file

description.zh: 记录最终 PHP 文件 API、运行身份和固定根目录，并准备只含随机标记的无敏感文件。
description.en: Record the final PHP file API, runtime identity, and configured root, then prepare a nonsensitive file containing only a random marker.

title.zh: 逐条提交 Filter 变体

description.zh: 每次只测试一个保留的原始变体，并把资源部分替换为隔离标记文件。
description.en: Test one preserved source variant per request and replace its resource component with the isolated marker file.

title.zh: 关联解码结果与文件读取
title.en: Correlate decoded output with the file read

description.zh: 将响应解码值、规范路径、请求 ID 和文件审计事件关联，排除代理编码和错误回显。
description.en: Correlate decoded response data, canonical path, request identifier, and file-audit event while excluding proxy encoding and error reflection.

title.zh: 限制 Scheme 并回归

description.zh: 改为对象映射与根目录校验后重放正常读取和七个变体，确认业务文件可读而 filter URI 被拒绝。
description.en: After object mapping and root validation, replay the normal read and seven variants to confirm business files remain available while filter URIs are rejected.

analysis.zh: 确认边界要求同一请求同时具备 filter 被实际处理、应用进程读取隔离文件、响应可还原随机标记三项证据。仅看到 Base64 字符、PHP 警告或 URI 回显都不是源码泄露。
analysis.en: Confirmation requires three correlated facts in one request: the filter was processed, the application process read the isolated file, and the response reconstructs the random marker. Base64 characters, PHP warnings, or URI reflection alone do not prove source disclosure.

opsecTips.zh: 所有资源路径先改为随机标记文件；若返回真实源码或系统内容立即停止并保留请求 ID
opsecTips.en: Replace every resource path with the random-marker file first; stop immediately and retain the request identifier if real source or system content appears.

opsecTips.zh: 完成后删除标记文件、解码副本和临时日志导出，并复核没有访问原始敏感路径
opsecTips.en: Afterward delete the marker file, decoded copies, and temporary log exports, and verify that no original sensitive path was accessed.

name.zh: PHP Data Wrapper 包含边界

description.zh: 保留两条 data:// 内联流样例，用于区分普通流读取与 allow_url_include 条件下的服务端代码解释。
description.en: Preserves two data:// inline-stream samples to distinguish ordinary stream reading from server-side interpretation under allow_url_include conditions.

prerequisites.zh: 已通过代码跟踪确认输入到达 include 或 require，而不是仅到达读取或回显函数
prerequisites.en: Code tracing confirms that input reaches include or require rather than only a read or reflection function.

prerequisites.zh: 已记录 allow_url_fopen、allow_url_include 和 data wrapper 状态，并使用无副作用标记脚本
prerequisites.en: allow_url_fopen, allow_url_include, and data-wrapper status are recorded, and a side-effect-free marker script is used.

title.zh: Data Wrapper Base64 流

description.zh: 原字节仅用于追溯。实际测试重编码为只设置请求内随机标记的 PHP 片段，每次提交一条且不运行命令、不读取文件。
description.en: The original bytes are retained only for traceability. For testing, re-encode a PHP fragment that sets only a request-local random marker, submit one line at a time, and execute no command or file read.

overview.zh: data:// 把 URI 中的数据暴露为流；读取流与把流交给 PHP include 是两个不同安全结果。测试必须先识别最终函数和配置，不能从 payload 内含 PHP 标签推断已执行。
overview.en: data:// exposes URI-embedded data as a stream; reading that stream and passing it to PHP include are different security outcomes. Testing must identify the final function and configuration before inferring anything from PHP tags in the payload.

vulnerability.zh: 用户输入进入 include/require 且 URL include 被启用时，内联流可能被解释为服务器端代码。若仅由 file_get_contents 读取、作为文本回显或被配置拒绝，则不构成代码执行。
vulnerability.en: An inline stream may be interpreted as server-side code when user input reaches include or require and URL inclusion is enabled. If file_get_contents merely reads it, it is reflected as text, or configuration rejects it, code execution is not established.

exploitation.zh: 用只设置内存布尔值并输出随机标记的片段替换原始危险内容，先测试合法 include 基线，再逐条提交。阳性要求应用日志显示 include 路径且响应出现唯一标记；解码成功、PHP 源码回显或统一 500 均为阴性。
exploitation.en: Replace the dangerous originals with a fragment that only sets an in-memory Boolean and prints a random marker, establish a valid include baseline, then submit each line separately. A positive requires an include path in application logs and the unique marker in the response; successful decoding, reflected PHP source, or a generic 500 is negative.

mitigation.zh: 禁止外部输入控制 include/require，关闭不需要的 allow_url_include，并用明确路由映射加载固定模板。回归应证明合法模板继续工作，同时 data scheme 在解释前被拒绝。
mitigation.en: Prevent external input from controlling include or require, disable unnecessary allow_url_include, and load fixed templates through explicit route mappings. Regression should preserve valid templates while rejecting the data scheme before interpretation.

title.zh: 记录 URL Include 配置

description.zh: 确认最终调用为 include/require，并保存 PHP 版本、wrapper 列表和两个相关 ini 设置。
description.en: Confirm the final call is include or require and preserve the PHP version, wrapper list, and both relevant ini settings.

title.zh: 改写为无副作用标记并提交
title.en: Rewrite to a side-effect-free marker and submit

description.zh: 保持 data URI 形态但替换原始代码，每次只提交一条并绑定唯一请求 ID。
description.en: Preserve the data-URI shape while replacing the original code, submitting one line per unique request identifier.

title.zh: 证明解释而非文本读取
title.en: Prove interpretation rather than text reading

description.zh: 同时核对 include 跟踪与随机标记输出，排除源码回显、Base64 解码和错误页。
description.en: Correlate include tracing with random-marker output, excluding source reflection, Base64 decoding, and error pages.

title.zh: 关闭 URL Include 并清理
title.en: Disable URL inclusion and clean up

description.zh: 切换到模板映射后回归合法路由和 data URI，随后删除测试片段、缓存和标记日志。
description.en: After switching to template mapping, regress valid routes and data URIs, then delete test fragments, caches, and marker-bearing logs.

analysis.zh: 有效发现必须证明 data 流进入 include/require 并被 PHP 解释为无副作用标记。仅能读取 URI 数据、返回编码文本、触发 warning 或看到 cmd 参数并不能证明代码执行。
analysis.en: A valid finding proves that the data stream reached include or require and PHP interpreted the side-effect-free marker. Reading URI data, returning encoded text, triggering a warning, or observing a cmd parameter does not prove code execution.

opsecTips.zh: 不得直接执行原始 system 或文件读取内容；先离线解码审查，再替换为单值随机标记
opsecTips.en: Never execute the original system or file-reading content; decode and inspect it offline first, then replace it with a one-value random marker.

opsecTips.zh: 一旦标记被解释即停止，清除 opcode/cache、请求日志中的编码片段和临时测试模板
opsecTips.en: Stop when the marker is interpreted and clear opcode or application caches, encoded fragments in request logs, and temporary test templates.

name.zh: PHP Expect Wrapper 扩展边界

description.zh: 使用三个 expect:// 变体确认 PECL expect 扩展、注册 wrapper 与最终文件 API 是否共同形成命令流边界。
description.en: Uses three expect:// variants to determine whether the PECL expect extension, registered wrapper, and final file API jointly create a command-stream boundary.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离 PHP 实例明确安装 PECL expect，且 stream_get_wrappers 输出包含 expect
prerequisites.en: The isolated PHP instance explicitly has PECL expect installed and stream_get_wrappers lists expect.

prerequisites.zh: 运行身份仅能启动预先批准的无副作用标记程序，并可审计进程创建
prerequisites.en: The runtime identity can start only a preapproved side-effect-free marker program and process creation is auditable.

title.zh: Expect Wrapper 命令流样例

description.zh: 原行保留用于来源核对。执行时统一替换为批准的 marker-helper，禁止运行 id、ls 或读取 /etc/passwd。
description.en: The originals are retained for source traceability. Replace every command with the approved marker-helper during execution; do not run id, ls, or read /etc/passwd.

overview.zh: expect:// 不是 PHP 默认 wrapper，它来自 PECL expect 扩展。没有扩展、没有注册 scheme 或输入未到达流 API 时，原行只是不可执行字符串，因此测试首先是环境能力确认。
overview.en: expect:// is not a default PHP wrapper; it is provided by the PECL expect extension. Without the extension, registered scheme, or a reachable stream API, the originals are inert strings, so testing begins with an environment-capability check.

vulnerability.zh: 若应用允许用户控制流 URI，expect wrapper 已启用且 PHP 进程可启动命令，文件读取功能可能跨越到进程执行。仅安装扩展或返回 unknown wrapper 错误都不等于存在可利用数据流。
vulnerability.en: If an application lets users control a stream URI while the expect wrapper is enabled and the PHP process can start commands, a file-read feature may cross into process execution. Installing the extension or receiving an unknown-wrapper error alone does not establish an exploitable data flow.

exploitation.zh: 先从服务器侧记录 wrapper 注册与目标 API，再把每条命令替换为只输出随机标记的固定帮助程序。阳性要求请求 ID、PHP 调用、子进程事件和标记响应完整关联；URI 回显、扩展存在或命令文本进入日志均不足。
exploitation.en: Record wrapper registration and the target API server-side, then replace each command with a fixed helper that only prints a random marker. A positive requires correlation across request ID, PHP call, child-process event, and marker response; URI reflection, extension presence, or command text in logs is insufficient.

mitigation.zh: 生产环境卸载或禁用 expect 扩展，拒绝非 file scheme，使用对象 ID 访问固定文件，并限制 PHP 进程创建子进程。修复回归需同时覆盖正常文件读取和隔离 marker-helper。
mitigation.en: Remove or disable the expect extension in production, reject non-file schemes, access fixed files through object identifiers, and prevent the PHP process from spawning children. Regression must cover both normal file reads and the isolated marker-helper case.

title.zh: 验证 Expect 是否真实注册
title.en: Verify that expect is actually registered

description.zh: 从同一 PHP 运行时采集模块、wrapper 列表、文件 API 和运行身份，而非依赖错误信息猜测。
description.en: Collect modules, wrapper list, file API, and runtime identity from the same PHP runtime instead of inferring them from an error.

title.zh: 替换命令后单次触发
title.en: Replace the command and trigger once

description.zh: 把原始三条都映射到同一无副作用帮助程序，仅提交一个带随机令牌的请求。
description.en: Map all three originals to the same side-effect-free helper and submit only one request carrying a random token.

title.zh: 关联子进程与标记
title.en: Correlate the child process and marker

description.zh: 匹配 PHP 请求、审计进程、帮助程序标准输出和响应，拒绝只依据 wrapper 识别。
description.en: Match the PHP request, audited process, helper stdout, and response, rejecting wrapper recognition alone.

title.zh: 移除扩展并验证阻断
title.en: Remove the extension and verify blocking

description.zh: 禁用 expect 与子进程能力后重放，确认普通读取正常、expect 在调用前拒绝并清理帮助程序。
description.en: After disabling expect and child-process capability, replay to preserve normal reads, reject expect before invocation, and remove the helper.

analysis.zh: 完整阳性必须出现由目标 PHP 请求启动的批准 marker-helper 进程及其唯一输出。wrapper 在列表中、URI 被解析、报错内容不同或命令字符串被记录只说明部分前提。
analysis.en: A complete positive requires the approved marker-helper process to be launched by the target PHP request and return its unique output. A listed wrapper, parsed URI, different error, or logged command string proves only a partial prerequisite.

opsecTips.zh: 只允许固定 marker-helper，设置一次执行和超时上限；发现任何其他子进程立即终止 PHP 测试实例
opsecTips.en: Allow only the fixed marker-helper with one-execution and timeout limits; terminate the PHP test instance immediately if any other child appears.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后卸载临时扩展、删除帮助程序和进程审计导出，并确认没有残留子进程
opsecTips.en: After testing remove the temporary extension, helper, and process-audit export, and confirm no child process remains.

reason.zh: input:// 不是 PHP 注册的标准 stream wrapper；正确的请求体流名称是 php://input。该行只能触发未知 scheme 或普通路径失败，不能验证 PHP wrapper 行为。
reason.en: input:// is not a standard registered PHP stream wrapper; the request-body stream is php://input. This line can only produce an unknown-scheme or ordinary path failure and cannot test PHP-wrapper behavior.

reason.zh: input scheme 在 PHP 中未注册，追加 id 不会调用命令，也不是 php://input 的有效写法；该行没有可执行的 PHP 流语义。
reason.en: The input scheme is not registered in PHP, and appending id neither invokes a command nor forms valid php://input syntax; the line has no executable PHP-stream semantics.

reason.zh: 该字符串把不存在的 input wrapper 与 shell 文本混合，PHP 不会据此运行 cat；它既不是 php://input，也不是可验证的命令 wrapper。
reason.en: This string combines a nonexistent input wrapper with shell text, which PHP will not execute as cat; it is neither php://input nor a testable command wrapper.

name.zh: SSRF File URI 本地资源读取

description.zh: 使用 Linux 与 Windows 的九个 file:// 目标验证服务端 URL 获取器是否越过网络资源边界读取本地文件。
description.en: Uses nine Linux and Windows file:// targets to test whether a server-side URL fetcher crosses its network-resource boundary and reads local files.

prerequisites.zh: 已确认请求由应用服务器发起，且可记录 URL 解析后的 scheme 与最终文件调用
prerequisites.en: The request is confirmed to originate from the application server, and the parsed scheme and final file call are observable.

prerequisites.zh: Linux 与 Windows 测试实例只提供无敏感随机标记文件，禁止访问原始系统路径
prerequisites.en: Linux and Windows test instances expose only nonsensitive random-marker files, and original system paths are off limits.

title.zh: 跨平台 File URI 目标

execution.command:
file:///etc/passwd
file:///etc/shadow
file:///proc/self/environ
file:///proc/version
file:///var/log/apache2/access.log
file:///var/www/html/index.php
file:///var/www/html/config.php
file:///C:/Windows/System32/drivers/etc/hosts
file:///C:/Windows/repair/SAM

description.zh: 原始路径只用于审计追溯。执行前按操作系统改写到隔离标记文件，每次只提交一个 file URI。
description.en: The original paths are retained only for audit traceability. Before execution, rewrite them to an isolated marker file for the relevant operating system and submit one file URI at a time.

overview.zh: file URI 让通用 URL 接口指向本地文件而不是远程主机。是否可读取取决于客户端支持、运行系统、目标 API 和进程权限，因此必须与 HTTP SSRF 分开验证。
overview.en: A file URI points a generic URL interface at a local file rather than a remote host. Readability depends on client support, operating system, target API, and process privileges, so it must be evaluated separately from HTTP SSRF.

vulnerability.zh: 若应用接受任意 scheme 并把用户 URL 交给支持 file 的获取器，原本只应访问远程业务资源的功能可能读取本机数据。scheme 被解析、路径存在或错误信息泄露都不等于文件内容已返回。
vulnerability.en: If an application accepts arbitrary schemes and passes a user URL to a file-capable fetcher, a feature intended only for remote business resources may read local data. A parsed scheme, existing path, or informative error does not mean file content was returned.

exploitation.zh: 先用受控 HTTPS 标记端点证明服务端获取基线，再将一条原始 file URI 的路径替换为本地随机标记文件。只有应用响应包含标记且文件审计显示同一请求 ID 的本地读取才算阳性；客户端读取、静态回显和权限错误均排除。
exploitation.en: First prove server-side retrieval with a controlled HTTPS marker endpoint, then replace the path in one original file URI with a local random-marker file. A positive requires the application response to contain the marker and file audit to show a local read under the same request ID; client-side reads, static reflection, and permission errors are excluded.

mitigation.zh: URL 获取器仅允许必要的 http/https，在解析后和每次重定向后校验 scheme 与目标；文件功能使用对象 ID 和固定根目录。网络获取与本地文件读取应由不同服务身份承担。
mitigation.en: Allow only required http and https schemes in the URL fetcher and validate after parsing and every redirect; file features should use object identifiers and a fixed root. Network retrieval and local file reading should run under separate service identities.

title.zh: 建立服务端 HTTPS 获取基线
title.en: Establish a server-side HTTPS retrieval baseline

description.zh: 用唯一令牌确认请求源、重定向行为和响应处理均属于目标应用。
description.en: Use a unique token to confirm request origin, redirect behavior, and response handling belong to the target application.

title.zh: 改写并提交单个 File URI
title.en: Rewrite and submit one file URI

description.zh: 把系统路径改为对应平台的随机标记文件，每轮仅测试一个保留变体。
description.en: Replace the system path with the platform-specific random-marker file and test only one preserved variant per run.

title.zh: 关联本地读取与响应标记
title.en: Correlate the local read and response marker

description.zh: 匹配规范化路径、文件审计、应用请求 ID 和返回标记，排除浏览器或代理读取。
description.en: Match canonical path, file audit, application request ID, and returned marker while excluding browser or proxy reads.

title.zh: 收紧 Scheme 并清除标记

description.zh: 修复后重放 HTTPS 基线与 file URI，确认前者正常而后者在文件调用前拒绝，再删除标记文件。
description.en: After remediation replay the HTTPS baseline and file URI, preserving the former and rejecting the latter before any file call, then delete marker files.

analysis.zh: 有效证据要求目标应用进程实际读取隔离本地文件并把唯一标记返回到同一请求。file URI 被接受、错误中出现路径、DNS 没有发生或测试浏览器能打开文件都不足以确认服务端本地读取。
analysis.en: Valid evidence requires the target application process to read the isolated local file and return its unique marker in the same request. An accepted file URI, a path in an error, absence of DNS, or a test browser opening the file is insufficient to prove a server-side local read.

opsecTips.zh: 执行前把九个敏感路径全部映射为专用标记文件；任何真实内容出现即停止并升级数据处理
opsecTips.en: Map all nine sensitive paths to dedicated marker files before execution; stop immediately and escalate data handling if any real content appears.

opsecTips.zh: 测试结束删除两种平台的标记文件、响应副本和文件审计导出，并确认未触碰原路径
opsecTips.en: At completion delete marker files, response copies, and file-audit exports from both platforms, and confirm the original paths were untouched.

name.zh: SSRF 回环地址规范化差异

description.zh: 使用 IPv4、IPv6、八进制、十六进制、整数、缩写和 DNS 名称验证解析器是否把不同表示统一识别为回环或本地目标。
description.en: Uses IPv4, IPv6, octal, hexadecimal, integer, shorthand, and DNS names to test whether parsers consistently classify alternate forms as loopback or local destinations.

subCategory.zh: 回环地址解析与规范化

prerequisites.zh: 隔离主机仅在一个固定端口运行返回随机标记的回环 HTTP 服务
prerequisites.en: An isolated host runs a loopback HTTP service returning a random marker on one fixed port only.

prerequisites.zh: 可记录应用使用的 URL 解析器、DNS 结果、最终 socket 地址和重定向链
prerequisites.en: The application's URL parser, DNS results, final socket address, and redirect chain are observable.

title.zh: 回环与特殊地址表示

description.zh: 在隔离环境给每行补上同一固定测试端口并逐条请求；公共 DNS 名称应先替换为自有记录，禁止扫描其他本地端口。
description.en: Append the same fixed test port to each line in isolation and request them individually; replace public DNS names with controlled records first and never scan other local ports.

overview.zh: 同一个回环地址可被表示为字面 IPv4、IPv6、非十进制整数、缩写或解析到本地的主机名。字符串允许列表若早于标准解析与地址分类执行，容易与实际连接目标不一致。
overview.en: The same loopback destination can be represented as literal IPv4, IPv6, nondecimal integers, shorthand, or a hostname resolving locally. String allowlists applied before standard parsing and address classification can disagree with the actual connection target.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是校验器和连接库使用不同解析规则，或应用只拒绝少量字面字符串而不检查解析后的全部 A/AAAA 地址。解析结果为回环并不自动证明连接成功，还需要目标服务收到应用来源请求。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is divergent parsing between validation and connection libraries, or rejection of a few literals without checking every resolved A and AAAA address. A loopback parse alone does not prove a connection; the target service must receive an application-origin request.

exploitation.zh: 先用正常外部 URL 记录请求基线，再逐条请求指向唯一标记端口的变体，保存原始 host、规范 host、DNS、socket 地址和监听日志。阳性要求监听器收到带请求令牌的应用流量；解析日志、超时或客户端访问不算。
exploitation.en: Record a normal external-URL baseline, then request each variant against the unique marker port while preserving raw host, canonical host, DNS, socket address, and listener logs. A positive requires the listener to receive application traffic with the request token; parse logs, timeouts, and client access do not count.

mitigation.zh: 使用单一标准 URL 解析器，解析全部地址后阻断回环、未指定、链路本地、私网和保留网段，并把连接固定到已批准 IP；对重定向和 DNS 重解析重复同样检查。
mitigation.en: Use one standards-based URL parser, resolve all addresses, block loopback, unspecified, link-local, private, and reserved ranges, and pin connections to an approved IP; repeat the checks for redirects and DNS re-resolution.

title.zh: 部署单端口回环标记服务
title.en: Deploy a single-port loopback marker service

description.zh: 服务只返回随机常量，并记录源地址、Host、请求令牌和时间。
description.en: The service returns only a random constant and records source address, Host, request token, and time.

title.zh: 逐个重放地址表示
title.en: Replay address forms one at a time

description.zh: 为每条输入使用新令牌和同一端口，保留原始字符串与解析/连接记录。
description.en: Use a new token and the same port for each input, preserving the original string and parse or connection records.

title.zh: 核对最终 Socket 目的地

description.zh: 把应用日志、DNS、规范地址和监听器请求关联，区分被拒解析与真实本地连接。
description.en: Correlate application logs, DNS, canonical address, and listener request to distinguish rejected parsing from a real local connection.

title.zh: 统一地址分类并回归

description.zh: 修复后重放外部允许地址和全部回环表示，确认仅前者到达并关闭测试端口。
description.en: After remediation replay an allowed external address and every loopback form, confirm only the former arrives, and close the test port.

analysis.zh: 确认 SSRF 绕过需要校验阶段接受某一表示、连接库把它规范化为回环、隔离监听器收到带唯一令牌的应用请求。仅 DNS 返回 127.0.0.1、解析器显示数值等价或响应超时都只是部分证据。
analysis.en: Confirming an SSRF bypass requires validation to accept a form, the connection library to canonicalize it to loopback, and the isolated listener to receive an application request with the unique token. DNS returning 127.0.0.1, numeric equivalence in a parser, or a timeout is only partial evidence.

opsecTips.zh: 仅开放一个无敏感标记端口，任何变体首次连接后停止该轮；禁止枚举本地服务
opsecTips.en: Expose only one nonsensitive marker port and stop that run after the first connection from any form; never enumerate local services.

opsecTips.zh: 删除自有 DNS 记录、关闭监听器并清理请求令牌；公共 nip.io/localtest.me 不用于真实执行
opsecTips.en: Delete controlled DNS records, close the listener, and remove request tokens; do not use public nip.io or localtest.me during actual execution.

name.zh: SSRF 带外回调关联验证

description.zh: 保留原始外部主机 URL，用于说明如何以自有唯一令牌域替换静态第三方名称并关联服务端 DNS/HTTP 回调。
description.en: Preserves the original external-host URL to show how a static third-party name must be replaced by a controlled unique-token domain for server-side DNS or HTTP callback correlation.

prerequisites.zh: 测试者控制权威 DNS 与 HTTPS 回调端点，并能为每个请求签发不可复用令牌
prerequisites.en: The tester controls authoritative DNS and an HTTPS callback endpoint and can issue a nonreusable token for each request.

prerequisites.zh: 原始 burpcollaborator.net 主机不会直接请求，应用请求 ID 与回调时间窗已定义
prerequisites.en: The original burpcollaborator.net host will not be requested directly, and the application request ID and callback time window are defined.

title.zh: 静态带外主机样例

description.zh: 该原始静态域仅供追溯。执行时必须替换为 `<request-id>.<owned-zone>` 并优先使用 HTTPS，禁止向不受控第三方发送请求。
description.en: This original static domain is retained only for traceability. Replace it with <request-id>.<owned-zone> and prefer HTTPS during execution; never send requests to an uncontrolled third party.

overview.zh: 带外验证适用于应用不返回获取结果但可能仍发起 DNS 或 HTTP 的场景。静态公共域无法可靠归因，必须用每请求唯一、自有且可审计的名称替换。
overview.en: Out-of-band validation applies when an application may issue DNS or HTTP traffic without returning the fetched content. A static public domain cannot be attributed reliably and must be replaced by a unique, controlled, auditable name per request.

vulnerability.zh: 若用户 URL 能驱动服务端解析或连接任意外部主机，盲 SSRF 可通过回调证实。只有 DNS 查询时可能是预解析、安全扫描器或中间件行为，HTTP/TLS 回调及应用来源更接近完整证据。
vulnerability.en: If a user URL can drive the server to resolve or connect to an arbitrary external host, blind SSRF can be confirmed by callbacks. DNS alone may come from pre-resolution, a security scanner, or middleware; HTTP or TLS callbacks from the application source provide stronger evidence.

exploitation.zh: 为单次应用请求生成随机子域并记录请求 ID、提交时间和预期窗口，随后关联权威 DNS、TLS 与 HTTP 日志。阳性至少要求令牌唯一且来源属于应用出口；本地浏览器解析、邮件扫描或旧令牌重放必须剔除。
exploitation.en: Generate a random subdomain for one application request and record its request ID, submission time, and expected window, then correlate authoritative DNS, TLS, and HTTP logs. A positive requires a unique token and an application egress source; local-browser resolution, mail scanning, and stale-token replay must be excluded.

mitigation.zh: 获取功能采用目的地主机允许列表、解析后 IP 分类、重定向复检和受限出站代理；不需要联网的工作负载禁止外连。保留回归域验证合法业务目标可达而任意令牌域不可达。
mitigation.en: Use destination-host allowlists, post-resolution IP classification, redirect revalidation, and a restricted egress proxy for retrieval features; deny egress for workloads that do not need it. Keep a regression zone to prove approved business targets remain reachable while arbitrary token domains do not.

title.zh: 签发一次性回调令牌

description.zh: 把随机子域绑定到应用请求 ID、操作者和短时间窗，并清空此前日志基线。
description.en: Bind a random subdomain to the application request ID, operator, and short time window, and clear the prior log baseline.

title.zh: 替换静态域并单次提交
title.en: Replace the static domain and submit once

description.zh: 保持 URL 输入位置不变，仅将原始域替换为自有令牌域，且不触发第二次请求。
description.en: Keep the URL input location unchanged, replace only the original domain with the controlled token domain, and do not trigger a second request.

title.zh: 关联 DNS、TLS 与 HTTP 事件
title.en: Correlate DNS, TLS, and HTTP events

description.zh: 按令牌、时间、出口地址和协议层关联证据，排除操作者客户端与自动扫描。
description.en: Correlate evidence by token, time, egress address, and protocol layer while excluding operator clients and automated scanners.

title.zh: 阻断任意出站并撤销令牌
title.en: Block arbitrary egress and revoke the token

description.zh: 应用允许列表与出站控制后重放一次，确认无回调，再使子域失效并删除临时日志。
description.en: After applying allowlists and egress controls, replay once to confirm no callback, then invalidate the subdomain and remove temporary logs.

analysis.zh: 最强证据是唯一令牌对应的应用源 HTTP/TLS 请求，并能和同一提交 ID 关联。仅有 DNS、公共静态域日志、非唯一令牌或操作者浏览器请求无法确认盲 SSRF；必须标注证据层级。
analysis.en: The strongest evidence is an application-origin HTTP or TLS request carrying the unique token and correlated to the same submission ID. DNS alone, public static-domain logs, nonunique tokens, or operator-browser requests cannot confirm blind SSRF; the evidence layer must be stated.

opsecTips.zh: 每次只签发一个短期域名并限制单次 DNS/HTTP 事件；收到应用源回调即停止
opsecTips.en: Issue one short-lived domain per run and limit it to a single DNS or HTTP event; stop when an application-origin callback arrives.

opsecTips.zh: 测试结束撤销 DNS、TLS 证书路由和令牌映射，按保留策略清理包含出口地址的日志
opsecTips.en: At completion revoke DNS, TLS certificate routing, and token mappings, and clean logs containing egress addresses under the retention policy.

name.zh: LFI PHP Filter 转换边界

description.zh: 使用 ROT13、字符集转换、压缩加 Base64 和无显式转换的 filter URI，验证过滤链实际输出及资源读取边界。
description.en: Uses ROT13, character-set conversion, compression plus Base64, and a filter URI without an explicit transform to verify actual filter output and resource-read boundaries.

prerequisites.zh: 已确认目标文件 API 支持 PHP stream filter，并能记录实际加载的 filter 名称
prerequisites.en: The target file API is confirmed to support PHP stream filters and the filters actually loaded can be observed.

prerequisites.zh: 测试资源只包含已知 UTF-8 随机标记，可离线计算 ROT13、UTF-16 与压缩编码预期值
prerequisites.en: The test resource contains only a known UTF-8 random marker whose ROT13, UTF-16, and compressed encodings can be calculated offline.

title.zh: Filter 转换与对照 URI

description.zh: 将 index.php 替换为隔离标记资源，按原顺序逐条执行并与离线预期字节比较；不得读取生产源码。
description.en: Replace index.php with the isolated marker resource, execute each line in source order, and compare bytes with offline expectations; never read production source.

overview.zh: PHP filter 链可以改变流的编码、字符集或压缩形态。四条输入属于同一读取边界，但预期输出不同；不带显式转换的最后一条可作为解析对照，不能自动视为绕过。
overview.en: A PHP filter chain can change stream encoding, character set, or compression. The four inputs exercise one read boundary with different expected outputs; the final URI without an explicit transform is a parser control and is not automatically a bypass.

vulnerability.zh: 当用户能控制 resource 和 filter 链且文件根目录未受约束时，应用可能以变换后的形式泄露本地内容或绕过简单响应检查。仅收到乱码、空响应或 PHP warning 不证明目标文件被读取。
vulnerability.en: When users control both resource and filter chain without a constrained file root, an application may disclose transformed local content or evade simplistic response inspection. Garbled bytes, an empty response, or a PHP warning does not prove that the target file was read.

exploitation.zh: 为随机标记离线生成每种转换的精确摘要，先读取合法资源基线，再逐条替换 URI。阳性要求响应字节或摘要匹配对应转换且文件审计指向同一标记资源；只识别 wrapper、filter 初始化失败或网关编码均排除。
exploitation.en: Generate an exact offline digest for each transformation of the random marker, establish a valid resource baseline, then substitute each URI separately. A positive requires response bytes or digest to match the corresponding transform and file audit to identify the same marker resource; wrapper recognition, filter-initialization failure, and gateway encoding are excluded.

mitigation.zh: 外部输入只选择预定义文件对象和转换选项，服务端组装固定 filter 链并校验规范路径位于根目录内；不允许任意 wrapper、filter 名称或 resource。修复后比较所有转换基线。
mitigation.en: Let external input select only predefined file objects and transformation options, construct fixed filter chains server-side, and validate that canonical paths remain under the root; arbitrary wrappers, filter names, and resources are disallowed. Compare every transformation baseline after remediation.

title.zh: 生成转换后的标记基准

description.zh: 离线计算四种输入对应的原始或转换字节及摘要，并记录 PHP 版本。
description.en: Calculate the raw or transformed bytes and digest for all four inputs offline and record the PHP version.

title.zh: 逐条读取隔离资源
title.en: Read the isolated resource one line at a time

description.zh: 只替换 resource 路径，保持原 filter 顺序，每个请求使用不同标识。
description.en: Replace only the resource path, preserve original filter order, and use a distinct identifier for each request.

title.zh: 匹配字节、摘要与文件事件
title.en: Match bytes, digests, and file events

description.zh: 将响应与离线期望、已加载 filter 和文件审计关联，排除代理二次编码。
description.en: Correlate the response with offline expectations, loaded filters, and file audit while excluding proxy re-encoding.

title.zh: 固定转换选项并清理
title.en: Pin transformation options and clean up

description.zh: 切换到服务端映射后重放合法选项和任意 filter URI，确认边界后删除标记资源。
description.en: After moving to server-side mappings, replay valid options and arbitrary filter URIs, confirm the boundary, and delete the marker resource.

analysis.zh: 阳性必须把特定 filter 输出与同一标记资源的文件读取关联起来。乱码、Base64 外观、warning、空响应或最后一条无转换 URI 的处理差异都只是诊断信号，不能单独证明 LFI。
analysis.en: A positive must correlate a specific filter output with a read of the same marker resource. Garbled data, a Base64 appearance, warnings, empty responses, or differential handling of the no-transform control are diagnostic signals and cannot alone prove LFI.

opsecTips.zh: 所有 resource 指向单个无敏感标记文件并限制响应大小；任何非标记文件访问立即停止
opsecTips.en: Point every resource to one nonsensitive marker file and cap response size; stop immediately on any access to a nonmarker file.

opsecTips.zh: 完成后删除离线转换产物、标记文件和响应副本，并清除 PHP/代理缓存
opsecTips.en: After completion delete offline transform artifacts, the marker file, and response copies, and clear PHP and proxy caches.

name.zh: LFI PHAR 归档成员读取边界

description.zh: 使用伪装为 JPG 和 PNG 的两个 phar:// 成员路径验证 PHP 是否按归档解析上传对象并读取指定成员。
description.en: Uses two phar:// member paths disguised as JPG and PNG uploads to test whether PHP parses an uploaded object as an archive and reads the named member.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离上传目录允许创建自有 PHAR 测试归档，归档成员仅含随机纯文本标记
prerequisites.en: The isolated upload directory permits a controlled PHAR test archive whose member contains only a random plaintext marker.

prerequisites.zh: 已记录 PHP 版本、phar.readonly、目标文件 API 和上传后的规范文件路径
prerequisites.en: The PHP version, phar.readonly setting, target file API, and canonical uploaded-file path are recorded.

title.zh: 图片扩展名 PHAR 成员路径

description.zh: 用自建归档文件名和纯文本 marker.txt 替换原目标，一次测试一个成员路径；不要包含 PHP 代码或反序列化元数据。
description.en: Replace the originals with a controlled archive name and plaintext marker.txt, testing one member path at a time; include no PHP code or deserialization metadata.

overview.zh: phar:// 让 PHP 把文件作为 PHAR 归档并访问内部成员，外层扩展名不决定实际解析器。这里验证的是归档成员读取，不应从文件名 shell.php 推断代码执行或从 PHAR 解析推断反序列化。
overview.en: phar:// makes PHP treat a file as a PHAR archive and access an internal member; the outer extension does not select the actual parser. This test covers archive-member reading and must not infer code execution from shell.php or deserialization from PHAR parsing.

vulnerability.zh: 若用户能控制上传内容和后续 phar URI，应用的普通文件访问边界可能变成归档成员访问。风险取决于目标 API、归档有效性和成员使用方式；文件上传成功或 wrapper 报错不是阳性。
vulnerability.en: If users control both uploaded content and a later phar URI, an ordinary file-access boundary may become archive-member access. Risk depends on the target API, archive validity, and how the member is consumed; a successful upload or wrapper error is not positive evidence.

exploitation.zh: 创建只含 marker.txt 的最小 PHAR，上传为两个允许的图片扩展名之一，并逐条访问对应成员。阳性要求应用进程打开该归档且返回唯一成员标记；仅检测到 MIME、读取外层文件或触发元数据警告均排除。
exploitation.en: Create a minimal PHAR containing only marker.txt, upload it under one permitted image extension, and access the member one line at a time. A positive requires the application process to open the archive and return the unique member marker; MIME detection, reading the outer file, or a metadata warning is excluded.

mitigation.zh: 上传对象使用随机服务端名称和不可执行存储，后续访问通过对象 ID，不接受 wrapper URI；在文件调用前校验 scheme、真实路径和允许媒体格式。清除旧上传并回归普通图片读取。
