mitigation.en: Store uploads under random server-side names in nonexecutable storage, access them by object ID, and reject wrapper URIs; validate scheme, real path, and allowed media format before file calls. Remove old uploads and regress ordinary image reads.

title.zh: 构建无代码 PHAR 标记归档
title.en: Build a code-free PHAR marker archive

description.zh: 归档只含一个纯文本随机成员，不写对象元数据、启动 stub 或 PHP 代码。
description.en: The archive contains one random plaintext member and no object metadata, executable stub, or PHP code.

title.zh: 上传并逐个访问成员

description.zh: 使用随机外层文件名，替换成员为 marker.txt，并为每次请求记录唯一 ID。
description.en: Use a random outer filename, replace the member with marker.txt, and record a unique ID for each request.

title.zh: 证明归档解析与成员返回
title.en: Prove archive parsing and member return

description.zh: 关联外层文件打开、PHAR 处理、成员读取和响应标记，不推导执行或反序列化。
description.en: Correlate outer-file open, PHAR handling, member read, and response marker without inferring execution or deserialization.

title.zh: 改为对象访问并删除归档
title.en: Move to object access and delete the archive

description.zh: 修复后验证普通图片仍可访问、phar scheme 被拒绝，然后删除归档和上传记录。
description.en: After remediation verify ordinary images remain accessible and the phar scheme is rejected, then delete the archive and upload record.

analysis.zh: 确认结果仅限目标应用通过 phar wrapper 打开受控归档并返回 marker.txt。上传成功、扩展名伪装、外层文件读取、元数据解析错误或成员名含 shell.php 都不能证明代码执行或反序列化。
analysis.en: A confirmed result is limited to the target application opening the controlled archive through the phar wrapper and returning marker.txt. Upload success, extension disguise, outer-file reading, metadata errors, or a member named shell.php proves neither code execution nor deserialization.

opsecTips.zh: 归档禁止对象元数据、可执行 stub 和脚本成员；首次返回纯文本标记后立即停止
opsecTips.en: Forbid object metadata, executable stubs, and script members in the archive; stop immediately after the first plaintext marker return.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后删除上传对象、归档构建目录、对象存储副本和相关缓存索引
opsecTips.en: After testing delete the uploaded object, archive build directory, object-store copies, and related cache indexes.

name.zh: LFI 跨平台路径规范化差异

description.zh: 使用 Linux 与 Windows 遍历、重复分隔符、分号和空字节历史变体验证输入校验与最终文件系统规范化是否一致。
description.en: Uses Linux and Windows traversal, repeated separators, semicolons, and a historical null-byte form to test consistency between input validation and final filesystem canonicalization.

prerequisites.zh: Linux 和 Windows 测试根目录外各放置一个无敏感随机标记文件，且文件审计已启用
prerequisites.en: A nonsensitive random-marker file exists just outside the test root on both Linux and Windows, with file auditing enabled.

prerequisites.zh: 已识别代理、框架、语言运行时和文件系统的全部解码与规范化步骤
prerequisites.en: Every decoding and canonicalization step in the proxy, framework, language runtime, and filesystem is identified.

title.zh: Linux 与 Windows 遍历变体

description.zh: 按目标操作系统把末端文件替换为根目录外的随机标记；逐行提交并记录每层解码。%00 仅作为版本相关负对照，不预设可截断。
description.en: For the target operating system replace the terminal file with the random marker outside the root, submit one line at a time, and record every decode layer. Treat %00 only as a version-dependent negative control, not an assumed truncation.

overview.zh: 遍历测试的关键是最终规范路径是否逃离批准根目录，而不是输入中出现多少个点或斜杠。不同组件可能解码、折叠或保留分隔符；Windows 与 Linux 语义也不可互换。
overview.en: Traversal testing asks whether the final canonical path escapes the approved root, not how many dots or slashes appear in the input. Components may decode, collapse, or preserve separators differently, and Windows and Linux semantics are not interchangeable.

vulnerability.zh: 若入口按字符串过滤而下游再次解码或采用不同分隔符规则，校验值可能留在根目录内而文件系统目标已越界。现代 PHP 通常拒绝 URL 中的空字节，因此 %00 成功必须由实际版本证据证明。
vulnerability.en: If an entry point applies string filtering while a downstream layer decodes again or uses different separator rules, the validated value may appear in-root while the filesystem target escapes. Modern PHP generally rejects null bytes in paths, so any %00 success requires evidence from the actual version.

exploitation.zh: 先读取根目录内标记建立正常基线，再把每个变体末端替换为根外标记并记录原值、每层解码值、realpath 与文件审计。只有最终路径越界且响应匹配根外标记算阳性；400、路径回显和不存在错误均不是。
exploitation.en: Read an in-root marker for the valid baseline, then replace each variant's terminal target with the out-of-root marker and record raw input, every decoded value, realpath, and file audit. A positive requires a final escaped path and a response matching the outside marker; a 400, path reflection, or not-found error is not positive.

mitigation.zh: 使用对象 ID 选择文件，将候选路径在单次完整解码后与固定根目录组合，解析真实路径并验证其仍为根目录后代；拒绝绝对路径、空字节和平台不支持分隔符。
mitigation.en: Select files by object ID, fully decode once, join the candidate under a fixed root, resolve its real path, and verify it remains a descendant; reject absolute paths, null bytes, and separators unsupported by the target platform.

title.zh: 布置根内外成对标记
title.en: Place paired in-root and out-of-root markers

description.zh: 两个文件使用不同随机值并启用路径和读取审计，以便区分正常与越界目标。
description.en: Use distinct random values in the two files and enable path and read auditing to distinguish valid and escaping targets.

title.zh: 按平台逐行替换目标
title.en: Replace targets line by line per platform

description.zh: Linux 只测正斜杠族，Windows 只测反斜杠族，并把 %00 保留为明确负对照。
description.en: Test forward-slash forms only on Linux and backslash forms only on Windows, retaining %00 as an explicit negative control.

title.zh: 比较校验值与 Realpath

description.zh: 关联各层值、最终规范路径、文件事件和响应标记，定位发生差异的组件。
description.en: Correlate values at every layer, final canonical path, file event, and response marker to identify the divergent component.

title.zh: 实施根目录约束并回归

description.zh: 修复后证明根内对象仍可读、所有根外变体在文件调用前被拒绝，再移除标记。
description.en: After remediation prove the in-root object remains readable and every escaping form is rejected before the file call, then remove the markers.

analysis.zh: 有效路径遍历要求最终规范路径离开批准根目录且目标进程读取根外随机标记。输入含 `../`、组件返回不同错误、日志显示解码或历史 %00 语法被接受都不是充分证据。
analysis.en: Valid traversal requires the final canonical path to leave the approved root and the target process to read the outside random marker. An input containing ../, differential errors, logged decoding, or acceptance of historical %00 syntax is not sufficient evidence.

opsecTips.zh: 只读取专用根外标记，不使用 /etc、Windows 系统文件或应用配置；首次越界读取即停止
opsecTips.en: Read only the dedicated outside marker, never /etc, Windows system files, or application configuration, and stop on the first escaped read.

opsecTips.zh: 结束后删除两套标记与审计导出，清理应用缓存并确认原系统路径没有文件事件
opsecTips.en: Afterward delete both marker sets and audit exports, clear application caches, and confirm the original system paths have no file events.

name.zh: LFI Data Wrapper 解释边界

description.zh: 使用明文和 Base64 的三个 data:// PHP 片段区分内联流读取、源码回显与 include 条件下的代码解释。
description.en: Uses three plaintext and Base64 data:// PHP fragments to distinguish inline-stream reading, source reflection, and code interpretation under include conditions.

prerequisites.zh: 已确认输入最终进入 include/require，并记录 allow_url_fopen 与 allow_url_include 的实际值
prerequisites.en: Input is confirmed to reach include or require, and the actual allow_url_fopen and allow_url_include values are recorded.

prerequisites.zh: 所有原始 PHP 片段先离线审查并替换为只输出随机标记的无副作用内容
prerequisites.en: Every original PHP fragment is reviewed offline and replaced with side-effect-free content that only prints a random marker.

title.zh: 明文与 Base64 Data URI

description.zh: 原始内容不得直接执行。把三条分别重写为同一随机标记输出，用于比较明文与 Base64 传输差异。
description.en: Do not execute the original content. Rewrite all three forms to emit the same random marker and use them only to compare plaintext with Base64 transport.

overview.zh: data wrapper 把 URI 内容作为流提供，Base64 参数只改变传输编码。真正的安全边界是流被普通读取还是被 include/require 当作 PHP 源解释；两种现象需要不同证据。
overview.en: The data wrapper exposes URI content as a stream, while the Base64 parameter changes only transport encoding. The security boundary is whether the stream is read as data or interpreted as PHP by include or require, and those outcomes require different evidence.

vulnerability.zh: 当外部输入控制 include 目标且 URL include 可用时，内联数据可能成为可解释源。若片段仅被输出、下载、写日志或因配置失败，则不能称为 RCE；phpinfo 文本本身也不证明函数运行。
vulnerability.en: When external input controls an include target and URL inclusion is enabled, inline data may become interpreted source. If the fragment is only printed, downloaded, logged, or rejected by configuration, it is not RCE; the text phpinfo does not prove that the function ran.

exploitation.zh: 将三条都转换成只输出不同随机标记的片段，按明文、Base64 无副作用、原危险形态替代物的顺序单次提交。阳性要求 include 跟踪与正确解码标记同时出现；源码文本、Base64 字符串或错误堆栈是假阳性。
exploitation.en: Convert all three lines into fragments that only emit distinct random markers and submit them once each as plaintext, harmless Base64, and the replacement for the original dangerous form. A positive requires both include tracing and the correctly decoded marker; source text, a Base64 string, or an error stack is false positive evidence.

mitigation.zh: 模板加载使用服务端映射，不接受 URI；关闭不需要的 URL include，限制 wrapper，并让内容展示与代码解释走独立路径。修复后回归合法模板、纯文本 data 流和全部三条负向输入。
mitigation.en: Load templates through server-side mappings rather than URIs, disable unnecessary URL inclusion, constrain wrappers, and separate content display from code interpretation. After remediation regress valid templates, a plaintext data stream, and all three negative inputs.

title.zh: 确认 Include 数据流

description.zh: 从入口追踪到 include/require，记录 ini 配置、wrapper 状态和输出缓冲行为。
description.en: Trace the entry point to include or require and record ini settings, wrapper state, and output-buffer behavior.

title.zh: 重编码标记并逐条提交

description.zh: 用无副作用随机输出替换 phpinfo/system，保持明文与 Base64 形态并绑定请求 ID。
description.en: Replace phpinfo and system with side-effect-free random output, preserve plaintext and Base64 forms, and bind each to a request ID.

title.zh: 区分解释、读取与回显

description.zh: 比较 include 跟踪、标记输出、响应 MIME 和源码可见性，只把真实解释计为执行。
description.en: Compare include traces, marker output, response MIME, and source visibility, counting only real interpretation as execution.

title.zh: 关闭动态 Include 并清理
title.en: Disable dynamic inclusion and clean up

description.zh: 应用模板映射后重放，确认 data URI 不再进入解释器，并删除编码片段和缓存。
description.en: After applying template mappings replay the inputs, confirm data URIs no longer reach the interpreter, and delete encoded fragments and caches.

analysis.zh: 完整证据是目标 include/require 解释了改写后的随机标记片段并产生预期输出。Base64 解码、源码回显、phpinfo 字符串出现、统一 500 或 WAF 命中只能说明传输或过滤行为。
analysis.en: Complete evidence is that the target include or require interpreted the rewritten random-marker fragment and produced its expected output. Base64 decoding, source reflection, the string phpinfo, a generic 500, or a WAF match demonstrates only transport or filtering behavior.

opsecTips.zh: 离线解码并禁用原始 phpinfo/system 片段，只执行单次随机标记输出；出现子进程立即停止
opsecTips.en: Decode offline and disable the original phpinfo or system fragments, executing only a one-time random-marker output; stop immediately if a child process appears.

opsecTips.zh: 测试完成清理请求日志中的编码代码、opcode 缓存和临时模板，并轮换测试标记
opsecTips.en: At completion clean encoded code from request logs, clear opcode caches and temporary templates, and rotate the test marker.

name.zh: LFI Expect Wrapper 执行前提

description.zh: 以单条 expect:// 输入验证 PECL expect 扩展是否注册、用户流 URI 是否可达以及 PHP 运行身份能否启动受控程序。
description.en: Uses one expect:// input to verify registration of the PECL expect extension, reachability of a user-controlled stream URI, and whether the PHP identity can start a controlled program.

prerequisites.zh: 仅在一次性隔离 PHP 实例安装 expect 扩展，并确认 stream_get_wrappers 返回 expect
prerequisites.en: The expect extension is installed only in a disposable isolated PHP instance and stream_get_wrappers confirms expect.

prerequisites.zh: 原始 cat 命令替换为固定 marker-helper，PHP 身份无网络、写入和读取敏感文件权限
prerequisites.en: The original cat command is replaced by a fixed marker-helper, and the PHP identity lacks network, write, and sensitive-file read privileges.

title.zh: Expect Wrapper 单行样例

description.zh: 该危险原行只作来源记录；实际执行必须替换为 expect://marker-helper，并由进程策略保证仅输出随机标记。
description.en: This dangerous original is retained only as a source record; actual execution must use expect://marker-helper, with process policy restricting it to random-marker output.

overview.zh: expect wrapper 是可选 PECL 功能，不属于标准 PHP 安装。单行 URI 只有在扩展已注册、目标 API 打开该流且进程权限允许时才可能跨入命令执行，因此必须逐项证明。
overview.en: The expect wrapper is an optional PECL feature and is not part of a standard PHP installation. The URI can cross into command execution only if the extension is registered, the target API opens the stream, and process permissions allow it, so every prerequisite must be proven.

vulnerability.zh: 文件包含或读取功能若接收任意 wrapper URI，且生产运行时错误启用 expect，攻击者可能让 PHP 创建子进程。unknown wrapper、命令文本回显、PECL 包存在或输入到达控制器都不是执行证据。
vulnerability.en: If a file include or read feature accepts arbitrary wrapper URIs while expect is mistakenly enabled in production, PHP may create a child process. An unknown-wrapper error, reflected command text, an installed PECL package, or input reaching a controller is not execution evidence.

exploitation.zh: 先从运行时确认 expect 注册和最终流 API，再将 cat 目标替换为只能打印随机值的签名帮助程序，提交一次并捕获进程审计。阳性要求 PHP 请求、帮助程序子进程和标记输出共享同一令牌；错误差异不算。
exploitation.en: Confirm expect registration and the final stream API from the runtime, replace cat with a signed helper that can only print a random value, submit once, and capture process audit. A positive requires the PHP request, helper child process, and marker output to share one token; error differences do not count.

mitigation.zh: 卸载 expect 扩展，文件入口拒绝非 file scheme，PHP 服务账户禁止启动子进程并限制系统调用。回归应证明合法文件对象仍可用，而 expect URI 在解析或策略层被拒绝。
mitigation.en: Remove the expect extension, reject non-file schemes at file entry points, and prevent the PHP service account from spawning children through process and syscall policy. Regression should preserve valid file objects while rejecting expect URIs at parsing or policy.

title.zh: 记录扩展、API 与进程策略
title.en: Record extension, API, and process policy

description.zh: 从目标 PHP 实例采集 wrapper 列表、最终调用和服务账户限制，确认可控实验范围。
description.en: Collect the wrapper list, final call, and service-account restrictions from the target PHP instance to define the controlled experiment.

title.zh: 替换为 Marker Helper 后提交
title.en: Submit after replacing with the marker helper

description.zh: 不运行原始 cat，只使用一次性随机令牌触发固定帮助程序并设置短超时。
description.en: Do not run the original cat command; trigger only the fixed helper with a one-time random token and short timeout.

title.zh: 确认目标 PHP 启动唯一子进程
title.en: Confirm the target PHP launched the sole child

description.zh: 关联请求、父子 PID、可执行文件哈希和标准输出，排除其他任务或日志回显。
description.en: Correlate request, parent and child PIDs, executable hash, and stdout while excluding other jobs and log reflection.

title.zh: 卸载扩展并销毁实例
title.en: Remove the extension and destroy the instance

description.zh: 修复回归后删除帮助程序和审计材料，卸载临时扩展并销毁一次性 PHP 环境。
description.en: After remediation regression, delete the helper and audit artifacts, uninstall the temporary extension, and destroy the disposable PHP environment.

analysis.zh: 唯一可确认结果是目标 PHP 父进程启动受控 marker-helper 并返回对应随机输出。expect 字符串被接受、扩展已安装、wrapper 出现在列表或错误发生变化只证明前提，不证明命令执行。
analysis.en: The only confirmed result is the target PHP parent launching the controlled marker-helper and returning its random output. Acceptance of the expect string, an installed extension, a listed wrapper, or changed errors proves prerequisites, not command execution.

opsecTips.zh: 用应用控制和系统策略双重限制只可运行 marker-helper；出现其他 PID、文件访问或网络事件立即终止
opsecTips.en: Use both application and operating-system controls to permit only marker-helper; terminate immediately on any other PID, file access, or network event.

opsecTips.zh: 结束后销毁隔离实例、撤销帮助程序签名允许项并删除进程审计中的测试令牌
opsecTips.en: Afterward destroy the isolated instance, revoke the helper's signing allow-entry, and remove test tokens from process audit.

name.zh: PHP 短 Echo 标签与反引号执行边界
name.en: PHP Short-Echo Tag and Backtick Execution Boundary

description.zh: 使用三条短 echo 标签变体验证 PHP 版本、数组偏移语法与反引号命令运算符的处理，并区分当前方括号语法和已移除的花括号语法。
description.en: Uses three short-echo-tag variants to test PHP-version handling of array offsets and the backtick command operator while separating current bracket syntax from removed curly-brace syntax.

subCategory.zh: PHP 标签与版本语法边界

prerequisites.zh: 已确认文件会由目标 PHP 版本解释，并记录 PHP 版本、SAPI 与 short_open_tag 配置
prerequisites.en: The file is confirmed to be interpreted by the target PHP version, with PHP version, SAPI, and short_open_tag setting recorded.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离实例把请求参数限制为固定 marker-helper，且可审计 PHP 父进程与唯一子进程
prerequisites.en: The isolated instance restricts request parameters to a fixed marker-helper, and the PHP parent and sole child process are auditable.

title.zh: 短 Echo 标签反引号变体

description.zh: 原行只作版本追溯。执行时参数仅指向无副作用 marker-helper；PHP 8 上两条花括号偏移应作为解析失败对照。
description.en: The originals are retained for version traceability. During execution parameters may reference only the side-effect-free marker-helper; on PHP 8 the two curly-brace offsets are expected parse-failure controls.

title.zh: WAF 对短标签与偏移语法的识别
title.en: WAF Recognition of Short Tags and Offset Syntax

description.zh: 保持源中重复的 WAF 分组用于一一对照；只比较拦截与到达 PHP 的差异，不把已移除语法的错误当成绕过。
description.en: Preserves the source's duplicate WAF group for direct comparison; compare filtering with PHP reachability and never treat an error from removed syntax as a bypass.

overview.zh: `<?=` 是 PHP 的短 echo 标签，自 PHP 5.4 起不依赖 short_open_tag；反引号会调用 shell。花括号数组/字符串偏移在 PHP 7.4 弃用、PHP 8 移除，因此三行不能在所有版本得到相同结果。
overview.en: <?= is PHP's short echo tag and has not depended on short_open_tag since PHP 5.4; backticks invoke the shell. Curly-brace array or string offsets were deprecated in PHP 7.4 and removed in PHP 8, so the three lines cannot behave identically across versions.

vulnerability.zh: 若上传或模板内容被 PHP 解释，且不可信参数进入反引号运算符，攻击者可能跨越数据与命令边界。WAF 放行只是前置条件，必须证明有效 PHP 语法到达解释器并启动受控子进程。
vulnerability.en: If uploaded or templated content is interpreted as PHP and untrusted parameters reach the backtick operator, data may cross into command execution. WAF acceptance is only a prerequisite; valid PHP must reach the interpreter and launch a controlled child process.

exploitation.zh: 在三个冻结版本环境分别 lint 三行，随后仅对语法有效的方括号行传入一次性 marker-helper。阳性要求请求、PHP 文件、父子 PID 和随机输出关联；源码回显、WAF 200、解析错误或短标签文本均不是执行。
exploitation.en: Lint the three lines under frozen PHP versions, then pass a one-time marker-helper only to the syntactically valid bracket form. A positive requires correlation across request, PHP file, parent and child PIDs, and random output; source reflection, a WAF 200, parse errors, and short-tag text are not execution.

mitigation.zh: 上传目录禁止脚本解释，模板不接受用户代码，移除反引号及其他进程 API，并以参数化业务操作替代命令。WAF 只作纵深防御；回归需覆盖 PHP 7.4/8.x 的语法差异。
mitigation.en: Disable script interpretation in upload storage, reject user code in templates, remove backticks and other process APIs, and replace commands with parameterized business operations. Treat the WAF only as defense in depth and regress PHP 7.4 and 8.x syntax differences.

title.zh: 冻结 PHP 与 WAF 基线

description.zh: 记录目标版本、SAPI、文件映射和无害 PHP 页面经过 WAF 与解释器的完整路径。
description.en: Record target version, SAPI, file mapping, and the full WAF-to-interpreter path for a harmless PHP page.

title.zh: Lint 后提交单个有效变体
title.en: Submit one valid variant after linting

description.zh: 逐行 lint，仅将通过当前版本语法的行与 marker-helper 参数提交一次。
description.en: Lint each line and submit only a form valid for the current version with the marker-helper parameter once.

title.zh: 关联解释与子进程证据

description.zh: 匹配 WAF 决策、PHP 请求、父子 PID 与随机输出，明确花括号行的版本阴性。
description.en: Match WAF decision, PHP request, parent-child PIDs, and random output while documenting version-negative curly-brace forms.

title.zh: 关闭脚本解释并清理
title.en: Disable script interpretation and clean up

description.zh: 修复后重放有效/无效对照，确认上传内容不再解释，并删除页面、帮助程序和日志令牌。
description.en: After remediation replay valid and invalid controls, confirm uploaded content is no longer interpreted, and delete pages, helpers, and log tokens.

analysis.zh: 完整阳性要求语法在目标版本有效、WAF 后到达 PHP、反引号启动受控 marker-helper 并返回唯一输出。WAF 放行、短标签被识别、PHP 8 的花括号解析错误或命令字符串回显都只是部分或阴性证据。
analysis.en: A complete positive requires syntax valid for the target version, delivery through the WAF to PHP, a backtick-launched controlled marker-helper, and unique output. WAF acceptance, short-tag recognition, PHP 8 curly-brace parse errors, and command-string reflection are partial or negative evidence.

opsecTips.zh: 仅允许签名 marker-helper 且执行一次；出现其他 shell、文件读取或网络事件立即停止
opsecTips.en: Permit only the signed marker-helper for one execution; stop immediately on any other shell, file read, or network event.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后删除 PHP 页面和帮助程序，清空 opcode/WAF 缓存，并撤销请求令牌
opsecTips.en: After testing delete the PHP page and helper, clear opcode and WAF caches, and revoke request tokens.

name.zh: ASP 内联表达式解释边界

description.zh: 使用单条 `<%= "test" %>` 识别 Classic ASP/ASP.NET 风格内联表达式是否由服务器解释；该行只输出常量，不构成 WebShell 或命令执行。
description.en: Uses one <%= "test" %> expression to identify server interpretation of Classic ASP or ASP.NET-style inline output; the line emits a constant and is neither a web shell nor command execution.

subCategory.zh: ASP 服务端表达式对照

prerequisites.zh: 已确认测试文件映射到隔离 Classic ASP 或 ASP.NET 处理器，并记录具体运行时
prerequisites.en: The test file is confirmed to map to an isolated Classic ASP or ASP.NET handler, and the exact runtime is recorded.

prerequisites.zh: 页面仅包含常量表达式且无用户输入、文件 API、组件创建或进程调用
prerequisites.en: The page contains only the constant expression with no user input, file API, component creation, or process call.

title.zh: ASP 常量内联表达式

description.zh: 将这一行单独放入对应测试页面，只验证响应是否输出常量 test；不得扩展为动态命令或对象调用。
description.en: Place this line alone in the matching test page and verify only whether the response emits the constant test; do not extend it into dynamic commands or object calls.

title.zh: WAF 对 ASP 表达式的传递对照
title.en: WAF Pass-Through Control for ASP Expressions

description.zh: 保留源中的第二份同一行以比较 WAF 前后字节；输出 test 只证明表达式解释，不证明安全控制被绕过。
description.en: Preserves the source's second copy to compare bytes before and after the WAF; emitting test proves expression interpretation only, not a security-control bypass.

overview.zh: `<%= expression %>` 是服务端页面中的内联输出形式，具体语义取决于 Classic ASP 或 ASP.NET 页面引擎。原行只有字符串常量，可安全用作处理器识别和 WAF 传递的阴性对照。
overview.en: <%= expression %> is an inline output form in server-side pages, with semantics determined by the Classic ASP or ASP.NET engine. The source contains only a string constant and is a safe negative control for handler identification and WAF pass-through.

vulnerability.zh: 只有当攻击者能让不可信内容成为服务器端表达式，或控制表达式调用危险对象时，才可能形成代码注入。静态页面输出 test 只是配置证据，不能升级为 WebShell、SSTI 或 RCE。
vulnerability.en: Code injection requires an attacker to make untrusted content part of a server-side expression or control an expression that invokes dangerous objects. A static page printing test is configuration evidence and cannot be escalated to a web shell, SSTI, or RCE.

exploitation.zh: 先以纯文本文件证明 `<%=` 未被解释，再在隔离 ASP 页面中放入原行并记录处理器、模板编译与响应。阳性仅为服务器输出 test；若源码原样返回、下载或 404，则处理器未解释。此对照不执行后续利用。
exploitation.en: First prove that a plain-text file does not interpret <%=, then place the source line in an isolated ASP page and record handler, template compilation, and response. A positive is limited to the server emitting test; returned source, download behavior, or 404 means no interpretation. This control does not proceed to exploitation.

mitigation.zh: 上传和用户内容目录禁用 ASP/ASP.NET 脚本映射，模板只能来自受信构建产物，动态数据采用上下文编码。回归应保持已批准页面渲染，同时用户文件始终作为静态内容。
mitigation.en: Disable ASP and ASP.NET script mappings in upload and user-content directories, source templates only from trusted build artifacts, and contextually encode dynamic data. Regression should preserve approved rendering while always serving user files as static content.

title.zh: 确认页面处理器映射

description.zh: 记录扩展名、应用池、Classic ASP/ASP.NET 版本和纯文本基线。
description.en: Record extension, application pool, Classic ASP or ASP.NET version, and the plain-text baseline.

title.zh: 部署常量表达式对照

description.zh: 只部署原始一行，不拼接变量、请求参数或对象方法。
description.en: Deploy only the original line without variables, request parameters, or object methods.

title.zh: 限定结论为表达式解释
title.en: Limit the conclusion to expression interpretation

description.zh: 匹配模板处理日志与常量输出，明确没有命令、文件或网络副作用。
description.en: Match template-processing logs with constant output and document the absence of command, file, or network side effects.

title.zh: 移除上传目录脚本映射
title.en: Remove script mapping from upload storage

description.zh: 修复后在批准页面和上传目录分别回归，确认前者渲染、后者返回静态源码。
description.en: After remediation regress an approved page and upload storage separately, confirming rendering in the former and static source in the latter.

analysis.zh: 该条目的最大可证结论是 ASP 页面引擎解释了常量内联表达式。响应 test、WAF 放行或模板编译均不证明命令执行；只有后续存在用户可控表达式和危险调用时才需要独立升级评估。
analysis.en: The strongest conclusion for this entry is that an ASP page engine interpreted a constant inline expression. A test response, WAF acceptance, or template compilation does not prove command execution; any user-controlled expression and dangerous invocation requires a separate escalation assessment.

opsecTips.zh: 页面只输出固定常量且部署在隔离站点；禁止加入请求数据、COM/.NET 对象或文件操作
opsecTips.en: Keep the page in an isolated site with constant output only; do not add request data, COM or .NET objects, or file operations.

opsecTips.zh: 验证后删除页面、回收应用池并清理模板缓存，确认上传目录未获得脚本权限
opsecTips.en: After validation delete the page, recycle the application pool, clear template caches, and confirm upload storage gained no script permission.

name.zh: PHP Linux 动态库路径字典

description.zh: libc、libpthread 与 libdl 的多架构候选路径清单，不是可直接执行的 Payload。仅用于授权实验中核对实际 ELF 依赖；优先从动态链接器或包管理器读取真实路径。
description.en: A multi-architecture candidate list for libc, libpthread, and libdl rather than an executable payload. Use it only to verify actual ELF dependencies in an authorized lab, preferring paths reported by the dynamic linker or package manager.

name.zh: Shellshock 无副作用解析探针

commands.command: env x='() { :;}; echo vulnerable' bash -c "echo test"

description.zh: 有效的 Bash 函数环境变量探针，用于隔离旧版 Bash 的 Shellshock 解析行为。仅比较固定 vulnerable/test 输出，不添加命令、文件读取、网络动作或 PHP 函数语法。
description.en: A valid Bash function-environment probe for isolated review of legacy Shellshock parsing. Compare only the fixed vulnerable and test output; do not add commands, file reads, network actions, or PHP function syntax.

reason.zh: Shellshock 后缀由 Bash 解析，但 system("id") 是 PHP 函数调用写法；bash -n 在左括号处报语法错误，因此不会调用 PHP system。
reason.en: The Shellshock suffix is parsed by Bash, but system("id") is PHP call syntax; bash -n rejects the opening parenthesis, so this cannot invoke PHP system.

reason.zh: system("whoami") 把 PHP 调用语法放进 Bash 函数环境值；Bash 在括号处解析失败，无法执行 whoami。
reason.en: system("whoami") places PHP call syntax in a Bash function environment value; Bash fails at the parenthesis and cannot execute whoami.

reason.zh: system("cat /flag") 不是 Bash 命令形式，bash -n 报 unexpected token；该行既不能调用 PHP system，也不能读取文件。
reason.en: system("cat /flag") is not Bash command syntax and bash -n reports an unexpected token; the line can neither call PHP system nor read a file.

reason.zh: system("ls /") 属于 PHP 表达式而非 Shellshock 后缀中的 Bash 命令，括号使解析在执行前失败。
reason.en: system("ls /") is a PHP expression rather than a Bash command in a Shellshock suffix, and its parentheses make parsing fail before execution.

reason.zh: passthru("id") 是 PHP 函数语法，Bash 不支持这种调用形式并在括号处报错，不能作为 Shellshock Payload。
reason.en: passthru("id") is PHP function syntax; Bash does not support this call form and errors at the parenthesis, so it is not a Shellshock payload.

reason.zh: passthru("whoami") 无法被 Bash 语法解析；Shellshock 环境值不会切换到 PHP 运行时，因此 whoami 不会执行。
reason.en: passthru("whoami") is not valid Bash syntax; a Shellshock environment value does not switch into a PHP runtime, so whoami cannot execute.

reason.zh: passthru("cat /flag") 混入 PHP 函数调用并被 bash -n 拒绝，不能形成文件读取或命令执行。
reason.en: passthru("cat /flag") injects PHP call syntax and is rejected by bash -n, so it cannot perform a file read or command execution.

reason.zh: passthru("ls /") 在 Bash 中不是合法简单命令，括号导致语法错误，无法测试 PHP disable_functions。
reason.en: passthru("ls /") is not a valid simple command in Bash; its parentheses cause a syntax error and cannot test PHP disable_functions.

reason.zh: shell_exec("id") 是 PHP API 调用，不是 Bash 语法；bash -n 在参数括号处失败，Shellshock 不会执行该函数。
reason.en: shell_exec("id") is a PHP API call rather than Bash syntax; bash -n fails at the argument parenthesis and Shellshock cannot execute the function.

reason.zh: shell_exec("whoami") 需要 PHP 解释器，但该位置由 Bash 解析且语法无效，不能运行 whoami。
reason.en: shell_exec("whoami") requires a PHP interpreter, while this position is parsed by Bash and is syntactically invalid, so whoami cannot run.

reason.zh: shell_exec("cat /flag") 在 Shellshock 后缀中触发 Bash 括号语法错误，不会进入 PHP，也不会读取 /flag。
reason.en: shell_exec("cat /flag") triggers a Bash parenthesis syntax error in the Shellshock suffix; it reaches no PHP runtime and reads no /flag.

reason.zh: shell_exec("ls /") 混合 PHP 与 Bash 两种运行时语法，离线 bash -n 已确认不可解析。
reason.en: shell_exec("ls /") mixes PHP and Bash runtime syntax, and offline bash -n confirms that it is not parseable.

reason.zh: Bash 的 exec 使用空格参数而不是 exec("id")；当前 PHP 风格括号写法在执行前语法失败。
reason.en: Bash exec takes space-delimited arguments rather than exec("id"); this PHP-style parenthesized form fails syntactically before execution.

reason.zh: exec("whoami") 既不是合法 Bash builtin 调用也不会转交 PHP，bash -n 在括号处拒绝该行。
reason.en: exec("whoami") is neither a valid Bash builtin invocation nor delegated to PHP, and bash -n rejects the line at the parenthesis.

reason.zh: exec("cat /flag") 使用无效的 PHP 风格参数形式，Bash 无法解析，因此不会替换进程或读取文件。
reason.en: exec("cat /flag") uses an invalid PHP-style argument form that Bash cannot parse, so it neither replaces the process nor reads a file.

reason.zh: Bash 中应写 exec ls /，而 exec("ls /") 在左括号处报错；该冻结行不可执行。
reason.en: Bash would require exec ls /, while exec("ls /") errors at the opening parenthesis; this frozen source line is not executable.

reason.zh: proc_open("id") 是 PHP 函数表达式，Bash 没有 proc_open 调用语法且在括号处解析失败。
reason.en: proc_open("id") is a PHP function expression; Bash has no proc_open call syntax and fails to parse the parenthesis.

reason.zh: proc_open("whoami") 不能在 Bash Shellshock 后缀中调用 PHP，离线语法检查确认不可解析。
reason.en: proc_open("whoami") cannot invoke PHP from a Bash Shellshock suffix, and offline syntax checking confirms it is unparseable.

reason.zh: proc_open("cat /flag") 混用 PHP 调用和 Bash 环境变量语法，bash -n 报错且不会打开进程。
reason.en: proc_open("cat /flag") mixes a PHP call with Bash environment syntax; bash -n errors and no process is opened.

reason.zh: proc_open("ls /") 不是 Shell 命令，括号表达式在 Bash 中无效，不能用于 disable_functions 验证。
reason.en: proc_open("ls /") is not a shell command and its parenthesized expression is invalid in Bash, so it cannot validate disable_functions.

reason.zh: popen("id") 是 PHP/C 风格函数调用，在 Bash 中不构成命令并由 bash -n 拒绝。
reason.en: popen("id") is PHP or C-style function-call syntax; it does not form a Bash command and is rejected by bash -n.

reason.zh: popen("whoami") 所需的 PHP 运行时不存在于 Shellshock 后缀，Bash 在括号处发生语法错误。
reason.en: The PHP runtime required by popen("whoami") is absent from a Shellshock suffix, and Bash raises a syntax error at the parenthesis.

reason.zh: popen("cat /flag") 不是合法 Bash 语句且无法调用 PHP popen，因此不会产生读取进程。
reason.en: popen("cat /flag") is not a valid Bash statement and cannot call PHP popen, so it creates no file-reading process.

reason.zh: popen("ls /") 在 Bash 中因函数式括号写法不可解析，不能作为 Shellshock 或 PHP Payload。
reason.en: popen("ls /") is unparseable in Bash because of its function-style parentheses and is neither a Shellshock nor PHP payload.

reason.zh: pcntl_exec("id") 是 PHP PCNTL API 调用，Bash 不认识该函数语法并在执行前失败。
reason.en: pcntl_exec("id") is a PHP PCNTL API call; Bash does not recognize this function syntax and fails before execution.

reason.zh: pcntl_exec("whoami") 不能跨运行时由 Bash 调用，bash -n 已确认括号语法错误。
reason.en: pcntl_exec("whoami") cannot be called cross-runtime by Bash, and bash -n confirms a parenthesis syntax error.

reason.zh: pcntl_exec("cat /flag") 是无效 Bash 后缀，不会进入 PHP PCNTL，也不会读取 /flag。
reason.en: pcntl_exec("cat /flag") is an invalid Bash suffix; it reaches no PHP PCNTL runtime and cannot read /flag.

reason.zh: pcntl_exec("ls /") 在 Shellshock 的 Bash 解析阶段即失败，不能测试 PHP 禁用函数绕过。
reason.en: pcntl_exec("ls /") fails during Bash parsing of the Shellshock value and cannot test a PHP disabled-function bypass.

reason.zh: putenv(...) 是 PHP 函数调用；Bash 环境赋值应使用 NAME=value 形式，当前括号语法无效且不会设置 LD_PRELOAD。
reason.en: putenv(...) is a PHP function call; Bash environment assignment uses NAME=value syntax, so this parenthesized form is invalid and does not set LD_PRELOAD.

reason.zh: putenv(...);mail() 连续使用两个 PHP 调用，Bash 在第一个括号处即报错，既不会设置预加载也不会调用 mail。
reason.en: putenv(...);mail() chains two PHP calls; Bash errors at the first parenthesis, setting no preload value and invoking no mail function.

reason.zh: putenv(...);error_log() 是 PHP 语句拼接，不是 Bash 命令序列；离线语法检查在 putenv 参数处失败。
reason.en: putenv(...);error_log() is a PHP statement chain rather than a Bash command sequence; offline syntax checking fails at the putenv argument.

reason.zh: putenv(...);mb_send_mail() 依赖 PHP 函数解析，但 Shellshock 值由 Bash 解析，括号使整行不可执行。
reason.en: putenv(...);mb_send_mail() depends on PHP function parsing, while Shellshock values are parsed by Bash; the parentheses make the entire line unexecutable.

reason.zh: putenv(...);imagick() 混合 PHP 函数名与 Bash 环境语法，bash -n 在首个调用处拒绝，无法加载库或调用 Imagick。
reason.en: putenv(...);imagick() mixes PHP function names with Bash environment syntax; bash -n rejects the first call, so no library is loaded and no Imagick action occurs.

name.zh: Fastjson InetAddress DNS 解析边界

description.zh: 使用 Inet4Address 与 Inet6Address 的 @type JSON 变体验证特定 Fastjson 配置是否实例化网络地址类型并由应用服务器发起 DNS 解析。
description.en: Uses Inet4Address and Inet6Address @type JSON variants to test whether a specific Fastjson configuration instantiates network-address types and causes application-origin DNS resolution.

prerequisites.zh: 已冻结 Fastjson 与 JDK 版本、AutoType 配置、解析入口和目标 Java 类型允许策略
prerequisites.en: Fastjson and JDK versions, AutoType configuration, parser entry point, and Java-type allow policy are frozen.

prerequisites.zh: dnslog.cn 在执行前替换为自有一次性权威 DNS 名称，且应用与操作者解析流量可区分
prerequisites.en: dnslog.cn is replaced before execution with a controlled one-time authoritative DNS name, and application traffic is distinguishable from operator resolution.

title.zh: Inet4Address 与 Inet6Address JSON

description.zh: 原始第三方域只作追溯；分别替换为两个自有随机子域，每次解析一行并记录请求 ID、类型选择与权威 DNS 日志。
description.en: The original third-party domain is retained for traceability only; replace it with two controlled random subdomains, parse one line per request, and record request ID, selected type, and authoritative DNS logs.

overview.zh: Fastjson 的历史 AutoType 行为可能根据 @type 创建指定 Java 类；InetAddress 构造或解析可产生 DNS 副作用。这两行用于证明类型实例化与解析边界，不包含类加载或命令执行链。
overview.en: Historical Fastjson AutoType behavior may instantiate a Java class named by @type, and InetAddress construction or parsing can produce a DNS side effect. These lines test type instantiation and resolution only and contain no class-loading or command-execution chain.

vulnerability.zh: 当不可信 JSON 可选择网络相关类型，解析器可能在业务校验前产生外部解析，造成盲副作用或成为更高风险 gadget 的前置条件。DNS 查询本身不能证明任意类实例化、JNDI 查找或 RCE。
vulnerability.en: When untrusted JSON can select network-capable types, parsing may cause external resolution before business validation, creating a blind side effect or a prerequisite for higher-risk gadgets. DNS alone proves neither arbitrary class instantiation, JNDI lookup, nor RCE.

exploitation.zh: 先用普通 DTO 建立无 DNS 基线，再为 IPv4/IPv6 各生成一个随机域并逐条解析。阳性要求 Fastjson 日志显示目标类型且权威 DNS 收到应用出口查询；操作者预解析、安全产品查询和缓存命中必须剔除。
exploitation.en: Establish a no-DNS baseline with an ordinary DTO, then issue one random domain each for IPv4 and IPv6 and parse them separately. A positive requires Fastjson logs to show the target type and authoritative DNS to receive an application-egress query; operator pre-resolution, security-product queries, and cache effects must be excluded.

mitigation.zh: 升级受支持 Fastjson 版本，关闭或严格允许 AutoType，反序列化到固定 DTO，并在网络层限制解析与出站。回归同时覆盖合法地址字段、未知 @type 和两个 InetAddress 类型。
mitigation.en: Upgrade to a supported Fastjson version, disable or strictly allowlist AutoType, deserialize into fixed DTOs, and restrict DNS and egress at the network layer. Regress valid address fields, unknown @type values, and both InetAddress types.

title.zh: 冻结解析器与无查询基线
title.en: Freeze the parser and no-query baseline

description.zh: 记录 Fastjson/JDK 版本、AutoType 策略和普通 DTO 解析期间的 DNS 空白窗口。
description.en: Record Fastjson and JDK versions, AutoType policy, and a DNS-quiet window during ordinary DTO parsing.

title.zh: 替换域名后逐类型解析
title.en: Replace domains and parse each type

description.zh: 为两条输入分别签发一次性域名并绑定不同请求 ID，不使用公共 dnslog 服务。
description.en: Issue a separate one-time domain and request ID for each input without using a public dnslog service.

title.zh: 关联类型实例化与 DNS

description.zh: 匹配解析日志、线程、请求 ID、出口地址和权威查询，排除扫描器与客户端。
description.en: Match parser log, thread, request ID, egress address, and authoritative query while excluding scanners and clients.

title.zh: 限制 AutoType 并撤销域名

description.zh: 修复后重放 DTO 与两条 @type，确认业务解析保留且 DNS 不再发生，再删除测试记录。
description.en: After remediation replay the DTO and both @type inputs, preserve business parsing with no DNS, then delete test records.

analysis.zh: 可确认结果限于 Fastjson 在目标配置下选择 InetAddress 类型并触发应用源 DNS。仅 JSON 解析成功、域名出现在异常、公共 DNS 有记录或响应不同都不足；该结果不能被表述为反序列化 RCE。
analysis.en: A confirmed result is limited to Fastjson selecting an InetAddress type under the target configuration and triggering application-origin DNS. Successful JSON parsing, a domain in an exception, public-DNS records, or response differences are insufficient and must not be described as deserialization RCE.

opsecTips.zh: 每条只使用一次性自有 DNS 令牌并限制单次查询；首次应用源解析后停止
opsecTips.en: Use one controlled one-time DNS token per line and limit it to one query; stop after the first application-origin resolution.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后删除权威记录和令牌映射，清理包含域名与出口地址的临时日志
opsecTips.en: After testing delete authoritative records and token mappings and clean temporary logs containing domains and egress addresses.

name.zh: Fastjson JdbcRowSet JNDI 查找边界

description.zh: 使用 RMI 与 LDAP dataSourceName 的 JdbcRowSetImpl JSON 验证 Fastjson AutoType、setter 调用与 JNDI 网络查找是否形成可观察链。
description.en: Uses JdbcRowSetImpl JSON with RMI and LDAP dataSourceName values to test whether Fastjson AutoType, setter invocation, and JNDI network lookup form an observable chain.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离环境固定 Fastjson/JDK 版本与 AutoType 策略，并确认解析入口会绑定属性 setter
prerequisites.en: The isolated environment pins Fastjson and JDK versions and AutoType policy and confirms that the parser entry binds property setters.

prerequisites.zh: RMI/LDAP 地址改为只记录连接、不返回 Reference、对象或类字节的自有捕获器
prerequisites.en: RMI and LDAP addresses are replaced with controlled capture services that log connections but return no Reference, object, or class bytes.

title.zh: JdbcRowSetImpl RMI/LDAP JSON

description.zh: 把 ATTACKER 替换为隔离捕获器，一次只解析一个协议；捕获器必须立即关闭连接且不提供任何可加载内容。
description.en: Replace ATTACKER with an isolated capture service and parse one protocol at a time; the service must close immediately and provide no loadable content.

overview.zh: JdbcRowSetImpl 的 dataSourceName 与 autoCommit 组合曾被用于触发 JNDI 数据源查找。原 JSON 只足以测试出站查找前提；安全验证不得返回远程对象、工厂类或字节码。
overview.en: The JdbcRowSetImpl dataSourceName and autoCommit combination has been used to trigger JNDI data-source lookup. The JSON is sufficient only to test outbound lookup prerequisites; safe validation must return no remote object, factory class, or bytecode.

vulnerability.zh: 如果 Fastjson 允许实例化该类并调用相关 setter，解析不可信 JSON 可能在业务逻辑前触发 RMI/LDAP。后续影响受 JDK 信任限制、类路径和网络控制约束；建立连接并不等于类加载或代码执行。
vulnerability.en: If Fastjson permits this class and invokes the relevant setters, parsing untrusted JSON may trigger RMI or LDAP before business logic. Further impact depends on JDK trust restrictions, classpath, and network controls; a connection does not equal class loading or code execution.

exploitation.zh: 先用同结构但普通类型的 JSON 建立无连接基线，再把 RMI/LDAP 各指向独立随机端口并单次解析。阳性要求解析线程与捕获器连接关联；捕获器不响应对象内容。超时、DNS、异常提到 URL 或测试客户端连接都不是完整查找。
exploitation.en: Establish a no-connection baseline using the same shape with an ordinary type, then point RMI and LDAP to separate random capture ports and parse once each. A positive correlates the parser thread with a capture connection while the service returns no object content. Timeout, DNS, a URL in an exception, or a test-client connection is not a complete lookup.

mitigation.zh: 升级 Fastjson，关闭或精确允许 AutoType，绑定固定 DTO；限制应用到 RMI/LDAP 端口的出站，并采用受支持 JDK 安全默认值。回归应确认普通 DTO 正常且两个捕获器均无连接。
mitigation.en: Upgrade Fastjson, disable or precisely allowlist AutoType, and bind fixed DTOs; block application egress to RMI and LDAP and use supported JDK security defaults. Regression should preserve ordinary DTOs with no connection to either capture service.

title.zh: 建立无对象 JNDI 捕获器

description.zh: RMI 与 LDAP 监听器只记录来源、令牌和首包，绝不返回 Reference 或类数据。
description.en: RMI and LDAP listeners record only source, token, and first bytes and never return a Reference or class data.

title.zh: 逐协议解析 JdbcRowSet JSON

description.zh: 替换主机并为两条输入分配独立请求 ID，每个环境只执行一次。
description.en: Replace the host and assign distinct request IDs to both inputs, executing each environment only once.

title.zh: 证明 Setter 到网络查找

description.zh: 关联 Fastjson 类型/setter 跟踪、解析线程与捕获器连接，并确认没有对象返回。
description.en: Correlate Fastjson type and setter traces, parser thread, and capture connection, and confirm that no object was returned.

title.zh: 阻断 AutoType 与 JNDI 出站

description.zh: 修复后重放普通 DTO 和两条 JSON，确认无捕获连接并删除监听器与令牌。
description.en: After remediation replay the ordinary DTO and both JSON inputs, confirm no captured connection, and remove listeners and tokens.

analysis.zh: 阳性仅证明目标 Fastjson/JDK 组合实例化 JdbcRowSetImpl、设置 dataSourceName/autoCommit 并发起应用源 RMI/LDAP 连接。没有 Reference、对象或类字节返回时，不能声称 JNDI 类加载或 RCE。
analysis.en: A positive proves only that the target Fastjson and JDK combination instantiated JdbcRowSetImpl, set dataSourceName and autoCommit, and initiated an application-origin RMI or LDAP connection. With no Reference, object, or class bytes returned, JNDI class loading and RCE cannot be claimed.

opsecTips.zh: 捕获器设置首包即断开和全局超时，禁止返回任何序列化对象、Reference 或远程类
opsecTips.en: Configure capture services to close after the first bytes with a global timeout and return no serialized object, Reference, or remote class.

opsecTips.zh: 完成后关闭两个端口、删除请求令牌并核对 JVM 没有类加载、线程残留或后续连接
opsecTips.en: Afterward close both ports, delete request tokens, and verify the JVM has no class load, residual thread, or follow-up connection.

name.zh: Jackson 多态类型网络副作用边界

description.zh: 使用 JEditorPane HTTP 页面与 JdbcRowSet RMI 数据源两个数组式多态 JSON，验证 Jackson 默认类型配置是否允许网络能力类型产生出站副作用。
description.en: Uses array-form polymorphic JSON for a JEditorPane HTTP page and JdbcRowSet RMI data source to test whether Jackson default typing permits network-capable types to produce outbound side effects.

subCategory.zh: Jackson 多态反序列化网络边界

prerequisites.zh: 已冻结 Jackson/JDK 版本、ObjectMapper 默认类型设置、允许类型验证器和解析目标类型
prerequisites.en: Jackson and JDK versions, ObjectMapper default-typing settings, polymorphic type validator, and declared target type are frozen.

prerequisites.zh: HTTP 与 RMI 目标改为自有首包捕获器，既不提供 class 文件也不返回远程对象
prerequisites.en: HTTP and RMI targets are replaced with controlled first-packet capture services that provide neither class files nor remote objects.

title.zh: JEditorPane 与 JdbcRowSet 多态 JSON

description.zh: 将 ATTACKER 分别替换为隔离 HTTP/RMI 捕获器；每次只解析一个类型，服务端不返回 class、对象或可执行内容。
description.en: Replace ATTACKER with isolated HTTP and RMI capture services respectively, parse one type at a time, and return no class, object, or executable content.

overview.zh: Jackson 数组式多态表示可在启用默认类型时携带具体类名。JEditorPane 的 page 属性和 JdbcRowSet 的 dataSourceName 具有网络副作用，但是否可实例化取决于版本、类型验证器、模块可见性和 JDK。
overview.en: Jackson array-form polymorphism can carry a concrete class name when default typing is enabled. JEditorPane page and JdbcRowSet dataSourceName can have network side effects, but instantiation depends on version, type validator, module visibility, and JDK.

vulnerability.zh: 不可信 JSON 若能选择任意多态类型，解析器可能调用具有 I/O 副作用的 setter。出站 HTTP/RMI 证明类型边界过宽，但在捕获器不返回内容时不能推导类执行；类型被拒绝或模块不可访问是阴性。
vulnerability.en: If untrusted JSON can select arbitrary polymorphic types, the parser may invoke setters with I/O side effects. Outbound HTTP or RMI proves an overly broad type boundary but does not imply class execution when capture services return no content; rejected types or inaccessible modules are negative results.

exploitation.zh: 以固定 DTO 和禁用默认类型建立无连接基线，再逐条指向不同捕获器并记录类型解析、setter、线程和 socket。阳性要求同一请求的目标 setter 与应用源连接关联；错误中出现类名、DNS 或预加载类不计。
exploitation.en: Establish a no-connection baseline with a fixed DTO and default typing disabled, then point each line to a separate capture service and record type resolution, setter, thread, and socket. A positive correlates the target setter and application-origin connection in one request; class names in errors, DNS alone, or preloaded classes do not count.

mitigation.zh: 禁用不需要的默认类型，使用 PolymorphicTypeValidator 精确允许业务类型，绑定固定 DTO 并升级受支持 Jackson/JDK。网络层阻断应用到任意 HTTP/RMI 目标，回归覆盖两个输入。
mitigation.en: Disable unnecessary default typing, precisely allow business types with PolymorphicTypeValidator, bind fixed DTOs, and upgrade supported Jackson and JDK versions. Block arbitrary application HTTP and RMI egress and regress both inputs.

title.zh: 记录 ObjectMapper 类型策略

description.zh: 保存默认类型、验证器、声明基类、JDK 模块和固定 DTO 的无连接结果。
description.en: Preserve default typing, validator, declared base type, JDK modules, and the fixed DTO's no-connection result.

title.zh: 逐类型连接空响应捕获器
title.en: Connect each type to an empty-response capture service

description.zh: HTTP 与 RMI 使用不同令牌和端口，单次解析且不提供任何响应对象。
description.en: Use distinct tokens and ports for HTTP and RMI, parse once, and provide no response object.

title.zh: 关联类型、Setter 与 Socket

description.zh: 匹配 Jackson 跟踪、解析线程、目标属性和首包日志，限定为网络副作用。
description.en: Match Jackson traces, parser thread, target property, and first-packet log and limit the finding to a network side effect.

title.zh: 收紧类型验证并清理
title.en: Constrain type validation and clean up

description.zh: 修复后重放 DTO 与两个多态输入，确认类型在连接前拒绝，再关闭捕获器。
description.en: After remediation replay the DTO and both polymorphic inputs, confirm type rejection before connection, and close capture services.

analysis.zh: 可证结论是 Jackson 在目标设置下接受网络能力类型并产生应用源 HTTP 或 RMI 连接。捕获器不返回 class/object，因此不能声称远程类加载、反序列化 gadget 完成或 RCE；错误和 DNS 只是诊断信号。
analysis.en: The supportable conclusion is that Jackson accepted a network-capable type under the target settings and produced an application-origin HTTP or RMI connection. Because capture services return no class or object, remote class loading, a completed gadget, and RCE cannot be claimed; errors and DNS are diagnostic only.

opsecTips.zh: 捕获器只接收首包并立即断开，禁止托管 Exploit.class、RMI 对象或重定向
opsecTips.en: Capture only the first packet and disconnect immediately; never host Exploit.class, RMI objects, or redirects.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后关闭 HTTP/RMI 端口、清除 token 与连接日志，并核对 JVM 无新增类或线程
opsecTips.en: After testing close HTTP and RMI ports, clear tokens and connection logs, and verify no new JVM class or thread remains.

reason.zh: 该行把 Java 序列化魔数的十六进制文本与说明文字混在一起，既不是 AC ED 00 05 原始字节也不是完整 ObjectStream，无法交给 Java 反序列化器执行。
reason.en: This line mixes hexadecimal text for the Java serialization magic with explanatory prose; it is neither raw AC ED 00 05 bytes nor a complete ObjectStream and cannot be executed by a Java deserializer.

reason.zh: 字面反引号位于 `$` 与 `{` 之间，破坏 Log4j lookup 所需的 `${...}` 起始序列；该冻结行不会被识别为 JNDI lookup。
reason.en: A literal backtick sits between $ and {, breaking the ${...} prefix required by Log4j lookups; this frozen line is not recognized as a JNDI lookup.

reason.zh: 该行同样因 `$` 后的反引号不满足 `${...}` 语法，后续 ReverseShell 路径不会进入 JNDI 解析；保留会造成可执行性误导。
reason.en: The backtick after $ likewise violates ${...} syntax, so the later ReverseShell path never reaches JNDI parsing; retaining it would misrepresent executability.

reason.zh: RMI URL 外层被无效的 `$`+反引号+`{` 包裹，Log4j 不会启动 lookup，不能产生 RMI 连接。
reason.en: The RMI URL is wrapped in an invalid dollar-backtick-brace sequence, so Log4j does not start a lookup and no RMI connection can result.

reason.zh: 该行含字面反引号而不是标准 `${jndi:...}`，因此不会进入 Log4j 替换器；dns URI 文本本身不触发 DNS。
reason.en: This line contains a literal backtick instead of standard ${jndi:...} syntax and never enters Log4j substitution; dns URI text alone does not trigger DNS.

reason.zh: 除反引号破坏 lookup 起始外，前缀还缺少 j，`ndi` 不是 JNDI lookup 名称；该行有两个独立语法错误。
reason.en: Besides the backtick breaking the lookup prefix, the name omits j and ndi is not the JNDI lookup name; the line has two independent syntax defects.

reason.zh: 该行既含无效反引号起始，又把 lookup 名缩短为 i，不存在可解析的 JNDI 插件标识，无法发起 LDAP。
reason.en: The line has both an invalid backtick prefix and a lookup name reduced to i, leaving no parseable JNDI plugin identifier and no LDAP lookup.

reason.zh: `ndidap//` 同时缺少 jndi 名称、冒号和合法 ldap:// scheme，外层还有反引号；它不是可执行的 lookup 或 URL。
reason.en: ndidap// lacks the jndi name, colon, and valid ldap:// scheme and is also wrapped with a backtick; it is neither an executable lookup nor a URL.

reason.zh: 反引号破坏 `${`，且 `jndi:://` 在第二个冒号前缺少 ldap/rmi/dns 等协议名称；解析器没有有效查找目标。
reason.en: The backtick breaks ${, and jndi::// lacks a protocol name such as ldap, rmi, or dns before the second colon; the parser has no valid lookup target.

reason.zh: JSON 结构可解析，但 `_bytecodes` 只有字面 `base64_payload` 占位符，不是有效 Translet 类字节；该不完整 gadget 不能实例化或执行，应作为占位草稿退役。
reason.en: The JSON structure parses, but _bytecodes contains only the literal base64_payload placeholder rather than valid Translet class bytes; this incomplete gadget cannot instantiate or execute and is retired as a draft placeholder.

reason.zh: 该行含破坏 lookup 的反引号、非 BCEL 编码的 any 占位符和括号说明文字；真实 BCEL 类名需 `$$BCEL$$` 编码，因此该行不可执行。
reason.en: This line contains a lookup-breaking backtick, an any placeholder that is not BCEL encoding, and parenthetical prose; a real BCEL class name requires $$BCEL$$ encoding, so the line is not executable.

name.zh: PyYAML Object/Apply 不安全加载边界

description.zh: 使用一条 `!!python/object/apply` 输入验证目标 PyYAML 版本与 Loader 是否允许构造 subprocess.check_output 调用，并以无副作用帮助程序限定证据。
description.en: Uses one !!python/object/apply input to test whether the target PyYAML version and Loader permit construction of a subprocess.check_output call, with evidence constrained to a side-effect-free helper.

prerequisites.zh: 已冻结 Python、PyYAML 版本和实际 Loader 调用，并确认输入完整进入 YAML 解析器
prerequisites.en: Python and PyYAML versions and the actual Loader call are frozen, and input is confirmed to reach the YAML parser intact.

prerequisites.zh: 原始 cat 命令替换为只输出一次性随机标记的固定帮助程序，且进程创建可审计
prerequisites.en: The original cat command is replaced with a fixed helper that only prints a one-time random marker, and process creation is auditable.

title.zh: PyYAML Object/Apply 输入

description.zh: 危险原行仅作来源记录；执行前把参数数组替换为签名 marker-helper，禁止读取 /etc/passwd 或运行任意命令。
description.en: The dangerous original is retained only for source traceability; replace its argument array with the signed marker-helper before execution and never read /etc/passwd or run an arbitrary command.

overview.zh: PyYAML 的 Python 专用标签可在允许的 Loader 下构造对象或调用可调用对象。`safe_load` 应拒绝该标签，而历史 `Loader`/`UnsafeLoader` 行为和版本差异必须从实际调用确认。
overview.en: PyYAML's Python-specific tags can construct objects or invoke callables under a permissive Loader. safe_load should reject this tag, while historical Loader or UnsafeLoader behavior and version differences must be confirmed from the actual call.

vulnerability.zh: 若应用用不安全 Loader 解析不可信 YAML，object/apply 可把数据边界升级为 Python 可调用对象执行。标签被识别、错误中出现 subprocess 或 YAML 语法通过并不等于函数被调用。
vulnerability.en: If an application parses untrusted YAML with an unsafe Loader, object/apply can turn a data boundary into Python callable execution. Tag recognition, subprocess in an error, or valid YAML syntax does not mean the function was invoked.

exploitation.zh: 先用普通 mapping 与 safe_load 建立无子进程基线，再将原参数改为只打印随机值的 marker-helper，并对目标 Loader 解析一次。阳性要求请求、Loader、Python 父进程、帮助程序子进程和输出令牌关联；构造器错误或源码回显是阴性。
exploitation.en: Establish a no-child baseline with an ordinary mapping and safe_load, replace the original arguments with a marker-helper that only prints a random value, and parse once with the target Loader. A positive correlates request, Loader, Python parent, helper child, and output token; constructor errors and source reflection are negative.

mitigation.zh: 对不可信输入使用 safe_load/SafeLoader 或更简单的数据格式，绑定明确 schema，禁止 Python 专用标签并升级受支持 PyYAML。运行身份还应限制子进程、文件和网络权限。
mitigation.en: Use safe_load or SafeLoader, or a simpler data format, for untrusted input; bind an explicit schema, reject Python-specific tags, and upgrade supported PyYAML. Also restrict child-process, file, and network permissions for the runtime identity.

title.zh: 记录 Loader 与安全基线
title.en: Record the Loader and safe baseline

description.zh: 保存依赖版本、加载 API、普通 YAML 结果和 safe_load 对 Python 标签的拒绝证据。
description.en: Preserve dependency version, load API, ordinary YAML result, and evidence that safe_load rejects the Python tag.

title.zh: 替换为 Marker Helper 后解析
title.en: Parse after replacing with the marker helper

description.zh: 不运行原始 cat，使用一次性令牌和短超时在隔离 Loader 中提交一次。
description.en: Do not run the original cat command; submit once to the isolated Loader with a one-time token and short timeout.

title.zh: 关联构造器、子进程与输出
title.en: Correlate constructor, child process, and output

description.zh: 匹配 YAML 构造器日志、父子 PID、帮助程序哈希和随机输出，排除错误文本。
description.en: Match YAML constructor logs, parent-child PIDs, helper hash, and random output while excluding error text.

title.zh: 切换 SafeLoader 并清理
title.en: Switch to SafeLoader and clean up

description.zh: 修复后重放普通 YAML 与 object/apply，确认前者正常、后者在构造前拒绝，再删除帮助程序。
description.en: After remediation replay ordinary YAML and object/apply, preserve the former and reject the latter before construction, then delete the helper.

analysis.zh: 完整阳性是目标不安全 Loader 处理该标签并由 Python 父进程启动受控 marker-helper，输出与请求令牌一致。YAML 可解析、标签出现在异常、subprocess 模块已导入或安全 Loader 拒绝都不能证明执行。
analysis.en: A complete positive is the target unsafe Loader processing the tag and the Python parent launching the controlled marker-helper with output matching the request token. Parseable YAML, a tag in an exception, an imported subprocess module, or rejection by a safe Loader does not prove execution.

opsecTips.zh: 只允许签名 marker-helper 且限制为一次子进程；出现文件读取、网络连接或其他可执行文件立即停止
opsecTips.en: Allow only the signed marker-helper and one child process; stop immediately on a file read, network connection, or any other executable.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后删除帮助程序、YAML 样例和进程审计导出，销毁隔离虚拟环境并轮换令牌
opsecTips.en: After testing delete the helper, YAML sample, and process-audit export, destroy the isolated virtual environment, and rotate the token.

name.zh: Python Pickle Base64 生成器样例

description.zh: 五行共同组成生成器程序而非网络 Payload。原程序序列化 os.system('id')，不得直接运行；仅在隔离代码审阅中先把 reduce 返回值替换为无副作用标记函数，再生成测试字节。
description.en: All five lines form a generator program rather than a network payload. The original serializes os.system('id') and must not be run directly; in isolated code review, first replace the reduce return value with a side-effect-free marker callable before generating test bytes.

name.zh: PDF 外部 HTTPS 诱导链接

description.zh: 使用一个外部 HTTPS 锚点验证 HTML 转 PDF 流程是否把不受信链接保留为可点击 PDF 注释，以及查看器如何展示目标来源。
description.en: Uses one external HTTPS anchor to test whether an HTML-to-PDF flow preserves an untrusted link as a clickable PDF annotation and how the viewer displays its destination origin.

prerequisites.zh: 使用隔离 PDF 生成器和自有无内容 HTTPS 测试域，能够检查输出注释对象
prerequisites.en: An isolated PDF generator and controlled empty HTTPS test domain are used, and output annotation objects can be inspected.

prerequisites.zh: 测试查看器关闭自动导航，操作者可观察链接提示、显示文本与实际 URI
prerequisites.en: The test viewer has automatic navigation disabled, and the operator can observe link prompts, displayed text, and the actual URI.

title.zh: 外部 HTTPS 锚点

description.zh: 原域仅用于来源追溯；生成前替换为自有空白测试域，检查 PDF 链接目标与可见文本是否一致，不进行凭证采集。
description.en: The original domain is retained for source traceability only; replace it with a controlled blank test domain before generation, inspect whether the PDF destination matches visible text, and collect no credentials.

overview.zh: HTML 锚点通常被 PDF 转换器映射为链接注释。该行测试的是文档内容完整性、目标来源提示与用户交互，不会因为 PDF 被生成就自动访问外部站点。
overview.en: HTML anchors are commonly mapped to link annotations by PDF converters. This line tests document-content integrity, destination-origin signaling, and user interaction; generating the PDF does not automatically visit the external site.

vulnerability.zh: 若应用允许攻击者控制链接目标或用可信显示文本掩盖外部来源，接收者可能被诱导离开受信文档。风险依赖链接被保留、查看器展示不足和用户点击，不能分类为 SSRF。
vulnerability.en: If an application lets an attacker control the destination or conceal an external origin behind trusted display text, recipients may be lured out of a trusted document. Risk requires preservation, weak viewer signaling, and a user click and is not SSRF.

exploitation.zh: 先生成无链接 PDF 基线，再用自有域替换 href 并检查注释 URI、可见文本和点击确认。阳性是未经授权的外部目标被保留且查看器允许用户导航；生成器 DNS/HTTP 日志应保持为空。
exploitation.en: Generate a no-link PDF baseline, replace href with the controlled domain, and inspect annotation URI, visible text, and click confirmation. A positive preserves an unauthorized external destination and permits user navigation; generator DNS and HTTP logs should remain empty.

mitigation.zh: 服务端只允许批准 scheme/host，重写或移除外部链接并在文档中显示规范化目标；对用户生成 PDF 增加明显来源提示。回归同时验证站内链接可用、外部目标被阻断。
mitigation.en: Allow only approved schemes and hosts server-side, rewrite or remove external links, and display canonical destinations in the document; add clear provenance to user-generated PDFs. Regress valid internal links and blocked external targets.

title.zh: 建立无链接 PDF 基线

description.zh: 记录生成器版本、输入 HTML、输出注释数量和查看器安全设置。
description.en: Record generator version, input HTML, output annotation count, and viewer security settings.

title.zh: 替换为自有域并生成
title.en: Replace with a controlled domain and generate

description.zh: 保持锚点结构，只替换域名，生成一次并离线检查链接对象。
description.en: Preserve the anchor structure, replace only the domain, generate once, and inspect the link object offline.

title.zh: 确认客户端导航边界

description.zh: 在隔离查看器手动点击，记录提示与目标；确认生成服务器没有网络请求。
description.en: Click manually in an isolated viewer, record prompts and destination, and confirm the generation server made no network request.

title.zh: 清理文档与测试域
title.en: Clean the document and test domain

description.zh: 删除 PDF 和测试路由，应用链接策略后重放站内/外部对照。
description.en: Delete the PDF and test route and replay internal and external controls after applying link policy.

analysis.zh: 确认范围仅是 PDF 中保留了可点击外部链接并可能诱导用户。没有用户点击和查看器导航就没有访问；生成器未发起请求，因此不能将内含 URL 或注释对象误报为 SSRF。
analysis.en: The confirmed scope is limited to a clickable external link preserved in a PDF that may lure a user. Without a user click and viewer navigation there is no visit; because the generator makes no request, a URL or annotation object must not be reported as SSRF.

opsecTips.zh: 只使用自有空白域且禁止表单、Cookie、重定向和分析脚本；一次手动点击后停止
opsecTips.en: Use only a controlled blank domain with no forms, cookies, redirects, or analytics and stop after one manual click.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后删除输出 PDF、浏览历史和测试域访问日志中的唯一令牌
opsecTips.en: After testing delete the output PDF, browsing history, and unique tokens from test-domain access logs.

name.zh: PDF JavaScript URI 动作边界

description.zh: 使用 javascript: 锚点测试转换器是否把脚本 scheme 保留为 PDF URI/动作，以及隔离查看器是否执行简单提示。
description.en: Uses a javascript: anchor to test whether a converter preserves the script scheme as a PDF URI or action and whether an isolated viewer executes a simple alert.

prerequisites.zh: 输出 PDF 可离线检查动作字典，测试查看器运行在无网络、无本地文件权限的沙箱
prerequisites.en: Output action dictionaries can be inspected offline and the test viewer runs in a sandbox without network or local-file access.

prerequisites.zh: 只允许原始 app.alert 常量提示，不添加文档数据读取、提交或持久动作
prerequisites.en: Only the original constant app.alert prompt is allowed, with no document-data read, submission, or persistent action.

title.zh: JavaScript URI 锚点

description.zh: 生成后先离线检查 scheme/动作，再在隔离查看器手动激活一次；不得扩展脚本或在常用工作站打开。
description.en: Inspect the scheme or action offline after generation, then activate it once in an isolated viewer; do not extend the script or open it on a normal workstation.

overview.zh: HTML javascript: URI 与 PDF JavaScript 动作并非同一规范对象，转换器可能删除、保留为普通 URI 或映射为动作。该卡只验证转换和查看器执行边界。
overview.en: An HTML javascript: URI and a PDF JavaScript action are not the same standards object; a converter may remove it, preserve it as a URI, or map it to an action. This card tests only conversion and viewer execution boundaries.

vulnerability.zh: 若不可信 HTML 可生成主动 PDF 内容，查看器策略或用户信任可能允许脚本交互。常量 alert 成功只证明活动内容执行，不证明 Cookie、文件、网络访问或浏览器 XSS。
vulnerability.en: If untrusted HTML can create active PDF content, viewer policy or user trust may permit script interaction. A constant alert proves active-content execution only and does not prove cookie, file, network access, or browser XSS.

exploitation.zh: 比较无 href、https href 与 javascript href 三份 PDF 的动作对象；在无数据文档和沙箱查看器中点击一次。阳性要求动作被保留且显示预期常量提示；仅源码含 javascript 或查看器警告不是执行。
exploitation.en: Compare action objects in PDFs with no href, an HTTPS href, and the javascript href and click once in a sandbox viewer with an empty document. A positive preserves the action and displays the expected constant prompt; javascript text or a viewer warning alone is not execution.

mitigation.zh: 转换前拒绝非 http/https/站内 scheme，生成后清除 JavaScript、Launch、URI 等非批准动作，并采用默认禁用活动内容的查看器策略。
mitigation.en: Reject nonapproved schemes before conversion, remove JavaScript, Launch, URI, and other unapproved actions after generation, and use viewer policy that disables active content by default.

title.zh: 离线检查 PDF 动作基线
title.en: Inspect the PDF action baseline offline

description.zh: 生成空链接与普通链接对照并枚举输出动作，不执行任何内容。
description.en: Generate no-link and ordinary-link controls and enumerate output actions without execution.

title.zh: 生成单一常量动作

description.zh: 提交原锚点一次并保存输入、输出哈希与动作字典。
description.en: Submit the original anchor once and preserve input, output hash, and action dictionary.

title.zh: 在沙箱查看器激活

description.zh: 手动点击并只记录常量提示、查看器版本和策略，不授予额外权限。
description.en: Click manually and record only the constant prompt, viewer version, and policy without granting extra permissions.

title.zh: 删除主动动作并回归

description.zh: 应用 scheme/动作清理后重新生成，确认普通链接保留而脚本动作消失。
description.en: After scheme and action sanitization regenerate to preserve ordinary links while removing script actions.

analysis.zh: 最强证据是特定 PDF 查看器执行被转换后的常量动作。若转换器删除 scheme、只创建不可执行 URI、查看器拦截或仅弹警告，则不是脚本执行；结果也不能外推到其他查看器。
analysis.en: The strongest evidence is a specific PDF viewer executing the converted constant action. If the converter removes the scheme, creates only a nonexecuting URI, or the viewer blocks or merely warns, script execution is unproven and cannot be generalized to other viewers.

opsecTips.zh: 查看器断网并使用空白临时 Profile，只允许一次 app.alert，禁止访问文档字段或主机 API
opsecTips.en: Run the viewer offline with an empty temporary profile and allow one app.alert only, with no document-field or host-API access.

opsecTips.zh: 验证后销毁查看器 Profile、PDF、动作导出和截图中的测试标识
opsecTips.en: After validation destroy the viewer profile, PDF, action export, and test identifiers in screenshots.

name.zh: PDF 本地 File URI 链接

description.zh: 使用 file:///etc/passwd 锚点验证转换器是否保留本地文件 URI，以及 PDF 查看器在用户激活时的 scheme 与文件权限策略。
description.en: Uses a file:///etc/passwd anchor to test whether the converter preserves a local-file URI and how PDF viewer scheme and filesystem policy behave on user activation.

subCategory.zh: PDF 本地文件链接策略

prerequisites.zh: 原系统路径在验证前替换为沙箱内只含随机标记的文件
prerequisites.en: The original system path is replaced before validation with a sandbox file containing only a random marker.

prerequisites.zh: 查看器以无宿主文件权限身份运行，能够记录 URI 激活、提示与实际文件调用
prerequisites.en: The viewer runs without host-file privileges and can record URI activation, prompts, and actual file calls.

title.zh: File URI 锚点

description.zh: 保持原行用于追溯，实际生成时把路径改为沙箱 marker.txt；不访问 `/etc/passwd`。
description.en: Retain the original for traceability and replace the path with sandbox marker.txt during generation; do not access /etc/passwd.

overview.zh: 锚点 file URI 通常成为客户端 PDF 链接，而不是生成服务器立即读取文件。风险取决于查看器是否允许用户激活本地 scheme、是否提示，以及是否能显示或传递文件内容。
overview.en: An anchor file URI normally becomes a client-side PDF link rather than causing the generation server to read a file immediately. Risk depends on viewer activation policy, prompts, and whether file content can be displayed or passed onward.

vulnerability.zh: 若查看器对不可信文档放宽本地文件链接，用户点击可能暴露路径存在性或打开本地资源。仅保留 URI、出现安全提示或打开失败都不等于文件内容泄露。
vulnerability.en: If a viewer permits local-file links from untrusted documents, a user click may expose path existence or open a local resource. Preserving the URI, showing a security prompt, or failing to open it does not equal file-content disclosure.

exploitation.zh: 用沙箱 marker.txt 生成 PDF，先离线检查链接，再手动点击并关联查看器文件审计。阳性按层记录：链接保留、文件调用、标记内容可见；生成器侧无文件访问是预期。
exploitation.en: Generate the PDF with sandbox marker.txt, inspect the link offline, then click manually and correlate viewer file audit. Record levels separately: preserved link, file call, and visible marker content; no generator-side file access is expected.

mitigation.zh: 转换前拒绝 file scheme，生成后移除本地 URI 动作；查看器默认阻断不可信文档访问本地文件，并把业务附件通过受控对象 ID 提供。
mitigation.en: Reject the file scheme before conversion, remove local URI actions after generation, block untrusted-document local-file access in the viewer by default, and provide business attachments through controlled object identifiers.

title.zh: 准备沙箱标记文件

description.zh: 文件只含随机常量，路径位于临时挂载且文件审计开启。
description.en: The file contains only a random constant in a temporary mount with file auditing enabled.

title.zh: 替换路径并生成 PDF
title.en: Replace the path and generate the PDF

description.zh: 只改 href 路径，保存输出哈希并检查生成器没有文件读取。
description.en: Change only the href path, preserve the output hash, and verify the generator performed no file read.

title.zh: 在查看器分层验证

description.zh: 记录提示、文件调用和标记可见性，区分链接激活与内容泄露。
description.en: Record prompts, file calls, and marker visibility and distinguish link activation from content disclosure.

title.zh: 阻断 File URI 并清理
title.en: Block file URIs and clean up

description.zh: 修复后重放普通 HTTPS 与 file 对照，随后删除 PDF、标记文件和审计导出。
description.en: After remediation replay ordinary HTTPS and file controls, then delete the PDF, marker file, and audit export.

analysis.zh: 该条只能证明 PDF 客户端对本地 file URI 的处理。生成器无文件事件时不是服务端文件读取；查看器仅提示或尝试打开也不等于内容泄露，必须看到沙箱标记或等价审计证据。
analysis.en: This entry proves only client-side PDF handling of a local file URI. With no generator file event it is not a server-side read, and a viewer prompt or open attempt is not disclosure without the sandbox marker or equivalent audit evidence.

opsecTips.zh: 只指向临时标记文件并以无宿主挂载权限查看；首次文件调用后立即停止
opsecTips.en: Point only to the temporary marker and view without host-mount privileges; stop after the first file call.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后卸载沙箱目录、删除 PDF 和查看器最近文件记录
opsecTips.en: After testing unmount the sandbox directory and delete the PDF and viewer recent-file records.

name.zh: PDF 元数据地址 HTTP 链接

description.zh: 使用指向 169.254.169.254 的锚点验证 PDF 是否保留特殊地址链接及客户端点击策略，并明确它不是渲染器 SSRF。
description.en: Uses an anchor targeting 169.254.169.254 to test PDF preservation and client click policy for a special-address link while explicitly distinguishing it from renderer SSRF.

prerequisites.zh: 禁止访问真实 169.254.169.254，链接在生成前改为隔离链路本地模拟服务
prerequisites.en: Access to real 169.254.169.254 is prohibited and the link is changed before generation to an isolated link-local simulation service.

prerequisites.zh: 生成器和查看器网络分别可观测，可区分服务端自动请求与客户端手动点击
prerequisites.en: Generator and viewer networks are observed separately so server-side automatic requests can be distinguished from a client-side manual click.

title.zh: 元数据 HTTP 锚点

description.zh: 实际测试替换为隔离模拟地址，只检查 PDF 注释和手动导航；绝不请求云元数据。
description.en: Replace the destination with an isolated simulator during testing and inspect only the PDF annotation and manual navigation; never request cloud metadata.

overview.zh: HTML 链接目标通常不会在 PDF 生成时被抓取，而是作为可点击注释保留。特殊地址使链接具有高风险外观，但实际请求源必须通过网络日志判定。
overview.en: An HTML link destination is normally preserved as a clickable annotation rather than fetched during PDF generation. A special address makes the link look high risk, but network logs must identify the actual request source.

vulnerability.zh: 不可信 PDF 若能引导用户访问客户端可达的链路本地服务，可能触发本地交互；这依赖点击和客户端网络。只有生成服务自动请求该目标时才属于 SSRF，而本卡不假设该行为。
vulnerability.en: An untrusted PDF may guide a user to a link-local service reachable by the client, but this requires a click and client network access. It becomes SSRF only if the generation service automatically requests the destination, which this card does not assume.

exploitation.zh: 生成时监控服务器网络并确认无请求，再在隔离查看器点击改写后的模拟链接，记录客户端来源和单一标记响应。若生成阶段出现请求，应转入独立渲染器 SSRF 评估。
exploitation.en: Monitor generator networking and confirm no request, then click the rewritten simulator link in an isolated viewer and record client source and one marker response. If a generation-time request occurs, move it to a separate renderer-SSRF assessment.

mitigation.zh: 移除或重写指向回环、链路本地、私网和保留地址的 PDF 链接，查看器对特殊地址显示阻断提示；对确需链接的业务使用批准域映射。
mitigation.en: Remove or rewrite PDF links to loopback, link-local, private, and reserved addresses, have viewers block or warn on special destinations, and map legitimate business links to approved domains.

title.zh: 分离生成器与查看器网络

description.zh: 为两个组件设置独立日志和出口，部署只返回随机标记的模拟端点。
description.en: Configure separate logs and egress for both components and deploy a simulator returning only a random marker.

title.zh: 改写地址并生成文档
title.en: Rewrite the address and generate the document

description.zh: 替换真实元数据地址，生成一次并检查注释及服务器零请求基线。
description.en: Replace the real metadata address, generate once, and inspect the annotation and server zero-request baseline.

title.zh: 手动点击并确认客户端来源
title.en: Click manually and confirm client origin

description.zh: 只允许一次查看器请求，匹配标记、来源和时间，禁止重定向。
description.en: Allow one viewer request only and match marker, source, and time with redirects disabled.

title.zh: 应用特殊地址策略

description.zh: 修复后生成并点击对照，确认普通批准域可用而模拟链路本地地址被阻断。
description.en: After remediation generate and click controls to preserve approved domains while blocking the simulated link-local destination.

analysis.zh: 网络来源决定结论：只有 PDF 查看器点击产生请求时，这是客户端链接行为；生成服务器自动抓取才是 SSRF。链接中出现 169.254.169.254、查看器预览 URL 或无响应均不能单独证明任何一类访问。
analysis.en: Request origin determines the conclusion: a request produced only by a viewer click is client-link behavior, while automatic generation-server retrieval is SSRF. The literal 169.254.169.254, a URL preview, or no response proves neither access class by itself.

opsecTips.zh: 绝不连接真实云元数据；模拟端点无凭证、无重定向且单次响应后关闭
opsecTips.en: Never connect to real cloud metadata; the simulator has no credentials or redirects and closes after one response.

opsecTips.zh: 验证后删除 PDF、模拟端点、查看器缓存和网络日志中的令牌
opsecTips.en: After validation delete the PDF, simulator, viewer cache, and tokens from network logs.

name.zh: Puppeteer HTTP 资源读取边界

description.zh: 归并 fetch 与同步 XMLHttpRequest 的回环及元数据地址变体，验证无头 Chromium 是否代表渲染服务请求 HTTP 资源并把响应交给页面脚本。
description.en: Groups fetch and synchronous XMLHttpRequest variants for loopback and metadata addresses to test whether headless Chromium requests HTTP resources on behalf of the renderer and exposes responses to page script.

subCategory.zh: 无头浏览器 HTTP 资源访问

prerequisites.zh: 真实回环和云元数据地址在提交前改写为两个隔离的固定标记端点
prerequisites.en: Real loopback and cloud-metadata addresses are rewritten before submission to two isolated fixed-marker endpoints.

prerequisites.zh: 能够同时记录渲染请求、Chromium 网络事件和页面 title 结果，并禁用重定向与外部出口
prerequisites.en: Renderer requests, Chromium network events, and the resulting page title can be recorded while redirects and external egress are disabled.

title.zh: HTTP Fetch 与 XHR 变体

description.zh: 保留原行用于来源追踪；实际测试必须把两个地址替换为隔离标记端点，并将响应限制为短随机常量。
description.en: The original lines are retained for provenance; replace both addresses with isolated marker endpoints during testing and limit responses to short random constants.

overview.zh: Puppeteer 驱动的 Chromium 会在页面上下文执行 fetch 或 XHR。若渲染器网络可达内部服务，页面脚本可能读取响应并通过 title 等输出通道交回调用方。
overview.en: Puppeteer-driven Chromium executes fetch or XHR in page context. If renderer networking reaches internal services, page script may read the response and return it through an output channel such as the title.

vulnerability.zh: 问题同时需要不可信脚本执行、目标地址可达和响应可读。只观察 DNS、连接尝试、CORS 错误或 title 中的输入回显，不足以证明内部响应泄露。
vulnerability.en: The issue requires untrusted script execution, destination reachability, and a readable response. DNS, a connection attempt, a CORS error, or reflected input in the title does not prove disclosure of an internal response.

exploitation.zh: 先用禁止网络的普通页面建立基线，再分别提交 fetch 与 XHR 到带不同令牌的模拟端点。阳性要求渲染请求、Chromium 请求、模拟响应和 title 中相同令牌完整关联。
exploitation.en: Establish a network-disabled ordinary-page baseline, then submit fetch and XHR separately to simulators with distinct tokens. A positive correlates the render request, Chromium request, simulator response, and the same token in the title.

mitigation.zh: 在解析后和每次跳转前执行地址策略，阻断回环、链路本地、私网及保留网段；禁用不需要的脚本，并让渲染进程运行在无内部路由的独立网络。
mitigation.en: Apply destination policy after resolution and before every redirect, blocking loopback, link-local, private, and reserved ranges; disable unnecessary script and run the renderer on a network without internal routes.

title.zh: 隔离网络并建立基线
title.en: Isolate networking and establish a baseline

description.zh: 确认普通页面不产生出站请求，并为两个模拟目标配置独立令牌。
description.en: Confirm an ordinary page makes no outbound request and assign separate tokens to the two simulators.

title.zh: 改写目标后逐条渲染

description.zh: 每次只测试一个 API 和一个模拟目标，保存页面与网络跟踪。
description.en: Test one API and one simulated destination at a time and preserve page and network traces.

title.zh: 关联响应读取证据

description.zh: 匹配请求令牌、响应体和 title，区分可达性与内容读取。
description.en: Match request token, response body, and title and distinguish reachability from content read.

title.zh: 收紧出口并回归

description.zh: 修复后确认批准公网目标仍可用，而模拟内部目标在发包前被拒绝。
description.en: After remediation preserve approved public targets while rejecting simulated internal destinations before a packet is sent.

analysis.zh: 只有应用发起的 Chromium 请求取得模拟响应，且页面输出出现同一随机标记，才证明 HTTP 响应可读 SSRF。连接失败、CORS 拒绝或空 title 只能说明某一环节被阻断。
analysis.en: Readable-response SSRF is proven only when the application-origin Chromium request receives the simulated response and the same random marker appears in page output. A failed connection, CORS rejection, or empty title shows a blocked stage only.

opsecTips.zh: 模拟端点只返回短随机标记，禁止凭证、实例数据、重定向和二次资源
opsecTips.en: Simulator endpoints return only short random markers, with no credentials, instance data, redirects, or secondary resources.

opsecTips.zh: 每个变体只渲染一次并设置短超时，完成后销毁浏览器 Profile、网络日志和标记
opsecTips.en: Render each variant once with a short timeout, then destroy the browser profile, network logs, and tokens.

name.zh: Puppeteer 本地 File URI 读取边界

description.zh: 归并 fetch 与同步 XMLHttpRequest 的 file URI 变体，验证无头 Chromium 的页面来源和启动策略是否允许读取渲染主机文件。
description.en: Groups fetch and synchronous XMLHttpRequest file-URI variants to test whether headless Chromium page origin and launch policy permit reads from renderer-host files.

subCategory.zh: 无头浏览器本地文件读取

prerequisites.zh: 原 `/etc/passwd` 路径在执行前替换为渲染沙箱内只含随机标记的临时文件
prerequisites.en: The original /etc/passwd path is replaced before execution with a temporary marker-only file inside the rendering sandbox.

prerequisites.zh: Chromium 使用临时 Profile 和最小文件权限，文件审计可区分 URI 解析、打开与内容读取
prerequisites.en: Chromium uses a temporary profile and minimal file permissions, with file audit distinguishing URI parsing, open, and content read.

title.zh: File Fetch 与 XHR 变体

description.zh: 实际验证仅指向临时 marker 文件；保留原命令用于追溯，不读取系统账户文件。
description.en: During validation point only to the temporary marker file; the original command remains for provenance and the system account file is not read.

overview.zh: file URI 是否可由 fetch/XHR 读取取决于文档来源、Chromium 安全策略、启动参数和沙箱文件权限。两条原行是同一边界的 API 变体。
overview.en: Whether fetch or XHR can read a file URI depends on document origin, Chromium security policy, launch flags, and sandbox filesystem permissions. The two source lines are API variants of one boundary.

vulnerability.zh: 若攻击者控制渲染页面脚本且浏览器可读取宿主文件，内容可能进入 title 或其他返回通道。错误中出现路径、请求被创建或文件存在性信号均不等于读取内容。
vulnerability.en: If an attacker controls renderer-page script and the browser can read host files, content may enter the title or another return channel. A path in an error, creation of a request, or a file-existence signal does not equal a content read.

exploitation.zh: 分别用不存在文件和随机 marker 文件执行两种 API，对照文件审计与 title。阳性要求浏览器进程实际读取 marker 文件，且同一随机值出现在返回结果。
exploitation.en: Run both APIs against a missing file and a random marker file and compare file audit with the title. A positive requires the browser process to read the marker file and the same random value to appear in returned output.

mitigation.zh: 禁用本地文件访问启动选项，把渲染器放入只含工作目录的只读沙箱，并在输入规范化后拒绝 file scheme；避免把任意页面输出直接返回。
mitigation.en: Disable local-file access launch options, place the renderer in a read-only sandbox containing only its work directory, reject the file scheme after normalization, and avoid returning arbitrary page output.

title.zh: 创建无敏感标记文件

description.zh: 在临时挂载写入一次性随机值并开启浏览器进程文件审计。
description.en: Write a one-time random value in a temporary mount and enable file auditing for the browser process.

title.zh: 改写路径并测试 API
title.en: Rewrite the path and test the APIs

description.zh: 逐一运行 fetch 与 XHR，对每次渲染使用新 Profile。
description.en: Run fetch and XHR one at a time using a fresh profile for every render.

title.zh: 验证文件内容链路

description.zh: 关联文件打开、读取字节和 title 标记，排除仅路径解析。
description.en: Correlate file open, bytes read, and title marker and exclude path parsing alone.

title.zh: 撤销文件权限并回归

description.zh: 修复后确认 marker 在打开前被拒绝且普通内联页面仍可渲染。
description.en: After remediation confirm marker access is rejected before open while ordinary inline pages still render.

analysis.zh: 浏览器文件读取审计和返回通道中的同一标记共同构成阳性。file URI 出现在 DOM、控制台错误或请求对象中只证明输入被解析，不能证明宿主文件泄露。
analysis.en: Browser file-read audit plus the same marker in the return channel constitutes a positive. A file URI in the DOM, console error, or request object proves parsing only, not host-file disclosure.

opsecTips.zh: 绝不指向系统文件、密钥或宿主挂载，只使用自动销毁的单行 marker 文件
opsecTips.en: Never target system files, keys, or host mounts; use only an automatically destroyed one-line marker file.

opsecTips.zh: 测试进程无管理员权限、无网络并设置文件读取配额，首次成功读取后立即停止
opsecTips.en: Run without administrator rights or networking, enforce a file-read quota, and stop after the first successful read.

name.zh: Puppeteer 页面 Cookie 出站通道

description.zh: 归并 sendBeacon、顶层导航和 Image 三种出站方式，验证无头浏览器执行不可信脚本时非 HttpOnly 测试 Cookie 是否可离开页面。
description.en: Groups sendBeacon, top-level navigation, and Image egress methods to test whether a non-HttpOnly test cookie can leave the page when a headless browser executes untrusted script.

prerequisites.zh: ATTACKER 改为隔离的单次请求捕获器，页面只设置无权限随机测试 Cookie
prerequisites.en: ATTACKER is replaced with an isolated single-request collector and the page sets only a random unprivileged test cookie.

prerequisites.zh: 同时准备 HttpOnly 对照 Cookie，并能记录浏览器请求方法、目标和来源渲染任务
prerequisites.en: An HttpOnly control cookie is prepared and browser request method, destination, and originating render job can be recorded.

title.zh: Beacon、导航与图片出站

description.zh: 实际测试把 ATTACKER 替换为隔离捕获器，且 document.cookie 只能包含随机测试值；三行逐一执行。
description.en: Replace ATTACKER with the isolated collector and ensure document.cookie contains only random test data; execute the three lines separately.

overview.zh: 三种 DOM API 都可产生浏览器侧请求，但传输位置和导航副作用不同。它们属于脚本执行后的数据出站，不是服务端根据 URL 抓取资源的 SSRF。
